C:
◆ 简介 ◆
维修科的某位科员是你的「迷弟」，他利用忆泡复现出了自己童年时最爱的游戏。他特地托人邀请你前去游玩，还为你贴心地准备好了「辅助功能」，实在是盛情难却……

◆ 活动规则 ◆
● 本次活动中，6个战斗关卡将逐天解锁。
● 战斗内需要在6个轮次内，击败3个波次的首领，非首领敌人将不断刷新。
● 通关时如有剩余轮次可获得更高评级。
● 我方角色消灭敌方目标时恢复的能量，为常规战斗的<unbreak>50%</unbreak>。
● 开拓者可以选择试用角色参与挑战。
● 当开拓者提升「均衡等级」时，敌方强度将同步提升。

◆玩法概述◆
● 每个关卡具有一种「战意机制」，触发后可快速积累「战意值」，提升「战意阶段」，获取更多增益。
● 进入「战意阶段4：力量觉醒」后，获得强大的关卡增益击败敌人！

◆ 战意值 ◆
● 战斗中每次触发「战意机制」，可积累大量「战意值」。
● 每次角色行动，可积累少量「战意值」。
● 「战意值」达到目标后，可提升「战意阶段」。
●  每个关卡提升「战意阶段」需要积累的「战意值」不同，可在关卡内查阅。

◆ 战意阶段 ◆
● 「战意阶段」共分为4个阶段，每达到1个阶段可额外激活1个「辅助功能」，获得更多的关卡增益。
●  进入「战意阶段4：力量觉醒」可获得强大增益。该阶段生效的「辅助功能」为本关的核心增益，默认添加无法选择。
●  每个关卡「战意阶段2」、「战意阶段3」生效的「辅助功能」需要在进入战斗前选择添加。
●  「战意阶段4：力量觉醒」将在一定行动值内结束，结束后将返回「战意阶段3」。
● 「战意阶段4：力量觉醒」期间每次攻击敌人可积累「觉醒攻击」，根据积累的「觉醒攻击」次数，将在阶段结束返回「战意阶段3」时，返还一定的「战意值」，可更快重新进入「战意阶段4：力量觉醒」。

◆ 活动奖励 ◆
● 活动期间，在关卡内将「战意阶段」提升至指定阶段、击败关卡首领，可在「限时奖励」中领取关卡奖励。
● 挑战全部关卡并击败全部关卡第1波次首领，可领取谢礼。
E:
◆ Introduction ◆
A researcher from the Maintenance Department is apparently your "fanboy." He used Memory Bubbles to recreate his favorite childhood game. He specifically asked someone to invite you to play it, even preparing a "Support Function" for you. This really is too kind to refuse...

◆ Event Rules ◆
● In this event, 6 combat stages will be unlocked one by one.
● In combat, you must defeat 3 waves of Boss Enemies within 6 Cycles. Non-boss enemies will also constantly appear.
● A higher rating can be achieved if there are Cycles remaining when a stage is cleared.
● When an ally defeats an enemy, the Energy regenerated is only <unbreak>50%</unbreak> of what would be generated in regular combat.
● Trailblazers can select trial characters to take part in the challenge.
When the Trailblazer increases their Equilibrium Level, enemies will correspondingly increase in strength.

◆ Gameplay Overview ◆
● Each stage has its own Grit Mechanics. Trigger it to quickly accumulate and increase Grit Value, elevate your Grit Phase, and obtain more buffs.
● After entering "Grit Phase 4: Power Awoken," you will obtain powerful Stage Buffs to defeat enemies!

◆ Grit Value ◆
● Grit Value is accumulated each time Grit Mechanics are triggered during battle.
● Characters can accumulate a small amount of Grit Value each time they take action.
● Once your Grit Value reaches the target value, you can elevate your Grit Phase.
● The amount of Grit Value required to elevate your Grit Phase in each stage is different. You can check it in the stage.

◆ Grit Phase ◆
● There are 4 Grit Phases. Every time you reach the next phase, you can activate an additional Support Function to obtain more Stage Buffs.
● Enter "Grit Phase 4: Power Awoken" to gain powerful buffs. The Support Function active in this phase is the core buff for this stage and is added by default and cannot be selected.
● For each stage, the Support Functions in Grit Phase 2 and Grit Phase 3 need to be selected before entering battle.
● "Grit Phase 4: Power Awoken" will end within a certain amount of action value. And when it ends, combat will return to Grit Phase 3.
● During "Grit Phase 4: Power Awoken," each attack against an enemy accumulates Waken Attacks. Based on the number of Waken Attacks accumulated, a certain amount of Grit Value will be returned when you return to Grit Phase 3, helping you to quickly re-enter "Grit Phase 4: Power Awoken".

◆ Event Rewards ◆
● During the event, elevate Grit Phase to the target level in the stage and defeat the stage boss to claim stage rewards from "Limited-Time Rewards."
● Challenge all stages and defeat the first wave's boss enemy in all stages to claim the offering.

C:
◆ 简 介◆
差分宇宙重磅更新！不仅有全新的祝福、方程、加权奇物、和随机事件，还新增了「金血祝颂」。

◆ 玩法目标 ◆
● 通关「常规演算」与「周期演算」获取拟合值来提升拟合等级，提升拟合等级可获得奖励。

◆ 玩法奖励 ◆
● 收集「差分宇宙」的祝福、方程、事件、奇物、加权奇物、金血祝颂可获得收集奖励。
● 首次在「常规演算」中通关各个难度，可获得挑战奖励。
● 每期首次通关「周期演算」可获得额外奖励。
● 通过完成指定「稳态数组」的目标，可获得对应奖励。

◆ 常规演算 ◆
● 通关「常规演算」可以解锁新的难度，首次通关新的难度可以获得额外奖励。
● 通关第五难度后，将解锁「星阶模式」。

◆ 周期演算 ◆
● 「周期演算」中每期都会更新特殊的玩法内容，每期首次通关都能获得额外奖励。
● 通关「周期演算」可以获得额外的拟合值奖励，每期有一定上限。达到上限后通关「周期演算」仍然可以获得拟合值。
● 「周期演算」中可以选择在「常规演算」中解锁的难度与阈值协议。
● 「周期演算」每两周更新，更新时间为当周周一<unbreak>04</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak>（服务器时间）。

◆ 星阶模式 ◆
● 「星阶模式」中，玩家可以挑战「阈值协议」，「阈值协议」中难度将大幅提高。
● 「星阶模式」包含「拓星模式」和「练习模式」。
● 「拓星模式」中，可以点亮智瞳，提升星阶。星阶越高，「拓星模式」的「阈值协议」等级也越高。
● 「拓星模式」中，星阶无法降低。同一星阶内，智瞳的数量可能会增减。部分星阶中存在保级机制。
● 「练习模式」中，可以自由选择「阈值协议」等级，最多不超过当前星阶对应的「阈值协议」等级。
● 「练习模式」不会影响星阶和智瞳。

◆ 数值映射 ◆
● 在「差分宇宙」中，角色的等级，光锥等级，行迹与遗器会在满足条件的情况下得到强化。该强化仅在「差分宇宙」中生效。
● 当角色等级低于当前均衡等级的角色等级上限时，会被提升至当前均衡等级的角色等级上限。
● 当角色已解锁的行迹未激活，或行迹等级低于当前均衡等级要求时，会被激活行迹或提升至当前均衡等级适配的行迹等级。
● 当角色装备的遗器总强化等级低于当前均衡等级要求时，遗器会被替换为适配当前均衡等级的临时遗器。

◆ 拟合等级奖励扩展 ◆
●「差分宇宙」的拟合等级会定期进行扩展并提供新的奖励。
● 在拟合等级扩展前若拟合等级达到上限，将无法在「差分宇宙」中获取拟合值。

◆ 模拟宇宙积分 ◆
● 通关「周期演算」与「常规演算」同样可以获得模拟宇宙积分。
E:
◆ Overview ◆
Huge Divergent Universe update! Not only are there new Blessings, Equations, Weighted Curios, and random Occurrences, but also new Golden Blood's Boons.

◆ Gameplay Goal ◆
● Clear Ordinary Extrapolation and Cyclical Extrapolation to obtain Synchronicity Points and raise the Synchronicity Level to obtain rewards.

◆ Gameplay Rewards ◆
● Collect Blessings, Equations, Occurrences, Curios, Weighted Curios, and Golden Blood's Boons in the Divergent Universe to obtain collection rewards.
● Clear the various Ordinary Extrapolation difficulties for the first time to obtain challenge rewards.
● First-time clearances of Cyclical Extrapolation each period yield bonus rewards.
● Complete specific Stable Computing Array objectives to obtain the corresponding rewards.

◆ Ordinary Extrapolation ◆
● Pass Ordinary Extrapolation to unlock new difficulties. First-time clearance of a new difficulty grants you bonus rewards.
● After passing the fifth difficulty, the Astronomical Division mode will be unlocked.

◆ Cyclical Extrapolation ◆
● Special gameplay content is updated in Cyclical Extrapolation every period. First-time clearances every period yield bonus rewards.
● Clear Extrapolation to earn bonus Synchronicity Points, of which there is a limit every period. When that limit is reached, clearing Extrapolation still yields Synchronicity Points.
● In Cyclical Extrapolation, Trailblazers can choose the difficulties and Threshold Protocols that were unlocked in Ordinary Extrapolation.
● Cyclical Extrapolation will be updated every two weeks on Monday at <unbreak>04</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak> (Server time).

◆ Astronomical Division Mode ◆
● In Astronomical Division Mode, players can challenge Threshold Protocols. The difficulty of the game will be greatly increased while challenging Threshold Protocols.
● Astronomical Division Mode includes Star-Pioneer Mode and Practice Mode.
● In Star-Pioneer Mode, you can light Cognoculi to increase your Astronomical Division. The higher your Astronomical Division, the higher the Threshold Protocol in Star-Pioneer Mode will be.
● Astronomical Division cannot be lowered in Star-Pioneer Mode. Your number of Cognoculi may increase or decrease in the same Astronomical Division. Some Astronomical Divisions contain rank-retaining mechanisms.
● In Practice Mode, you can freely choose Threshold Protocol levels, up to the max level corresponding to your current Astronomical Division.
● Practice Mode will not affect your Astronomical Division or Cognoculi.

◆ Arithmetic Mapping ◆
● In the Divergent Universe, character levels, Light Cone levels, Traces, and Relics will be enhanced when the conditions are fulfilled. These enhancements are only effective in the Divergent Universe.
● When a character's level is below the level cap set by the current Equilibrium Level, it will be increased to that level cap.
● When a character's unlocked Traces are inactive, or if their Trace Level is lower than that required by the current Equilibrium Level, their Traces will be activated or their Trace Level will be increased to a level suitable for the current Equilibrium Level.
● When a character's equipped Relics' total Enhancement Level is lower than that required by the current Equilibrium Level, their Relics will be replaced with temporary Relics that are compatible with the current Equilibrium Level.

◆ Synchronicity Level Reward Extension ◆
●The Divergent Universe's Synchronicity Level will be regularly extended to provide new rewards.
● If the Trailblazer's Synchronicity Level reaches the maximum before the Synchronicity Level is extended, they will not be able to obtain Synchronicity Points in the Divergent Universe.

◆ Simulated Universe Points ◆
● Clear Cyclical Extrapolation and Ordinary Extrapolation to obtain Simulated Universe Points.

C: 芮克先生向你们揭示了自己忆者的身份与感染模因病毒窘境，并提出了一个破局方法：乱破含有忍者模因病毒的记忆可以毒攻毒。为了提炼这份解药，你通过钟表把戏了解了乱破的过去——一位在返祖实验中诞生的超级实验品，她口中传授自己忍术的「苦茶大师」实为一位良心发现的研究员，为了亲如骨肉的乱破，不惜代价背叛了原始博士…这也是她踏上巡猎之路的原因。
E: Mr. Reca reveals his identity as a Memokeeper and his dilemma with the memetic virus. He proposes a solution: Rappa's memories, infused with the ninja memetic virus, can neutralize the existing virus. To extract the antidote, you delve into Rappa's past using Clockwork — She is in fact a super experimental subject created by an atavistic experiment. The person she refers to as Master Kucha, supposedly her ninjutsu mentor, was a scientist who was stung by conscience and turned against Dr. Primitive at tremendous cost, all to protect Rappa, whom he sees as his daughter.... This is what motivated her to join the way of The Hunt.

C: 你搜集完《冒险鼹鼠队》的新书章节，并顺利完成出版。\n至此，贝洛伯格的小读者们都会感谢你的。
E: You have collected the new chapters of The Adventurous Moles and published them.\nAll the young readers in Belobog will be grateful to you.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n你成功协助展品修复员鲍里斯修好了自动机兵操作终端，进一步丰富了博物馆的库存。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nYou have helped Exhibit Restorer Boris restore the automaton control terminal, adding another valuable piece to the museum's collection.

C: 在司辰宫里的商业区开发竞标已经结束了，迄今为止的一切努力是否有结果，就等司辰宫方面的消息了。\n从小习武从军的素裳可能也没想到自己有一天能站在谈判席上，找她再聊聊吧。
E: The open bidding in the Palace of Astrum for the Commercial District has concluded. As for whether all your hard work thus far will pay dividends, that needs to wait until the Palace of Astrum makes its formal announcements.\nThe ever-martial Sushang probably never expected that she would end up as a negotiator one day. Find her and speak with her.

C: 「罗浮杂俎」上无奇不有，比如「亡妻离世多年归来」的传说。\n十妖在林，不如一妖在手。岁阳唯一该去的地方，就是绥园中的镇妖塔。
E: The Ghostly Grove offers a myriad of uncanny stories, including rumors about the uncanny return of a deceased woman.\nThe only good heliobus is a captured heliobus. The only place they should go is the Suppression Tower in Fyxestroll Garden.

C: 本幕所有事件卡<color=#f29e38ff>惊险</color>获取量×#2
E: In this act, <color=#f29e38ff>Thriller</color> obtained from Event Card ×#2

C: 蜥蜴村长觉得村子不该麻烦外人，拒绝了钟表小子的请求。但村民们集体进谏村长，无奈的老蜥蜴只能把武器交给了钟表小子。
E: Chief Lizard feels that the village should not trouble outsiders, and rejects Clockie's request. But the villagers petition the chief, and all the poor old lizard can do is hand over his weapons to Clockie.

C: 一言不发的哈努兄弟找来了草药，治疗了公主的伤势。不要问为什么草药能修好镜子。
E: Without saying a word, Brother Hanu finds some herbal medicine and manages to heal the princess' injuries. Just don't ask how herbal medicine can repair a mirror.

C: 哈努兄弟和石头老板达成合作，开展了小规模的宝石开采工程。\n「哈努兄弟，你六我四，你说话我干事。」
E: Brother Hanu and Boss Stone partner up to develop a small-scale gem extraction project.\n"Brother Hanu, let's split things sixty-forty. Just say the word and I'll get to work."

C: 哈努兄弟有所警惕，只让石头老板开设了一个小工厂，但小镇的秩序确实因此变好了。\n「只要给他们的时间标好价，他们就不会浪费时间。」
E: Brother Hanu remains guarded and only lets Boss Stone set up a small factory. However, order in the small town did improve as a result.\n"So long as they put a good price on their time, then they won't waste our time."

C: 哈努兄弟在与石头老板的战争中节节败退。\n「输完石头老板，再输吃吃经理，再往下没得输了！」
E: Brother Hanu suffered back-to-back losses in the battle against Boss Stone.\n"Losing to Boss Stone, THEN losing to Lieutenant Chitters... There's nothing left to lose after that!"

C: 钟表小子没有拿走小叶子的钱，他知道，这些钱以后能让美梦小镇变得更好。\n「滴答，勤俭节约，钟表有责！」
E: Clockie doesn't take Leafy's money. He knows that this money is going to make a better Dreamville in the future.\n"Tick-tock, be thrifty and hardworking. Every watch plays its part!"

C: 钟表小子从镜子中看到了一个秘密——美梦小镇的疆土远比他们想象的要宽阔，如果能征服荒漠与森林，那这里可能会成为比大陆还大的小镇……
E: Clockie is able to learn a secret from the mirror — Dreamville's territory is far vaster than ever imagined. If they're able to conquer the deserts and the jungles, then the town could grow bigger than the whole of the mainland...

C: 但钟表小子仍抱有警惕：石头老板真的如此好心吗？
E: But Clockie is still very cautious: Could Boss Stone really be that kind?

C: 铲子兄弟们在去往小镇的路上遭遇风暴折损了一半，然后被小镇外游荡的怪物消灭了另一半。\n「这儿确实是天堂，我的弟兄们都上天堂了。」
E: His shovel buddies are reduced by half when they meet with a storm on their way to town and are completely wiped out by monsters wandering outside the town.\n"This place is indeed a heaven. Now all my buddies have gone up to heaven."

C: 罗盘号没有收到钟表小子的消息，他们正在汹涌海浪中冒险，信件全部被海浪卷走了……「滴答，大海上没信号吗！？」
E: Clockie's letter did not reach The Compass. The crew was busy navigating the rough sea, and all letters were swept away by the waves...\n"Tick-tock, is there no signal on the ocean!?"

C: 叶子店长和汽水先生岔开话题，跟钟表小子提出了许多商业合作方案，但这些方案只会让美梦小镇更加堕落……\n「滴答，这种概率的黄金扭蛋机会让人破产的！」
E: Shopkeeper Leaf and Mr. Soda changed the subject of the conversation, presenting various business collaboration proposals to Clockie. However, those ideas would only exacerbate Dreamville's decline...\n"Tick-tock, the winning odds of this Golden Capsule Machine will bankrupt the people!"

C: 钟表小子藏身在舞会之上，向好奇的来客发出邀请，在共舞之余说出一些美梦小镇的秘密，传言从舞会传到整个美梦小镇……\n「滴答，你知道吗，钟表小子在美梦小镇藏了一份宝藏……」
E: Clockie hides at the ball and invites curious guests to dance. While dancing, he reveals some secrets about Dreamville to them, and rumors start spreading like wildfire from the ball to the entire Dreamville...\n"Tick-tock, do you know that Clockie has hidden a treasure in Dreamville..."

C: 钟表小子默许了木头老爷的做法，因为他也找不到更好的方式拯救小镇……\n「滴答，但我会找到的…到时候，我就来阻止他！」
E: Clockie reluctantly consents to Old Man Wood's action because he can't come up with a better way to rescue the town...\n"Tick-tock, I'll surely figure out something... When that time comes, I'll stop him!"

C: 钟表小子跟木头老爷表达了自己的想法，两人再次成为了伙伴，一起让美梦小镇成为乐园！
E: After Clockie shared his views with Old Man Wood, the two became partners once again. They would strive to turn Dreamville into a paradise together!

C: 罗盘号造访了镜子王国，这里的镜子们并不欢迎外人。船员们被拦在王城之外，束手无策，只能让钟表小子想想办法……
E: The Compass visits the Mirror Kingdom, which does not welcome outsiders. The crew is stopped outside the palace, and they are helpless with no choice but for Clockie to help them come up with a way out...

C: 工厂的收入越来越高，石头老板决定给大伙涨薪。但出于对小镇财务状况的考量，他也建议哈努兄弟顺势加税。
E: The factory starts taking in more and more income, and Boss Stone decides to give everyone a raise. However, when sizing up the overall financial situation of the town, he also suggests that Brother Hanu raise taxes together.

C: 冒险小队越走越深，意外遇到了可怕的老苍蝇！在逃跑的途中，他们遇到了一个分岔路口——第一个洞中传来振翅的声音，第二个洞中传来悦耳的虫鸣……
E: The adventure squad goes deeper and deeper before accidentally running into scary Old Buzzflies! As they try to escape, they come across a fork in the road: In the first corridor, they can hear the sound of wings flapping. While in the second corridor, they can hear the delightful sound of insects chirping...

C: 看到牛仔们不再捣乱，木头老爷暂时默许了他们的存在，但他依然希望夺回小镇的领土。
E: Seeing that the cowboys are no longer causing trouble, Old Man Wood temporarily accepts their existence, but he still hopes to reclaim the town's territory.

C: 美梦小镇里有人爱而不得，钟表小子问：「滴答，木头老爷，该怎么办呢？」
E: Someone's love is not reciprocated in Dreamville. "Tick-tock, what should we do, Old Man Wood?" Clockie asks.

C: 滴答！我是钟表小子，「罗盘号」上最厉害的船员！
E: Tick-tock! I'm Clockie, the most awesome crew member on The Compass!

C: 滴答…镇民们好像比之前要开心，难道石头老板真的是正确的？
E: Tick-tock... The townsfolk look happier than before. Could Boss Stone really be right?

E: "The one who feeds the crocodile will eventually be eaten by it."

C: <color=#42a8b9>#十万订阅特辑##提问收集#</color>祝贺我们一起达成十万订阅的成就！真的很感谢大家对我一路支持，为了感谢大家，我准备制作一期视频来回答大家的问题。家人们有什么想问我的吗？关于我的直播、我的生活、最近的捉鬼小队或者任何其他问题，尽管问吧！活动期间我会挑选一些有意思的问题来回答，敬请期待！
E: Congrats for us all reaching <unbreak>100</unbreak>k subscribers! I can't thank you enough for your support throughout all this time. To show my gratitude, I'm gonna make a vid to answer all of your questions. Is there anything you wanna ask me? You can ask about my stream, IRL stuff, how the ghost-hunting squad is doing these days, or anything else! I'll pick some interesting questions to answer while the event is on. Keep your eyes on this space! <color=#42a8b9>#100kSubSpecial #Q&ACollection</color>

C: <color=#42a8b9>#捉鬼小队##相信科学#</color>住房者身患重病？上班途中莫名受伤？是自己运气不好，还是房子凶气重？都不是！据地衡司介绍，该情况为老小区通病，低租金、低房价导致了人群复杂，难免会到安全事件发生。小桂子调查后发现有人刻意制造「闹鬼现象」，就是为了降低房价，真是一个坏东西！
E: Are residents falling seriously ill or mysteriously getting injured on their way to work? Is it just bad luck or is there something sinister about the house? None of it! According to the Realm-Keeping Commission, this situation is a common issue in older neighborhoods. Low rent and property prices attract a diverse population, which increases the likelihood of incidents occurring. Little Gui's investigation revealed that someone was deliberately creating "haunting phenomena" to drive down property prices. So manipulative! <color=#42a8b9>#BelieveInTheScience #GhostHuntingSquad</color>

C:
◆ 无名勋礼 ◆
● 每期无名勋礼开启后，将默认解锁「无名客的赠礼」。
● 开拓者可通过购买「无名客的荣勋」或「无名客的奖章」，解锁「无名客的荣勋」，获取更多奖励。

◆ 无名勋礼任务说明 ◆
● 开拓者可通过完成「无名勋礼」任务，来获取「无名客的经验」，提高勋礼等级，获取奖励。
● 「无名勋礼」任务共有两种：本周任务、本期任务。
● 本周任务将在每周一<unbreak>04</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak>（服务器时间）更新。
● 当本期无名勋礼到达勋礼等级上限时，将不能够通过「无名勋礼」任务获取「无名客的经验」。

◆ 重复购买补偿说明 ◆
● 如因特殊情况导致重复购买「无名客的荣勋」或「无名客的奖章」时，「无名客的经验」将无法累加，并将直接返还对应购买价格的古老梦华*<unbreak>750</unbreak>或古老梦华*<unbreak>1410</unbreak>。
● 若因特殊情况导致重复购买「荣勋授章」时，将直接返还古老梦华*<unbreak>860</unbreak>。
E:
◆ Nameless Honor ◆
● Each time Nameless Honor is activated, the Nameless Gift will be unlocked by default.
● Trailblazers can unlock Nameless Glory to get more rewards by purchasing Nameless Glory or Nameless Medal.

◆ Nameless Honor Missions ◆
● By completing Nameless Honor Missions, Trailblazers will gain The Nameless EXP to increase Honor level, leading to rewards.
● There are two types of Nameless Honor missions: This Week's Missions and This Period's Missions.
● This Week's Missions will refresh every Monday at <unbreak>04</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak> AM (server time).
● When Nameless Honor of the current period reaches the level cap, Trailblazers will stop gaining The Nameless EXP from completing Nameless Honor Missions.

◆ Refunding Repeated Purchases ◆
● Should Nameless Glory or Nameless Medal be purchased repeatedly, The Nameless EXP will not increase as a result of such purchases, and you will be refunded with Oneiric Shards equal to the value of your purchase (either <unbreak>750</unbreak> or <unbreak>1410</unbreak> Oneiric Shards).
● In cases where Honor Badge is purchased repeatedly, you will be refunded with <unbreak>860</unbreak> Oneiric Shards.

C:
◆ 玩法规则 ◆
● 「单抽出奇迹」是「好运滚滚自助机」的一种玩法模式。
● 开拓者可通过「好运滚滚自助机」随机抽取1个图案，并获得图案对应的「开拓券」数值奖励。
● 随着游玩进程的推进，将会解锁「加注」功能。开拓者可通过消耗额外的「开拓券」，激活指定倍数，使游戏结算时的奖励倍数增加。
E:
◆ Gameplay Rules ◆
● "Marvel Solo" is one of the gameplay modes for Windfall Slot Machine.
● Trailblazers can randomly obtain 1 image from the Windfall Slot Machine and obtain an amount of Trailblazer Funds that corresponds to the image.
● As the game progresses, the "Add Stake" function will be unlocked. Trailblazers can pay extra Trailblaze Funds to activate specific multipliers and obtain more rewards when the game ends.

C:
◆ 模拟宇宙 ◆
● 游玩「模拟宇宙」探索模式！击败敌人，获得祝福，不断增强你的队伍，挑战最终的强敌！
● 在探索过程中寻找特殊装置吧！下载装置能扩充你的队伍，程序装置能让你获得随机祝福。
● 在探索模式中享受惊喜的邂逅！你将遭遇旅途中的老朋友与繁多的随机事件。
E:
◆ Simulated Universe ◆
● Play the Exploration Mode in Simulated Universe! Defeat your foes and gain Blessings to build a stronger team, before the final showdown with a formidable foe!
● Look for special devices when you explore! Use the Downloader to expand your team and the Interpreter to gain random Blessings.
● Enjoy unexpected reunions in the Exploration Mode! You will meet up with old friends and experience plenty of random Occurrences together.

C:
少女不解地比划着手中的细剑。
自己的剑要双手才能挥舞，这样的剑也能算剑？这样的剑也能杀敌？

剑的主人倒是对此毫不在意，毕竟——
杀不杀敌又不在剑，全在心。
用的重剑还是细剑，又有什么区别。
E:
Looking rather skeptical, the girl thrust the small sword at her imaginary enemy in an attempt to convince herself that this thing was useful.
How can something so feeble compete with my two-handed sword? Do enemies even notice when they get stabbed?

The owner of the sword did not seem to care about its size.
After all, enemies are defeated by strategy, not swords.
It doesn't matter whether the sword is heavy or light, as long as you use the pointy end.

C: 命运总是无端将众人牵引，而她隐于暗处铭刻最为关键的瞬间。 排序，组合，洗牌，抽牌…她模拟命运之手操纵众人的种种可能，寻找纷乱表象之下的真实轨迹。 终于，所有人物各安其位，她拂过凝固的牌面，拼凑出那幽邃的真相。 「还缺了一张…那么，我来补上吧。」
E: Destiny always tows the masses onward without reason, and she lurks within the darkness, waiting to inscribe the most crucial of instants. Sorting, matching, shuffling, drawing... She simulates fate's hand in how it manipulates all variables for the masses, seeking the trajectory of truth beneath the visage of a disorderly exterior. Finally, when all the characters are in their place, she brushes over the card faces that are in stasis and assembles the unfathomable truth. "Still missing a card... So, I'll add one in."

C:
从一道光开始。
祂们坠落，陨灭的威胁居高临下。
祂们不得不停止自我复制，争先恐后拥抱彼此，
试图用繁殖的权利为代价，换取生存的可能。
祂们携手，从未如此团结
——但命途戛然而止，
祂们趋向真正的死亡。
E:
It began with a flash of light.
One by one, THEY fell as the threat of expiration loomed over THEM.
THEY had to stop self-replicating and rushed to embrace each other,
trying to offer the right to reproduce in exchange for a possibility of survival.
THEY held hands in a show of unprecedented unity.
...But the Paths met an abrupt end,
and THEY were headed to a true death.

C: 能在列车的留声机上播放的碟片，是偶然所得，亦是他人馈赠。音律飞旋时，那些笑容、擦肩、触碰，还有战斗时激荡的心绪，都一一涌上心头。或许这就是时代飞速发展向前，却依然有人在收集碟片的原因。\n当前碟片中刻录着《严寒行军》。
E: A record that can be played on the Express' phonograph. It might be a chance acquisition or a gift from someone else. All sorts of memories surge up when the music plays — the smiles, encounters, touches, and the excitement of battle. Maybe that is why people still collect records even as society rapidly advances.\nThe current record contains the track "Frozen March."

C: 星穹列车的通行车票。顺着星轨一路前行，在通航的世界间游历。\n\n「随心所欲地去任何想去的地方，见想见的人，留下想要的回忆。」
E: Astral Express Universal Pass. Travel as far as the Star Rail stretches.\n\n"Map worlds, meet people, make memories."

C: 播放着震撼心魄的宇宙交响。\n\n「有些天文学家们认为，天体运行犹如复杂的机械结构，日月众星在运转时会发出水晶般悦耳的音符。此所谓『天体谐乐』。」
E: It plays a powerful cosmic symphony.\n\n"Some astronomers believe that the revolutions of the heavenly spheres work the same as complex mechanical structures. The crystal clear and pleasant notes emitted during the movements of the stars are known as the 'Harmony of the Heavenly Spheres.'"

C: 以地髓为能源注入动力，运转时喷燃的并非火星，而是游走的极光。\n\n「只有大守护者直属的技术部有权调阅旧世界的资料，我嘛，被开除后就进不去啦。」
E: It uses Geomarrow as the energy source. When powered, it spews wandering auroras, not sparkles.\n\n"Only the Technology Division directly under the Supreme Guardian has access to information regarding the Old World. I lost my privileges after I was fired."

C: 用于打开机械聚落大门的第一级认证。只有获得全部三级认证者才能取得开门权限。\n\n「哎哟喂！疼疼疼…这机器人，就不能对美少女的手温柔点嘛！」
E: Level-1 certification for opening the entrance of the Robot Settlement. Only those who have obtained all three certification levels can gain permission to open the door.\n\n"Hey, ow! Ow, ow, ow... Can't this robot be more gentle with a pretty girl's hand?"

C: 用于打开机械聚落大门的第三级认证。只有获得全部三级认证者才能取得开门权限。\n\n「哎哟喂！疼疼疼…这机器人，就不能对美少女的手温柔点嘛！」
E: Level-3 certification for opening the entrance of the Robot Settlement. Only those who have obtained all three certification levels can gain permission to open the door.\n\n"Hey, ow! Ow, ow, ow... Can't this robot be more gentle with a pretty girl's hand?"

C: 一箱娜塔莎急需的医疗物资。\n\n「娜塔莎自制的止痛剂，无需服用，只是闻到其气味就足以让人昏睡过去。」
E: A box of medical supplies urgently needed by Natasha.\n\n"Natasha's home-made painkillers. People faint just from the smell."

C: 储备着机器学习数据与代码的玉兆，用于帮助小聪写诗。\n\n「他们都说『诗歌不能谈技术，这不浪漫』，可是技术也可以浪漫呀？」
E: A Jade Abacus that stores machine learning data and codes. It is used to help Cong write poems.\n\n"They say 'Poetry cannot be about technology, as it is not romantic,' but technology can be romantic, right?"

C: 在空间站「黑塔」的决胜乐园中，挑战冠军候补所需的三重凭证之一。在黑塔的不太情愿的许可下，以太战线决胜协会改装了空间站「黑塔」，为玩家设下了阻碍。
E: One of three passes required to challenge the championship contender in the Victory Zone of Herta Space Station. With Herta's reluctant consent, the Aetherium Wars Tournament Association revamped the space station and set up obstacles for the players.

C: 闪闪发光的黄金游戏代币，看上去像是可以被用来兑换某种惊世骇俗的超级大奖，但跑遍整个黄金的时刻都没有人知道它究竟有什么作用。\n此时，你该记住的就只有这四个字：「未来可期」。
E: This shiny gold token appears to hold great value and can potentially be exchanged for an incredible super jackpot, but nobody in the Golden Hour knows how to use it.\nNevertheless, remember the words: "Promising Future."

C: 破旧的卷轴，上面记载着某个流传已久的神秘仪式的步骤，并附带了不知名人士的批注。\n\n「天知道能召唤出什么东西……」
E: A tattered scroll detailing the steps of an ancient, mysterious ritual, with annotations from an unknown person.\n\n"Who knows what this might summon..."

C: 把这段记忆喂给留声海螺，然后侧耳聆听——那道音色或诉说着自然，或吐露着思绪。\n这是关于「壁炉」的记忆。\n「热茶，针织围巾，以及一个永远讲不完的故事」
E: Feed this memory into the Recording Conch and listen closely — the voice may speak of nature's secrets or confide hidden thoughts.\nThis is a memory about the "Hearth."\n"Steaming tea, knitted scarves, and a tale without end."

C: 仿佛具有虚无力量的铁片。 它似乎曾经是一枚硬币，拥有过经济学上的价值。 但显然价值已经随着花纹的磨损而化作虚无了。 「我不知道写这句引言是为什么，我不知道编这个物品介绍是为什么，我的人生毫无意义，这段文案也一个德性。」
E: A chip made of iron that seems to possess the power of Nihility. It may have been a coin that people use to buy things. But apparently, as the engravings on it fade away, its value went with them. "I don't know what I'm writing between these quotation marks. What's the point of this item description? My life is meaningless, so is this piece of flavor text."

E: Stray cats won't care whether the hands of the people feeding them snacks are covered in blood.

C: 没事上公园遛遛弯也算是一种开拓。
E: If you have nothing to do, a short jaunt around the park counts as a form of trailblaze, too.

C: 但你还是得自掏腰包买饮料喝。
E: But you still have to buy drinks using money from your own pocket.

C: 舞，为了世界的温热。
E: Dance, for the sake of the world's warmth.

C: 《以太战线》中通过决胜乐园考验的证明，集齐四枚资格徽章后可以获得参加锦标赛的资格。来自空间站「黑塔」的决胜乐园，拥有它便意味着你战胜了强大的冠军候补「黑塔」。\n\n「你是一位智慧超群的玩家！」
E: In the game Aetherium Wars, the proof of passing the Victory Zone test can be obtained by collecting four Mastery Marks, which qualifies you to participate in the championship. The Victory Zone of Herta Space Station grants you this proof, signifying your victory against the formidable championship contender, Herta.\n\n"You are an intelligent player!"

C: 你意识深处的种种开拓经历，将其完整回忆后能为游戏提供灵感。
E: The trailblazing memories deep in your mind will provide inspiration to the game once you recall it in full.

C: 「嘘，它在祈祷耶，好有神性的小家伙。」
E: "Shh, it's praying! What a spiritual little fellow."

C: 一个数值，你可以通过累积和消耗它提升「差分宇宙」中的辅助系统强度。\n\n「将回路中闪过的一簇电子流，整合为可量化的数值…真可惜，我本希望它会是一只蝴蝶的模样。」
E: A numerical value that you can accumulate and consume to enhance the strength of the support system in the Divergent Universe.\n\n"Turning a fleeting cluster of electrons in the circuit into a quantifiable value... It's a pity, I had hoped it would take the form of a butterfly."

C: 曾经的无名客隐藏在星海之间的宝藏，旨在激励新时代的后辈们勇敢开拓，前进不休。
E: Treasure hidden amongst the starry seas by the bygone Nameless. These items encourage future explorers to step onward bravely and ceaselessly.

C: 唇舌期盼多汁的肥肉，肠胃渴望被填满，就连空气仿佛都泛着焦香——雷鸣般的嘶吼从腹中传来，你开始难以控制自己。\n\n「世间鲜有永无止境的欲望，此为其中之一。」
E: Your lips and tongue yearn for juicy meat, your stomach craving to be filled — even the air seems to carry the scent of charcoal. Your belly emits a thunderous roar, and you struggle to maintain control.\n\n"There are few desires in this world that are as insatiable as this one."

C: 流梦礁经典的派对小吃，起源于一场酸黄瓜的噩梦。它以刺激性的口感告诉大家，丰富的色彩未必有丰富的口味，也可能是酸、很酸和特别酸。 「我们是！红色强壮黄瓜！金色华丽黄瓜！蓝色忧郁黄瓜……」 「朋友们，就是现在！超合体——炫彩酸黄瓜！」
E: A classic party treat from Dreamflux Reef. It originated from a nightmare involving pickled cucumbers. It informed everyone with its shocking taste that varied colors don't always equate to varied flavors. They can be sour, very sour, or extremely sour. "We are... red robust pickle! Golden gorgeous pickle! Blue and feeling-blue pickle..." "Friends! Now is the time! Come together to form — Florescent resplendent pickle!"

C: 「成功不止是征服强敌，摘下星星。成功是每一次完成往昔未竟之事。」
E: "The definition of success is broader than conquering a formidable foe or touching the stars. Success is every time you achieve something you've never done before."

C:
献予游历之人的祝福

愿你驶过洞天，观无量寿数摹绘生命的华彩。
愿你览历梦海，为醉人幻境奏响清脆的舞曲。
你在此间的行迹，终将凝作满载星河的回忆。
E:
A blessing offered to wayfarers on the journey.

May you navigate through the delves and behold how fathomless wakespans paint the scintillating beauty of life.
May you explore the Sea of Dreams and play a rousing melody for the enchanting land of fantasia.
Your traces there will condense into the memories that overflow the very river of stars.

C:
欧嘉：

儿子近来可好？希望他的病情有所好转。

我的症状还在恶化。为了安全起见，我们近期还是不能见面。

我已经找到了一份工作，应该足够维系我们一家的生活。

我从小体质就强过别人，就算生了病，他们的力气也比不过我。你不用为我担心。

照顾好我们的孩子，也保护好你自己。

<align="right">科鲁泽</align>
E:
Olga,

How has our son been? I hope his illness has gotten better.

My symptoms are still worsening. So, for safety concerns, we still can't see each other for the time being.

I've found a job that should be able to keep our family afloat.

I've always been sturdier than others, ever since I was a child. Even when I become sick, I'm still strong. So, no need to worry about me.

Take good care of yourself and our kid.

<align="right">Kluzer</align>

<align="center">协会名称</align>
黑塔•狂野爆炸头协会

<align="center">协会纲领</align>
科学进步的脚步飞速向前迈进，而人类自我建设的进程却像蜗行牛步。身为科研工作人员，我们有义务承担便于他人识别我们科室的责任，故而已然牺牲了一部分的自我判定特色——那就是衣着。面对千篇一律的衣着，我们当以其他途径加强属于个人的特色。本协会认为，头颅之所以生长于人的躯干顶部，不仅仅是因为它里面装了个脑子那么简单。它必然扮演了不可替代的职责，那就是「识别」的意义。所以烫一个属于自己的独一无二「爆炸头」，便是掌握自我认识的关键一步。唯有如此，空间站才会在科学的气息之下，弥漫出人性的馥郁之香。

<align="center">协会方针</align>
每日一定形，每周一护发，每月一加固。

<align="center">协会目标</align>
本协会主要面向「黑塔」空间站的科研人员以及工作人员。培养大家的独特魅力；适应危急时刻特殊需要；掌握一门独特的烫发手艺；为寰宇输送源源不断的「爆炸头」能量。
E:
<align="center">Association Name</align>
Herta Curlcademy

<align="center">Association Guidelines</align>
Modern science progresses at a rapid pace, while humanity's self-determination approaches at a snail's pace. We have a duty as researchers to help others identify our department more easily, and so we have shed part of our personal flair: Our outfits. We should strengthen our personalities in different ways, rather than cliché clothes. We believe that our heads evolved to grow out of the tops of our torsos not simply because they contain the brain. They must play a vital role — that of Identification. Therefore, grooming your own personal hairstyle is a key step in mastering your identity. This is the only way to bring a whiff of humanity beneath the stench of science aboard the space station.

<align="center">Association Motto</align>
Sculpt daily, condition weekly, and strengthen monthly.

<align="center">Association Goals</align>
Mainly aimed at the researchers and staff aboard the Herta space station: To nurture everyone's unique vibe, to rapidly respond to crises, to master meticulous perming technique, and to deliver a steady stream of fashionable hairstyles for the whole universe.

前几天在莱姆士汀家偷车轮的坏人找到了。当时铁卫找到了三名嫌疑人，杰克、克里斯和埃里克。三个人争执不休，其中杰克说道：「偷车轮的是克里斯！」

机智的杰帕德很快就找到了犯人。为了考验他的副官，杰帕德没有直接指认窃贼，而是说：「真奇怪啊，三人中竟然只有窃贼没有撒谎。」

请问到底是谁偷走了莱姆士汀家的车轮呢？

1、杰克
2、克里斯
3、埃里克

The Limesteins' wheel thief was apprehended, with the guards taking in three suspects: Jack, Chris, and Eric. The three argued, with Jack blurting: "Chris is the one who stole the wheels!"

The quick-witted Gepard quickly found the culprit. To test his aide, Gepard said cryptically without revealing the thief: "How strange. Of the three, only the thief did not lie."

Who was the thief that stole the Limesteins' wheels?

1. Jack
2. Chris
3. Eric

<align="center">*劳动合同</align>
甲方：真志摩
乙方：世宏

一、合同目的
本合同旨在明确甲方与乙方之间关于安保工作的权利、义务和责任，并确保双方的合法权益。

二、工作内容
1.乙方将被聘用为甲方的安保人员，负责执行与安全相关的工作任务。
2.乙方在工作期间需穿戴仙舟罗浮的云骑军甲胄，确保工作执行的安全性和有效性。
3.乙方需要强健体魄，能扛能打，确保在工作中能够应对突发状况和紧急情况。

三、工作地点
1.工作时间为根据甲方需要指定地点进行排班安排，不得质疑工作安排。

四、工资和福利
乙方的工资将根据甲方制定的薪酬标准进行支付。

五、保密条款
1.乙方在执行工作期间可能遭遇第三方盘问，乙方应当严格保密工作内容，不得泄露给第三方。
2.乙方离职后，仍需继续承担保密义务。
3.乙方不会仔细阅读合同条款，正如此条不会被发现。

六、违约责任
1.如果乙方未能履行本合同约定的职责和义务，甲方有权采取相应的纠正措施，并根据情况对乙方进行相应的处罚或解雇。
2.乙方如果进行非法活动被捕，甲方无需承担任何法律责任。

七、解除合同
1.本合同期限为三日，在合同期限届满前，乙方不得擅自解除合同。

八、其他条款
1. 本合同一式两份，甲方和乙方各执一份，具有同等效力。

决应依据星际和平公司®相关法律法规进行。

<align="right">*甲方：真志摩</align>
<align="right">*乙方：世宏</align>

<align="center">*Labor Contract</align>
Party A: Majima
Party B: Shihong

1. Purpose
The purpose of this contract is to clarify the rights, obligations, and responsibilities between Parties A & B regarding security works, and to ensure the legal rights of both Parties.

2. Work
1. Party B will be hired as Party A's security personnel, responsible for performing security-related tasks.
2. Party B must wear the helmet and armor of a Luofu Cloud Knights Officer during work hours to ensure safety and efficiency of work services.
3. Party B must be physically strong and able to handle fighting and carrying tasks to ensure an appropriate response to sudden and emergency situations at work.

3. Place of Work
1. Shifts are set based on Party A's location and must not be called into question.

4. Remuneration and Benefits
Party B's salary will be paid according to remuneration standards set by Party A.

5. Confidentiality Clause
1. Party B may encounter third-party interrogation in the line of work, and must keep in strict confidence all work content. Leaking of information to a third party is forbidden.
2. Upon resignation, Party B must continue to undertake obligation of confidentiality.
3. Party B will not read the terms and conditions of this contract carefully, and won't even notice this condition.

6. Breaching Contract
1. If Party B fails to perform the duties and obligations stipulated in this contract, Party A retains the right to take corrective measures and summarily punish or dismiss Party B.
2. Party A shall bear no legal ramifications should Party B be arrested for illegal activities.

7. Termination
1. The contract period is three (3) days only. Party B shall not terminate the contract without authorization.

8. Other Terms
1. This contract is in duplicate, with Parties A & B each retaining one (1) copy both of equal effect.

Decisions should be made in accordance with relevant legislation from the Interastral Peace Corporation®.

<align="right">*Party B: Shihong</align>

C:
尊敬的来宾，感谢您响应家族的邀请，莅临晖长石号参观本次巡航。在忆质之海的航行或许会有所颠簸，但一定会给您留下难以忘怀的美好回忆。

十二个梦境的景致各不相同，而巡航永不停歇。为保障您的观览体验，家族特此准备了这本手册，为您提供最全面的行程规划参考。

「子夜的时刻」是梦的起点，时常有人会忽视它的存在，认为这片黑暗如同它看上去那样空无一物。但若是在船沿闭上眼睛，侧耳倾听，那些入梦时的欢声笑语便会顺着忆质之海的浪花溅起来，这些纯粹的快乐，是连梦境贩售店也买不到的秘密。况且，如果您放弃了子夜的沉寂，那晖长石号在进入「安谧的时刻」的瞬间，地平线上的第一缕曙光泛起时的震撼，便也要同您失之交臂了。

由于这片海域接近噩梦的边缘，请不要对耳边可能出现的声响感到惊慌。晖长石号是绝对安全的场所，观景之余，到餐厅里与朋友们共进早餐，在梦泡池里接受精神的洗涤，都是不错的选择。

在盛会之星，所有的时间都凝固在特定的时刻，唯有守护美梦的家族，沿着巡航的轨迹，感受昼夜的更迭。而在早餐结束后，您也将有幸目睹被晨曦打湿的朝露公馆，许久以来，正是它见证了这颗星球的落魄与崛起。折纸筑梦师们将一日的伊始放在这里，然后走进「黎明」和「烫金」，阳光下家族成员的汗水，最终酿造出夜幕里不朽的美梦。

因涉密原因，在以上区域的观览过程中，请注意拍照留念的尺度问题。

梦中并不会真正迎来饥饿，当正午来临，若您愿意稍稍延后进餐时间，请移步至晖长石号的左侧甲板，从空中俯瞰格拉克斯教授最后的作品——培育了无数筑梦工程师的「折纸大学」。它是如此瑰丽，纵使是浩瀚的忆质之海和最华丽的语言，也会在这片建筑物面前黯然失色。如果您是希米亚影业的忠实影迷，请走向甲板的右侧，您很快会看到在忆质下若隐若现的「匹诺康尼大博物馆」，著名的梦泡电影《虚构奇妙夜》，它的取景地点正是这座博物馆。

甲板顶部的观景台会提供餐饮供应服务，上至精品甜点，下至民间小吃，您大可放开肚子，毕竟这只是美梦的一部分，既不会吃撑，也不会蛀牙。

「绿洲」和「热砂」相互倚靠，就像是两条斑斓的色带。可惜的是，受过去迷因的侵袭和近期梦境动荡的影响，您很难从层层云雾中窥见它们的影子。但千万别浪费了宝贵的午后时间，位于二楼聚会厅的艺术沙龙不定期展开；船长室下方的餐吧里，或许能邂逅意想不到的惊喜。

时间的流逝永远令人怅然，当歌声从耳畔传来，天空露出火红，「蓝调的时刻」将为您补足此程的情调，晖长石在空中巡航，黄昏号在海底漫步。热情高涨的游客们常常将舞池挤得水泄不通，在那之前，您最好尽快找到心仪的舞伴。无论是商业上的对手，还是关系僵硬的恋人，邀请对方跳上一曲总归是不错的选择，当繁星铺满海面，就像是一地的宝石无人拾起，再多的怨愤也会消失得无影无踪。

至于最后「黄金的时刻」，就请您用自己的眼睛去品味吧。
E:
Dear guest, thank you for accepting The Family's invitation and joining us on board the Radiant Feldspar for this experiential cruise. Discounting the potential turbulence, your voyage into the sea of memoria is sure to become a wonderful memory you'll never forget.

Each of the <unbreak>12</unbreak> Dreamscapes features different sceneries that you can appreciate while on the non-stop cruise circuit. To complement your tour experience, The Family has prepared this comprehensive guidebook for you to reference as you plan your journey.

The Moment of Midnight is the starting point of all dreams. People tend to overlook this moment, believing there's nothing beyond the inky darkness it presents. But if you were to stand along the side walls of the airship, close your eyes, and prick up your ears, you'd be able to hear chuckles and laughter from entering the dream, sounds tossed along waves and foams on the sea of memoria. These types of simple happiness are secrets that you can never buy at the Dreamscape Sales Store. Besides, if you give up on the silence of midnight, then you will also miss the stunning shock when the first ray of sunlight shines over the horizon the second the Radiant Feldspar enters the Moment of Serenity.

These waters are close to the boundaries of nightmares, so do not be alarmed by any sounds you may hear. The Radiant Feldspar is an absolutely safe facility! Rather than just taking in the views, why not take the time to bond with your friends over breakfast in the restaurant or cleanse your consciousness in the dream bubble spring?

On the Planet of Festivities, time everywhere is frozen for each specific moment. Only The Family, which protects the sweet dream, feels the turn of night and day along the cruise's path. When you finish breakfast, you'll be lucky enough to marvel at the Dewlight Pavilion, doused in morning dew. Since time immemorial, the pavilion has been the one to watch over the decline and rise of this planet. This is where the Origami Dreamweavers have chosen to place the start of a day, before progressing into Moment of Daybreak and Gilded Hour. Every sweatdrop that members of The Family have shed under the sun has come together to create an everlasting dream set against the night sky.

For confidentiality reasons, please respect the guidelines and only take photos within the suitable parameters when visiting the aforementioned domains.

Hunger doesn't hit when you're in your dreams. So, if you're fine with having lunch a little later, then head up to the port side deck on the Radiant Feldspar right when it strikes noon for a bird's eye view of Professor Glaux's final creation: The Paperfold University, where tons of Dreamweaver Engineers graduated from. Even the most eloquent of languages fail to describe its magnificence, one that easily puts the vast and mesmerizing sea of memoria to shame. Are you a fan of Himemia Films? If so, step right up to the starboard side of the deck to catch a glimpse of the mirage-like Penacony's Grand Museum beneath memoria. This museum was where they filmed the famous dream bubble movie, Fictional Wondernight.

Food is provided on the observation deck of the upper deck, with a spread ranging from fancy desserts to street snacks, so eat to your heart's content! No, really. Everything here is just part of the dream, so you won't end up overeating or getting cavities here.

Moments of Oasis and Scorchsand lie next to each other like two colorful ribbons. It's a pity you can no longer see them clearly now that they're clouded over by layers of fog following a meme incursion and repercussions from the recent Dreamscape turmoil. Even so, that doesn't mean your precious hours in the afternoon are going to waste! Choose to visit the art salon that opens occasionally in the meeting hall on the second floor, or drop by the restaurant and bar below the Captain's Quarters to see if you're in luck for a surprise.

The passage of time never fails to put one in a low mood. When songs begin to play and the sky starts to turn a fiery red, the Blue Hour steps in to complement this journey's mood. When the Radiant Feldspar cruises in the sky, the Eventide likewise meanders across the ocean floor. Eager and energetic tourists tend to crowd out the dance floor, so make sure you grab yourself a partner before the place turns into a tin of sardines. Whether it's your business partner or the other half you fought with, you'd never go wrong inviting them to a dance. By the time the blanket of twinkling stars finds its reflection in the sea like a gorgeous spread of gems unattended by anyone, you'll then find all feelings of frustration gone.

As for the final Golden Hour, I'll leave it up to your own eyes to take in the views.

C:
上禀十王：

在下罗浮善宏学宫文化人类学博士宗光。

此番擅自离开罗浮，加入白狼猎群的彦游，的确是我门下弟子。他叛离联盟，堕为「白狼」，我难辞其咎，愿接受惩罚，以儆效尤。

然而我也不得不承认，彦游所为，并不令我感到惊奇。步离人「野蛮」的生活方式，对很多生活在「文明」中的人来说，有着致命的吸引力。

实际上，在第三次丰饶民战争尘埃落定、步离人已不再可能掀起更大波澜的当下，我们也许准备好了去面对一个过去不敢谈论的话题——步离人真的「野蛮」吗？

我不由得想起，在<unbreak>148</unbreak>年前，我曾随授业恩师介廉先生前往一颗名叫「毗舍阇」的行星，当时那里是犀犬猎群的属地。

我们以星际和平公司专员的身份，同犀犬猎群的开创者只里古汗进行了会面，并在「毗舍阇」居住了六个星历月。

那是我们第一次真正意义上与步离人平等地交流——不是作为彼此的敌人，也不是作为战俘或奴隶。即使是介廉先生这样步离学领域开宗立派的大师，也从未有过如此机会。

与通常印象里的步离人首领不同，只里古汗是个天生瘦弱的步离人。在强者唯尊的步离人社会中，这样的身体状况无异于天缺。

只里古汗并未继续在他不擅长的道路上痛苦前行，而是选择了另一条道路——技术研究。他带领一批同样不擅长或不愿意学习「古老战斗技巧」的步离青年，开始研究能提高自身战斗能力的新式武器。

不到一百年后，只里古汗就带着一群身着外骨骼动力甲的步离人自立门户，以「犀犬」为名，建立了自己的部族。

即使时至今日，仍有很多步离人认为，犀犬猎群背叛了父狼都蓝开创的神圣生活方式，但没有任何一个步离人敢因为他们肉体的孱弱而轻视他们。

我们对步离人的文化有一个相当经典的误读——步离人信奉「以强为尊」，所以只看得起最强大的战士。

事实并非这样单薄。步离人的确「以强为尊」，但他们对「强大」的判定并非单一的，而是多元的。

对于步离人来说，什么是强大？像呼雷一样一骑当千？这当然是「强大」。像只里古汗一样聪明？这也是强大。像凿齿猎群的基因巫师们一样擅长培育武器和兽舰？这同样是强大。

居住在「毗舍阇」的六个月里，我发现步离社会多元化的评价体系，使得他们的社会生活并不压抑，甚至充满活力。

的确在传统的步离社会，有些职业选择会让人瞧不起，比如商人和农民——实际上，步离社会（除了较为「新潮」的犀犬猎群）也根本不需要这两种职业。我那位可怜的朋友阿合马，当初就是因为想做商人，而在家乡饱受欺凌。

除此之外的绝大部分职业选择——战士、谋士、兽舰役者、医生、基因巫师、祭祀、吟游诗人…都具有平等的社会地位。

即使是最为强大的战士，也不敢随意嘲讽一位瘦弱但天才的老诗人。如果这位战士这样做了，那么在步离人的评价体系中，他会被判定为「不懂得尊重强者」，而被人所唾弃。

另一方面，步离人「以强为尊」的信仰，使得他们真正做到了「英雄不问出身」。只要你是步离人，并真心崇敬「长生主」（这一点存疑），那么无论你出身多么低贱，都可以凭借自己的强大走上台前，书写属于你自己的历史。

大夷离堇（即步离语中「最高武官」之意）叱力延，在升任大夷离堇前，不过是只里古汗偶然买下的一个瘦弱的战奴。据坊间传闻，只里古汗买下他，只是因为从他身上看到了儿时的自己。

当时根据我们粗略计算，仅在「毗舍阇」一地，像叱力延一样从战奴升为实权高官的人物就足有<unbreak>14</unbreak>名。这一方面当然是因为只里古汗本人较为开明，但另一方面也足见步离社会重视能力远大于出身的特征。

我们如今讳莫如深的白狼猎群不也是一个例证吗？狐人奴隶揭竿而起，建立起了一个全新的猎群——不但没有步离人用他们的「奴隶血统」来攻击他们，甚至大多数步离人都因为「白狼」们过于残酷的行事作风而忌惮他们。

这样「以强为尊」且评价体系多元的社会，实际上催生了相当高效的决策体系——没有人可以长期尸位素餐，没有人可以躺在功劳簿上吃一辈子，军事议会上拥有决策权的，永远是真正有才能的步离人。

说回我的徒弟彦游。他的父母认为文化人类学是「注定找不到工作的学科」，甚至因为他坚持要进修人类学，而与他断绝了关系。而等到他排除万难，如愿进入学宫后却发现，那些「学术泰斗」（包括我），无一不来自几千年历史的「学术世家」。

这样的人会被仅以能力论英雄的步离文化吸引，走上极端错误的道路，难道是一件很令人意外的事吗？

当然，即使如此我还是震惊于他的愚蠢。对于步离人来说，「人类学」大概是更没意义的学科。如果步离人对文化人类学有半点尊重，都不可能杀害介廉先生。

但不敢欺瞒十王——我也认同步离人的这一项社会文化。虽然在呼雷被擒，步离帝国分崩离析的当下，过去那样纯粹的「以强为尊」的文化也在逐渐消失。新一代的步离贵族们，在人才选拔思路上开始变得越来越「文明」，更加重视自己政治上的「基本盘」，而罔顾整个猎群的盛衰。

但对于仙舟联盟而言，这是一个抛弃过去思想包袱，向「野蛮」学习的大好机会。仙舟社会上笼罩着的死气，也许可以藉由「强者为尊」的文化一扫而空。

<align="right">罗浮善宏学宫博士 宗光</align>
E:
To the Venerable Ten Lords,

I'm Dr. Zongguang, a PhD in cultural anthropology from the Luofu's Grand Virtue Academy.

I can confirm that Yanyou, who recently left the Luofu without authorization to join the Whitewolf Pack, is indeed my disciple. He betrayed the Alliance and reduced himself to a "White Wolf" and I must bear the blame. I am willing to accept my rightful punishment in order to set an example for others.

However, I must admit that this move by Yanyou does not come as a surprise to me. These "barbaric" lifestyles of borisin have a certain fatal attraction to many of those who live within "civilized societies."

In actual fact, now that the dust has settled on the Third Denizens of Abundance War and borisin are unlikely to be causing any more major disruption, perhaps we are now prepared to face a topic that we never dared face in the past... Are borisin really "barbaric"?

I cannot help but recall a time <unbreak>148</unbreak> years ago, when I followed my mentor, Mr. Jielian, to a planet known as Pisdo. At the time, it was a Rhinohound Pack territory.

We met with the Rhinohound Pack founder — Geliko Khan — as IPC specialists and lived on Pisdo for 6 Star-Calendar months.

That was the first time that we truly communicated with borisin as equals — not as enemies, nor as prisoners of war or slaves. Even Mr. Jielian, the master who founded the sect of borisin studies, had never had an opportunity like this before.

Contrary to the common impression one has of borisin chiefs, Geliko Khan had always been thin and frail. In borisin society, where strength rules, a body like this was basically tantamount to an Incomplete One.

Geliko Khan had not chosen to walk a painful path in which he did not excel. Instead, he chose another path — technological research. He led a team of other young borisin who, like him, either did not excel at or refused to study "ancient martialism" and began researching new forms of weaponry that could help to improve their fighting ability.

Less than a century later, Geliko Khan set up his own tribe of borisin, equipped his people with powered armor exoskeletons, and named them the "Rhinohounds."

Even to this day, there are many borisin who believe the Rhinohound Pack betrayed the sacred way of life that Duran the Father Wolf had created for them. However, not one of them dares look down on the Rhinohounds for their physical weakness.

There is a classic misunderstanding regarding borisin culture... Borisin "respect only the strong," so they must only have respect for the most powerful of warriors.

The truth is actually much more profound than this. Though borisin do indeed "respect only the strong," their definition of "strong" is not set in stone, but diverse.

What is strength in the eyes of borisin? Someone like Hoolay that has the strength of a thousand men? Naturally, that is "strength." What about someone who is as intelligent as Geliko Khan? That is also strength. What about the genetic warlocks of the Chiseltooth Pack who excel at cultivating weaponry and beast ships? That is also strength.

Over the six months that we lived on Pisdo, I discovered that the diverse evaluation system of borisin society actually led to bustling vitality, not oppression at all.

Indeed, there are certain jobs that may cause you to lose respect in borisin society, such as a merchant or a farmer — In fact, borisin society doesn't need these two professions at all, aside from the more "new-age" Rhinohound Pack. My poor friend Arma was brutally bullied in his hometown due to his desire to become a merchant.

These jobs aside, the majority of professions — such as warriors, advisers, beast ship operators, doctors, genetic warlocks, priests, and bards... All of these jobs are considered equal in borisin society.

Even the most powerful warrior would not dare mock a frail but genius poet without careful consideration. If they were to do this, they would be judged as "disrespecting the strong" in the borisin social system and be shunned.

On the other hand, the borisin faith in "respect only the strong" has allowed them to really master the concept of "a hero's roots do not matter." As long as you are a borisin and truly revere the Master of Immortality (this I doubt), then no matter how humble your beginnings are, you can rely on your strength alone to lead you to the forefront and write your own history.

Before the current Great Erkan (top military officer in the borisin tongue) Chiliyan took his post, he was just a weak war slave that Geliko Khan purchased by chance. Word on the streets was that Geliko Khan purchased him simply because he saw his childhood self in this boy.

According to our rough calculations, there were <unbreak>14</unbreak> people alongside Chiliyan who had managed to rise from war slaves to positions of power in Pisdo alone. Naturally, this was partly because Geliko Khan was more liberal-minded, but it also clearly shows how borisin placed more importance on capability than that of birth.

Is the dreaded Whitewolf Pack of today not yet another example? The foxian slaves rose up and formed their very own pack. Not only did borisin not use their "slave lineage" against them, the majority of borisin now fear them due to their savage and merciless actions.

This "respect only the strong," alongside their pluralistic societal ranking system, has actually birthed a very effective system of policies. No one is free to slack off at a desk for their whole lives, and no one can rest on their laurels and milk past successes for a lifetime. The ones who have decision-making power in military meetings will always be borisin who have true talent.

Back to my disciple, Yanyou. His parents always believed that cultural anthropology was "a pointless discipline that will never help you find a job." They were so set on this that when he insisted on advancing with his anthropology studies, they cut off all ties with him. Then, when he did make it through all the challenges and entered the academy as he had wished, he discovered that all the "leading academics" there (myself included) came from "academic families" with thousands of years of history.

Such people would naturally be attracted to borisin culture of only using meritocracy to select heroes. Though the path that he has taken is undeniably deplorable, is it really surprising?

Of course, even with this being the case, I am still shocked by his foolishness. As far as borisin are concerned, anthropology is likely an even more meaningless profession. If borisin had just a single ounce of respect for culture and anthropology, they would never have killed Mr. Jielian.

However, I shall not attempt to deceive the Ten Lords... I also approve of this specific aspect of borisin society. I will point out, however, now that Hoolay has been captured and the Borisin Empire has collapsed, their pure "respect only the strong" social norm has started to disappear. Their new generation of aristocrats is becoming more and more "civilized" when it comes to their selection of talents, growing more concerned solely for their own "political bases" regardless of how this would affect the pack as a whole.

Nevertheless, for the Xianzhou Alliance, this offers a prime chance to ditch outdated ideologies and adopt lessons from the "barbarians." Embracing a culture where strength rules could rejuvenate the stagnant atmosphere within Xianzhou society.

<align="right">Dr. Zongguang, Anthropologist from the Luofu Grand Virtue Academy</align>

C:
编者按：

战争是泰坦意志的延伸，泰坦的存在形式就是一切斗争的根源——这是尼卡多利的教导，也是参谋作业如此重要的根本原因。

个人的能力是有限的。如果要将泰坦的意志准确延伸到组成军队乃至城邦的每一个个体，依靠单个领袖的魅力远远不够。王不可能随时随地跟进战线上的每一处进展——但协同作业，或者具体说，发起进攻的节奏，对任何一只军队来说，又都是在战场上获得优势的最关键的手段。在此，参谋作业的重要性就无比具体地显露了出来：参谋群体是指挥官最重要的助手，他们通过彼此之间的密切协同，为指挥官提供情报、制定计划、组织部队实施战役安排、为指挥官提供各种有价值的建议，并保证指挥官的头脑始终在进行战略、战役级别的思考（而不是具体的战术，比如指挥某个中队向东前进五十步重新布防），帮助其做出明智的决策。

战争是一个系统工程，而且是互相最大限度地使用暴力的系统工程。有些愚蠢的城邦，幻想找出一种巧妙的方法，能够既不造成大量的伤亡，又能彻底打败对立的一方、使其心服口服——然而这种想法只会让他们自己崇敬的泰坦蒙羞，也往往让他们的同胞在敌人面前付出更惨痛的代价。这种愚蠢思想的起源，在编者看来，和那些城邦的领导者无视参谋作业有直接的关系（除了不敬尼卡多利之外）。任何实际了解过参谋作业、知晓军事斗争复杂性的人，都不会认为还存在一种可以不凭借暴力的角力就达成目标的手段——即使是看起来温文尔雅的外交活动，其背后的军事博弈也往往超过那些无知之人的想象。

近年来，悬锋城出现了一种错误的思潮，认为战争是尼卡多利的神权，普通人只要向它展现出足够的虔敬（往往是自虐式的），它就可以帮助我们得到任何我们想得到的东西。这不是尼卡多利的愿望。尼卡多利恰恰希望我们亲身投入到所有的生存斗争之中，用我们自己的聪明才智，为自己赢取生存空间（而不是由它包办代替）。「宁战死，毋荣归」——这句口号不是让我们做个愚蠢的匹夫，在战场上白白送死。它真正的内涵，是一个人应该倒在他所追求的事业上，应该倒在让悬锋城通往荣誉的征途上——这意味着他始终倾尽所有，在为自己「存在于世的意义」而斗争。而让各位在未来能够冷静地面对种种斗争、从参谋学问中懂得如何团结一致，以最大的胜率去击溃敌人，在编者看来，也是《参谋学导论》这门课程对于你们最大的价值。

在本课程中，我们将分章节讲解参谋的角色和职责、参谋的素质和能力、参谋作业的流程和方法、参谋与指挥官的关系、参谋在战时和平时训练中的不同作用。这是本套课程教材自创设以来的第八次修订，增添了不少与对抗黑潮有关的实战内容；编者在此特别感谢王翼冠军克拉特鲁斯的倾情指导，他为本次修订提供了很多的有益的素材与见解（包括本篇序言）。
E:
Editor's Note:

War is an extension of the Titans' will, and the very existence of Titans is the root cause of all fights — this is the teaching of Nikador and the foundational reason why strategic advisory is so critical.

The ability of an individual is limited. Therefore, relying on the charisma of a single leader is far from enough to accurately extend the Titan's will to everyone in an army, let alone a city. A king cannot possibly monitor every development on every front at all times. Yet coordination — or, more specifically, the ability to launch attacks at the right time and in the right place — is the single most crucial factor in securing battlefield advantages for any army. This is where the importance of strategic advisory becomes evident: Advisors are the commanding officer's most indispensable aides. Through close collaboration, they provide intelligence, craft plans, organize units to implement battle arrangements, and offer valuable counsel to the commanding officer. They must ensure that the commanding officer maintains a focus on strategic and operational levels, rather than on specific tactics, such as redeploying a squadron fifty paces east, thereby enabling wise decision-making.

War is a systemic endeavor, one that maximizes the use of violence against each other. Some foolish city-states dream of finding an ingenious method to achieve decisive victories and win the enemy's heartfelt submission without significant casualties. Such fantasies not only disgrace the Titan they revere but often result in even greater losses for their compatriots at the hands of the enemy. In my opinion, the root of this folly lies in these city-state leaders' disregard for advisory work, along with their irreverence toward Nikador. Anyone with practical knowledge of strategic advisory and the complexity of military conflict understands that there is no path to success without the application of violence. Even diplomatic activities — often mild and friendly as they may seem — involve military calculations beyond the comprehension of the ignorant.

In recent years, Castrum Kremnos has witnessed the rise of a dangerous misconception: That war is a divine authority of Nikador and that it will help us obtain whatever we desire as long as we, the ordinary people, demonstrate sufficient — though often self-destructive — devotion to it. This is not what Nikador wants. On the contrary, Nikador desires that we actively engage in all the struggles of survival, using our own wits to secure our place in the world rather than having them do it for us. "Valorous death before glorious return" — this motto does not call for us to die senseless deaths on the battlefield. What it truly indicates is that one should only fall while striving for a cause the person deems worthy, specifically in the pursuit of glory for Castrum Kremnos. It signifies giving one's all and fighting for the "meaning of one's existence in the world." In light of this, I believe the greatest value of this course lies in learning to face future conflicts with composure, understanding the principles of solidarity through the study of strategic advisory, and securing the highest chances of defeating your enemies.

In this course, we will explore the roles and responsibilities of advisors, the necessary qualities and capabilities they must possess, the procedures and methods of strategic advisory, the relationship between advisors and commanding officers, and the various roles of advisors during peacetime training and wartime engagement. This is the eighth edition of this course's textbook since its establishment. It now includes substantial updates on practical guidance for combating the black tide. Special thanks go to Krateros of the King's Aegis, who generously provided numerous valuable materials and insights for this revision, including this very foreword.

C:
致{NICKNAME}阁下：

我…不知该如何向你问好，毕竟在此世，我们还素未谋面。

昔涟小姐曾经打趣说，这一世，{NICKNAME}阁下亏欠我一个拥抱。初听时只觉这话叫人害臊，可当我沉入冥界、捱过漫长的岁月以后，我竟然对与你相见的自己，产生了一丝羡慕——并开始期盼，这虚妄的债项真能被偿还。

唉，请别笑话我。

冥界比我想得更美丽，也更清冷。在这里，我见到了我的妹妹玻吕茜亚，也见到了许多或熟悉或陌生的面庞——比如，在第一次逐火中逝去的数百英雄，他们的理智虽支离破碎，胸前的铭牌却仍熠熠闪烁；再比如，阿格莱雅大人。她赠了我一只若虫作伴，随后静静地消失在花原中……

不久以后，缇宝老师耗尽神力，打开了联通斯缇科西亚与创世涡心的门径，并由海瑟音前辈以神力予以维系。缇宝老师临走前嘱咐我，要好好守护这条通道。漫长的岁月中，我从冥界看见伙伴们一一逝去，他们中甚至有数位连冥界都来不了，比如…将灵魂碎作五瓣的万敌，还有将自己炼成贤者之石的那刻夏老师。

直到最后，翁法罗斯全境再无人类幸存，海瑟音前辈为了封印来古士，不得不将全部神力集中在斯缇科西亚的欢宴之中。失去了海洋的力量，联通斯缇科西亚与创世涡心的道路开始破碎，我最终下定决心——以死龙残躯的样貌，操纵冥河之水，保护那条通路。

将自己化作死龙之前，我曾绞尽脑汁地思考，能为你留下什么。可死龙之躯，自然是无法再奢求任何人的拥抱了。

恍惚间，我又忆起昔涟小姐曾偷偷告诉我，在上个轮回，你曾希望我在冥界给你寄「冥信片」。于是，趁着现在的身躯还能握笔，我为阁下写下了这封信，并让葳蕤生长的安提灵将它托举离开冥界，等待阁下捡拾。

许久以后，当阁下沿着那道通路前往创世涡心之时，或许能在安提灵的花丛中找到这张「冥信片」。又或许，那时的我已耗尽神力、陷入沉眠，安提灵尽数枯萎……

但这一定不是永别。倘若阁下能完成救世的使命，那么，等到了崭新的世界，我一定会勇敢地向阁下索取

一个迟到了数千年的拥抱。

遐蝶
E:
Dear {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME},

I... find myself unsure how to address you, given that we've never actually met in this recurrence.

Miss Cyrene once joked that in this recurrence, you, {NICKNAME}, owe me a hug. I found it quite embarrassing at first, but after descending into the nether realm and enduring the long passage of time, I've begun to envy the version of myself who will eventually meet you, and started hoping that silly little "debt" might actually get paid after all.

Oh, forgive me for my sentimentality.

The nether realm is more beautiful than I imagined, yet also more desolate. I've reunited with my sister Polyxia here, alongside countless faces both known and unknown, like the hundreds of heroes lost during the first Flame-Chase, their minds fragmented yet their insignias still brilliantly shining. Or Lady Aglaea, who gifted me a nymph companion before silently fading into the flower fields...

Not long after, Lady Tribbie depleted her divine power to create a passage between Styxia and the Vortex of Genesis, which Hysilens maintained with her power. Before departing, Tribbie entrusted me with guarding this passage. And over countless years, I witnessed from the nether realm as my companions perished one after another, some never even managing reaching here, such as... Mydei, who shattered his soul into five pieces, or Professor Anaxa, who transmuted himself into a Philosopher's Stone.

Finally, when not a single human being remained alive in Amphoreus, Hysilens had to concentrate all her divine power within Styxia's revelry to seal Lygus. Without the Ocean's power, the passage connecting Styxia to the Vortex of Genesis began disintegrating. And then, I made my final decision: to assume the form of Netherwing's corpse and command the waters of the River of Souls to preserve that passage.

Before becoming Netherwing, I racked my mind thinking what I might leave for you. But I could hardly expect to receive anyone's embrace as Netherwing.

In a flash of recollection, I remembered Miss Cyrene once secretly told me that you had wished for me to send you a "nether postcard" from the underworld in the previous recurrence. So, while my body can still hold a pen, I've written this letter for you and instructed the flourishing Antila flowers to carry it from the nether realm, waiting for you to find it.

Someday, when you travel that passage to the Vortex of Genesis, perhaps you'll discover this "nether postcard" among the Antila flowers. Or perhaps by then I will have expended all my power and fallen into deep slumber, with all the Antila flowers long withered...

But this is certainly not our last goodbye. Should you fulfill your destiny as the Deliverer, then in that bright new world, I promise I'll find the courage to ask you for...

...an embrace I've waited for millennia too long.

Castorice

C:
致{NICKNAME}：
 
<align="center">借由诸位之力，我已完成此世最伟大的课题，表演本可落幕——</align>
<align="center">但在那安提基色拉人的脑中，我看到了世外无垠的知识。</align>
<align="center">在最后的舞台上，我看到你们实现了扭转命运的奇迹。</align>
 
<align="center">正是这些我仍不解的秘密，解开了将世界困囿的谜题，</align>
<align="center">使人在黑暗中的不竭摸索，不至于沦为徒劳。</align>
<align="center">故：我已目睹洞穴之外的真实，便不可停止求索。</align>
 
<align="center">无论翁法罗斯继续以何种形式存续，</align>
<align="center">我都将延续「理性」，直至重拾真理，</align>
<align="center">将那更为神圣、宏伟之物再度超越、亵渎！</align>
 
<align="center">你大可以把这枚贤者之石视作我对你的嘉奖，</align>
<align="center">我希望你珍重这枚包含此世一切智慧的炼金奇迹，</align>
<align="center">但若遇到实在讲不通道理的蠢材，就用它的坚硬给予他启明吧。</align>
 
 
<align="right">阿那克萨戈拉斯</align>
E:
To {NICKNAME}:

<align="center">Through your collective power, I have completed this life's greatest research, and the performance could have ended.</align>
<align="center">But in the mind of that Antikytheran, I saw boundless knowledge beyond this world.</align>
<align="center">On the final stage, I witnessed you achieve the miracle of defying destiny.</align>

<align="center">It is these mysteries I still cannot comprehend that unlock the riddles confining our world,</align>
<align="center">so that our endless groping in darkness shall not be in vain.</align>
<align="center">Therefore: Having glimpsed the truth beyond the cave, I must never cease my quest.</align>

<align="center">No matter what form Amphoreus continues to exist in,</align>
<align="center">I shall continue to carry "Reason" until I reclaim the truth,</align>
<align="center">and once again surpass and desecrate that which is more divine and magnificent!</align>

<align="center">You can consider this Philosopher's Stone as my reward to you.</align>
<align="center">I hope you'll treasure this alchemical miracle containing all the wisdom of this world,</align>
<align="center">but when you encounter fools who won't listen to reason, use its hardness to knock some sense into them.</align>


<align="right">Anaxagoras</align>

E: A strange creation in the shape of a flower's sepal, with crimson stamens and pistils and ink-black petals. It seems to continuously imitate and piece together elements found in reality in an attempt to create new existences.

C: 状如花萼的奇异造物，赤色芯蕊，玄黑花瓣。它似在不停模仿、拼凑着现实存在的元素，试图创成新的事物。
E: A strange creation in the shape of a flower's sepal, with crimson stamens and pistils and ink-black petals. It seems to continuously imitate and piece together elements found in reality in an attempt to create new existences.

C: 状如花萼的奇异造物，赤色芯蕊，玄黑花瓣。它似在不停模仿、拼凑着现实存在的元素，试图创成新的事物。
E: A strange creation in the shape of a flower's sepal, with crimson stamens and pistils and ink-black petals. It seems to continuously imitate and piece together elements found in reality in an attempt to create new existences.

C: 裂界中暂时停滞行动的虚影，不去触碰便不会有危险。\n无论细节如何逼真，它都只是现实的影子，是裂界仿造的玩具罢了。
E: A shadow in the Fragmentum that temporarily stays stagnant. It is not dangerous if left alone.\nAs lifelike as it may look, it is only part of the umbra of reality, a toy counterfeited by the Fragmentum.

C: 裂界侵蚀现实后留下的伤痕，通向未知的地方。\n有人说裂界并非单纯吞没了现实，它记录着所有被它吞噬之物的信息。若条件正确，过去的遗物会再度浮现。
E: A bite mark left by the Fragmentum when it corroded the reality, leading to mysterious places.\nSome say that the Fragmentum does not simply devour reality. In fact, it preserves all the information of what was eaten. When certain conditions are met, the relics of the past may re-emerge.

C: 裂界侵蚀现实后留下的伤痕，通向未知的地方。\n有人说裂界并非单纯吞没了现实，它记录着所有被它吞噬之物的信息。若条件正确，过去的遗物会再度浮现。
E: A bite mark left by the Fragmentum when it corroded the reality, leading to mysterious places.\nSome say that the Fragmentum does not simply devour reality. In fact, it preserves all the information of what was eaten. When certain conditions are met, the relics of the past may re-emerge.

C: 疯狂的大守护者葬身于此。再次踏足永冬岭，回忆与可可利亚的最后一战。
E: Here rests the Supreme Guardian caught by insanity. The last battle with Cocolia on the Everwinter Hill shall echo through eternity.

C: 铸有凶煞巨面的幽狱大门。古国神话称此威灵曰「方相」，以其善吞邪祟，常被绘于十王司相关之物上。
E: The gate of the Shackling Prison, emblazoned with a fearsome visage. Primeval Imperium myths name this spiritus "Fang Xiang," believed to devour evil and often depicted on objects associated with the Ten-Lords Commission.

C: 风景不错的楼顶花园——看得出来，匹诺康尼的筑梦师们对楼高有着极强的执念。
E: A rooftop garden with a nice view. It's obvious that Penacony's Dreamweavers have extreme obsessions when it comes to the heights of buildings.

C: 剧院二楼贵宾包厢外侧的休憩处。渴念「同谐」福音的名流在此互道祝福，随后各自前往包厢领受恩典。
E: A lounge for relaxation located just outside the VIP box on the second floor of the theater. Celebrities who long for Harmony's gospels exchange well-wishes in this place before heading to their boxes and receiving their graces.

C: 前往铸魂区的必经之路，现在已尽是断壁残垣。
E: A necessary path to take when heading to the Soul-Forging Zone. All that remains in the area now are the remnant walls.

C: 与其他长生种禀受「丰饶」之赐不同，持明族源于「不朽」龙祖的恩典。上祷于龙，必蒙垂听。
E: The Vidyadhara originated from the blessing of their dragon ancestor, Long the Permanence, unlike the other long-life species that received the gift of Abundance. Orisons offered to Long will always be heard.

C: 仍待修建与筑巢的大树，折纸小鸟的聚集地之一。
E: A great tree still waiting to be built and adorned with a nest. A place where Origami Birds gather.

C: 挥动球棒，战胜宇宙各处的敌人；寻找宝物，合成星际最强武器——最终，登上「银河球棒侠」之巅吧！
E: Swing your bat and defeat enemies from across the universe. Find treasures and synthesize the most powerful weapons in the cosmos. And ascend to the pinnacle of the "Galactic Baseballer"!

C: 晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号上出售零食船长的小店。\n出售现任船长的周边似乎是店里的一贯特色。
E: A small store selling snacks and the captain's merchandise on board The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand.\nSelling merchandise of the current captain seems to be the selling point of this store.

C: 寒潮降临后逡巡在裂界中的虚影。它扭曲地模仿着银鬃铁卫的身形，其甲胄着装与贝洛伯格的战士们同样严整，头颅却被没有五官的冰棱所取代。
E: Shades that wander in the Fragmentum after the arrival of the Eternal Freeze. They mimic the forms of the Silvermane Guards in a twisted manner. Fitted with the same uniformed armors as the Belobog warriors, its face is however replaced by a sheet of featureless ice.

C: 贝洛伯格的执法者，守护冰雪中残存文明的最后一道阵线。被分配到不同地区的银鬃铁卫职责不尽相同，但共通的是他们保家卫民的决心。
E: The keeper of peace in Belobog, and the final line of defense protecting this last bastion of civilization in the snow. Silvermane Guards allocated to different areas have different duties, but they share a common resolve to protect their home and people.

C: 伴随着黑潮而来的扭曲造物，对杀戮的渴求成为了空洞躯壳中仅存的意志。外形怪异，极具攻击性，毫无理性可言，始终致力于侵蚀与腐化整个世界。
E: A twisted creation of the black tide, driven solely by the urge to kill. Grotesque, aggressive, and irrational, these beings exist solely to spread corrosion and corruption in the world.

E: For every <color=#f29e38ff>#1 Bananas</color> eliminated, randomly trigger <color=#f29e38ff>cross-shaped detonation</color> on the board <color=#f29e38ff>#2</color> time(s).

E: After entering battle, there is a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> base chance to increase Fire DMG taken by all enemies by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s).

C: 「战意汹涌」期间，敌方目标受到的击破伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>，且处于【爆裂】状态的目标被任意单位消灭时会对相邻敌方目标造成<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>点无视弱点属性的削韧。
E: During Surging Grit, increases Break DMG taken by enemy targets by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>. When targets in the "Shatter" state are defeated by any unit, deals <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> Toughness Reduction regardless of Weakness Type to adjacent enemy targets.

C: 我方目标施放终结技攻击敌方目标后，【游侠长弓】发射<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1#(+<unbreak>#14[i]</unbreak>)}</color>支风箭，风箭对随机敌方目标造成等同于<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C2#(+<unbreak>#12[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>基础伤害的风属性伤害，并对相邻敌方目标造成<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color>范围伤害。
E: After any ally target attacks any enemy target using an Ultimate, "Ranger's Longbow" fires <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1# (+<unbreak>#14[i]</unbreak>)}</color> Wind Arrow(s). Wind Arrows deal Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C2# (+<unbreak>#12[i]%</unbreak>)}</color> of base DMG to random enemy targets and <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> AoE DMG to adjacent enemy targets.

C: 我方目标或武器消灭敌方目标时触发【甜美的沉眠】，对相邻敌方目标造成等同于被消灭目标<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1#(+<unbreak>#12[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>生命上限+<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C2#(+<unbreak>#15[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>基础伤害的量子属性伤害。
E: "Sweet Slumber" is triggered when an ally target or a weapon defeats an enemy target, dealing Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1# (+<unbreak>#12[i]%</unbreak>)}</color> of the defeated target's Max HP plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C2# (+<unbreak>#15[i]%</unbreak>)}</color> of base DMG to adjacent enemy targets.

C: 我方目标或武器消灭敌方目标后，【筑城之志】对一名我方目标提供等同于<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1#(+<unbreak>#12[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>基础伤害的护盾，持续<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color>个回合。持有该护盾的我方目标攻击后，造成等同于<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C2#(+<unbreak>#16[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>护盾值的物理属性伤害，若敌方目标的当前生命值低于护盾量的<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C3#(+<unbreak>#14[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>，则消耗护盾并对其造成等同于其当前生命值的固定数值物理伤害，对精英、首领目标额外提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#8[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: After an ally target or weapon defeats enemy targets, "Will of Architects" provides a Shield equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1# (+<unbreak>#12[i]%</unbreak>)}</color> of base DMG to 1 ally target, lasting for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s). After the ally target with this Shield attacks, deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C2# (+<unbreak>#16[i]%</unbreak>)}</color> of the Shield Effect. If the enemy target's current HP is lower than <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C3# (+<unbreak>#14[i]%</unbreak>)}</color> of the Shield Effect, then consumes the Shield and deals a set amount of Physical DMG to the enemy equal to its current HP. This DMG increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#8[i]%</unbreak></color> against Elite and Boss targets.

C: 我方目标连续行动达到<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>次后，在敌方行动前触发【寒冰飞剑】，对随机敌方目标发射<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1#(+<unbreak>#15[i]</unbreak>)}</color>把飞剑，每把飞剑造成等同于<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C2#(+<unbreak>#12[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>基础伤害的冰属性伤害。我方目标每多行动<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak></color>次，增加<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak></color>把飞剑。
E: After ally targets consecutively act <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> time(s), triggers "Frosty Flying Sword" before the enemy's action and launches <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1# (+<unbreak>#15[i]</unbreak>)}</color> flying sword(s) at random enemy targets. Every flying sword deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C2# (+<unbreak>#12[i]%</unbreak>)}</color> of base DMG. Every <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak></color> additional actions performed by ally targets adds <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak></color> flying sword(s).

C: 我方目标击中敌方目标后有<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1#(+<unbreak>#12[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>固定概率使其陷入【挫败】状态。敌方目标陷入其他负面状态时也会陷入【挫败】状态。【挫败】状态下的敌方目标受到的所有伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C2#(+<unbreak>#13[f1]%</unbreak>)}</color>，最多叠加<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>层。层数达到上限时，【虚无的预警】对目标造成等同于<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C3#(+<unbreak>#15[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>基础伤害的量子属性伤害，该伤害对精英、首领目标额外提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#9[i]%</unbreak></color>，同时清除所有【挫败】的层数。
E: After ally targets hit any enemy target, there is a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1# (+<unbreak>#12[i]%</unbreak>)}</color> fixed chance to inflict "Chagrined" to the target. When enemy targets are afflicted with other debuffs, they will also be afflicted with "Chagrined." While in the "Chagrined" state, all DMG taken by the enemy target increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C2# (+<unbreak>#13[f1]%</unbreak>)}</color>, up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> stack(s). When max stacks are reached, "Nihility's Warning" deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C3# (+<unbreak>#15[i]%</unbreak>)}</color> of base DMG to the target. This DMG additionally increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#9[i]%</unbreak></color> against Elite and Boss enemies. At the same time, all "Chagrined" stacks are removed.

C: 【发射】类型的武器施放攻击的次数提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1#(+<unbreak>#11[i]</unbreak>)}</color>次。

C: 角色攻击与受击时会对敌人造成【<u>反震</u>】<color=#f29e38ff>伤害</color>，行动时获得护盾，<color=#f29e38ff>护盾可叠加</color>。
E: When attacking or being attacked, characters deal <u>Quake</u> <color=#f29e38ff>DMG</color> to enemies. When taking an action, gains a <color=#f29e38ff>stackable Shield</color>.

C: 进入「战意阶段4：力量觉醒」时，敌人陷入<color=#f29e38ff>弱点击破状态</color>并触发全部弱点击破效果，我方弱点击破效率提高。已陷入<color=#f29e38ff>弱点击破状态</color>的敌人受到的伤害提高，并在受到攻击时行动延后。
E: When entering "Grit Phase 4: Power Awoken," enemies will have their <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness Broken</color> and trigger all Weakness Break effects. Increases allies' Weakness Break Efficiency. Enemies that already have their <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness Broken</color> receive increased DMG and will have their action delayed upon being attacked.

C: 进入战斗时，我方全体恢复能量。
E: Upon entering battle, regenerates Energy for all allies.

C: 敌方召唤物<color=#f29e38ff>不断刷新</color>，消灭召唤物会使敌方首领<color=#f29e38ff>损失生命值</color>。我方<color=#f29e38ff>追加攻击</color>伤害提高。发动<color=#f29e38ff>追加攻击</color>后，每<color=#f29e38ff>累计命中</color><color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak></color>名敌人，对敌方全体造成一次固定数值伤害。
E: Enemy summons <color=#f29e38ff>continuously refresh</color>. Destroying summons will make the enemy boss <color=#f29e38ff>lose HP</color>. Increases allies' <color=#f29e38ff>Follow-Up ATK</color> DMG. After launching a <color=#f29e38ff>Follow-Up ATK</color>, for <color=#f29e38ff>every</color> <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak></color> enemies hit, deals a set amount of DMG one time to all enemies.

C: 敌方目标回合开始时，持续伤害额外触发<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>次。
E: At the start of an enemy's turn, all DoT sources on it are triggered <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> extra time(s).

C: 你记得丹恒回到罗浮仙舟之后是非不断，很少有机会慢下来四处闲逛…但，他是个喜欢闲逛的人吗？这不重要，因为你和小三月要闲逛了。不出所料，被强行带来听西衍先生讲《开拓豪侠传》的丹恒*如坐针毡*…见此情况，你——
E: You remember Dan Heng getting embroiled in more trouble since his return to the Luofu Xianzhou, with little chance of slowing down to take in the sights... But, is he really someone who likes to wander? This isn't important, because you and March 7th are about to do that. As expected, Dan Heng has been dragged here to listen to Mr. Xiyan narrate the Legend of the Trailblazer. Looks like he's sitting on pins and needles... Seeing this, you...

C: 你在罗浮仙舟上遇到了一位寻找仙药的小孩，他身边无人照顾，似乎还不太清楚，在仙舟寻不到长生——
E: You encounter a child looking for immortality elixirs on the Xianzhou Luofu. He has no one to watch over him, and is seemingly unaware of the fact that immortality will not be found on the Xianzhou...

C: …依然为数字感到焦虑。
E: ...But you are still anxious due to the score.

E: A life is on the line. Better leave such things to the professionals.

E: He's stunned by your wit... Luckily, you got the bat back.

E: I'm a pro at teaching rambunctious kids a lesson. What should I do...

E: "What have I done that made you disrespect me so brazenly."

E: Don't wash your clothes — that'll make Peppy jealous when you get back to the space station.

E: Phase II: Greed Breeds Danger

E: Counter the DMG dealt by Boss Mirage's "Dancing in Dreams" and "Singing in Rain"

E: Turn Back the Tide

C: 银鬃铁卫的戍卫长。\n杰帕德会为士兵提供抵挡攻击伤害的护盾。
E: Captain of the Silvermane Guards.\nGepard will provide soldiers with a shield that can block DMG taken.

C: 以旧世界遗留的科技拼凑制造的自动机器单元，负责替代人类进行最基础的体力劳动。\n战斗中，自动机兵「蜘蛛」的动力非常不稳定，极易在损毁时发生殉爆事故。
E: An automaton pieced together with Old World technology, tasked with replacing humans in performing the most basic forms of physical labor.\nIn combat, Automaton Spiders are highly unstable, capable of exploding when damaged.

C: 代码受到影响后的完整投影。参照本体为大岁阳「燎原」的碎片。融聚众多岁阳碎片，试图重现「燎原」之气魄。
E: A complete projection produced by compromised codes. The referent entity is a fragment of the great heliobus, Ignamar. Gather the numerous fragments of the heliobus to recreate Ignamar's spirit.

C: 饮下呼雷之血，甘当弃子的步离狼卒。
E: A Borisin Wolftrooper that has imbibed Hoolay's blood and willingly became a discarded pawn.

C: 迷失在群星中的跨维度生物，性温，味甘，不可食用。一生中大部分时间花在进食和逃跑上。偶遇它的旅行者视之为吉兆。
E: An interdimensional creature lost in the stars. Docile in nature. Sweet in taste. Inedible. Spends most of its life feeding and fleeing. Travelers who encounter these creatures see them as good omens.

C: 代码受到影响后的错误投影。参照本体为由星核力量幻造而成的虚影，执行着令裂界不断扩张的意志。\n智慧生命的欲求在裂界中投影形成的活体能量，犹如一颗沙砾在蚌壳中凝成了珠贝。然而驱动它的这股欲望早已扭曲，模糊不清。
E: A false projection produced by compromised codes. The referent entity is a shadow manifested by the power of Stellaron, carrying out the Fragmentum's unceasing will to expand.\nA physical embodiment of the desires of intelligent life in the Fragmentum, like a pearl created from a single grain of sand. However, its purpose has long since been twisted and distorted.

C: 在末日来临之前的最后一个黎明，明洁的朝阳也会颤抖着悄然退场。\n黎明的左手善于使用量子属性的力量，针对单个个体发起攻击。
E: At the last dawn before the end, even the bright and clear morning sun will tremble and cower away.\nDawn's Left Hand is adept at drawing upon Quantum power to launch attacks at single targets.

C: 无根自开、凭空生就的幻花。幻胧托体「建木」，炼成肉身，也触及了丰饶的权柄。
E: A phantom flower that blooms without roots and forms out of thin air. Phantylia used the Ambrosial Arbor as her host to forge a physical body and to touch upon Abundance's authority.

C: 反物质军团的绝灭大君「幻胧」自建木中生成的躯壳。\n兼具「毁灭」与「丰饶」之力，生灭循环的肉体。也是建木复生后结出的第一颗「果实」。
E: The body born out of the Ambrosial Arbor by Phantylia, Lord Ravager of the Antimatter Legion.\nThis flesh possesses the powers of both Destruction and Abundance, a form that embodies the cycle of death and rebirth. It is also the first "fruit" borne from the rejuvenated Ambrosial Arbor.

C: 反物质军团的绝灭大君「幻胧」自建木中生成的躯壳。\n兼具「毁灭」与「丰饶」之力，生灭循环的肉体。也是建木复生后结出的第一颗「果实」。
E: The body born out of the Ambrosial Arbor by Phantylia, Lord Ravager of the Antimatter Legion.\nThis flesh possesses the powers of both Destruction and Abundance, a form that embodies the cycle of death and rebirth. It is also the first "fruit" borne from the rejuvenated Ambrosial Arbor.

E: Vagrant
