C: 对我方全体造成少量冰属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Ice DMG to all targets.

C: 对我方全体造成少量冰属性伤害，并使我方行动延后
E: Deals minor Imaginary DMG to all targets and delays the target team's actions.

C: 对指定我方单体造成少量冰属性伤害，并有大概率使受到攻击的我方目标陷入冻结状态。
E: Deals minor Ice DMG to a single target, with a high chance to Freeze the target.

C: 进入蓄力状态，下次行动时对我方全体施放【无尽长冬的绝罚】。
E: Enters the Charging state. The next action casts "Punishment of Endless Winter" on all targets.

C: 进入反击状态，持续1回合。在该状态下受到我方目标攻击后，立即对该目标施放【霜之惩击】。该效果最多触发1次。
E: Goes into the Counter state for 1 turn. If attacked by a target while in this state, immediately use "Smite of Frost" on the attacker. This effect can only be triggered 1 time.

C: 对指定我方单体造成冰属性伤害。
E: Deals Ice DMG to a single target.

C: 阶段开始时，立即召唤【银鬃近卫】和【银鬃炮手】。
E: When the phase starts, immediately summon Silvermane Soldiers or Silvermane Cannoneers.

C: 召唤【辅助机械臂单元】。
E: Summons Auxiliary Robot Arm Unit.

C: 随机召唤【自动机兵•甲虫】和【自动机兵•战犬】。
E: Summons Automaton Beetle and Automaton Hound at random.

C: 对指定我方单体造成冰属性伤害，并有大概率使受到攻击的我方目标陷入【深寒】状态。
E: Deals Ice DMG to a single target, with a high chance to Deep Freeze the target.

C: 召唤建木枝梢【肃风之杪】。
E: Summons Ambrosial Arbor branch "Twig of Wintry Wind"

C: 当呼雷进入【<u>月狂</u>】状态时，每当敌方施放攻击后，为呼雷附加1层【怒意】，若为呼雷攻击，则额外附加1层【怒意】。每当我方施放攻击后，将减少1层【怒意】。【怒意】拥有初始层数，当【怒意】层数叠加到一定值时，呼雷将释放【贪狼逐驰，血色临照】并清除所有【怒意】层数。每当【怒意】由于我方角色攻击被减少至0层时，将削减呼雷的韧性，并重置【怒意】层数为指定层。
E: While Hoolay is in the "<u>Moon Rage</u>" state, applies 1 stack of "Irate" to Hoolay after every attack launched by a friendly unit. If Hoolay uses an attack, additionally applies 1 stack of "Irate." After every attack used by a target, reduce 1 stack of "Irate." "Irate" will have an initial set of stacks. When a certain number of "Irate" stacks is reached, Hoolay will release "Lupine Chase Calls Bloody Gleam" and remove all "Irate" stacks. Whenever "Irate" stacks are reduced to 0 due to attacks from characters, Hoolay's Toughness will be reduced and reset "Irate" to a set number of stacks.

C: 对我方全体造成少量量子属性伤害，并使我方全体能量减少。只能在【惊吓频道】状态下使用。
E: Deals minor Quantum DMG to all targets and causes all targets' Energy to be reduced. This ability can only be used while in the Fright Channel state.

C: 在受到攻击后，会从【狂乱】状态转变为【讥讽】状态。处在【讥讽】状态时，受到攻击后不会切换状态。
E: After being attacked, switches the "Rabid" state to the "Mocked" state. When in "Mocked" state, will not switch states after being attacked.

C: 对我方单体造成物理属性伤害。
E: Deals Physical DMG to a single target.

C: 当自身被弱点击破时将会离开战斗。当自身受到我方攻击时，将会被添加此次攻击对应的属性弱点，至多添加2个弱点。
E: When this unit is Weakness Broken, it will leave the battle. When attacked, Weaknesses corresponding to the attack's Type will be implanted, up to 2 Weaknesses.

C: 本次战斗中，「昔在、今在、永在的剧目」与所有「秩序的傀儡」共享血量。
E: In this battle, "The Past, Present, and Eternal Show" shares HP with all "Puppets of the Order."

C: 本次战斗中，「千面斯科特」与所有「斯科特」共享血量。
E: In this battle, "Thousand-Faced Skott" shares HP with all other "Skott" units.

C: 受到致命攻击时，对攻击者施加1层可叠加的伤害提高效果。【灵魂释放】状态下，施加的伤害提高效果层数增加。
E: When receiving a killing blow, applies 1 stack of stackable DMG Boost effect to the attacker. When in the "Soulfreed" state, increases the applied DMG Boost stacks.

C: 受到致命攻击时，我方额外获得一层【灵魂强化】。
E: When receiving a killing blow, targets will additionally gain one stack of Soul Enhancement.

C: 消耗自身生命值，进入【次级燃烧】并解除【弱点无效】效果。进入【次级燃烧】后自身大幅增强，但所有攻击会消耗自身生命值。
E: Consumes own HP to enter the Secondary Combustion state and dispels the Weakness Protected effect. Becomes significantly more powerful after entering the Secondary Combustion state, but all attacks consume own HP.

C: 使自身进入【尔在光明中】状态，获得护盾，造成的伤害提高，受到的伤害降低，且韧性无法被削减。
E: Enters the "If We Live In the Light" state, gains a Shield, increases the DMG dealt, decreases the DMG taken, and makes Toughness immune to reduction.

C: 对我方单体造成少量量子属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Quantum DMG to one target.

C: 对指定我方单体目标造成虚数属性伤害。
E: Deals Imaginary DMG to one designated target.

C: 连续对我方随机单体目标造成少量虚数属性伤害。
E: Deals successive minor Imaginary DMG to random single targets.

C: 使自身和【哀悯长臂】初始受到的伤害降低，我方目标生命值降低时会积累【濒死梦泡】，当【濒死梦泡】达到上限时，使自身行动提前，下一次行动会进入<u>【死亡的芬芳】</u>状态。在该状态下，移除自身和【哀悯长臂】的受到伤害降低状态。解除<u>【死亡的芬芳】</u>状态时，自身受到伤害并回复我方目标生命值。
E: Decreases the initial DMG this unit and "The Long Arms of Sorrow" receive. When targets lose HP, they accumulate "Desperate Bubble." When "Desperate Bubble" reaches the limit, advances this unit's action and enters the <u>"Fragrance of Death"</u> state in its next turn. Under that state, removes this unit's and "The Long Arms of Sorrow"'s DMG Reduction state. When <u>"Fragrance of Death"</u> is dispelled, this unit will take DMG and restore targets' HP.

C: 本次战斗中，对【阳雷之鸦】、【百眼之末】或【百眼之梢】造成伤害时，【至高，至阳，天空的化身】也会损失相等的生命值。当【阳雷之鸦】、【百眼之末】或【百眼之梢】受到致命攻击时，【至高，至阳，天空的化身】会受到韧性伤害，且【百眼之末】或【百眼之梢】回复生命值并进入不可选中状态。
E: During this battle, upon inflicting DMG to "Daythunder Raven," "Shoot of Hundred Eyes," and "Twig of Hundred Eyes," "Sublime, Radiant, Avatar of the Sky" will also lose an equivalent amount of HP. When "Daythunder Raven," "Shoot of Hundred Eyes," or "Twig of Hundred Eyes" receives a killing blow, "Sublime, Radiant, Avatar of the Sky" will also receive Toughness DMG, and "Shoot of Hundred Eyes" or "Twig of Hundred Eyes" will start healing and cannot be selected.

C: 对指定我方单体及其相邻目标造成物理属性伤害。
E: Deals Physical DMG to one designated target and adjacent targets.

C: 对我方全体造成物理属性伤害，消耗所有<u>【灾难之力】</u>额外造成数次少量物理属性伤害，消耗的<u>【灾难之力】</u>层数越多，伤害的段数越多。
E: Deals Physical DMG to all targets and consumes all <u>"Calamity Power"</u> to additionally deal several instances of minor Physical DMG. The more <u>"Calamity Power"</u> stacks are consumed, the more instances of DMG.

C: 对指定我方单体目标造成少量量子属性伤害。若此时场上有【泡影稚子】处于【向蜃楼冲锋】状态，则造成额外量子属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Quantum DMG to one designated target. If there is any "Mirage Fizzle Kid" in the "Mirage Rush" state on the field, additionally deals Quantum DMG.

C: 对指定我方单体造成伤害。
E: Deals DMG to a single target.

C: 消耗所有充能。对我方全体造成伤害，使陷入灼烧状态的我方目标发生爆炸同时对自身及相邻目标造成伤害，同时解除该目标的灼烧状态。
E: Consumes all Charge. Deals DMG to all targets. Burned target will explode, subsequently dealing DMG to the Burned target and units adjacent to the target. The Burn status will be removed afterward.

C: 扑满陷入恐慌，即将在1个回合后逃离。
E: The Treasure Trotter is panicking and will flee in 1 turn.

C: 进入蓄力状态，下次行动施放【引爆扩散】。
E: Enters the Charging state. Uses Bursting Detonation for the next action.

C: 对指定我方单体造成量子属性伤害
E: Deals Quantum DMG to a single target

C: 对我方全体造成物理属性伤害。
E: Deals Physical DMG to all targets.

C: 关灯
E: Turn the light off

C: 最新普查表明，来到「黄金的时刻」的游客平均身价为<unbreak>3,584,680,988</unbreak>信用点。你达到平均线了吗？
E: The latest statistics show that the guests at the Golden Hour have an average asset level of <unbreak>3,584,680,988</unbreak> credits per person. Have you reached that average number?

C: 冷知识：你在梦境中不必呼吸，不会口渴，也不用进食！但是谁能抵得住花花世界的诱惑呢？
E: In fact, Dreamchasers do not need to breathe, drink, or eat in the Dreamscape! However, who can resist the allure of this enchanting realm?

C: 如果注定一生都只能以打灰为生，那就给每一桶灰都倾注我的灵魂！
E: Even if I'm destined to spend my entire life pouring concrete, I'll pour my heart and soul into every bucket of concrete!

C: 没完没了的会议和形式主义的流程，是艺术创作的最大敌人！
E: Endless meetings and formalistic processes are the greatest antagonists to artistic creation!

C: 故事告一段落后，回到巨星诞生之处
E: After everything has concluded, return to where the superstar was born

C: 参观奥帝商业中心
E: Visit Oti Mall

C: 结识强壮的训物师
E: Make acquaintance with a strong Props Master

C: 参观巨大的黄金扭蛋机
E: Visit the giant Golden Capsule Machine

C: 雅利洛-Ⅵ
E: Jarilo-VI

C: 走为上计
E: Retreat Is the Best Option

C: <color=#f29e38ff>克拉拉</color>希望史瓦罗在封锁矿脉的同时努力获取民众信任，但史瓦罗称自己只为「存护」下层区。希儿要求史瓦罗撤走，与其手下开战。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Clara</color> hoped Svarog could gain the trust of the public while sealing the mines, but Svarog proclaimed to only here to Preserve the Underworld. Seele entered a battle with Svarog's underlings to request for Svarog's retreat.

C: 你成功使用机关装置击破建木枝条，洞天内传来一阵震动。公输师傅提议乘胜追击，以免枝条复生。
E: You destroyed the Ambrosial Arbor branches using the Commission's mechanisms, triggering tremors in the delve. Master Gongshu urged you to press the attack before the branches regenerated.

C: 丹炉熄灭后，符玄率领云骑军赶来，与「药王秘传」魁首丹枢对峙。丹枢执意追求「丰饶」赐下的长生，率领部下向你们发起攻击。
E: After the elixir crucible was extinguished, Fu Xuan arrived with the Cloud Knights, confronting Dan Shu, Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus. Dan Shu, obsessed with the immortality granted by the Abundance, ordered her followers to attack.

C: 丹枫并不后悔自己曾为拯救同伴而做出的选择，反问丹恒愿为你和三月七做出多少牺牲。丹恒的回答是：「一切。」
E: Dan Feng had no regrets about the choice made to save his companions and asked Dan Heng how much he would sacrifice for you and March 7th. Dan Heng's answer was: "Everything."

C: 你进入「一页永恒」。一切都静止在美好的瞬间。这座花园就是昔涟的「记忆」。
E: You entered An Eternal Page. Everything was frozen in the most beautiful moment. This garden was Cyrene's "memory"...

C: 桂乃芬向你介绍「绥园闹鬼」的传说。此地本是一处园林洞天，因人们自发到绥园里的狐眠冢处吊唁故人，久而久之园中便有鬼火幽幽。
E: Guinaifen shared the legend of the "haunted Fyxestroll Garden." Once a tranquil garden delve, it gradually gained a haunting reputation as more people began visiting the Foxsomn Tomb to mourn the departed. Before long, faint will-o'-wisps started drifting through the garden.

C: 景元试探两位将军的来意，怀炎暗示曜青天击将军为建木灾异事件而来。曜青使者<color=#f29e38ff>椒丘</color>与<color=#f29e38ff>貊泽</color>觐见景元，称天击将军正在鳞渊境赏景。
E: Jing Yuan sounded out the two generals' intentions, and Huaiyan hinted that the Merlin's Claw of the Yaoqing had come for the Ambrosial Arbor disaster. Jing Yuan had an audience with the Yaoqing messengers <color=#f29e38ff>Jiaoqiu</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>Moze</color>, who stated that the Merlin's Claw was currently enjoying the scenery at Scalegorge Waterscape.

C: 受伤的末度出现在你和貊泽面前。末度拒绝透露关于呼雷去向的信息，决心像真正的狼一样，与你们战斗至死。
E: Mok Tok appeared before you and Moze. Wounded but defiant, he refused to reveal any information about Hoolay's whereabouts, determined to fight to the death like a true wolf.

C: 你们捡到一台损坏的「家用寻物仪」，是星际和平公司生产的家电。你决定将其带上，说不定在找东西时能帮上忙。
E: You found a damaged Home-Use Object Finder, a household device produced by the Interastral Peace Corporation. You decided to take it along, as it might come in handy when searching for things.

C: 下层区的事情告一段落，「星核」的真相被揭露，当下仍需找到其位置坐标。丹恒称有一位与可可利亚联系密切的人物，或是破局关键。
E: With things in the Underworld settling down and the truth of the Stellaron finally revealed, the challenge of pinpointing its exact location remained. Dan Heng believed someone closely connected to Cocolia might hold the key to breaking the stalemate.

C: 你们发现下一个待解锁的装置被掩在一扇门后面，必须想办法绕路过去。
E: You notice the next device awaiting to be unlocked lay hidden behind a sealed door. You had to find another way around.

C: 公输师傅认为，玄鹿的生命力由建木提供。你们尝试摧毁更多建木缠结，以削弱其恢复能力。
E: Master Gongshu deduced the deer's vitality was sourced from the Ambrosial Arbor. You decided to destroy more coils, crippling its regenerative power.

C: 电视机传出的声音断断续续，似乎在说「梦境酒店修缮中」。
E: The sounds from the television came in intermittent stutters, and it seemed to state that the "hotel in the Dreamscape is undergoing renovations."

C: 你将钟表小子眼睫毛上的奇怪小鸟揪出。小鸟感谢你的救援，称会在「大树」给你报答。流萤带着你前往游览的下一站。
E: You pulled out the strange bird on Clockie's eyelashes. The bird thanked you for saving them, and said they would return the favor at the Great Tree. Firefly then led you to the next stop on your tour.

C: 你成功变回原样，流萤焦急地询问你的情况。桑博称你拿到了名为「片刻自由」的重要材料，是时候让你们领略真正的快乐了。
E: You successfully transformed back into how you used to be. Firefly anxiously asked about how you were, and Sampo claimed that you managed to obtain an important material for "Momentary Freedom." It was now time for you to experience true happiness.

C: 你在第三个垃圾桶中遭遇一只真蛰虫。是时候为民除害了，用球棒告诉它，这里是「存护」的王国。
E: You encountered a True Sting at the third trashcan. It was time to rid the people of this menace. Use your bat to tell it that this is a Kingdom of Preservation!

C: 钟表小子称自己与哈努兄弟、仓鼠球骑士等卡通人物是匹诺康尼的守护者，只能被有童心的人看到。你决定带流萤一起前去解救米沙。
E: Clockie claimed he, Brother Hanu, Hamster Ball Knight, and all the other cartoon characters were Penacony's guardians. They can only be seen by people who are childlike at heart. You decided to bring Firefly with you to go rescue Misha.

C: 瓦尔特与黄泉谈论匹诺康尼本身。黄泉认为美梦正在崩溃，这是人性使然。当人沉溺于只有享乐的梦境时，便是向死亡无可避免的坠落。
E: Welt and Acheron discussed Penacony itself. She believed that sweet dream was on the brink of collapse, a result of human nature. When one is immersed in a dreamscape of pure indulgence, that was their inevitable descent into death.

C: 你劝说银枝放你们进入大剧院，并解释现状，银枝虽理解却坚持骑士原则，提出以决斗裁断是非。
E: You tried to persuade Argenti to let you into the Grand Theater. After you explained the current situation, he sympathized but remained steadfast in his knightly code, insisting on a duel to settle the matter.

C: 你击败十七分熟兄弟，重现逐梦客逆境突围的结局，完成战斗关最终试炼，赢得现场喝彩。
E: You defeated the Beyond Overcooked brothers, depicting the Dreamchasers' breakthrough and completing the final trial. All in attendance applauded you.

C: 一位得「巡猎」真传的忍侠前来讨伐御猿•邪忍，并与乱破相遇。对方称，属于乱破的试炼与狩猎已经完成，可当「缭乱•忍侠」之名。
E: A Ninja Hero who had inherited the true teachings of The Hunt came to defeat Evil Ninja Osaru and encountered Rappa. The hero declared that Rappa's trials and hunting were complete, and that she could bear the title of Dazzling Ninja Hero.

C: 你进入乱破的回忆，变成乱破记忆中的自己。在一处实验室里，乱破输入正确密码，成功突破活体基因编辑舱的收容。
E: You entered Rappa's memory, becoming what Rappa had remembered of you. In a laboratory, Rappa input the correct password, successfully breaking the containment of a live gene-editing pod.

C: 波提欧打败闹事的睡蕉社员们，向其中一人索要社员证。在展开拷问之前，社员没有进行任何反抗就将证件交给波提欧。
E: After defeating the troublemaking Slumbernana Association members, Boothill demanded one of them to relinquish their membership card. Before any interrogation began, the member handed over their ID to Boothill without any resistance.

C: 公园被封锁，猎犬家系称因星核余波。万维克凭身份获准进入调查。
E: The park was sealed off, and the Bloodhound Family claimed it was due to the residual effects of the Stellaron. Using his identity, Wonweek obtained a permit to go in and investigate.

C: 第二块拼图象征羽翼，附带留言温暖鼓励。
E: The second puzzle piece represented wings, together with the warm wishes of his words.

C: 你与白厄、缇宁来到记忆中的命运重渊。见到了记忆中的缇里西庇俄丝。
E: You, Phainon, and Trinnon arrived at the Abyss of Fate within your memories, where you encountered memory-Tribios.

C: 缇里西庇俄丝亵渎火种的行为被发现，昔日圣女如今被圣殿守卫围攻。
E: Tribios was caught red-handed in the blasphemous act of stealing the Coreflame, and the Holy Maiden was encircled by the temple guards.

C: 丹恒被元老院的使者盘查，他由此确定元老院中有人对黄金裔颇为不满。你决定如迷迷所说，代替黄金裔，接受「岁月」火种的试炼。
E: Dan Heng was held up by two messengers from the Council of Elders, and confirmed that the council was dissatisfied with the Chrysos Heirs. On behalf of the Chrysos Heirs, you accepted Mem's proposal to take on the trial of Oronyx's Coreflame.

C: 遐蝶恳请你原谅她的无礼。作为「入殓师」，她想要追溯你灵魂的去向，可惜暂时没有发现。或许再尝试一次，结果会有不同。
E: Castorice asked you to forgive her abrupt behavior. As a mortician, she wished to trace where your soul had gone to, and lamented that she could not find anything yet. She suggested that trying again might help.

C: 铁匠与学徒自顾自地说话，称本该镶嵌于百夫长盾牌上的铭刻被某位少女拿走。铁匠只好与学徒一起，等待少女回来。
E: The blacksmith and apprentice were talking among themselves, saying that the engraving meant for the centurion's shield had been taken by a young girl. The blacksmith and apprentice had no choice but to wait around for her return.

C: 两个孩子掰着手指计算妈妈离开的天数。一，二，三……早已超过手指计数的上限，但妈妈一直没有回来。
E: The two children counted the days since their mother left on their fingers. One, two, three... They had long run out of fingers to count on, but mom still hadn't come back.

C: 你来到斯缇科西亚，却没有见到赛飞儿的踪影。身后传来阵阵阴风，迷迷对迫近的气息有不妙的预感。
E: You arrived in Styxia, but Cipher was nowhere in sight. An icy breeze blew by, and Mem had a bad feeling that trouble was on the wind.

C: 你与白厄被「清洗者」包围。白厄向你解释，「清洗者」是专门暗杀黄金裔的刺客部队。你做好战斗准备，但对方并未发起进攻。
E: You and Phainon were swiftly surrounded by "Cleaners." Phainon explained that "Cleaners" were assassins that specialized in killing Chrysos Heirs. You prepared for battle, but the enemy did not launch an attack.

C: 白厄认为「清洗者」的实力不足以刺杀阿格莱雅，当下必须亲眼确认阿格莱雅的状况。他请缇宝尽力安抚公民，并与你即刻赶回奥赫玛。
E: Phainon did not believe the "Cleaners" were strong enough to kill Aglaea, and wanted to confirm her condition with his own eyes. He asked Tribbie to keep the citizens calm. Meanwhile, you and Phainon rushed back to Okhema.

C: 灵体天马骤然消失。风堇猜测其为露奈比斯的幻影，「阳雷骑士」塞涅俄丝的翼兽伙伴之一。无论如何，你们要去往晨昏之眼的核心。
E: The ethereal pegasus suddenly disappeared. Hyacine guessed that it was an illusion of Lunabis, one of Seliose's winged companions. In any case, you needed to reach the core of the Eye of Twilight.

C: 你完成了一处「电路」的修复。继续前进，去找另一边的算碑吧。
E: You repaired one "circuit," and continued onward to find the tablet on the other side.

C: 风堇念动祷词，将火种献给祭仪水盆。创世涡心星宿中，代表「天空」的星座亮起。
E: Hyacine recited the prayer and offered the Coreflame to the ritual basin. In the Vortex of Genesis, the constellation representing Sky lit up.

C: 白厄在故乡哀丽秘榭的麦田中醒来，他梦见一道神谕：<color=#f29e38ff>「汝将肩负骄阳，直至灰白的黎明显著。」</color>
E: Phainon woke in the golden wheat fields of Aedes Elysiae, his hometown. In his dream, he heard a prophecy: <color=#f29e38ff>"You will bear the blazing sun, until the pale dawn breaks."</color>

C: 来古士警告你，一旦揭开记忆的真容，世界进程便无法回头。他认为你受过星神的瞥视，一定能令翁法罗斯停滞的命运再度流动。
E: Lygus warned you that, once the truth of this memory was revealed, the progress of the world would never be able to turn back. As you had been gazed upon by Aeons, he believed you could definitely set Amphoreus's stalled fate back into motion.

C: 凯撒拒绝接见白厄，并派阿格莱雅与缇宝前来质询。白厄将一切如实相告，指出「再创世」是一场骗局，并劝说世人放弃神谕。
E: The Imperator refused to meet Phainon. Instead, she sent Aglaea and Tribbie to question him. Phainon told them that the Era Nova was a lie and tried to persuade the people to abandon the prophecy.

C: 你在晖长石号遇到知更鸟，她受老奥帝所托，将一个叫做「圣杯」的奇物赠送给你，你的思绪也随之被带回一段时间以前……
E: On the Radiant Feldspar, you encountered Robin, who was entrusted by Old Oti to present you with a Curio known as the "Holy Grail." With it, your thoughts drift back to a time long past...

C: 你在空间站遇到姬子，向她询问列车以及无名客们的近况。姬子邀请你与她一同出发，在列车启程之前，你可以好好考虑自己的选择。
E: You found Himeko at the space station and asked about how the Express and the Nameless were doing. She invited you to come along with her and said you had until the Express's departure to make up your mind.

C: 等到「救世主」归来的那天，风堇将为你架起彩虹的桥梁。护送你前往最后的战场。而命运的最后一棒，风堇拜托昔涟将其交到你手中。
E: When the Deliverer at last returned, Hyacine would raise a rainbow bridge to carry you to the final battleground. As for the final baton of fate, Hyacine had entrusted Cyrene to pass it to your hands.

C: 缇安、缇宁与缇宝在车厢追逐玩闹。英雄们都卸下负担，变回纯真的孩子。所以今天，让缇宝老师也享受下难得的孩童时光吧。
E: Trianne, Trinnon, and Tribbie were having fun chasing each other in the car. The heroes had put down their burdens, and returned to their innocent selves. So, perhaps you should let Lady Tribbie enjoy this rare moment of childhood today.

C: 众人情绪消沉。担心葬身虫腹。三月七鼓励大家打起精神来，越是面对危机，就越要多传递信心。
E: Everyone's spirits were low, worried about becoming bug food. March 7th encouraged everyone to keep their chins up. The bigger the crisis, the more important it was to stay positive.

C: 灵火在逐渐衰弱。真理医生认为，这是「冥火大公」无法再维持它的讯号。
E: The Phase Flame was getting weaker. Dr. Ratio believed that Duke Inferno could no longer maintain its signal.

C: 你与三月七在城中闲逛一番后，想起布洛妮娅发来的邀请函，决定找个时间去拜访「大守护者」。
E: After wandering through the city with March 7th, you remembered Bronya's invitation and decided it was time to pay the Supreme Guardian a visit.

C: 你们发现公司执行外勤的「小组长」，其装甲样式与自动机兵「灰熊」类似，希望「潜爆机兵」的攻击能对其奏效。
E: You spotted an IPC field Team Leader clad in armor that resembled the Automaton Grizzly. You hoped the Automaton Stealth Bomb's attacks would prove effective.

C: 玲可撬开树干，找到了拟态雪蛞蝓。这种蛞蝓在火上烤过之后，口感会变得非常好。

C:
热夜之都曾经的信使们将板鞋扔于一处，短暂沉默之后便各自离开。大多数的信使们不会在这座城市里留下名字，也不会留下痕迹，这种行为不过是一个自我感动的休止音符。

信使们也很难说清从哪一天开始「信使的性质」变了，信使变成了自己最讨厌的人。

不知不觉间，信使保障的「信息独立」变成了垄断；不知不觉间，信使面对的风险变成了价码；不知不觉间，信使成了阴谋家的帮凶…财阀们未能摧毁他们，是不成熟的理想背叛了信使。在一切彻底失控之前，信使们聚集在一起，告别了奔走的生涯。

「也许，信使就应该止步于此，让所有人看清这座城市，让真正的改革者们行动起来。」

这是双弃置于路边的「小黄鸭」板鞋，热夜之都的信使们已经成为了过去的传说。
E:
The former Capital of Passion messengers all throw their sneakers into one spot, and leaves after a brief moment of silence. Most messengers wouldn't leave their name or even a trace in this city, making their behavior nothing but a self-indulgent coda.

Even messengers can't pinpoint when the "nature of being a messenger" had changed to make them the people they hated the most.

Insidiously, the "informational independence" that messengers protected became a monopoly. Insidiously, the risks that messengers faced became a bargaining chip. Insidiously, messengers became the accomplices of conspirators... The financial magnates did not destroy the messengers — It was their immature ideas that betrayed them. The messengers assemble before everything totally spirals out of control, and bid a last farewell to their hurried lives.

"Perhaps this should be the end for the messengers. Perhaps we should let everyone see the truth of this city, and let the true reformists take action."

These are a pair of Yellow Ducky sneakers abandoned on the side of the road. The messengers of the Capital of Passion have long become a legend of the past.

C:
在步离人的语言里，缰绳的别名唤作「亚萨•奇塔」，意即「活的书」。

猎群巫者在双隆月相会之刻、夜空光辉最盛之时，将缰绳作为成年礼物赐予都蓝子嗣们。这条空白缰绳将是记录他们一生战斗历程的卷册。

成年礼甫一结束，步离人必须走进武器牧场，从基因巫术筛选和育种的「器兽」中挑选、驯服自己第一匹战骑。以被征服者为饲料的器兽有着惊人的敏锐和凶残——与未来的主人比起来，器兽们不过是羔羊。月光唤起体内涌动的狂野之血，步离青年们与器兽互相追逐、角斗。有人死于兽吻，那是羸弱的下场；有人诛戮同胞，那是猛兽的分配法…步离青年使中意的坐骑绊倒在地，将带有神经刺鞭的缰绳勒在它的脖颈上——牲畜被未来主人的心灵感应震慑了，就像挨了几百次皮鞭般温驯。当它主动驮起主人时，一名合格的步离人「索牙」（武者、骑手）诞生了。

从此步离缰绳便成为战斗经历的记叙者，缰绳上从此渐渐挂满了划痕、结扣与坠饰。

饱经训练的索牙们在「昂达」（统军百夫长）的带领下穿上水母般的胞衣铠甲，登上能在星际间穿行跳跃的兽舰，开赴不同的世界，发誓将以都蓝与长生主的名义让繁星变作牧场。缰绳之上，浅浅的划痕代表着杀敌的数量，结扣代表其经历的大战，绳上的挂饰则是大掠时获得的战利品：人类的牙齿，智械的硅芯…它们是被征服者的怨怒与哀嚎，也是步离人彰显个体力量的勋章。

当胯下的坐骑殁于战火时，亦或步离人想要施加惩戒时，缰绳也会被取下套在其他活物身上。

这样的对象通常是狐人——那些经由血统选育计划被排斥族外的奴隶阶层，他们弱小、狡诈、只配劳作和运算。当狐人中偶尔出现善战的个体时，狼首的主人会优先将缰绳捆缚在他们身上，驱使他们作为战奴带头冲锋。

若奴隶死伤殆尽，武器折损，缰绳末端系上尖刺也可充作鞭子。要是鞭索断裂，爪牙尽碎，葬身战场，那么这条缰绳将会成为步离人残存的碑铭与纪念……

诚如古谚所云：「森林中，猎手与猎物的地位时常交换」。在宇宙这片黑暗森林中与仙舟人交战数千年后，狼族鞭索断裂已多到数之不尽。最终，这条连接众多猎群的纽带被「巡猎」的锋镝切断，步离人也陷入了内乱与衰败的渊薮，不复昔日的高傲。
E:
In the borisin language, the bridle was also called assa-chita, meaning "the living book."

When the dual rising moons meet, and the night sky is at its brightest, the voodoo masters of the hunting tribe gift bridles to the children of Duran to symbolize them entering adulthood. This blank bridle would become a book that records the history of their battles throughout their lives.

As soon as the adulthood ceremony ends, the borisin youths must walk into the weapon farm, then pick and tame their first battle mount among the "mechabeasts" that have been filtered and bred via gene witchcraft. Mechabeasts that consume the conquered as their feed have astounding agility, perception, and ferocity — Yet they are considered mere sheep when facing against their future masters. As the moonlight stirs the violent blood in their veins, the borisin youths chase and duel against the mechabeasts. Some will die from the beast's kiss — That is the result of cowardice. Some will kill their peers — That is the law of how valiant beasts shall be distributed... The borisin youths trip the desired mount to the ground and tie the bridle, which is inlaid with neural spike whips, onto the animal's neck — The beast will be stunned through telepathy with its future master and become as tame as if they already received hundreds of whiplashes. When the beast willingly carries the master on its back, a fitting borisin sorya (warrior, rider) will have been born.

Then, the borisin bridle will become the recorder of wars, and the reins will gradually become full of scratches, knots, and accessories.

The well-trained sorya dons jellyfish-like membranous armor under the leadership of a yonda (leader, centurion). They then board the beast ships that can warp between stars, explore different worlds, and swear in the name of Duran and the Master of Immortality to make the stars into their herding ground. On the bridle, light scratches indicate how many enemies the owner had slain, knots record how many major campaigns they were involved in, and the accessories dangling from the reins are loot such as human teeth and Intellitron cores obtained from pillaging frenzies... They are the vengeful wails of the conquered, as well as medals for borisin individuals to demonstrate their strength.

When the mounts beneath the warrior perish in warfare, or when borisin wish to mete out punishment, the bridle can also be fastened around the bodies of other living beings.

Their targets are usually foxians — The slave race excluded from the clan due to genetic selection plans. They are weak, devious, and are only fit for lowly labor and calculations. Whenever rare war-like individuals emerge among the foxians, the master of the wolf-head would prioritize binding these foxians with the bridles, driving them as war slaves to serve as vanguards on the battlefield.

If all slaves are dead, and the weapons are bent, then the bridle can still act as a whip if one attaches a spike to the end. If the bridle is snapped and the warrior perishes in war with their fangs and claws shattered, then the bridle will become the sole remaining epitaph and memories for borisin...

Just as the old tales said that "the position between the predator and prey often changes in the forest," countless wolf-kind bridles have been broken and snapped after fighting for millennia against the Xianzhou in this dark forest called the universe. In the end, this link that connects various clans is severed by the sharp arrow of The Hunt, and the borisin also fall into the shadow of internal strife and general decay, becoming ever more removed from their former pride.

C: 反抗命运，一种以确定未来为目标进行的破坏性行为。如果反抗命运本身就是命运的一部分，面对「智识」，自由意志是否也只是自欺的一场谎言？ 心理历史学派成功预言了白锡世界九颗星辰的覆灭，他们在未来模型推演上的成就至今无人超越。继承其衣钵的量子历史学派，却仅是宇宙的笑柄。没人能理解，他们在未来学大会上包庇众多底层学士的动机何在，从事后的角度分析，这一行为招致了学会的报复，让他们分配到最少的算力。但同时，众学士的支持却又让他们成功在四道寰宇难题中占得一席。 未来是确定的还是混沌的？如果卜算出完美的宇宙模型，或许连未来也能被约束进知识的圆圈。 ——《学派战争全史》烛墨史学家，科尔哈桑
E: Resisting destiny — a destructive behavior with the goal of ascertaining the future. If resisting destiny is in itself a part of destiny, in the face of Erudition, is free will also not just a lie of self-delusion? The School of Psychohistory successfully foretold the annihilation of the nine-star cluster of the White Tin world — their exploits in future model extrapolations are unsurpassed. Yet, the Quantum History School that inherited the mantle became nothing more than the laughingstock of the universe. No one could understand their motive for shielding so many lowly scholars in the Futurological Congress. Subsequent analysis of the matter proffered that this act earned the vengeful ire of the Guild, resulting in their allocation of the least amount of computational power. But concurrently, support from the scholarly masses allowed them to secure a seat in the Four Cosmic Conundrums. Is the future certain, or is it chaotic? If a perfect universal model is divined, mayhaps even the future can be confined within the circle of knowledge. — Chronicles of the Scholars' Strife Candelagraph Historian, Kerhasan

C: 箭矢穿过云霄，刺破寰宇，将散落的碎片收集，逝去的英勇将伴随左右，斩除肆虐的邪孽。\n觐见之人请拉动弓弦，鸿雁孤鸣声起，万马千军乍现。

C:
请听取一位可怜老父亲的忠告吧。
即使你身无分文，即使你走投无路，也不要接受围炉氏族的帮助。
本是雅努萨波利斯的高贵家族啊，
因一桩丑闻遭到除名和驱逐。
他们佯言得到雅努斯和欧洛尼斯的双重神谕，
誓要将所有人同感同化。
一个普通的围炉茶话会，成为实施邪典的法坛。
所有与会者的经历与情绪共享，
无论是龌龊的私欲还是高尚的美德。
更卑鄙的是，他们诱骗懵懂之人加入，
我那傻儿啊，你为何离家出走，又为何听信他们的谗言。
E:
Heed the advice of a poor, old father.
Even if you're coinless and at the end of your rope, never, ever seek help from the Hearth Clan.
We were once a prestigious family in Janusopolis,
But we were stripped of our honor and exiled because of a scandal.
Now, they claim to have received prophecies from both Janus and Oronyx,
Vowing to assimilate everyone into their fold.
An ordinary stove-boiled tea session has become an altar for sinister cult rituals.
Each participant's experiences and emotions are now intertwined,
Encompassing both their darkest desires and noblest virtues.
Worse still, they prey on the innocence of others, enticing them to join in.
Oh, my poor, naive son, why did you run away from home and fall prey to their deceitful words?

C: 选择困难（其一）
E: Selection Difficulties (I)

C: 星系中时空曲率最大的地方曾出现疑似「虚无」星神的巨影，祂的影子乃是层层迷雾，曾有学者认为自己得到启示，为追随那道晦暗丢下一切，奋不顾身前往其中，再没有回来过。学界主流观点认为这是有暗地势力刻意布置的陷阱，但据探测，此处确有不同寻常的隐秘能量流动，其原因未知。
E: The places where the space-time curvature are most extreme are suspected to be locations cast in the vast shadow of the Aeon of Nihility. However, as THEIR presence is shrouded in mist and mystery, there have been many a scholar who thought they have received revelations from the Aeon, causing them to leave all behind to seek Nihility's gloom without giving thought or concern to their own safety. In the end, none of them ever returned. It is a common belief among mainstream academic circles that this is a trap intentionally set by hidden powers, but according to survey data, there truly seems to be some kind of unknown energy flowing through these parts for reasons unfathomed.

C: 鲁珀特一世设计的差分机，在第二次帝皇战争期间登上历史舞台。这台恐怖装置在战争中不断提升自身的算力和决策机能，几乎有成为第三代帝皇的倾向。如今差分机的残骸被公司封藏在多个研究所内，任何与它们结合的装置都会遭受反有机方程的入侵，在过载运行后自动瓦解。无人知晓帝皇是如何将方程式写入这些不会思考的零件，它们一刻不停地发出共振，等待着再一次的聚合——「如果这就是天才，那世上还是多些蠢人为好。」
E: A difference machine designed by Rubert I that took to history's stage during the Second Emperor's War. This terrifying device kept increasing its computational power and decision-making capacities during the war, veering on the edge of showing traits that could make it the third machine emperor. Now, the remains of the difference machine are sealed by the IPC inside multiple research institutes, and any device that connects with these remains will be invaded by the Anti-Organic Equation and automatically disintegrate after operating in an overloaded state. No one knows how the emperor managed to write the algorithms into these unthinking mechanical parts. They ceaselessly resonate with each other and wait for their next union — "If this is what geniuses are, then it'd be far better for the world to produce more idiots."

C: 「第一百二十三回对阵：彦卿、景元。」 「将军，咱不比了吧！彦卿好累……」 「不是手中握剑，便有立足不败的信心吗？怎么虚了？」 「哪有侍卫对着要保护的对象动刀动剑的？万一伤着了……」 「你的身手若有你嘴皮子一半利索，眼下我已输了。让你一只手，赶快。」 「不行，得两只手！将军要不让个神君也行！」 「你当是天舶司的买卖，还能讨价还价么？唔，让我想想……」 「有破绽！看招！」 「一早料到了。破！」 「痛痛痛！可恶，彦卿可是等这机会好久了……」 「兵不厌诈，偷袭是个好法子。可惜，你出剑太重气势，藏不住形。这就是所谓的少年意气吧？」 「将军，再来再来！这回我尽量悄没声地动手…」 景元花费了许多精力栽培彦卿，有人揣测他是想栽培后继，也有人说不过把这孩子当成秘密武器使唤。景元从未予以回应。 随着彦卿的技艺日渐精深，成为罗浮仙舟上罕有匹敌的战士，景元逐渐开始考虑如何收敛彦卿的锋芒，给予他失败的考验却又不至于摧折他。 过刚易折，过利则损。宝剑不仅需要锋刃，更需要约束锋刃的剑鞘。在景元看来，彦卿成长得很快，快的出乎预料。此时彦卿需要的已不再是力量，而是收敛和运使力量的经验——而这些，只有时间能给他。
E: "Bout #123: Yanqing, Jing Yuan." "General, let's call it a day! I'm exhausted..." "Didn't you say you have the confidence to remain undefeated as long as you hold a sword? Why are you acting so weak?" "What kind of retainer would take up arms against the person they vowed to protect? What if I accidentally hurt..." "If your sword is half as quick as your mouth, I'd already have lost. I'll keep one hand behind my back. Now, be quick!" "No no, two hands behind your back, please! Or maybe you can consider not using the Lightning-Lord, general?" "You think it's like the Sky-Faring Commission's business, where you can barter your way out? Hmm, let me see..." "Aha — a weakness! Watch this!" "I knew you'd do that. Counter!" "Ow-ow-ow, darn it! I'd been waiting for ages for my shot." "All's equal in war, and sneak attacks are a good idea. It's too bad your sword is so focused on the flourish and can't conceal its form. Is this what they call youthful vigor?" "General, let's go again! This time I'll try to be as inconspicuous as possible..." Jing Yuan spent much time and energy raising Yanqing. Some speculated that he was cultivating an heir, while others claimed he kept the kid around just to use as a secret weapon. Jing Yuan never offered a response. Yanqing became an unrivaled fighter aboard the Xianzhou Luofu as his skills grew more and more advanced. Jing Yuan gradually began thinking about ways to restrain Yanqing's edge, to take him down a peg without curbing his confidence. Too solid and it can shatter. Too sharp and it can blunt. More than just a sharp edge — a sword also needs a scabbard that can restrain it. In Jing Yuan's view, Yanqing has grown up exceedingly fast — beyond expectations. What Yanqing needs right now is not more strength, but the ability and experience of curbing that strength — something that can only manifest over time.

C: 「小子，你真行啊…用神乎其神的手段搬光了我的产业。但我绝不会投降，大不了，我就把这里全炸咯…你能怎么办？」 伊伊玛尼喀的「疯牛」示意手下松手，他从桌子上抬起头来，拍了拍衣领上的灰尘。 「你们，高高在上的公司狗，根本看不起流浪者，对吧？但你现在在我们的地盘，就得按我们的方式。」 「疯牛」清空弹匣，往枪中装入一粒子弹，丢在他脚边。 「六次，最多六次枪响之后，生死由命。你敢不敢？」 他蹲下来，捡起枪。 「用枪指着我的人太多了，甚至有人直接扣下了扳机…但你猜，为什么我还能站在这儿？」 他站起来，逼视着「疯牛」的眼睛，举起枪，抵住自己的心脏。 「因为最后，枪都会来到我手里。」 「而现在，这个游戏令我有些厌烦了…六分之一的概率远远不够，要挑衅命运——」 六声连续的枪响在死寂的星舰中炸开，烟尘过后，他再次举起枪，朝「疯牛」走去，而弹匣里有一颗新的子弹。 「就得先学会把自己变成骰子。」 「——你不肯投降，但凭什么？就凭这拙劣的概率游戏？还是……」 他调转枪口，指向黑暗中的某处。 「她？」 枪口所指的方向，一位同样举着手枪的女士缓缓出现。看到她的一瞬间，「疯牛」仿佛抓到了救命稻草。 「翡翠女士，这和说好的不一样……」 就在同时，两人开枪，在双方各自背后的暗处，两个黑衣人应声倒下。 「公司的敌人还真是无处不在，对吧？」女士从容地收起手枪，拿出化妆镜，检视了一下自己的仪容。 「拿你我的生命作饵，让他们争相啄食，误以为这是一场内讧，却被一网打尽…不错的诡计，只不过太惊险了些。」他微笑着欢迎对方的到来，双手却微微颤抖。 「诡计？不，只是一场测试罢了。」 优雅的女士摊开手掌，一枚闪烁着奇异色泽的「砂金石」躺在她的手心。 「没什么奇怪的，被渴望，被追逐，被切割，被出售…这都是宝石的宿命。」 「但你还是有许多可做的，全凭你怎么看待自己。」
E: "You're quite something else, boy... I still can't figure out how you managed to empty out my entire business. But I will never surrender. If push comes to shove, I'll just blow up this whole place... What are you gonna do about it?" The Mad Bull of Iymanika signals his followers to let go. He raises his head from the table, dusting off his collar. "You arrogant dogs from the IPC never respected us wanderers, did you? But now that you're in our territory, you'll play by our rules." Mad Bull empties the cylinder, putting only one bullet in the revolver, and tosses it to the other man's feet. "Six shots. Fate will decide whether we live or die after a maximum of six shots. Do you have the nerve?" The other man bends down and picks up the revolver. "There are too many people who've pointed a gun at me. Some of them even just went ahead and pressed the trigger straight up... Now, guess how come I'm still standing here." The man stands up, stares into the Mad Bull's eyes, raises the gun, and puts it against his own heart. "It's because the gun will always end up in my hand." "And now, this game is making me bored... One in six? That possibly is nowhere near enough. If you want to tempt fate..." Six consecutive gunshots thunder out in the starship that is wrapped in a deathly silence. After the smoke clears, the man raises the gun again and walks toward Mad Bull. The revolver is now loaded with a fresh bullet. "You need to learn how to turn yourself into a die first." "...You won't surrender, but why? Because you have this lousy game of chance? Or..." He points the gun into the darkness. "Because of her?" A woman holding a pistol emerges slowly from the direction the revolver points. The Mad Bull acts as if he found a lifeline when he sees her. "Madam Jade, this is not what we agreed upon..." At that moment, both of them opened fire simultaneously, and two figures dressed in black fall from the shadows behind each of them. "The IPC has enemies everywhere, right?" The woman calmly holsters her pistol, takes out her cosmetic mirror, and inspects her appearance. "You used our lives as bait, making them believe there was internal strife between us, and then you eliminated them all... A clever trick, although a bit reckless." He greets the woman with a smile, although his hands tremble slightly. "Trick? No, it was just a test." The elegant lady opens her palm, revealing a shimmering aventurine of peculiar hues. "There's nothing strange about it. Gemstones are destined to be... desired, sought, cut, and sold." "However, there's so much more you can do. It all depends on how you see yourself."

C: 关于那位自称「真理医生」的维里塔斯•拉帝奥，其人如他的研究一般充满争议。在拉帝奥的故乡，至少有八部讲述他传奇事迹的纪录片，十几部关于他的回忆录，可评论众多，却没有足够有说服力的观点。为填补空缺，笔者亲自前往，拜访了对拉帝奥的成长有重要影响的荣德教授。荣德教授年事已高，已无法正常言语，却在笔者提起拉帝奥姓名时难掩激动之情。在其家人和学生的协助下，笔者拿到一封泛黄却保存完好的推荐信。  「 尊敬的第一真理大学录取委员会： 我是银河自由大学的数学系荣休教授荣德。素闻贵校爱才重教之名，我想推荐一位名为拉帝奥的学生来贵校攻读学位。虽然拉帝奥目前只是一位中学生，但其在数学、物理、乃至哲学上的思想已远超一般大学的本科要求。 教学期间，拉帝奥以远超预期的速度解开了复杂的数学方程。与此同时，我班上的本科生甚至无法理解那些概念。出于好奇，我私下与他分享了一份关于荣德猜想的手稿。虽然我是这一猜想的提出者，但我始终无法将其证明。在经过日日夜夜的讨论后，他提出了一个美妙且惊人的巧思， 一举完成了最后的论证。该论文近期即将刊发，届时您就能明白我所言并非虚假。 在这段时间的相处中，拉帝奥展现出了非凡的感知力、好奇心与创造力。他每日早早地起来锻炼，随后便一头扎进知识的海洋。他也许是最符合普世观念中天才形象的人，激情、深刻、热烈和…天生的强势。 限于当地学校无法开展更高水平的科学课程，我衷心希望贵校能够接纳拉帝奥就读。我以我的名誉保证，他一定会取得超越这个时代的成就，为贵校享誉银河的学术声誉再添荣光。 致以最好的祝愿， 荣德 哲人历██年██月██日 」 ——摘自《智慧之为特权：解密真理医生》第九页
E: Veritas Ratio, who calls himself "Dr. Ratio," is as contentious as his research. In Ratio's homeworld, there are no less than eight documentaries detailing his legendary exploits, and over a dozen memoirs about him. However, despite the plethora of commentaries, none of them seems to provide a compelling perspective. To fill this void, I personally visited Professor Rond, who had a significant influence on Ratio's upbringing. Though advanced in years and unable to speak coherently, Professor Rond couldn't contain his excitement at the mention of Ratio's name. With the help of his family and students, I obtained a yellowed yet remarkably well-preserved letter of recommendation. "To the respected admission committee of the University of Veritas Prime: I am Rond, Professor Emeritus of the Department of Mathematics at the Cosmos Liberty University. Given your institution's reputation for valuing talents and education, I would like to recommend a student named Ratio to advance his studies at your university. Although Ratio is a secondary school student at the moment, his mastery of math, physics, and even philosophy has far exceeded the requirements for an undergraduate degree in many universities. While he was under my tutelage, Ratio managed to solve complicated mathematical equations at an unexpectedly staggering speed. The undergraduates in my class struggled to even comprehend the concepts. Out of curiosity, I shared a manuscript about an equation named Rond's Conjecture in private. Although I'm the one who proposed the equation, I've been unable to prove it. After days of discussion, Ratio came up with a brilliant and stunning idea that managed to finally prove the equation in one strike. The paper will be published shortly, and you will see that I am speaking the truth. Ratio showed remarkable perception, curiosity, and creativity during the time we spent together. He wakes up early every morning to exercise before diving straight into the sea of knowledge afterward. Perhaps, he is exactly what everyone would picture a genius to be — passionate, profound, fervent, and inherently dominating. Due to the lack of more advanced science programs at local schools, I sincerely hope that your esteemed institution will accept Ratio's enrollment. I can vouch for him on my reputation that he will definitely achieve accomplishments that transcend this era and bring glory to your widely-renowned institution. Best wishes, Rond ██ ██ ██, Philosopher Calendar" Extracted from page 9, Wisdom as a Privilege: Decoding Dr. Ratio

C: 「假面愚者」的成员之一，难以捉摸，不择手段。\n危险的戏剧大师，沉迷于扮演，身怀千张假面，能化万种面相。\n财富、地位、权力…于花火而言都不重要，能让她出手的，唯有「乐趣」。
E: A member of the Masked Fools. Inscrutable and unscrupulous.\nA dangerous maestro of theatrics, utterly engrossed in the art of performance. Adorned with innumerable masks, she is the hero with a thousand faces.\nWealth, status, power... None of those matters to Sparkle. The only thing that can get her attention is "amusement."

C: 自称「巡海游侠」的旅人，本名不详。身佩一柄长刀，独行银河。\n\n淡漠寡言，剑出如紫电般迅猛，却从来只以刀鞘战斗，收而不发。
E: A drifter claiming to be a Galaxy Ranger. Her true name is unknown, and she walks the cosmos alone, carrying with her a long sword.\n\nThough aloof and taciturn, her blade flicks out like lashing lightning. And yet, she always strikes with her scabbard, never drawing the sword free.

C: 那刻夏：与神对谈的黄昏
E: Anaxa: An Afternoon's Dialogue With the Divine

C:
目光从陌生的天花板上移开后，你看着周围的各色「奇物」，脑袋中似乎残留着一个女人的声音，只是现在的情况不允许你确定自己是否能马上清晰地回忆起她。
「当你有机会做出选择的时候，不要让自己后悔。」
于是你选择先听这位「三月七」与刚刚那位已经离开的「丹恒」的话，至少，他们看着不像是坏人。
好了，现在路上有了伴，先离开这里吧。
E:
You move your gaze away from the unfamiliar ceiling and look at the variety of Curios around you. A woman's voice echoes in your head but you're in no position to confirm whether you can clearly remember it.
"When you have a chance to make a choice, make one that you know you won't regret..."
You decide to first listen to March 7th and Dan Heng, who had just left. At least they don't look like bad people.
Alright, now that there are companions, it's time to leave this place.

C: 你踏上星穹列车，结识了一群志不同道不合的同伴，好在他们的态度都还算友善。\n一段不知终点的星间流浪之旅即将开启，或许你真的在不经意间把自己卷进了某部科幻电影的拍摄片场。\n根据列车长帕姆的通报，「跃迁」即将开始——鉴于你还是个星际穿越新手，最好还是找个地方坐稳扶好吧。
E: You board the Astral Express and become acquainted with a group of companions who may not always get along, but are all at least friendly.\nA journey with an unknown destination between the stars is about to begin. Maybe you really did accidentally stumble upon some set of a Sci-Fi movie.\nConductor Pom-Pom announces that the warp jump is about to begin — seeing that you're still new to interstellar travel, best you find a seat and hang on tight.

C: 你们平安着陆雅利洛-Ⅵ，却发现此处只有冷冽的霜风和无垠的雪原向各位表示欢迎。\n毫无头绪的你回想起姬子的话：成功的开拓需要「探索」、「了解」、「建立」和「连结」…现在大概是正处于「探索」的阶段吧——\n无论如何，现在恐怕只剩下在风雪中前进，或者等星核自己找上门这两种选择了。
E: You land on Jarilo-VI safely, but now find yourselves standing in frigid winds among barren snowfields stretching as far as the eye can see.\nFeeling stuck, you recall Himeko's words: Successful trailblazers must learn to explore, understand, establish, and connect... Maybe this is what exploring looks like.\nIn any event, your options are now clear: Push through the snow or wait for the Stellaron to miraculously appear by itself.

C: 你和同伴击退裂界生物，保证了克拉拉的安全。你本想借此机会说服克拉拉将大家带到史瓦罗面前，可惜她是个比三月七更透彻、更坚持自己信念的孩子…因此，这次交涉以失败告终。\n但是，这次交流也并非没有收获：你们觉察到了或许能令她和史瓦罗松口的突破口——接下来，只需找到克拉拉重新交涉即可。\n克拉拉应该就在附近不远处，仔细搜索吧。
E: You and your companions defeated the Fragmentum organisms and secured Clara's safety. You wanted to take the opportunity to persuade Clara into bringing you to Svarog, but she has a firmer and clearer conviction than March 7th... Your persuasion ended in failure.\nHowever, all is not lost. You've noticed a breakthrough that could make her and Svarog talk — all you have to do now is to find Clara and revisit the conversation.\nClara should be close by. Search carefully for her.

C: 为了令搜索行动事半功倍，停云展示了工造司发明的便利工具——一只寻人追物的机巧犬「谛听」。\n利用谛听，你们找到了停云。
E: To make searching operations exponentially easier, Tingyun has introduced a handy tool invented by the Artisanship Commission — Diting, an ingenium dog used for tracking.\nWith Diting, you have successfully tracked down Tingyun.

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•枪火的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将扮演钟表小子动画系列亦正亦邪、充满魅力的形象——哈努兄弟。\n「这到底是要比什么？」你想，「比谁的『哼』更酷吗？」
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Gunfire Trial arena. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role of the evil-retributing, charisma-overflowing character from the Clockie series — Brother Hanu.\n"What is this competition supposed to be about?" You wonder. "Are we trying to see who has the coolest 'hmph'?"

C: 列车组终于胜利会师，与你们一道的还有忆者黑天鹅及罗浮将军景元。\n将军与公司的各位要员约定就谐乐大典一事先行磋商，并邀请列车组的各位前去旁听——尤其是你，{NICKNAME}。你根本没有拒绝的理由，不是么？
E: The Express Crew finally reunite victoriously. Accompanying you are Black Swan, the Memokeeper and Jing Yuan, the Luofu General.\nThe General and various IPC dignitaries have agreed to hold talks regarding the Charmony Festival incident — and they have invited the Express Crew to be present... You in particular, {NICKNAME}. You have no reason to turn down this offer, right?

C: 你费了好大工夫，才让被家族管控的迷因把你送到了这个鸟不拉屎的地方。这里没看到什么目标的线索，天气差得要命，但麦芽果汁还凑合。\n外面的人吵个不停，可能是欠爱了。
E: You spent a great amount of effort to get the meme controlled by The Family to send you to this dump. Not much here looks helpful, and the weather's been a nightmare, but hey, the malt juice ain't half bad.\nThose sons of a nice lady causing a ruckus outside need some serious chill pills.

C: 你们刚买来的猴子就这么跑了，果然不能相信大学同学在校园里给你推销的业务。\n快追吧，匹诺康尼的消费者权益保护法可没那么到位。
E: Your recently acquired monkey has run away. As suspected, you can never fully trust university peers who are promoting stuff.\nGive chase. The consumer protection laws in Penacony is not robust enough to protect your rights.

C: 实际惊险！原来虾蟇•忍者并非叛忍，而是心中另有妙算，真乃智囊忍也。此刻，借助你的忍法潜入缭乱•忍侠的追忆片段中，寻找救度众生的甘露吧！\n直视忍者的过往可能会发生应激反应，请自备救心丸、镇静剂与尿不湿。
E: Thrilling! Turns out Ninja Gama is not a renegade ninja, but a wise ninja with a solid plan. Now, use your ninjutsu to dive into the Dazzling Ninja Hero's fragmented memories in search of the panacea that promises the world's salvation!\nStaring a ninja's past in the face may trigger stress responses. Please bring your own heart medications, sedatives, and adult diapers.

C: 名为缇宝的女孩借助奇妙的时空复现能力帮助难民脱离了险境，一行人即将安全奔赴奥赫玛。
E: A girl named Tribbie aids the refugees to lead them out of danger, using her remarkable ability to replicate space and time. The group is now preparing for a safe departure to Okhema.

C: 列车车厢受袭迫降，好在我们并无大碍。初步判断，这个世界有文明存在。我们决定提高警惕，探索这片完全未知的土地。
E: The coach was forced to make an emergency landing, but thankfully, we were both unharmed. Our initial assessment suggests that this world contains civilization. We resolve to remain vigilant as we explore this unfamiliar land.

C: 「圣城」奥赫玛…据说是如今的末世长夜中，唯一的永昼之地。我们决定在城中游历一番，了解此处风土人情，同时收集可靠信息。
E: Okhema, the holy city... It is said to be the only place with eternal daylight amidst the end times' long night. We decide to tour the city to familiarize ourselves with the area and gather reliable information.

C: 「圣城」奥赫玛…据说是如今的末世长夜中，唯一的永昼之地。我们决定在城中游历一番，了解此处风土人情，同时收集可靠信息。
E: Okhema, the holy city... It is said to be the only place with eternal daylight amidst the end times' long night. We decide to tour the city to familiarize ourselves with the area and gather reliable information.

C: 「粉霞天女」风波差点闹出人命。我们以暴露天外来客身份为代价救下了执着的达米亚诺斯，只是，如此一来…便违背了对阿格莱雅的承诺。
E: The "Rosy Celestial Maiden" fiasco almost caused someone their life. We rescued the persistent Damionis at the cost of exposing our identities as guests from beyond the sky. But in doing so... we broke our promise to Aglaea.

C: 我们成功进入了三相神殿。只是，欧洛尼斯并不欢迎我们，反而以各种谜题刁难，阻止我们进入神殿深处。
E: We successfully entered the Temple of the Three Fates. However, Oronyx does not welcome our presence and complicates our path with various puzzles, blocking us from reaching the temple's deeper chambers.

C: 自重渊归来，我们再次兵分两路。我与白厄前去援助死战多时的万敌，而{NICKNAME}则利用欧洛尼斯赋予的力量，收集记忆碎片，想办法前往悬锋城的往世，与遐蝶一同破解尼卡多利的不死神躯。
E: After returning from the Abyss, we split into two groups. Phainon and I headed to assist the battle-worn Mydei, while {NICKNAME} planned to harness Oronyx's power to gather the memory fragments. Once this was done, we would devise a plan to journey into Castrum Kremnos' past, where we would join forces with Castorice to destroy Nikador's immortal body.

C: 遐蝶向寡言的斗士格奈乌斯坦露了此行的目的。一行人继续前行，沿途收集情报，誓要将尼卡多利的五瓣神魂归位，阻止不死神躯的诞生、重铸纷争泰坦的荣耀。
E: Castorice reveals the true purpose of our mission to Gnaeus, the silent gladiator. The party presses on, gathering information on the way, vowing to return Nikador's five soul fragments to their rightful place to prevent the creation of their immortal divine body, and to reforge the glory of the Strife Titan.

C: 尼卡多利一战，以黄金裔的胜利作结。我们返回奥赫玛，经过休整，将一同见证泰坦火种的归还与火种试炼的开启。
E: The battle with Nikador ends with the Chrysos Heirs' victory. We return to Okhema to rest and recover. Together, we will witness the return of the Titan's Coreflame and the start of the Coreflame's trial.

C: 对于我们伸出援手击败尼卡多利一事，阿格莱雅表现出真挚的谢意，诚备厚礼、邀我与{NICKNAME}前往英雄浴池一叙。
E: Aglaea shows sincere gratitude for our help in defeating Nikador, preparing generous gifts and inviting {NICKNAME} and I to the Hero's Bath for a discussion.

C: 为了复现记忆、完成对克拉特鲁斯的承诺，*我们*悄悄来到命运重渊，寻找历经当年岁月的事物。
E: To replicate memories and fulfill the promise to Krateros, we quietly visit the Abyss of Fate, searching for objects that have witnessed those years.

C: 重回故乡，缇宁不禁睹物生情，也回想起许多本已忘却的人、事、物。
E: As Trinnon returned to her homeland, familiar sights stirred forgotten memories within her — of people, moments, and treasures she thought time had washed away.

C: 元老院如你所料派出了使者抢在阿格莱雅行动前将你带到了黎明云崖。在这里，你将接受众元老们的庇护。\n元老们已经知晓你的到来，跟随传令兵前去会面吧。
E: The Council of Elders dispatched a messenger, as you anticipated, to escort you to Dawncloud before Aglaea could make her move. Here, you will be under the Elders' protection.\nThey await your arrival. Follow the Messenger to meet them.

C: 计划有变，赛飞儿希望{NICKNAME}与遐蝶在奥赫玛城外会面。\n出发，前往斯缇科西亚。
E: Plans have changed. Cipher hopes that {NICKNAME} can meet with Castorice outside Okhema.\nOnward, to Styxia.

C: 斯缇科西亚，巨龙与海浪的城邦。如今，那冥河却把这凄惨的城池团团围拢。\n前路阻断，会飞的迷迷能使出欧洛尼斯的奇迹，复原远处塔楼中的「奇迹宝珠」。
E: Styxia, the City-State of Dragons and Waves... At present, the River of Souls has encircled this pitiful city.\nThe path ahead has been severed. Mem, capable of flying and using Oronyx's Miracle, has restored the Miracle Orb in a distant tower.

C: 阿那克萨戈拉斯的「贤者之石」、斯缇科西亚的炼金法阵，以及遐蝶手中灵魂的残留，炼金的准备业已齐备。\n根据树庭的资料来看，「万物因四根的组合而生成，因四根的分离而消失」。完成炼成阵法，召唤泰坦。
E: With Anaxagoras's Philosopher's Stone, Styxia's alchemical array, and the spiritual remains in Castorice's hands, the alchemical preparations are ready.\nAccording to data from the Grove, "All things come into being through the combination of the Four Roots and perish with their separation." Complete the alchemical array and summon the Titan.

C: 晨昏之眼，被冠以泰坦神名的天空壁垒，既是遥远年代天空一族的故乡，也是如今艾格勒的栖地。在风堇的帮助下，我们踏上了这片域外之地，找寻那位制约天幕的泰坦。
E: The Eye of Twilight, a sky barrier named after a Titan, was both the homeland of the Sky people in ancient times and now serves as Aquila's dwelling. With Hyacine's help, we have set foot on this outworld land to find the Titan who binds the sky.

C: 真相十分苦涩——塞涅俄丝早已对族人彻底失望，而风堇一族的血脉，则传承自一位未被肃清的无名黄金裔，好在她并未因此黯然。事已至此，我们将直面「晨昏之眼」艾格勒，为这段天空的因缘画上句点。
E: The truth is extremely bitter — Seliose had long since lost all faith in her kin. Hyacine's bloodline leads back to an unnamed Chrysos Heir who escaped the purge, yet thankfully, she refused to let this black moment shape her. Now, we shall confront Aquila, Eye of Twilight, and bring closure to this saga of skies and predestination.

C: 将{NICKNAME}与白厄接送至树庭后，赛飞儿找来「贼灵」巴特鲁斯，回到冥滩一阵搜刮…
E: After dropping {NICKNAME} and Phainon off at the Grove, Cipher rounded up the "Spirithief", Bartholos, and returned to the Nethershore for a bit of scavenging...

C: 克拉特鲁斯向我传达了阿格莱雅的死讯，而随后衣匠发来的短信也证明了他所言非虚，我相当震惊。摆脱「清洗者」的纠缠，我立即赶回奥赫玛，和{NICKNAME}汇合后，向同伴们了解情况…
E: Krateros brought word of Aglaea's death, and the Garmentmaker's message that followed confirmed it, I was stunned. After shaking off the "Cleaners," I returned to Okhema at once. Upon reuniting with {NICKNAME}, I sought out our companions to learn what had happened...

C: 螺丝咕姆先生的现身无疑是一个转机，我们对翁法罗斯的状况有了新的认知。\n应他的请求，{NICKNAME}将留在翁法罗斯临机应变，而我会按照原定计划返回列车，与列车组的其他成员汇合后，商讨下一步的计划。
E: Mr. Screwllum's arrival marks a definite turning point, giving us fresh insights into Amphoreus's condition.\nFollowing his request, {NICKNAME} will stay behind in Amphoreus to adapt to changing circumstances, while I'll return to the Express as planned to regroup with the other Crew members and formulate our next course of action.

C: 异乡的故事，异乡的风。
E: Stories of a foreign land, carried on a foreign breeze.

C: 权杖内核层已严重损毁，宛如废墟。要想在此搜寻德谬歌的痕迹，无异于大海捞针。真是欲盖弥彰呀，这只说明一件事——\n我找对地方了。
E: The Scepter's kernel is severely damaged, little more than rubble. Seeking traces of the Demiurge here would be like finding a needle in a haystack. How revealing... This only confirms one thing...\nI'm exactly where I need to be.

C: 为了忘却的纪念——阿兰请你帮忙拍下呜呜伯们围在纪念碑旁的照片。
E: A commemoration held in order to forget — Arlan asks you to help snap a photo of Wubbaboos surrounding the monument.

C: 幸得你身手过人，此去有惊无险，总算找齐了所有的备用电源。\n现在该带着电源与希望回到电梯口了，科员们还在等着你。
E: Thanks to your outstanding skills, the trip posed no real dangers as you finally collected all the backup batteries.\nIt's time to return to the elevator with the batteries and hope. The researchers are still waiting for you.

C: 冥火的力量在逐渐消散，看来这是一场消耗战
E: The infernal fire's power is gradually being reduced. Seems like this is a battle of attrition.

C: 小机器人为你规划好了路线，第一站就从贝洛伯格开始吧。
E: The little robot has planned a route for you. First stop, Belobog!

C: 要和鼹鼠党的老朋友相见，你格外激动，却又倍感可惜——早知道要来这儿，应该多带几本练习题……
E: Knowing that you are going to meet with your old friends in the Moles, you feel a rush of excitement — as well as a pang of regret... If you knew you were coming, you'd have brought a few more exercise books...

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n贝洛伯格，还挺热闹。四处转转，说不定能撞上熟人。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nBelobog's quite lively. Taking a stroll around, might bump into familiar faces.

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n意见收集完了，平票。没办法，找希儿决定吧。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nFinished collecting ideas. It's a split vote. Oh well, let's find Seele and get her to decide.

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n布洛妮娅带我们到了个新地方。比永冬岭还往北。想看看前面有什么。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nBronya took us to a new place. It's even more up north than Everwinter Hill. Wanna see what's up ahead.

C: 矿车工老师傅为你准备了眼前的「矿车难题」——三下五除二地解决掉吧。
E: The senior mine cart operator prepared the Mine Cart Puzzle in front of you. Solve it promptly.

C: 虎克大人自说自话地出发了，说是在铆钉镇安全的地方等你。可是铆钉镇被裂界侵蚀，哪里都称不上是安全。\n保护好虎克大人是荣誉队员的职责，尽快去找到她，早点把她带回来吧。
E: Hook sets off alone, saying she will be waiting for you at a safe place in Rivet Town. But this town is corrupted by Fragmentum. Nowhere is safe.\nIt's the duty of an honorary member of the Moles to protect Hook, so you need to find her and bring her back as soon as possible.

C: 你在铁卫禁区再次遇到了希莉儿…她已经不再是一个小女孩了。\n希莉儿仍在被类似的箱子谜题困扰着，她需要你的帮助。
E: You bump into Cyrille again in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone... And she's no longer a little girl.\nCyrille's still being confounded by box-like puzzles puzzles and needs your help.

C: 根据铁卫的指示，击败盘踞在矿山硐室的裂界生物
E: Under the Silvermane Guard's command, defeat the Fragmentum creatures occupying the mining chambers

C: 卢卡将他的「修炼计划」告知了你和希儿，并且希望你们能够全程陪同，见证他的成长。\n试炼的第二个目标简单粗暴——把渗透到机械聚落的裂界怪物清理干净。\n一个强大的裂界怪物出现在你们面前——干掉它吧！
E: Luka tells you and Seele about his "trial plans" and wants you to accompany him the whole way to witness his improvement.\nThe second goal of the trial is simple and brutal... clear out all the Fragmentum monsters that have entered the Robot Settlement.\nA powerful Fragmentum monster appears before you. Get rid of it!

C: 怀着好奇和兴奋的心情，你重新踏入了贝洛伯格的领地。\n或许这次也会有什么奇妙的冒险故事发生？谁知道呢……
E: With curiosity and excitement, you step into Belobog's domain once again.\nPerhaps some wondrous adventure would happen this time as well? Who knows...

C: 用于投影展示的「微缩胶卷」失窃了，没有了这带胶卷，历史区将无法顺利开放。\n结合华劳斯与布洛妮娅等多方的线索，你们有足够的理由认为名叫诺尔伯特的贵公子参与到了这次展品失窃案中。\n根据线索，诺尔伯特最近经常出没于上层区受到严重侵蚀的商业街。
E: The microfilm used to display projections was stolen. Without this film, the History Exhibit cannot open to the public.\nCombining clues from Wallace, Bronya, and others, you have enough information to conclude that a wealthy youth named Norbert is involved in the exhibit thefts.\nAccording to the clues, Norbert has been frequenting the Overworld shopping street that is severely corroded by the Fragmentum.

C: 用于投影展示的「微缩胶卷」失窃了，没有了这带胶卷，历史区将无法顺利开放。\n你和佩拉来到了没落的商业街，追查嫌疑人诺尔伯特公子的下落。\n诺尔伯特的言谈已经揭露了他既是展品贩子的不争事实。继续前进，把他捉拿归案。
E: The microfilm used to display projections was stolen. Without this film, the History Exhibit cannot open to the public.\nYou and Pela arrive at the desolate shopping street to chase down Norbert, the suspect.\nNorbert's words and actions have already revealed the indisputable fact that he is the artifact peddler. Keep going and take him into custody.

C: 十王司判官请求你们将她护送至星槎渡口。横生的建木枝蔓，失控的魔阴身与孽物…想必这一路定然不可能一帆风顺。
E: The Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission requested you to escort her to the Starskiff Jetty, with overgrown Ambrosial Arbor Vines and uncontrolled mara-struck individuals and abominations along the way... It is nearly impossible for the journey there to be smooth sailing.

C: 星槎的培育分为几个阶段，铖杰师傅想要见证的是，星槎从一枚种子长成一艘大船的过程。\n你也来过几次迴星港，说不定你从未注意过，星槎竟然是从培养舱里长出来的。
E: The cultivation of a starskiff is divided into several phases. Chengjie wanted to see the process between a starskiff seed and a fully cultivated vessel.\nYou have been to Stargazer Navalia a few times, but you probably haven't noticed that starskiffs are grown in an incubator.

C: 铖杰师傅好像从低落情绪之中调整了过来，就像他说的，完成老师的夙愿便是一段佳话，可惜这件事没有发生…去星槎海，再和铖杰谈谈吧。\n老师帮他卸下了枷锁，但是他要去往哪里，还得看他自己。
E: Chengjie seems to have recovered from his depressed episode. As he said, completing his master's final work could be a good closure, but this did not happen... Go to Starskiff Haven and talk to Chengjie again.\nHis master helped him unload the pressure he placed on himself, but it is still up to him to decide where to go next.

C: 接下来就要到显龙大雩殿了，不出意外的话，那些藏在暗处的刺客们应该是不会再随便出手了。当然，不出意外的话，可能还会再出意外。\n遇到意外也不要慌张，丹恒现在依然非常可靠，你应该相信丹恒。
E: Your about to arrive at the Dragonvista Rain Hall next. If all goes as expected, those hidden assassins probably won't be able to attack as they please. Of course, the expected might still be followed by the unexpected.\nStill, even if something happens, it's not a big deal. Dan Heng's always reliable. You can always count on Dan Heng.

C: 小聪希望你能见证他向静斋表白成功。\n首先，他得成功。你有一种预感，小聪把这件事想得太过简单了。\n说真的，要是一首诗就能表白成功，那这世界的律法肯定会崩溃吧。
E: Cong hopes that you can witness his successful confession to Jingzhai.\nBut first, he has to succeed. You have a hunch that Cong is approaching this a little too simplistically.\nTo be honest, if just a poem is enough for a successful confession, then all the rules of this world will certainly fall apart.

C: 按照钟珊的指挥修理好这些机兵吧。但说真的，这种「机械生物」能让那群大善人买账吗？
E: Follow Zhongshan's direction to repair these automatons. But seriously, can you really sell these "mechanical creatures" to the Benevolent Ones?

C: 事实是没有人偷走了孤云，是孤云自己偷走了孤云。无论是作为犯人还是受害者，孤云应该向你们解释清楚。\n跟随孤云继续前进。
E: The mystery's solved: Nobody stole Guyun. It just made itself "gone with the wind." Culprit or victim, Guyun owes everyone an explanation for what happened.\nFollow Guyun and continue onward.

C: 另一边，景元、丹恒与灵砂来到正收拾残局的幽囚狱中，试图从步离人的突袭中辨出蛛丝马迹，试图捉住那只隐于幕后搅动风云的黑手。在此过程中，往日旧事种种再度重提……
E: On the other side, Jing Yuan, Dan Heng, and Lingsha arrive at The Shackling Prison, where all are busy picking up the pieces of the breakout. The trio examine the aftermath of the borisin's surprise attack, in search of clues that may help them catch the mastermind stirring up trouble from behind the scenes. Along the way, past events are revisited...

C: 受怀炎将军所遣，三月七与云璃登上竞锋舰参与演武仪典。除了要在擂台上争逐胜利，她们还要承担起抵御危机，戍守擂台的职责。只是，初登场的少女剑士难免心怀忐忑……
E: General Huaiyan tasks March 7th and Yunli with boarding the Skysplitter and participating in the Wardance. Apart from striving for victory in the arena, they must also take up the responsibility of defending the arena against potential crises. However, the young swordswoman who will be making her debut can't help but feel anxious at such a prospect...

C: 另一边，三月七也察觉到了竞锋舰上的异样，试剑的时刻终于来临。
E: Meanwhile, March 7th has also noticed the unusual events aboard the Skysplitter. The time for her to put her swordsmanship skills to the test has finally come.

C: 离开查德威克的心绪空间，回到匹诺康尼的梦境中。
E: Leave Chadwick's Emoscape and return to the Dreamscape in Penacony.

C: 通过见证「湛蓝爵士」的过去，你修正了关于那几位筑梦师的记录，把知道的消息都告诉惠特克爵士吧。
E: You fixed the records for those Dreamweavers by witnessing Dr. Blues' past. Go tell everything you know to Sir Whittaker.

C: 经历了匹诺康尼的许多变故之后，知更鸟决定离开盛会之星，踏上自己的旅途。\n告别之前，拍一张合照作为纪念吧。
E: After the tumultuous events in Penacony, Robin has decided to leave the Planet of Festivities, embarking on her own journey.\nBefore she leaves, take a group photo with her as a cherished memento.

C: 播散文明种子的第一站，雅利洛-Ⅵ！
E: First stop for spreading the seeds of civilization: Jarilo-VI!

C: 第二站，仙舟「罗浮」！\n景元将军似乎不在，那就去找符玄「将军」吧。
E: Second stop, the Xianzhou Luofu!\nGeneral Jing Yuan doesn't seem to be around, so let's go find "General" Fu Xuan.

C: 根据「防盗门怪谈」亲历者提供的坐标，找到防盗门，并调查出「怪谈」背后的真相。
E: Follow the coordinates provided by the person who witnessed the Security Door Anecdote, find the security door in question, and unveil the truth about the "ghost story."

C: 为了「鼹鼠党振兴计划」，尤利安打算继续秘密配送「地火」留下的快递。\n这件快递包裹上署的名是说唱歌手伊妮丝，去机械聚落找到他吧。
E: For the Moles' Reinvigoration Plan, Julian plans to keep secretly delivering the packages Wildfire had left behind.\nThis package should be sent to Eunice the rapper. Find her in the Robot Settlement.

C: 老吉尔伯特希望你能把他推迟退役的消息转达给女儿莉拉。\n在那之前，他希望你能去花店为他的女儿选一束花——至于要选什么种类的花，决定权在你。
E: Old Gilbert wants you to tell his daughter Lila that his retirement will be delayed.\nBefore that, he wants you to buy a bouquet for his daughter at the florist's — It's up to you to decide what kind of flower to buy.

C: 丹鼎司洞天重开之后，鱼龙混杂。仅仅依靠护珠人在海滩巡逻是不够的，他们向善良勇敢的志愿者发出了邀请。\n护珠人跃渊希望你能参与海滩巡逻…真是的，守护这片沙滩的人到底是谁呢？
E: After the Alchemy Commission delve reopened, people honest and crooked walked betwixt each other. As such, the Pearlkeepers alone are no longer enough to patrol the beach. They have offered invitations to brave and noble volunteers for the task at hand.\nYueyuan the Pearlkeeper hopes that you can help patrol the beach... Seriously, though, who's the one that actually protects this place?

C: 这面镜子原来是一个模因：来自「流光忆庭」的信使悄悄来到列车，并希望与你达成某个交易。她说：你的记忆非常珍贵，忆庭愿意用珍贵的物资换取你的记忆。为此，你必须进入忘却之庭中诱发回忆，好让忆庭将它们取走。\n从来没见过这么复杂的系统包装，对吧？
E: This mirror turns out to be a memetic entity. A messenger from the Garden of Recollection had quietly boarded the Express in the hope of making some kind of deal with you. She says your memory is very precious, and that the Garden is willing to exchange precious materials for it. Doing so requires inducement of memories inside the Forgotten Hall, so that they can be extracted.\nYou've never seen such a complex system packaging as this.

C: 你凭借着自己的智慧给出了最优解。\n去「棋鬼」旁边领取宝箱奖励吧。
E: You provided the optimal solution with your superior intellect.\nClaim your treasure chest reward next to the Chess Ghost.

C: 即使是纵横棋坛三百年的老将也不是你的对手，看来最强棋手的称号非你莫属。
E: Even a seasoned player who had been facing opponents for three hundred years wasn't your match. Seems like you are the undisputed winner of the title "Strongest Player."

C: 火种匣里存放着「清洗者的名录残卷」，好像知道了什么不得了的事。\n伊来内请求你打开下一个火种匣。「余火」会在其中吗？
E: The Coreflame Casket contains the "Cleaners' Fragmented Roster" — it seems you've uncovered something extraordinary.\nAlain asks you to open the next Coreflame Casket. Could the Embers be within?

C: 请与法政科的创始人古恩沟通，帮忙补足列车物资。
E: Speak with the founder of the Department of Galactic Geopolitics, Gunn, and help to replenish provisions on the Express.

C: 丢失的奇物竟然在一名叫「管家」的造物手里，它是谁？它在哪儿？你和佩佩两眼一抹黑，在走丢的造物处，它们似乎知道「管家」的信息……
E: The lost Curio is currently held by a creation known as "butler." Who is this butler? And where can they be found? Despite lacking any information, you might uncover new leads by locating the lost Curio...

C: 邓恩邀请你参与铁卫禁区的联合演习。\n作战的第一步目标是突破禁区的封锁线，找到办法打开大门吧。
E: Dunn invites you to a joint training in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone.\nThe first aim is to break through the blockade line in the restricted zone, so go ahead and find a way to open the gate.

C: 你清除了残响回廊里残余的所有威胁。\n去和奥列格汇报战果吧。
E: You cleared out all threats remaining in the Corridor of Fading Echoes.\nReport the situation to Oleg.

C: 泰坦的恩赐无处不在，奥赫玛也不例外。探寻过往的奥秘，重启神秘的仪式。
E: The Titan's blessing surrounds us, as does Okhema. Uncover the mysteries of the past and reignite the mystical ceremony.

C: 在风堇的委托下，你答应去拜访那些树庭牺牲者的家属，了解一下他们的近况。\n但或许除此以外，你能做的还有很多。
E: You promised to visit the families of those who lost their lives at the Grove and find out about how they're doing at Hyacine's request.\nAside from this, however, you might be able to do something more...

C: 祭台被重塑，作为特产的心酿也再一次回到了欢宴客的视野中，去和他们聊聊吧。
E: The altar has been reforged, and the signature soul brew has once again caught the attention of the banquet guests. Go have a chat with them.

C: 就像被什么人下了什么奇怪的诅咒那样，星穹列车乘员和驭空的会面似乎总会陷入某种尴尬的情境。你和瓦尔特不想被卷入别人的家事，还是先离开司辰宫吧。希望下次和驭空见面，气氛能和平一些……
E: As if being struck by some strange curse, meetings between the Astral Express crew and Yukong always seems to be tied to some kind of awkward situation. Welt and you don't want to be involved in other people's family affairs, so it's best to leave the Palace of Astrum first. Hopefully the atmosphere will be less tense the next time you meet with Yukong...

C: 银狼引起的风波终于告一段落，但伦纳德依旧忧心忡忡。\n为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，他请求你协助进行一项测试……
E: The troubles caused by Silver Wolf have abated, but Leonard still looks concerned.\nHe's asking for your help to carry out a task that will improve the space station's cybersecurity and help him keep his job...

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你前往机械聚落，收集「自动机兵•甲虫」的战斗数据，以便博物馆制作复制品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan needs your help to collect Automaton Beetle combat data at the Robot Settlement to help the museum make a replica.

C: 阿克赛准备带你进入古代遗迹，开始你的探宝之旅吧！
E: Aksay is taking you into an ancient ruin. Begin your treasure hunting journey!

C: 这注定是一场史无前例的决斗。你和那位玩家将共同升至巅峰，沸腾的热血足以点燃冰原的寒风。即使某日你们连记忆都已模糊，这场景也会一次次出现在你们的梦中，仿佛琥珀封存的宝藏。\n就让游戏开始吧——
E: This moment is fated to be a duel most unprecedented. You and the other player achieved twin ascents in sync, and the fire in your veins flows more than capable of igniting the cold winds carried upon these frosted plains. Even should someday your memories erode and succumb to vagueness, this scene will appear time and time again in your dreams, like a treasure encased eternally in the embrace of amber.\nLet the games begin...

C: 《以太战线》的核心玩法便是「对决」——挑战不同的玩家，证明自己的实力吧！
E: The core gameplay loop behind Aetherium Wars is "dueling." Challenge different players and show your true strength!

C: 青雀说「沙盘当然有第二种解法」，现在就按照她的想法在沙盘中就位吧。
E: Qingque says the sand table always holds an alternative solution. Follow her instructions and arrive at your destined position in the sand table.

C: 来到长乐天的街巷中，你见到几人围着一方小小棋盘如丧魂魄。都什么年代了，在街边摆个残局来夺人魂魄，真是毫无效率。岁阳们应该学学公司，靠资本主义收割人类的灵魂。
E: As you arrive in the streets of Exalting Sanctum, you notice a few people who appear possessed, gathering around a plain-looking chessboard. What an old trick! How inefficient it is to put an unfinished chess game at the side of the road to rob people of their souls? What year is it? Heliobi should really take notes from IPC on how to harvest souls through capitalism.

C: 十妖在林，不如一妖在手。岁阳唯一该去的地方，就是绥园中的镇妖塔。
E: The only good heliobus is a captured heliobus. The only place they should go is the Suppression Towers in Fyxestroll Garden.

C: 小院之中堆放了许多从凶宅中取出的杂物。四处调查一番，也许去往下一处的线索就隐藏其中。
E: Many items removed from the haunted residence are stacked in the small courtyard. Look around, and you might find the clue for your next destination buried within.

C: 你收到了掘掘博士的短信。他告诉你，磐岩镇的搏击俱乐部正在举办一场新赛事。在这场惊险刺激的「斗技表演赛」中，参赛者需要使用各种武术技巧击倒对手。为了磨练战斗技艺，更为了丰厚的奖金，你决定前往参加。
E: You receive Dr. Dig's message, which informs you that Boulder Town's Fight Club is now hosting a new tournament. In this adrenaline-pumping and thrilling "martial exhibition," the participants must use various martial arts to defeat opponents. In order to hone your battle skills — and even more so for the tantalizing rewards — you decide to participate too.

C: 美食庆典正在进行中！去问问杰伊今日需要什么食材吧。
E: The gourmet carnival is in progress! Ask Jay what ingredients are needed for today.

C: 一些帮忙建设美梦小镇的小鸟被意外困住了，你必须帮助哈努兄弟解救它们。
E: Some of the birds that helped build Dreamville have been trapped by accident. You have to help Brother Hanu rescue them.

C: 哈努兄弟必须找到能够操控监狱电脑的秘钥，以此解开封闭了通道的隔离门。
E: Brother Hanu must find the passkey that controls the prison's computer, which can unlock the door that blocks the passageway.

C: 有些地方太高上不去？哈努兄弟早就想到了解决办法！\n只要化身闪电，再远的距离也只需要“咻”一下就能抵达了。
E: Are some places out of reach? Brother Hanu has already found a solution! \nIf you turn into lightning, you'll be able to teleport to any distance with a "swoosh."

C: 《美梦往事》剧组接受了匹诺康尼商贩的合作方案，筹备了一部名为《哈努兄弟大劫案》的广告片，去帮帮忙吧！
E: The Dreamjoy Memoir crew accepted the collaboration from Penacony merchants and planned a commercial named Brother Hanu's Great Heist. Go help them!

C: 见习医师伦道夫已经准备好了今日的离散忆质收容计划，去帮伦道夫拍摄目标所在的位置吧。
E: Trainee Healer Randolph has prepared the retrieval plan for the scattered memoria today. Help him film the location of the target.

C: 有一位哲学貘曾经说过：「么么么～么！么么！」\n这句话翻译成无名客通用的语言是这样的：\n「白昼如梦，夜梦方为真实。」
E: A philosophical tuskpir once said: "Moo moo moo~ Moo! Moo moo!"\nTranslated into the language used by the Nameless, it means:\n"The day is like a dream, and dreams are reality."

C: 折纸大学的校庆正在进行中，其中最为盛大的活动——「音乐派对」即将开启。\n学生们都在为音乐派对做准备，氛围相当热烈。机会难得，陪知更鸟在校园里逛逛吧。
E: Paperfold University's anniversary is happening in full swing and the music party — the biggest event in this festival — is about to begin.\nAll the students are preparing for the music party and the atmosphere is getting heated. It's such a rare opportunity. Have a stroll in the school with Robin.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n乐队组建完毕，跟随乱破去看看演出舞台的情况吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nThe band has been created. Go check out the stage with Rappa.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n得到扑满的节奏记录，帮助乱破收集作曲用的灵感吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nObtain a record of the Trotter's beats to help Rappa collect inspiration for composing.

C: 桑博即将在店里上架新的宝贝…不过在此之前，他还需要你的帮助。
E: Sampo is about to add some new treasures to the store... but before that, he still needs your help.

C: 三月七希望和朋友一起分享获奖的喜悦，为邀请到的朋友们拍摄合影留念吧。
E: March 7th wants to share the joy of winning with her friends. Take group photos as a keepsake for the friends she has invited.

C: 在地宫中，每座房间都被封印把守，而这间受制于「扎格列斯之手」。只有完成它的试炼才能继续前进。
E: Every room in the hypogea is protected by a seal, and this one is controlled by the "Hand of Zagreus." You will need to complete its trial before you can continue any further.

C: 你们越走越深，来到了一片颇为空旷的房间…\n扎格列斯信徒将偷窃视为圣事。若要解开这里的封印，必须先完成「扒手」的试炼才行。
E: As you enter deeper and deeper, you find yourself in an open and spacious room...\nDisciples of Zagreus regard theft as a holy sacrament. If you wish to undo the seal here, you will have to complete the trial of "pickpocketing."

C: 在「情商」配方的助力下，真理医生为素裳上了一堂精彩、成功、妙趣横生的课程。\n这份配方还有另一种功效尚未调制…回到临时吧台准备接待下一位客人，或者为真理医生再调制一杯调饮吧。
E: With the help of the "EQ" Recipe, Dr. Ratio delivered a brilliant, successful, and entertaining lesson to Sushang.\nThis recipe has another effect yet to be mixed... Return to the makeshift bar to serve the next guest, or mix another drink for Dr. Ratio.

C: 机缘巧合之下，你成了这只小小的大地兽的监护人。而且，你还听说，它身上似乎有着能够成长为传奇生物的潜质…？总之，在这段时间里，就按照你的方式培养它，让它恢复健康，并茁壮成长吧。
E: By a twist of fate, you've become the guardian of this tiny dromas. And word has it that it might have the potential to evolve into a legendary creature...? For now, raise it in your own way, help it recover, and watch it grow strong.

C: （可选）在跃迁前随便逛逛
E: (Optional) Look around before the warp jump

C: 在雪原中寻找文明的迹象
E: Search for traces of civilization in the Snow Plains

C: 在歌德大饭店休息
E: Have some rest at the Goethe Grand Hotel

C: 和布洛妮娅散步聊天
E: Talk and walk with Bronya

C: 与希儿等人会合
E: Meet up with Seele and the others

C: 与希露瓦交涉，借机械屋藏身
E: Talk to Serval and hide at the workshop

C: 搭乘星槎，前往星槎海中枢
E: Take a starskiff to Central Starskiff Haven

C: 寻找另一条路追击卡芙卡
E: Find another path to pursue Kafka

C: 抵达「白日梦」酒店
E: Arrive at The Reverie Hotel

C: 调查可疑的电视机
E: Investigate the suspicious television

C: 继续跟随流萤，抵达筑梦边境深处
E: Continue following Firefly to reach the depths of the Dream's Edge

C: 前往家族议事厅，直面星期日
E: Head to The Family's council chamber and face Sunday

C: 分发最后一点宝石
E: Distribute the last of the gems

C: 在第三幕中前进，配合完成演出
E: Advance through Act III and work together to complete the performance

C: 前往贵宾休息区寻找丹恒
E: Head to the VIP Lounge Rest Area and find Dan Heng

C: （可选）尝试使用「钟表把戏」
E: (Optional) Try using clockwork

C: 挥洒墨彩！大破邪阵！
E: Splash the colored ink! Shatter the wicked formation!

C: 飞矢已出，继续追逐普利蒙蕉授
E: The arrow has been released. Continue pursuing Profnana Primon.

C: 调查扭蛋机
E: Investigate the Capsule Machine

C: 对梦境进行调律
E: Tune the Dreamscape

C: 骑上大地兽，前往圣城
E: Ride the dromas and head to the holy city

C: 前往屋顶
E: Head to the rooftop

C: 接受阿格莱雅的拷问，最好坦诚些吧
E: Submit to Aglaea's interrogation — it's better to speak the truth

C: 继续前进，深入悬锋城
E: Continue onward deep into Castrum Kremnos

C: 尝试利用奇迹典籍修复天秤
E: Try using the Tome of Miracles to repair the scales

C: 谒见「永夜之帷」欧洛尼斯
E: Have an audience with Oronyx, Veil of Evernight

C: 在遐蝶的帮助下与彷徨的亡灵对话
E: Speak with the wandering spirit with the help of Castorice

C: 清理能源区的异常
E: Clear the abnormalities in the Energy Supply Zone

C: 前往算力区
E: Go to the Computing Zone

C: 前往更深处，调查人偶信号
E: Head deeper to investigate the puppet's signal

C: 与终端交互，尝试与博识尊对话
E: Interact with the terminal and try to speak with Nous

C: 观看白厄与万敌交谈
E: Observe Phainon conversing with Mydei

C: 阅读缇安找到的信件
E: Read the letter Trianne found

C: 继续探索龙骸古城，前往更高处
E: Continue exploring Dragonbone City and head higher

C: 继续探索龙骸古城，沿着过去的锁链继续向上
E: Continue exploring Dragonbone City and proceed upward with the chains of the past

C: 尝试利用奇迹宝珠，穿过幕墙
E: Try using the Miracle Orb to pass through the curtain wall

C: 揍趴挡路的怪物
E: Knock out the monsters blocking the way

C: 继续，下一处宝藏！
E: Keep hunting for the next trove!

C: 「汝将肩负骄阳，直至…黎明显著…」
E: "You will bear the blazing sun, until... dawn breaks..."

C: 酒剧落幕
E: End of Brew Play

C: 以凯撒之名，批阅记忆的谏书
E: Review the Epistle of Remembrance in Imperator's name

C: 跟昔涟一起逃离这里
E: Escape with Cyrene

C: 与「赞达尔」交谈德谬歌
E: Talk to Zandar about the Demiurge

C: 召集「最后的泰坦」们，准备迎战铁墓
E: Gather the "Last Titans" and prepare to face Irontomb

C: 启动仪式，打破「负世」的绝望
E: Initiate the ceremony and break the Despair of Worldbearing

C: 熄灭绝望，带走另一半负世的印记
E: Extinguish despair and take the other half of the Worldbearing mark

C: 找到阿兰，倾听空间站的星声余音
E: Find Arlan and listen to the space station's star echo remnants

C: 与阿德勒交谈
E: Talk to Adler

C: 跟随佩佩前进
E: Follow Peppy

E: Please select the assist you want Qingque to provide you today
