E: Pass the Final Sword Trial

C: …嗯，没有出现「星神」或「令使」等级的虚数反应。放心吧。
E: ...Yes, we haven't seen any Aeon or Emanator-level imaginary reactions. Relax.

C: 谁知道呢？以前的事我全都不记得了。
E: Who knows? I don't remember anything before that.

C: 这个世界所处的虚数定域遇到了…某种情况。列车行进的轨道被某种东西堵塞了。
E: The complex locality of this world has been... affected somehow. The star rail has been blocked off by something.

C: 怎么样——准备好出发了吗？
E: Well, are you ready?

C: 如果他在仙舟上，那么所有人——瓦尔特先生，三月七和{NICKNAME}——都有危险！
E: If he's on the ship, then Welt, March, and {NICKNAME}... everyone is in grave danger!

C: 景元，你不是其中之一。
E: You are not one of them, Jing Yuan.

C: 星核猎手，你们在打什么主意…仙舟联盟可不像我们这么好说话。被「{RUBY_B#岚}巡猎{RUBY_E#}」盯上，你们就不再是猎手，而是猎物了，联盟会追逐你们到宇宙尽头——
E: What exactly are you Stellaron Hunters trying to do...? The Xianzhou Alliance aren't us — they won't give you time to explain. Once you draw the attention of {RUBY_B#Lan}The Hunt{RUBY_E#}, you become their prey. The Alliance will hunt you to the end of the universe...

C: 没有。
E: Never.

C: 那我下次能申请休息吗？
E: Can I skip the next mission and get some rest?

C: 好羡慕你们喔，帕姆现在还不能离开这辆列车……
E: Pom-Pom is so jealous of you guys. Pom-Pom still can't leave the train yet...

C: 仔细一看，竟然发现有一个图标酷似普通文档的游戏软件潜藏其中。
E: A closer look reveals a game software with an icon resembling an ordinary document lurking amongst the clutter.

C: 卡芙…卡？
E: Kafka...?

C: 你没事吧，阿兰？艾丝妲很担心你。
E: Are you alright, Arlan? Asta's been worried about you.

C: {NICKNAME}，你想好再回答哦。
E: {NICKNAME}, think carefully about how you wanna reply to that.

C: ——我就是这个性格嘛！这次又没惹祸…习惯就好了…你看，丹恒他就习惯了。
E: ...That's just my charm! And I didn't cause any trouble. You just have to get used to me... Look, Dan Heng agrees, right?

C: 根据预测，军团即将进行十个波次以上的连续袭击，大家扛住！
E: Our measurements predict that the Legion is about to unleash over ten waves of continuous attacks. Everyone, brace yourselves!

C: 我也这么认为，但事后追究起来，全责一定在我啊。
E: I agree. But when the investigation's over, the blame will fall entirely on my shoulders.

C: 奇物藏品？
E: Rare item collection?

C: 看我不好好揍你几下，别逃，你……
E: I'll knock some sense into you yet... Hey, where do you think you're go— Argh...

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着镜流：「0分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Jingliu: "0 points!" it announces.

C: 每个生命体都应当拥有一套完整的「分装快乐」，快乐永不嫌多。
E: Every living being should own a complete Joy Filtration Set. One can never have too much joy.

C: 你是…机器人？
E: You're... a robot?

C: 我叫{NICKNAME}。
E: My name is {NICKNAME}.

C: 我还有别的选择吗？
E: Do I have any other choice?

C: 唉呀，你打心底就是这么想的——在我面前就别装了，我都看得出来。
E: Oh come on, you know that's what you want deep down inside. I can see it on your face.

C: 你帮了我一个大忙：让空间站免于反物质军团的毒手。黑塔虽然不会自认欠我一份人情，但之后我有什么请求，她也不会拒绝我——
E: You've done me a huge favor by defending the space station from the Antimatter Legion. And know that while Herta may not admit it, she owes me one. And she will not refuse me if I ask for a favor in return...

C: 不过我跟着列车碰到的事都很千奇百怪啦。
E: But every encounter I've had since coming aboard the Express has been strange to say the least.

C: 歇一会儿吧，不打扰你了。对了，把你的信标地址给我——有什么事，好联系上你。
E: I guess I'll leave you to rest up a bit for the time being. By the way, what's your beacon address? That way if anything happens, I can contact you.

C: 对了，别看帕姆那副样子，列车很久没有新乘客了，它对你还是很感兴趣的。
E: Also, don't mind Pom-Pom's antics. They're actually pretty interested in you. It's just that we haven't had new passengers on the Express for a long while.

C: 当一个生物跃升成为星神后，祂就会拥有「命途」的执掌权；祂可以任意搬运该命途中的虚数能量，同时也被「原动力」所束缚。
E: Upon ascending to Aeon-hood, that being gains power over the Paths, free to choose the allocation of imaginary energy however THEY wish, while suffering the restrictions of the "Primum Mobile."

C: 关于派系…
E: About the factions...

C: 这些派系拥有和我们一样的星际跃迁能力。想要在银河中顺利旅行，很难不与他们打交道。
E: These factions possess the same power as us to voyage between worlds. It would be hard to travel through the galaxy without them.

C: {NICKNAME}，丹恒，你们看那边的巷道！
E: {NICKNAME}, Dan Heng, the alley!

C: …请个别大人旁听就好，这是针对孩子的历史之旅……
E: ...And perhaps the grownups among us could remain silent? This is a children's program...

C: 你今天不开张吗，希露瓦？
E: Is the shop not opening today, Serval?

C: 第一，我虽然名义上是朗道家的大小姐，但实际上早就被赶出家门了。什么显赫的家室呀，早就是过去式了。
E: Firstly, even though I am the eldest daughter of the Landau family, I was actually kicked out of the family a long time ago. All that stuff about prestigious family... it's long been a distant memory.

C: 确实值得庆贺。
E: Worth celebrating, I'd say.

C: 已经这么久了啊…
E: It's been so long...

C: 没关系的，女儿，我们以后有的是机会…等会儿，你刚才说「杂志社」？
E: That's okay, my child, we've got all the time in the... did you say "publisher"?

C: 毕竟你的谈吐很端庄。
E: After all, you are very dignified in your speech.

C: 行吧，看在你请客的份上…
E: You have my attention... as long as the afternoon tea keeps flowing.

C: 我是没想到，她居然表现得那么豁达…也没说什么挽留的话。她该不会只是想找个理由召见我，然后把这吉他还回来吧？
E: I didn't expect her to be so open-minded... and she didn't even try to persuade me to stay. She didn't summon me just to return the guitar, did she?

C: 原来她也是技术人员出身。
E: So she was tech-savvy too?

C: 哦，这个——这是我准备寄给老妈的信，还没写完呢。
E: Oh, that's a letter I was gonna send to my mom. I haven't even finished writing it.

C: 希露瓦的吉他
E: Serval's guitar

C: 在你的眼中，邮筒和两只信封构成了美丽的数学图景。力——银河中不可见不可触，却无处不在的神秘能量化作实体，在你的脑中构筑模型。
E: To you, the mailbox and the two envelopes form a beautiful mathematical picture. The concept of force — the invisible, untouchable, but ubiquitous phenomenon that permeates throughout the cosmos. A model coalesces inside your mind.

C: 新书到货，仅剩一册！
E: New arrivals, only one copy left!

C: 你看见菜单上写着：「巡游花圃蜂蜜酿！全世界最好喝的蜂蜜饮料！——售罄。」
E: You see on the menu: "Parterre Patrol Honey Drink! The world's greatest honey-based beverage! Sold out."

C: 有人在追捕我们…
E: People were following us...

C: 话先说在前面，我对桑博也谈不上有多了解。
E: Ask away, but I'm afraid I don't know a lot about him myself.

C: 喂，你们快看，那是谁！
E: Hey, look! Who is that?

C: 矿区是地底的生命线，必须保证地髓供给，我们才能从运输线拿到地上配给的物资。
E: Mines are our lifelines in the Underworld. We have to keep providing Geomarrow to the Overworld in exchange for supplies.

C: 听说冲突导致了不少人受伤，我就赶来看看能不能帮上忙。
E: *sigh* I heard that many were injured in the clashes, so I hurried over here to see if I could help.

C: 死对头？我可不这么想。在我看来，他就像这位小哥说的，是台冷冰冰的机器，只认自己「计算」出来的死道理。
E: Sworn enemy? Not how I see it. The young master here is closer. Svarog is a cold and unfeeling machine. He recognizes only the dead reasoning of his calculations.

C: 布洛妮娅？
E: Bronya?

C: 她嘱咐我一定要保证你们安全回到上层。我思前顾后，最稳妥的办法还是拜托这小子帮忙。
E: She told me to make sure you return to the Overworld safely. I gave it some thought, and I think the safest way is to ask this fella for help.

C: 别扯没用的，当好你的向导！
E: Enough chatter. Just be a good guide!

C: 够了！
E: Enough!

C: 这流畅的战斗…令人窒息的压迫感…甚至让我感觉历代拳王也不过如此！了不起，实在是了不起！
E: The smoothness of the battle... the suffocating sense of oppression... even the old champs can't do much better! Impressive, most impressive!

C: 哎，这样的病人我见过太多了，多半不会听从医嘱……
E: You know, I've seen too many patients like this, and most of them won't follow the doctor's orders...

C: 真能立刻安排吗？
E: Can it be arranged now?

C: 经此史诗大捷，{NICKNAME}即将来到天梯榜的第二位——这是多么傲人的战绩啊！
E: After this epic victory, {NICKNAME} is on the verge of reaching No. 2 on the ladder — what a feat!

C: 这场比赛的奖金很快就会转到您的账户上——史考特商业，只为冠军而生！
E: The prize money for this game will be transferred to your account shortly. Scott Business Alliance, made for the champions!

C: …谢谢你们。虽然很难想象你们究竟在上面经历了什么，但万幸结果是好的。
E: ...Thank you. I can't even imagine what you've been through up there. I'm just glad everything turned out alright.

C: 可、可是…它好像在冒黑烟……
E: But... there's smoke coming out of it...

C: …嗯？什么意思？
E: ...Huh? What do you mean?

C: 你不明白自己对垃圾箱的执念从何而来，但上述作品应该脱不了干系。
E: You don't understand where your obsession with dumpsters come from, but it must have to do with the aforementioned work.

C: 涂改纸条。
E: Scribble the paper.

C: 你离开这座垃圾箱，将它抛之脑后，不再理睬。
E: You leave this dumpster and forget all about it.

C: 动手脚！
E: Do it!

C: 「荷尔斯泰因大静默」被证实是「焚化工」所为，巡海游侠宣布正在追查失窃记忆下落。
E: It has been confirmed that The Cremators are responsible for the Holstein Aphasia. Galaxy Rangers have announced that they are working on retrieving stolen memories and that the investigation is ongoing.

C: 「毁灭」能带走一切，但永远无法夺走希望。星际和平公司将为银河中一切文明的长远发展提供力所能及的支持与存护——也包括那些消亡的世界。
E: The Destruction can destroy any material thing, but it can never take away our hope. The IPC will provide whatever support and protection within its means for the long-term development of all civilizations across the universe — including those that have perished.

C: 本次播报到此结束，请在指定时间收听下一周期的星际和平播报。再见。
E: And this is the end of our broadcast. Please tune in for our next episode. Thank you for listening.

C: 再见。
E: Goodbye.

C: ——但是来都来了，怎能让各位无功而返！虽然「星核」一事不能接受列车团的帮助，但我确实另有一事，非得拜托各位不可！请！
E: ...Of course, it would be inappropriate of me to let you return without something to show for it. While I cannot accept your help with regard to the Stellaron, I do have a favor to ask. Please, after you.

C: 你到底在想什么啊？景元！该不会…难道是你故意把人放跑的？！
E: Wait, what are you up to exactly? Jing Yuan, did you... let him escape on purpose!?

C: 天还大亮着呢。
E: The sun hasn't gone down yet.

C: 这不，驭空大人亲自吩咐我，为各位安排好浥尘客栈的上房以及日常花销用度，希望各位能在这里住得舒心，吃得开心～这样一来，仙舟也算是没有失了待客的礼数。
E: In any case, Madam Yukong instructed me to reserve the best rooms at the inn and have all your expenses covered. She wants to extend the full courtesy of the Xianzhou so that all of you enjoy your stay to the fullest~

C: 宣夜大道这么繁华…
E: Starwatcher Avenue is a bustling sight...

C: 嗯？您是游客吗？现在是非常时期，请您尽可能不要在外面闲逛，可能会遇到危险…哎，一定要注意安全啊！
E: Hm? Are you a traveler? These are unstable times right now. You should not be strolling around in the streets, or you might run into danger... Hey, keep yourself safe!

C: 是的，一个能洞察未来的逃犯束手就擒，说明在她眼中，事情「应该如此」。
E: Yes. It's strange for a fugitive to give themselves up, but a fugitive who can see the future? For her, perhaps that was the way it was always going to be...

C: 那口棺材里是什么？
E: What's in that coffin?

C: 有事请教…
E: I'd like to ask...

C: 哈哈——好苦涩哦。
E: Haha, that's the trailblazing life for ya.

C: 你以前也抓过星核猎手？
E: You've caught a Stellaron Hunter before?

C: 被团成一团的包装纸，展开便能看到出自茶饮品牌「仙人快乐茶」。
E: A crumpled up packaging of the tea brand Immortal's Delight.

C: 所以停云…
E: That is to say, Tingyun...

C: 一头巨大的狼形孽物匍匐在地，你从它的残躯上感受不到生命，但一些细微的幼芽在它的身躯下茵开。
E: A huge, wolf-like beast lies on the ground. Its corpse shows no signs of life, but tiny saplings are sprouting from underneath it.

C: 你看起来没事啊…
E: You seem quite alright...

C: 那股烟雾真的对我们无害？
E: Is that smoke really safe though?

C: 抱歉，我不能在此驻足。我的朋友已经离开了，我必须追上他们。
E: I'm sorry, I cannot linger here. My friends have left — I must find them.

C: （耽搁的时间太久了，需要情报……）
E: (I've delayed for too long. I need more information...)

C: 啊，重提旧事就像搅浑一潭浊水，徒然惹引不快。大概是你的模样…大概是那龙角，依稀仿佛的龙尊气质，总让我把你和故人联系起来吧。
E: *sigh* Raising old nets only darkens the water — an exercise in unhappiness. Perhaps it is your visage, the horns on your head, or the unmistakable air of the high elder that makes the separation nigh impossible for me.

C: 将军与您还有要事相商。请留步。
E: The general still has important matters to discuss with you. Please remain here.

C: 哈，有几分将军的意思了。
E: Ha, spoken like a true general.

C: 有一些…但都是些碎片。
E: A little... only fragments.

C: 不错，星穹列车为罗浮出生入死，赤诚可鉴。经六御共商，自即日起，诸位便是罗浮的誓助盟友。在罗浮疆域之上，诸位受到视同联盟使节的最高规格优待。
E: Yes, the Astral Express has braved great evil for the Luofu. Your devotion is evident. After discussions with the Six Charioteers, you are henceforth sworn allies of the Luofu. Within the Luofu's jurisdiction, you are to be treated with the highest standard of diplomatic protocol.

C: 你打算在这儿待多久？
E: How long do you plan on staying here?

C: 对了，我听说商港又开了，停云小姐怕是又忙起来了吧？
E: I heard the trade port is open again for business. Miss Tingyun must be real busy, right?

C: 哎呀，学会了之后，你和杨先生、三月七再找个人凑一桌，旅途上就不会无聊啦。
E: C'mon... If you learned how to play, then you, Welt, and March would only need to find one more person! You could get a table going and play a few rounds during your travels.

C: 你放心，我还会回来的。
E: Don't worry. I'll be back.

C: 我打算离开罗浮仙舟了。
E: I'm leaving the Luofu.

C: 汪汪！
E: Woof woof!

C: 汪！汪汪！
E: Woof! Woof woof!

C: 老大，我认得{F#她}{M#他}！{F#她}{M#他}就是上次给咱们捣乱那货！
E: Hey boss, I recognize {F#her}{M#him}! {F#She's}{M#He's} the one who messed with us last time!

C: 且再等等，我还有几句话要和列车团的朋友们讲。
E: Not yet. I have things I wish to convey to my Astral friends.

C: 各位，我能否冒昧地请你们来，一同见证？
E: I'd like to ask you all to witness this event with me.

C: 等杂务处理完毕，我想参与云骑的调查，亲自驾驶星槎，沿着停云进入仙舟前的航路追溯此事的细节。我一定会查明，她到底遭遇了什么……
E: Once I've finished handling the various tasks at hand, I want to aid the Cloud Knights in their investigation. I'll fly out on a starskiff and trace Tingyun's original flight path onto the Xianzhou. Rest assured, I will leave no stone unturned.

C: 唔…可算到了！家族的入境手续也太复杂了吧，一路下来大大小小十几道检查，行李箱都翻了四、五遍……
E: We're here at last! The Family sure doesn't play around with their entry protocols. Our bags probably know what it feels like to be a celebrity now, with all that attention!

C: 我不知道。
E: I don't know.

C: 我会放弃——这代价实在太过沉重。
E: I would abandon it — the price is too dear.

C: 我不知道。
E: I don't know.

C: 原来如此，我知道了。
E: I see, got it.

C: 关于梦中的行程…
E: About the dream journey...

C: 你还记得我？
E: Do you still remember me?

C: 除了流光忆庭的忆者，一般人很难随心所欲地操纵忆质。但没关系，在「同谐」的调律下——基本上，你可以依赖现实的物理法则理解梦中世界。
E: Unless you're one of the Memokeepers of the Garden of Recollection, it can be difficult at first to manipulate the memoria as you wish. But once you've been tuned by the Harmony, you can use the same laws of physics from the real world to understand how the dream world works.

C: 当然是另一个性别的我自己！
E: Myself in a different gender, of course!

C: 我最喜欢这家店的橡木蛋糕卷，每天都要吃一个。
E: I love their Oak Cake Rolls! I get one from here every day!

C: 哈哈，咱俩的电波可是越来越一致了！
E: Haha, seems like we're getting on the same wavelength now!

C: 怎么办？
E: What should we do?

C: 搞什么鬼？
E: What the heck is this?

C: 天哪，你们真高！
E: Gosh, you guys are tall!

C: 桑博，你想做什么？
E: Sampo, just what are you up to, exactly?

C: 优雅的忆者？
E: The elegant Memokeeper?

C: 一定要记住：绝对不能用<color=#dbc291ff>钟表把戏</color>做坏事——我们可是美梦小镇的守护者，滴答！
E: Please bear in mind that you should never use <color=#dbc291ff>Clockwork</color> with malicious intent. We're the guardians of Dreamville, after all, tick-tock!

C: 预备——起！
E: Ready... Go!

C: 呜呜…您说的是……
E: *sob*... You're right...

C: （也许…可以再用一次钟表把戏？这应该不算「做坏事」吧……）
E: (Perhaps... Clockie's Clockwork trick can come in handy? This doesn't count as malicious intent, right...)

C: 筑梦师变得十分平静。但对于艺术家来说，「平静」实在是有点索然无味——也许你得进一步刺激他才能让灵感的火花闪现。
E: The Dreamweaver has calmed down. However, "calm" could be dull for an artist. Maybe you need to stimulate him further to ignite the spark of inspiration.

C: …但我失败了。也许…你们还有其他办法？
E: ...But I think I failed. Maybe... there are other things that you guys do?

C: 最开始的五百年，我发誓如果有桶来解救我，我必赐给他无穷的财富。第二个五百年，我发誓如果有桶来解救我，我必赐给他无尽的垃圾。
E: For the first five hundred years of my imprisonment, I swore an oath that if a can came to save me, I would reward them with endless wealth. Then, for the next five hundred years, I swore that if a can saved me, I would reward them with endless trash.

C: 是因为我的犹豫不决让她送了命…对不起，{NICKNAME}。
E: It was my hesitation that caused her to lose her life... I'm sorry, {NICKNAME}.

C: 不要让伤痛左右你的想法，{NICKNAME}。维持自我，你才能走在正确的路上。
E: Do not let pain dictate your thoughts, {NICKNAME}. Compose yourself, and you will walk the right path.

C: 就聊到这里吧。
E: That's all for now.

C: 她…是在奔跑吗？不…奔逃？她的身后似乎有什么……
E: She... Is she running? No... Running away? Something's right behind her...

C: 某种难以名状的流质——黑暗——自你的胸膛漫向喉头。窒息感自内而外将你淹没。然后，声音响起……
E: An indescribable fluid — darkness — flows from your chest to your throat. Suffocation engulfs you from within. Then, a voice emerges...

C: （看来这只怪物死于某种高热反应……）
E: (Looks like this monster died of a hyperthermic reaction...)

C: 看起来没有向下的路。
E: Doesn't look like there's a way down.

C: 变幻莫测的通路，指向游荡的忆域迷因…她完全迷失在忆域中了。
E: Unpredictable pathways pointing toward a wandering meme... She was completely lost in the Memory Zone.

C: 突破这道防线，在梦境中创造「死亡」…未经家族许可，就连忆者都做不到这事。
E: Breaking through this line of defense to create "Death" in the dreamscape... Not even a Memokeeper could do that without The Family's permission.

C: 既然如此，我不会相信任何人。
E: If that's the case, I can't trust anyone.

C: 你想要什么帮助？
E: What kind of help?

C: 无名客才不会和公司为伍。
E: The Nameless would never associate with the IPC.

C: 这一切太突然，我也只能给出猜测。离开这里后，去和你的同伴仔细聊聊吧，希望你们能厘清纷乱思绪的源头。
E: It's all happened so quickly I can only make conjecture. After leaving here, go have a chat with your companions. I hope you can clarify the source of this confusion.

C: 接下来…我有些私事要处理，是关于那位巡海游侠的。我们就此别过吧。
E: Then... I've something private to take care of regarding that Galaxy Ranger. Let's leave things there, shall we?

C: 游侠，你行于狭隘的「巡猎」，自然无法理解。
E: Ranger, you tread the narrow Path of The Hunt. You could never understand.

C: 你知道艾利欧。
E: You know Elio.

C: 我不需要帮助，但可以给你一个建议，这样对你我都更好。
E: I don't need help, but I can give you a suggestion that would make things better for you and me.

C: 但这不就跟街上的人一样了吗…唔……
E: But then I'd be just like everyone else out on the streets...

C: <color=#ff3a3e>奇怪…我好像记不清了。</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>Weird... I can't seem to remember.</color>

C: 和它的主人很相称，这宅子名义上属于星期日，没有他的邀请，普通宾客一辈子都没机会踏足这里。多看两眼吧，趁你还有片刻自由。
E: This mansion nominally belongs to Sunday, and is very befitting of its owner. Without his express invitation, the likes of ordinary guests would never grace these grounds in their lifetimes. Look around while you still have this moment of freedom.

C: 是。怎么了？
E: They are. What's wrong?

C: 请看看看看看——我身后这台<color=#dbc291ff>扭蛋蛋蛋蛋蛋机</color>模型——
E: Please lo—o—o—o—ok behind me — a <color=#dbc291ff>capsule m—a—a—a—a—chine</color> model—

C: 所以这并非邀请，而是传唤，在谈话开始前，我需要对你的品性做些考验。
E: Well, this isn't an invitation, but a summoning. Before we speak, I need to test your character.

C: （那两个人，看着有点眼熟……）
E: (Those two people look a little familiar...)

C: 我想请你们调些记录，办案用。
E: I need you to pull some records for me. It's for official business.

C: …喂！治安官交代过，他从筑梦边境回来前，不准透露任何消息！
E: ...Hey! The Security Officer instructed everyone to shut their traps before he returned from Dream's Edge!

C: 要是你不介意的话…
E: If you don't mind...

C: 来就来，谁怕谁！
E: Come at me, bro!

C: 除了「同谐」的家族，很难想象宇宙中还有哪一方势力，能维系一座如此庞大的建筑。
E: Other than The Family of the Harmony, it's hard to imagine any other power in the universe that could sustain a building of such magnitude.

C: 关于「薄暮的时刻」…
E: About the Moment of Dusk...

C: 也许有办法改变这一切。
E: There might be a way to change everything.

C: 也许吧。但如果这正是人们所期望的世界——<color=#ff3a3e>如果这正是生命选择沉睡的原因</color>——我们还应令它做出改变吗？
E: Perhaps. But if this is indeed the world that people desire — <color=#ff3a3e>if this is precisely why life chooses to slumber</color> — should we still seek to change it?

C: 「察夸卡德星链地处阿库讷瓦卡德星区，曾是公司重要的贸易埠头，但在星际能源战争期间，遭到费兹杰罗准军事海军联合武力窃夺——」
E: The Chakwakad Chain, located in the Acunawakad Sector, was once a vital trading port for the IPC. However, it was captured by the combined forces of the Fitzgerald Paramilitary Navy during the Interstellar Energy War...

C: 和星期日的对谈让我确信了家族中有叛徒，而匹诺康尼的秘密就在那人手中…借此机会，我也把所有基石放在了它们该在的位置上。
E: My conversation with Sunday convinced me that there's a traitor in The Family, and that they hold the secrets of Penacony... So, I took the opportunity to set everything in motion.

C: 而现在我还成功拿回了礼金，自打踏入白日梦酒店的大门，事情就没像这样顺利过…看着吧，距离胜利我只差一步之遥了。
E: I even managed to recover the gift money. Things haven't gone this smoothly since I walked through the doors of The Reverie... Now, I'm only one step away from victory. Let's just wait and see.

C: 一言为定。不过我还想借此机会请教一下，您可否听说过有关「死亡」的轶事？
E: Sure thing. By the way, do you happen to know anything interesting about "Death"?

C: 就等这句话呢。
E: Just what I've been waiting for.

C: 哼，整个匹诺康尼都找不出第二种比它更甜腻的饮料，但如今的逐梦客好的就是这一口。
E: Heh, you won't find a sweeter drink anywhere in Penacony, and that's what today's dream seekers crave.

C: 不可能。现在的问题不是*她死了*，而是*她仿佛从没出现过*。
E: That's impossible. The problem now is not that she's dead, but that it's as if she had never existed in the first place.

C: …嗯？影城那边好像有点事…先失陪了，祝你们好运。
E: ...Hmm? Something just happened at the theme park... Now, if you'll excuse me. Good luck to all of you.

C: …叫做<color=#dbc291ff>「翡翠」</color>。
E: ...<color=#dbc291ff>Jade</color>.

C: 我当然会。
E: Of course I know.

C: 怎么轮到我就跳过了？
E: Hey, I still deserve a proper intro!

C: 朋友们，游戏已经开始了。你们无法拒绝——
E: Friends, the game has commenced, and you cannot choose to decline...

C: 他兑现了承诺。
E: He kept his promise...

C: 我收回前言：你的问题不是疑心太重。你是个疯子，懂吗？疯子。
E: I take back what I said: Your problem isn't paranoia. You're just crazy, you know? Lunatic.

C: …看来你的伪装已经帮你充分了解到家族的每一处细节了。
E: ...Looks like your disguise has helped you successfully understand every facet of The Family.

C: 兄弟，搞这么剑拔弩张做什么，掏这玩意儿不就是为了打个招呼？
E: Hey pardner, what's with the hostility? I thought pulling this thing out was just a way of saying hello?

C: 但今天，我仍站在这里，不介意为这数字再添一笔。
E: And here I stand again, about to add another mark to the tally.

C: 这算是第三个问题了？
E: Is that the third question?

C: 我说过，这是个坏习惯。
E: I told you before, it's a bad habit.

C: 滴答！老朋友和新朋友，来击个掌吧！
E: Tick-tock! Old friend and new friend, let's high-five!

C: 比起这个，有另一件令我在意的事。请问你口中的「拉扎莉娜女士」是？
E: You don't say... There was something else that piqued my interest. Who is Madam Razalina?

C: 星穹列车的各位，又见面了。听说我的失踪在外界引发了不小的骚乱…非常抱歉。
E: It's nice to see you all again, Astral Express crew. I heard my disappearance caused quite the commotion out there... I'm really sorry about that.

C: 欢迎来到天堂…真梦假梦…都是浮生一梦……
E: Welcome to heaven... dreams, true or false... all are ephemeral...

C: 但是我们不能眼睁睁看着歌斐木先生走向「同谐」的对立面，我更不可能用自己的歌声去赞美罪恶的事业——
E: But I can't just stand by and watch Mr. Gopher Wood become an enemy of the Harmony. I won't use my voice to support an evil cause...

C: 我一直都搞不懂这老头在想什么，但这空无一物的梦泡还真有他的风格。充斥着无厘头的幻想…和难以理解的浪漫主义。
E: I could never figure out what was going on in that old man's head, but this empty dream bubble is so typical of him. He was always full of weird fantasies... and incomprehensible romanticism.

C: 我发誓。
E: Yes.

C: 星期日先生为谐乐大典日夜操劳，如今却遇上这种意外，即便星核问题非同小可，到底也有些教人过意不去啊。
E: You've been working non-stop on the Charmony Festival, Mr. Sunday, and no one could have predicted this incident. Even if the Stellaron does pose a grave threat, I still feel sorry for all the trouble we've caused you.

C: 星期日先生…你好呀！瞧见了吗？那天上的月亮，就和我手中的苏乐达瓶盖相同大小！
E: Oh, Mr. Sunday... Hey there! Okay, see the moon in the sky? It's about the size of the cap on my SoulGlad bottle!

C: 哦…好啊，你说得对。不愧是美梦的领导人，我的大救星！
E: Oh... yeah, that's a great idea! Wow, no wonder you're the leader of this sweet dream! You're totally a lifesaver!

C: 哈…真羡慕这些永恒不变的东西啊。
E: Heh... how I envy those everlasting things...

C: 明明是在梦想之地，为什么人们却会过上这种生活呢？
E: This is the land of the dreams, but why do they live like this?

C: 知更鸟，可否使你临场见证，记录实情，并传述我的清白，令全部污名悉数消散？
E: Robin, could I entrust you to be present as a witness, to document the truth, and to proclaim my innocence, so that all slander may be utterly dispelled?

C: 非常抱歉，我也是第一次遇见这种情况。不过系统显示，几位客人仍然在梦境中。
E: My apologies. This is the first time I've encountered a situation like this. However, the system indicates that those guests are still in the Dreamscape.

C: 他们不会贸然出手的。可不止我们在担心打草惊蛇，家族一定也害怕惊动了外人…看见了么，这酒店里还有公司狗在盯着呢。
E: They don't want to attract unwanted attention from certain outsiders, so they won't do anything reckless... See? The IPC lackeys are keeping a close eye on this hotel.

C: 嘿嘿，他根本就不懂。
E: Hey, this guy doesn't know anything at all.

C: 什么？！他宝了个贝的——流光忆庭的，你出卖我？！
E: What!? You Garden of Recollection shirtbag, you betrayed me!?

C: 我可以帮你。
E: I can help you.

C: 大家好，我是流萤，嗯…也是一个喜欢到处冒险的普通女孩。
E: Hello everyone, I'm Firefly. Mm... I am also an ordinary girl who enjoys adventures.

C: 原来这玩意还在办啊…明明最早是米哈伊尔为了引人注目特意搞的噱头。倒是有一试的价值。
E: So they're still running this thing eh... It was originally just a publicity stunt set up by Mikhail to drum up attention, but it looks like it might be worth a shot.

C: 两位逐梦客，恭喜你们站稳脚跟，成为匹诺康尼冉冉升起的新星。但此时，又一位竞争对手低价倾销，将你们拖入破产的边缘。
E: Congratulations to our two Dreamchasers for establishing yourselves as budding stars in Penacony. However, now you face a competitor selling at low prices, pushing you to the brink of bankruptcy.

C: 通过门口的电视便可跃入哈努兄弟的世界，与它共度一段美妙惊险的故事——祝你们顺利通关！
E: Enter into the world of Hanu via the TV by the entrance, and partake in an enchanting and suspenseful story with him! Good luck in there!

C: 天哪，哈努兄弟简直所向披靡！各位，关卡完成，快通过电视机前往下一关吧！
E: Oh my! Hanu is on a streak! Everyone, the stage is complete, quickly head through the TV to the next stage!

C: ——纯美女神伊德莉拉美貌盖世无双！
E: ...Idrila, the Beauty, is the most peerless beauty of them all!

C: 我怎么也没有想到，一个如此悲伤的场景，竟会被你们演绎得这么愉快和温馨。两人依然如同往时般友好，仿佛时间和地位对他们不值一提！
E: I never imagined that such a sad scene could be portrayed by you two in such a joyful and heartwarming way — two people sharing a long-cherished friendship, as if time and status meant nothing to them!

C: 这样应该就都搞定了…走吧，瓦尔特先生还在等我们。
E: That should do it... Okay, let's go. Mr. Yang is waiting for us.

C: 我…没有资格成为真正的你。还是放弃吧，钟表小子！
E: I'm not qualified to be the real Clockie. Just give up, Clockie!

C: 我清楚地记得她们的迷茫、恐惧…但也记得，在那梦里她们从未选择放弃——就像知更鸟小姐一样。
E: Their confusion and fear are lucid to me... But I also remember they chose never to give up — just like Miss Robin.

C: 我们已经再次接近真相的核心。给米沙一点时间吧，他一定能为我们揭开梦泡的秘密。
E: We're drawing closer to the truth once more. Let's give Misha some time, as I believe he'll unveil the secret of this dream bubble.

C: 是，但也不是。也许这么说更合适……
E: Yes, but not exactly. To be more precise...

C: 拉格沃克•夏尔•米哈伊尔，或者更简洁的…{RUBY_B#米哈伊尔-夏尔}米沙{RUBY_E#}。
E: Mikhail Char Legwork, or simply... {RUBY_B#Mikhail-Char}Misha{RUBY_E#}.

C: 他的意思，是要我们去谐乐大典上一较高下吗？
E: Does that mean he wants to fight us during the Charmony Festival?

C: 用这杯「聚散有时」向你致意…{NICKNAME}……
E: Here's to you, a glass of "Hello and Goodbye"... {NICKNAME}...

C: 我怕这些鲜红的记忆也离开我。我能看到的颜色已经不多了，除了这一点淡淡的、温暖的「红」，我几乎一无所有。
E: I fear that those vivid red memories will fade away too. There isn't much color left, and besides this faint, warm red, there's almost nothing.

C: 「与蜂共舞者，必遭蜂毒所害。我早已知晓我的命运，这一天早晚会到来。」
E: "Those who dance with bees are bound to fall victim to their stings. I have long foreseen my fate, and this moment is inevitable."

C: 最近几次开拓之旅都没进监狱，我还以为自己时来运转了呢！结果还是难逃此劫……
E: I thought things were finally looking up as I managed to dodge prison during my recent trailblazing expeditions! But now it looks like I'll be back behind bars again...

C: 「欢迎来到乐园！」
E: Welcome to the paradise!

C: 虽然我不清楚个中缘由，但公司的代表们表示务必要让{NICKNAME}前来旁听——我为各位带路，这边请！
E: Although I'm not too sure of the reason, the representatives from the IPC have insisted on {NICKNAME}'s presence — allow me to lead the way, follow me please!

C: 久违了，星穹列车的各位。
E: It's been a while, my Astral Express friends.

C: 好啊好啊，皆大欢喜。
E: Hooray! It's a big win for everyone!

C: 既然这样，看来我们在匹诺康尼也没什么后顾之忧了…我们是时候踏上新的旅程了。
E: If that's the case, it appears that we have nothing else to worry about on Penacony... Looks like it's time for us to embark on a new voyage.

C: 喔…有好多选择啊，感觉要挑花眼了。
E: Ooh... So many options. I'm seeing stars already.

C: 呵，真为匹诺康尼的逐梦客们感到开心——全宇宙最智慧和最愚钝的头脑现在全都为他们所用了。
E: I am truly happy for the Dreamchasers on Penacony — the cosmos's brightest and, let's admit, dimmer intellects are now at their service.

C: 你…做好准备了么？
E: ...Are you ready?

C: 如果我没记错，可能有几年、几十年，甚至上百年了吧。
E: If I remember correctly, it has lasted for decades, or even centuries.

C: 人们说那四十八个系统时里发生了许多事。一颗太阳将要陨落，一片乐园将要坍塌，一个世界将要易主；一具身躯将要腐朽，一群兀鹫将要集结，一对兄妹将要长别。
E: Whispers carried the tale of those fateful <unbreak>48</unbreak> system hours, when a sun teetered on the precipice of collapse, a paradise stood on the brink of destruction, and a world was poised to surrender to its new master. Amidst it all, a body decayed, a pack of vultures gathered, and a brother and sister were doomed for long separation.

C: 拉勾，约好了，什么东西都改变不了我们的理想。
E: It's a deal, then. This is our promise, and nothing will sway our ideals.

C: 我们到了。
E: Here we are.

C: 还记得邀请函上的问题吗——生命因何而沉睡？
E: I still remember the question on the invitation letter — Why does life slumber?

C: 如果你我从不孤独，又怎会踏上渐行渐远的道路…？
E: If we had never experienced solitude, how could we have embarked on different paths?

C: 喔，原来是老奥帝本人！怪不得船上的装潢这么奢华。
E: Oh, so it's owned by Old Oti himself! No wonder this ship is so lavishly decorated.

C: 到头来，普通人只觉得这是一场邪恶势力针对谐乐大典的袭击，而家族没有尽到「保护美梦」的职责，信用一落千丈。
E: Ultimately, the public perceived the incident as an attack by evil forces targeting the Charmony Festival. They believe The Family failed to safeguard the sweet dream, significantly eroding their credibility in the process.

C: 说什么呢，这可是我的店。
E: What are you talking about? This is my lounge.

C: 「长梦苦短」——这酒吧里最不受欢迎的饮品。苦口、酸涩，就像血淋淋的现实。
E: Here's Bitter Dreams... the least popular drink in this bar. It's bitter and sour, just like the harsh realities of life.

C: 公司有什么动作吗？
E: Did the IPC make any move?

C: 智库里没有相关记录，只是我的猜测：「秩序」的隐患始终存在于「同谐」中，这原本是家族的内部问题。
E: No related records exist in the data bank, but I have a theory: The hidden dangers of the Order have always been within the Harmony — And this issue existed within The Family from the very beginning.

C: 那…就见不到吧。
E: Then... I guess you won't be seeing him.

C: 嚯嗬嗬，可以，可以！你说服我了。
E: Ohoho! Well said! Now you've convinced me.

C: 我和老奥帝先生已经商量好了，<color=#dbc291ff>为了感谢无名客对匹诺康尼做出的贡献，我会以家族的名义赠予星穹列车一件礼物。</color>
E: Mr. Alfalfa and I discussed it. <color=#dbc291ff>I'll present a gift to the Astral Express on behalf of The Family as a token of gratitude for the Nameless' contributions to Penacony.</color>

C: …你们全都一个样！
E: ...Come on, you're all the same!

C: 「恶兆」？
E: The Omen of Evil?

C: 噢…这就是你的愿望？
E: Oh... This is your wish?

C: 我在听…
E: I'm listening...

C: 呵，会问出这样的问题，就代表你根本没有真正地理解学习的目的。
E: Ah, saying such a thing merely indicates that you have not truly grasped the essence of learning.

C: 她给我开了个价，但……
E: She told me her price, but...

C: 那次情况紧急，算不上正式道歉，也确实是我有错在先。
E: It was an emergency, so I never had the chance to formally apologize to you, and admittedly, I was the one to blame.

C: 算了吧，我惜命。
E: Forget it. I value my life too much.

C: 既然你会出现在这…那我就长话短说吧。大约半小时前，我收到未知发信人的消息，就立刻赶过来了。
E: Since you're here... I'll just keep it short. Just over half an hour ago, I received a message from an unknown sender, and rushed here as soon as I could.

C: 流梦礁的人们接下来会怎么样？
E: What will the people of Dreamflux Reef do now?

C: 这座雕像…上次应该还不在这儿吧。
E: That statue... It wasn't here last time.

C: 就在刚才，星穹列车收到了来自「盛会之星」的邀请函……
E: The Astral Express just received an invitation to the Planet of Festivities...

C: 抱歉，刚才打断了你们。
E: Apologies for interrupting you earlier.

C: 唱得不错。
E: Your rapping is great.

C: 缭乱•空手道•正气断惑手刀！
E: Dazzling Palm: Righteous Chop!

C: 试镜流程很简单，你只需要回答几个问题。当然，我的判断依据不止是答案，也包括你在镜头前的一举一动。
E: The audition process is simple. You need only answer a few questions. Of course, I won't be judging based on your answers alone. I will be watching your every move on camera.

C: 伎乐忍徒，为何烦扰？
E: Ninja Initiate Gigaku, what ails you?

C: 这项挑战需要各位扮演明星模特，选出一位摄影师来拍摄符合要求的照片，我们会印成写真集送给大家。
E: This challenge requires you to take on the role of celebrity models. You'll choose a photographer who will take a photo that meets our requirements. We'll then print it into a photobook and send it to you.

C: 不，我也不认识这位先生，但无论有没有人出头，我们的态度都不会变。
E: No, I don't know this man either. But thug or no, our position isn't going to change.

C: 也行。你不管自有人管。睡蕉社是吧，谢了，哥们。

C: 这话可就长了，等我确认完再说吧。反正这入社考试我非得通过不可。
E: Long story. I'll fill you in once I have more concrete details. But first, I have to pass that entrance test by hook or by crook.

C: 不对不对，你这是在瞎蒙吧？这句是我从别的地方偷来的。
E: That's totally off the mark. You're just trying your luck, aren't you? I lifted this quote from someplace else.

C: 违背律法的
E: Illegal stuff.

E: I went to a few trustworthy Bloodhounds for help, asking them to eliminate any Assistananas that they come across. Looks like that's not helping the current situation...

C: 走了，无名客姐们——或者你自己去找个位置。
E: Let's go, Nameless gal. Or you can go grab a seat by yourself.

C: 「悬留音发问：我们非死不可？」
E: "Told them something? Those suspensions, those solutions—'Must we die?'"

C: 这么说或许有些失礼，可眼下能佐证她游侠身份的，恐怕只有那奇妙的言行举止。
E: This might sound rude, but the only proof of her being a Ranger is her peculiar behavior.

C: 啊！怎么一瞬间就画好了，像魔术一样。

E: Ah, what's going on here? Only trashcans? Where's the monkey? Zero points from me!

E: Wait, I just need some more time...

E: Corporal punishment is forbidden!

C: 邪祟傀儡形同活物，可谓是极致的忍•自动化。
E: Fiendling puppets imbued with life... The epitome of Ninja Automation.

C: 《银河忍法帖》有云：「炙烤的烧鸟不知冰清，冷藏的刺身不知火明。」倘若堕入邪道是百货•忍徒的选择，在下确实无权干涉。
E: As stated in the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions: "Sizzling yakitori knows not refreshing ice, as chilled sashimi knows not blazing fire." If Ninja Initiate Merchant has indeed chosen the way of the fiend, it is not my place to intervene.

C: 《银河忍法帖》有云：张网捕鱼，鱼死网破。如今御猿•邪忍仍未现身，敌我皆在暗处，不宜打树•惊猴。
E: As stated in the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions: "When the net is cast for a catch, ready yourself to land a fish or forgo your net." With Evil Ninja Osaru lurking in the shadows and our locations not yet compromised, I suggest laying low to avoid alerting the monkeys.

C: 好水的剧本…
E: What a lousy script...

C: ACTION！
E: ACTION!

C: 侠客将此箴言铭诸肺腑，褪色的宝剑再度锋芒毕露。昨日告负不妨今夕重振旗鼓，扬眉拔剑再度讨伐狂妄恶徒！
E: The master's wisdom resonates to his core, the hero's blade sharper than ever before. Yesterday's loser is back in the fight, fight or flight, evildoers think twice.

C: 旁边的同学，能帮我翻译一下吗？
E: Excuse me dear student, could you help me translate that?

C: 也罢，庸人难以理解返祖实验的伟大。在传道解惑前，先来个随堂测验吧：同学们知道香蕉是如何繁殖的吗？
E: ...Never mind. Ordinary folks will never understand the great cause of our atavistic experiment. How about a pop quiz before I clarify your doubts? Who knows how bananas reproduce?

C: 不及格…我也…不及格……
E: Fail... I... also failed...

C: 哈哈，你有很长时间没提起过这个名字了。也对，对此刻的你来说，公司所做的一切可都还是遥远的未来。
E: Haha, you haven't brought up that name in quite a while. But I suppose that's only right considering where you are on the timeline. For you at this point, everything the IPC does is still in a far-off future.

C: 来！都朝我看！我就明说了吧，这就是个宝贝的阴谋。
E: Alright, folks! Eyes on me! Now listen here: This whole thing is a muddle-fudgin' scheme!

C: 蒙塔娜，你听我说啦。
E: Montana, would you please just hear me out?

C: 「可别来这套，经典就是经典。」
E: "Nuh-uh, don't pull that nonsense on me. A classic will always be a classic."

C: 命运将时间如拉面般拉长，忍之都在御猿•邪忍的摧折下有如奈落地狱，其惨状令大岚神也不禁合眸长叹……
E: Destiny elongates time, in the same way ramen noodles are stretched. The Ninja Capital has turned into an abyssal hell under the devastation of Evil Ninja Osaru. Even the mighty Lan would rather close THEIR eyes to the capital's sorry state and let out a long sigh...

C: 给你摄像机扬了嗷
E: Your camera's gonna be a victim of my bat~

C: 联系到此前的蕉学，我逐渐意识到这或许就是你能免疫睡蕉小猴污染的原因。而蕉授的台词更是点出了一种串联所有的可能——
E: When I made the connection between that and the banacademics that we've seen earlier, I came to the realization that this might be the very reason you're immune to Slumbernana Monkey's corruption. What Profnana said also hinted at a possibility that links everything else up.

C: 莫要逃避…忍侠不可逃避！
E: Rid all thoughts of escape... Ninja Heroes never flee!

C: 听得很清楚…在下的超•听力已然能捕捉忍者的低语了吗？甚是可喜。
E: I can clearly hear everything they're saying... Is my superhearing capable of picking up even whispers among ninjas now? A joyous discovery indeed.

C: *忍侠俚语*不会吧…我说怎么实验室这帮*忍侠俚语*全死地上了。
E: *Ninja Slang*, no way... So that's why all those *Ninja Slang* in the lab are lying dead on the ground.

C: 呵呵，看来{NICKNAME}不怎么喜欢上学呢。没关系，人生本就是一场求学的旅程，宇宙本身就是一个巨大的学校。
E: Haha, not an eager student, {NICKNAME}? Never mind — life itself is a journey of study, the universe a boundless ocean of learning.

C: 呵呵，你帮我拍摄了这么精彩的影片，我是来奉上片酬的。
E: Hehe, after helping me shoot such an exciting film, I'm here to hand you your remuneration.

C: 此处姹紫色的忍•泡影秘药似乎能补充忍力，击破此物来补充忍力吧。
E: This purple Ninja Secret Brew seems like it would replenish my ninja power. Shatter it and replenish some ninja power.

C: 丹恒
E: Dan Heng

E: (The future of Kremnos... I should find Krateros.)

E: It's a secret passage...

C: 无所谓，「开拓」会打十个。

C: 啊…啊……
E: Urk... Hngh...

C: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}…这就是我为您献上的祭品……
E: Please accept my offering, {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}...

C: 一道狭长的阴影破空而来，贯穿了哈托努斯的幻影……
E: A long, narrow shadow pierces through the phantom of Chartonus...

C: 是本人啊。你此前经历了什么？
E: So, you are Dan Heng. What did you go through before meeting us?

C: 欢迎，蝶，还有来自天外的…「开拓者」。
E: Welcome, Cas. And you as well, Trailblazer from beyond the sky.

C: 阿格莱雅女士赠以如此贵重之物，恐怕不只是为了表达谢意吧？
E: This precious gift isn't simply a token of gratitude though, is it, Lady Aglaea?

C: 灰宝？丹宝？
E: Grayie? Dannie?

C: 谁是那刻夏老师？
E: Who is Professor Anaxa?

C: 从这条路，飞起来，我们就要，离开奥赫玛！
E: Down this road we go! To the skies we fly! Leaving Okhema behind!

C: 阿基维利，借我元气！
E: Akivili, lend me your strength!

C: 为什么说我们与你利害攸关？
E: Why do you say that our fates are intertwined?

C: 正是，吾在称赞你憨态可掬呢。
E: Indeed, I'm complimenting your charming naiveté.

C: 大家没事就好。言归正传，这枚琥珀是…？
E: I'm glad that everyone is alright. Speaking of which, this piece of amber is...?

C: 没有…一点都没有。
E: There's... no reaction at all.

C: 真是的，人家最讨厌说话说一半的家伙了！
E: Come on, I hate people who don't finish their thoughts!

C: 嗯？这里竟还存放着<color=#dbc291ff>「灵液匣」</color>么……
E: Huh? There are <color=#dbc291ff>ichor vessels</color> stored here...

C: 没人…等等，「神识之蝶」不见了？
E: There's no one... Hold on, the Butterfly of Divine Mind is gone?

C: {RUBY_B#做得好，伙伴…！}咕嘟咕嘟咕嘟……{RUBY_E#}
E: {RUBY_B#Well done, friend!}Bloop bloop bloop...{RUBY_E#}

C: 啊呀，人子们…哪面是背来着？
E: Ahh, children of humanity... Which side is the back?

C: 老师…不，泰坦，别开玩笑了…！
E: Professor — no, Titan, stop joking!

C: 我爸爸是蛇妖枪骑兵队的百夫长，妈妈是神盾旅最勇敢的战士，<color=#dbc291ff>克拉特鲁斯爷爷</color>给我家发过好多好多银币呢！
E: My dad is a centurion with the Hydra Lancers, and my mom is the bravest warrior in the Godshield Brigade. We used to get tons of silver coins from <color=#dbc291ff>Mr. Krateros</color>!

C: 这里不错，适合私下谈话。
E: This is a nice spot for a private chat.

C: 他消失了，不知去向。有些人嘴里念念有词，说是「悬锋人」干的…阿格莱雅女士有头绪吗？
E: He disappeared, and no one knows where he's gone to. Some people have been saying that the Kremnoans are behind this... Lady Aglaea, what do you think about this?

C: 今日，我就来教你这些宫廷礼数！
E: Looks like I'll have to teach you some royal etiquette today!

C: 「迈德漠斯…{RUBY_B#悬锋人}我们{RUBY_E#}的王啊…不要落泪，那不称你的身份。」

C: 冷静，提图斯。我是神悟树庭的阿那克萨戈拉斯，与你的父亲老提图斯是同道。
E: Keep your cool, Titus. I'm Anaxagoras from the Grove of Epiphany and a colleague of your father, Old Titus.

C: 他回心转意后住的房子我都物色好了…现在，别说养老，连最后一面都没见上……
E: I already got him a retirement home and was waiting for him to come around... All my effort is wasted now, and he didn't even give me a chance to say goodbye...

C: 习惯了，我就是这么特别。
E: I'm used to it. I'm just special like that.

C: 你还没看清吗？令我彷徨的理由，正是你这溶入骨血的鲁莽和冲动。

C: 我只要你的命！为了给母亲和同袍复仇，仅此而已！

C: 疑问，你带着它来。说吧，现在。
E: Questions, you bring with you. Ask, now.

C: 「退路为何█ 空余死灵彷徨█ 前路为何█ █独听生灵离别█ ██」

Time ██ █is running█ out.███ ██ █ ██ █ █

E: The whereabouts of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} remain a mystery to all. As for {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}...

C: 呵，纤弱的人子…保你在刀下留个全身，可比解明至理还费力哪。

C: 是什么？
E: And what is it?

C: 所以，你要独自返乡了吗，万敌阁下？
E: So, are you returning home alone, Lord Mydei?

C: …你是对的，迈德漠斯。
E: ...You're right, Mydeimos.

C: 应该…是因为{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的离去吧。
E: It's probably because {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} is gone...

C: 只是一些理念上的差异……
E: They have... differences in ideology.

C: 没关系。不过除了缇安，现场还发现了另一个人……
E: It's alright. They also found someone else besides Trianne.

C: 但是，阿格莱雅大人…我不明白，拖垮缇安大人的事物并不是生命……
E: But Lady Aglaea, I don't understand... It wasn't life itself that Lady Trianne lost...

C: 但现在…它或许是给缇安的，最好的礼物了吧。
E: But now... it might just be the perfect gift for Trianne.

C: 我已接过使命，就要启程了……
E: I have assumed my duty and stand ready to set out...

C: 既然缇宁老师都这么说了，那就先专注眼前的事吧。各位，我们上！
E: In that case, let's focus on the mission at hand now. Let's do this, everyone!

C: …这种玩笑可不敢乱开。
E: ...Let's not joke about monsters in your pockets.

C: 我们还是来晚一步，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的火种…恐怕已经遭遇不测。
E: We were still too late. I fear something bad has happened to {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx's{RUBY_E#} Coreflame.

C: 我将能实现一切愿望的万能许愿机——「圣杯」，带到了匹诺康尼。
E: I have brought the omnipotent wish-granting chalice, the Holy Grail, to Penacony!

C: 「圣杯」会召唤出匹诺康尼历史上那些杰出名人的英灵，令其死而复生——而你，勇敢的逐梦客，将成为「御主」驱使这些「从者」战斗，直至幸存最后一人！
E: The Holy Grail will summon Heroic Spirits — legendary figures from Penacony's rich history and bring them back to life. And you, daring Dreamchasers, will become Masters, commanding these Servants in battle until only one survivor remains!

C: 这是…「战略投资部」的人也会加入？！
E: Wait... You're telling me the Strategic Investment Department is joining, too!?

C: 一旦接受了请柬，烙印了令咒，身为御主的资格便是无法撤回的。
E: Once you accept the invitation and are branded with the Command Spells, your qualification as a Master can't be revoked.

C: 嘿嘿，{NICKNAME}，老子必须先把你给料理了，以免夜长梦多。
E: Heh heh, {NICKNAME}, I gotta take care of you first. Can't have any loose ends hanging around.

C: 我从者呢？？？
E: Where's my Servant???

C: 呵，你还真有胆子追过来啊，{NICKNAME}！
E: You really had the guts to chase me down, huh, {NICKNAME}?

C: 在我喊「Cut」之前，这些「群演」会永无休止地表演下去。
E: Until I yell "Cut," these extras will keep performing forever!

C: 按照「圣杯」赋予我的职阶，叫我Caster吧。
E: Caster. That's the title the Grail assigned me.

C: 好的，我明白、我明白，就像配方要好好保密。
E: Gotcha, gotcha. Like a secret recipe, huh?

C: 先试着好好相处一下吧！
E: Let's just try to get along first!

C: 御主，我们走吧……
E: Master. Let's go.

C: 我很幸运。
E: I'm really lucky.

C: 在国家最繁荣的时刻，他就曾告诉过我……
E: And while the kingdom was in its prime, he also told me...

C: 你已经对眼前的工作得心应手。
E: You're in the zone now, handling the work before you with practiced ease.

C: 对了，听说星穹列车又来了，会在空间站停靠一段时间。要不要过去看看？就当是凑热闹。
E: By the way, I heard the Astral Express is coming back and will be stopping at the space station for a while. Want to go check it out? Just for fun.

C: 有新人上车吗？
E: Any new passengers aboard?

C: 余下的两骑，Rider和Berserker，迎接我们的会是谁？还是二者皆有？在对方已占据圣杯的情况下，看来会是一场恶战。
E: The last two Servants left are Rider and Berserker. Which one will face us? Or will it be both? With the enemy already in possession of the Holy Grail, it looks like we're in for a brutal fight.

C: 「另一种人生」…匹诺康尼的梦泡确实有害健康。那场谐乐大典要走了我半条命……刚才那个从者所编织的幻境又拿走了剩下一半。
E: "A different life"...? Penacony's dream bubbles are pure cancer. The Charmony Festival nearly killed me... and that Servant's fantasy almost finished the job.

C: 梦想？愿望？你们真以为匹诺康尼建立在这些虚无缥缈的东西上？不！支撑它的，恰恰是你们眼中最庸俗的东西，是源源不断的货币！金钱，才是这盛会之星最坚固的基石！
E: Do you honestly believe Penacony was built on empty ideas like "dreams" and "wishes"? No! What truly underpins and supports this city is what you deem "crude." It's the unending flow of money! On this rock called money, we have built the Planet of Festivities!

C: 御主，看来我没法为你夺得圣杯了。
E: My Master, it seems I won't be able to claim the Holy Grail for you.

C: 在远离「战场」的一角，以Rider职阶被召唤的从者，似乎从一开始就没有加入战斗的想法。
E: Far from the heat of battle, a Servant summoned under the Rider class stays on the sidelines. From the very beginning, it seems he had no intention of fighting.

C: 有小可爱诈骗到了巡海游侠的头上。
E: ...A shirtbag pulled off a scam on a Galaxy Ranger.

C: 我声音呢？<size=36>他宝贝的，他宝贝的！他宝贝的！</size>
E: Where's my voice? <size=36>Forkin' hell, forkin' hell! Son of a fork!</size>

C: 别费劲了，我试着解析了下这个结界。在封禁声音的同时，似乎还有更危险的东西正在向我们靠近。
E: It's no use. I've tried analyzing this Bounded Field. It doesn't just mute sound, something far more dangerous is closing in.

C: 你这不完全清楚我是谁吗？
E: You really don't know who I am?

C: 只要锯掉任意一个人的腿，大门就会自动打开。但如果一个系统时后什么也没有发生——
E: Saw off someone's leg, and the door unlocks automatically. But, if nothing happens after a system hour—

C: 请稍安勿躁，电影的第二幕即将开始。
E: Don't get ahead of yourselves. Act Two is about to begin.

C: 真正的孤狼总是独行，只有乌合之众才成群结队。
E: The true lone wolf walks alone. Only weak rabble sticks together.

C: 在我看来，你不过也和葛瑞迪一样，是个虚张声势的空壳。
E: You seem like just another hollow loudmouth, like Grady.

C: 敢抢我这主演的戏？都给我上，谁能拿下他们，投资人给它报销一辈子的苏乐达！
E: Trying to steal the spotlight from the star!? Get them! Whoever takes them down gets a lifetime supply of SoulGlad from our investors!

C: 正义斯科特先生和那些坏斯科特不一样，他舍身保护了我啾。
E: Skott of Justice's not like those evil ones. He threw himself in to protect me, tweet!

C: 我想和你们同行，救下其他的知更鸟小姐。为了防范斯科特的诡计，我也需要有人能及时杀死我。
E: I want to go with you to save the other Miss Robins, and I also need someone to kill me if Skott ever takes over my body.

C: 呱！我会用行动向你们证明我的正义呱！
E: *ribbit* I'll prove my justice with my actions. *ribbit*

C: 再来一枪就不疼了。
E: Just one more bullet and no more pain.

C: 谢谢大家的帮助，没有你们，我肯定已经被他宝贝的——抱歉，意识分离的影响似乎还没有完全痊愈。
E: Thank you everyone for your help. Without you, I would definitely have been fudgin'— sorry, seems the consciousness-splitting effects haven't completely worn off.

C: 导演，片酬和保险赔偿记得打我女儿账上…呃啊。
E: Director, make sure the paycheck and insurance payout go to my daughter's account... ugh.

C: 也可以这么形容。那时我还是一个孩子，为成为橡木家系的「铎音」，在歌斐木先生门下学习。
E: You could say that. I was still a child back then. To become the Bronze Melodia of the Oak Family, I'd gone under Mr. Gopher Wood's tutelage.

C: 我说什么来着，轮不到你出手，家族自己就能解决问题。
E: Didn't I tell you? The Family can take care of the issue without you having to get involved.

C: 也对，你扮演的从来都是聚光灯下的角色，受人敬仰的精英、领袖。你上一次摔倒在泥地里是什么时候，是不是要追溯到童年了？
E: That's true. Come to think of it, you had always been in the spotlight, be it as a respected member of the elite or a leader. When was the last time you fell into the mud? All the way back during your childhood days?

C: 接下来去哪？
E: So, where are we heading next?

C: 能与自己共事，机会实在难得，能有这般一心同体的默契，生意定可顺风顺水！
E: How often do you get the chance to work with yourself? Just imagine how in sync we'll be with one another... We're bound to thrive and prosper!

C: 恰恰相反，她或许是距离风暴中心最近的人。
E: Quite the contrary. She might've been the person closest to the eye of the storm.

C: 「我无法来到你的面前，能做的只有等待你走完这段路。」
E: "I can't go to you. All I can do is wait for you to finish walking this path."

C: 「很接近，但还不是。」
E: "Close, but not quite."

C: 商业模式倒是颇有意思……
E: The business model is quite interesting...

C: 又是角又是翅膀…要素太多了吧。
E: Both wings and horns? That's a little much, don't you think?

C: 喔…这可真是场精彩的梦，波澜起伏，要素齐全。这位客人，我愿意高价回收，您可以考虑下。
E: Oh... this is quite the dream—full of twists and turns, with all the right elements. I'd be willing to buy it back at a high price. Think about it.

C: 都在鬼门关走过一遭了，还有什么可挑剔的呢？
E: I've already escaped death once. What more could I ask for?

C: …联盟内部也有人这么认为，嫌疑人如今正在「玉阙」。
E: ...There are people within the Alliance who also believe that the suspect is now on the Yuque.

C: 但如此一来，必须对内隐瞒你「死而复生」的消息。我实在希望做决定前，能听听你自己的想法。若你想要回家……
E: If we follow this plan, we must keep your "resurrection" hidden. But before making any decisions, I want to know what you think. If you wish to go home...

C: 那我定会力排众议。
E: I'll support you, no matter what others may say.

C: 没有没有。今天是休息日，待会儿有场演出，我提前来找个好位置。
E: No, no. Today is my rest day. There's going to be a show later, so I came early to find a good seat.

C: 他不会。在站起来前…他会犹豫这是否正确，并为此苦恼很久。
E: It's not. Because before he stands up again, he will hesitate and agonize for ages over whether that is the right course of action.

C: 可能是这样没错，但我还是希望那个人不要变。
E: You may be right, but I still hope that he'll never change.

C: …哥哥。
E: ...Brother.

C: 「期待这种可能」…你的确是变了。换作从前，你根本不可能忍受得了杂音。
E: "Anticipating this possibility..." You've really changed. In the past, you wouldn't have tolerated any noise at all.

C: 嗯。
E: Mm.

C: 而且，那是一个完全未知的世界哎，还有什么比它更适合「开拓」？
E: Plus, it's a completely unknown world! What better place to trailblaze?

C: 「开拓」也未曾抵达的世界——对无名客而言，是个难以抵御的诱惑吧？
E: A world yet to be explored by the Trailblaze... No self-respecting Nameless would turn that opportunity down.

C: 未知的世界意味着未知的挑战，我也有些跃跃欲试了。
E: An unknown world brings unknown challenges. Exciting stuff.

C: 终于知道了智库的重要性。
E: Now I see why the data bank's important.

C: 经历了匹诺康尼之行，{NICKNAME}也是成熟的无名客了。
E: I see our adventure in Penacony has helped {NICKNAME} grow into an experienced Nameless.

C: 出什么问题了，黑塔女士？
E: Is something wrong, Madam Herta?

C: 交给我吧。
E: My pleasure.

C: 当然，已经准备好了帕！三月乘客身体不适，我特地准备了容易消化的列车长定制菜单。
E: Of course, the food's ready! March isn't feeling well, so Pom-Pom has specially prepared the conductor's special bland meal that'll be easy on her stomach.

C: 就是它们污染、篡改了人偶的设置吗？
E: So they were the ones that corrupted and tampered with the settings of my puppets?

C: 该给第三代转世起名了…
E: Time to come up with a name for the next reincarnation...

C: 「无私的裁决者{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}，请以律法之名，宣我等无罪；称量悬于现世的果实，换取残留于旧日的甜美。」
E: "O, selfless arbiter {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}, declare us innocent in the name of the law. Weigh the fruits of the present in exchange for the sweetness of the past."

C: 「——汇作一条滚烫的河，流遍世间英雄末裔……」
E: "...forming the boiling river that flows through the legacies of heroes who take their stand..."

C: 好黑，现在是晚上么……
E: Why is it so dark? Is it nighttime already...?

C: 「这场神战持续了好久好久，给天上地上所有的生灵带去了不幸。直到有一天——发生了一件不得了的大事！」
E: "Everyone fought for a really, really long time, disturbing and hurting all people living in the world. Until one day — something big happened!"

C: 你有一位温润知礼的伙伴。请来吧，贵客。
E: You have a very considerate partner. Follow me, then.

C: 你太高看我们了…
E: You think too highly of us...

C: ——当然不能靠「人力」啦。
E: Not with human effort, of course, silly!

C: （掏出手机）该不会是…
E: (pull out your phone) Is this...?

C: 该死，他什么时候学会的读心术？
E: Darn it, when did he learn to read minds?

C: 他遇到的人好像很难缠，还是先别打扰了。
E: He seems to be dealing with someone difficult right now. Let's leave him to it.

C: 会场里有一百多个人，虽然目前没人相信达米亚诺斯，但我们不知道他接下来会做什么。一旦事情失去控制，后果难以想象。
E: There are more than a hundred people in here. Although no one believes what Damionis is saying now, we don't know what he'll do next. If the situation gets out of control, the consequences might be disastrous.

C: 休息片刻
E: Take a rest

C: 一下这么多人……
E: There are so many people all of a sudden...

C: 翁法罗斯并非不愿行向群星，只是妄图触犯天穹者，无不触怒神明，令生灵的大地燃烧，凡人的国度殒灭，{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}「晨昏之眼」{RUBY_E#}只是其中一例。
E: It's not that Amphoreus is unwilling to head toward the stars. Yet, anyone who even thinks about breaching the firmament would undoubtedly infuriate the gods, causing this land of the living to burn and an entire nation of mortals to perish. The {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Eye of Twilight{RUBY_E#} is only one example of this.

C: 这你都能觉察到？
E: Wait, you can even detect that?

C: 各位，请等一下——
E: Hold on! Please wait a moment...

C: 过河拆桥？亏我还帮了你们。
E: Talk about burning bridges! After all we've done to help you.

C: 太好了，你们果真是翁法罗斯的希望。
E: That's wonderful to hear. You truly are the hope of Amphoreus.

C: 有他们两人在，应该能速战速决。
E: With those two, the battle should end quickly.

C: …悬锋城是你的故乡，迈德漠斯，你的族人曾是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的子民——但你选择了依归奥赫玛，为神谕奉献己身。
E: Mydeimos, Castrum Kremnos was your home. Your people were once {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} followers, yet you've chosen to turn to Okhema and dedicate yourself to the prophecy.

C: 没想到时移世易，连{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的腹地都在溃散边缘了，一个它的眷属都看不见。
E: Times really have changed. Even {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} own lands are on the verge of collapse. I haven't seen any sign of Titankin.

C: 我成裁判了？
E: Am I the referee?

C: 不竞速，只比战利品的数量，计数全凭自觉。放心，被{F#她}{M#他}解决的敌人，我不会算在自己头上的。
E: We won't compete on who's fastest but on the number of trophies, so we'll each be responsible for our own tally. Don't worry. I won't add {M#his}{F#her} kills to my own count.

C: 毕竟对万敌而言，族人和荣誉大于一切。就算破败成这样，能让他自由自在的地方，也只有悬锋城一处了。
E: Nothing is more important to Mydei than his people and glory. The city may be in ruins, but... Kremnos is still the only place where he can be free.

C: 在照片之外，说不定能让你们的旅途更丰富一点？
E: Give you something to show for your trip, in addition to the photos.

C: 「…但他们企盼的荣光却没有如期而至。」
E: "...but the glory they've been striving for has not come as anticipated."

C: 可不是么，只能仰仗你了。
E: Sadly, yes. You are my only hope now.

C: 悬锋人用那双如鹰隼般锐利的双眼追踪着你，你很确定他可以坚持一天一夜不眨眼。
E: The Kremnoan follows you with his eagle-sharp gaze. You're sure he can keep his eyes open day and night without blinking.

C: 英灵……
E: Martyrs...

C: 你指的是……
E: You mean...

C: 「狡猾、粗鄙之人，在厄运将临之际，又打算侵扰我的安宁吗？」
E: "Devious and repulsive humans... Are you here to disturb my peace again, just as disaster approaches?"

C: 不行…这么做就是在浪费时间。
E: This won't do... We're just wasting our time.

C: 对于翁法罗斯人，真的存在比这片土地更重要的东西吗？他们甚至没有逃向天外这个选项。
E: For the people of Amphoreus, is there really anything that has more weight than this land? They don't even have the option to flee beyond the sky.

C: 似乎没有很强的压迫感。
E: It doesn't feel particularly oppressive.

C: 母亲？是谁？不记得。
E: Mother? Who? Don't remember.

C: …那就是我能够想象的，最大的奢侈。
E: ...That is the greatest luxury that I can ever imagine.

C: 不必如此咄咄逼人。当年的决议投票，可是有接近半数的元老拒绝将圣城交到你们手中，我不过是反对派里不起眼的一员。
E: Ease off on the hostility. You'd do well to remember nearly half of the elders stood against entrusting the holy city to you in that crucial vote. I am but one voice in the dissent.

C: 它诉说了白厄一行的胜利吗？
E: Does it foretell the triumph of Phainon and the others?

C: 愚蠢至极……
E: Utterly foolish...

C: 能借着天谴之锋的耀光看清各位的面庞，我倍感荣幸。
E: It is an honor to see your true faces revealed by the radiant glow of The Blade of Fury.

C: 「以此为证：它从未将神矛刺入任何敌人的后背。」
E: "A testament that they have never plunged their divine lance into an enemy's back."

C: 挣脱束缚，回归神躯吧。
E: Break free from your shackles and return to your divine body.

C: 无梦的睡眠，只是一片死寂。
E: A dreamless sleep is nothing but deathly silence.

C: 若是刺客…就在那里解决他。
E: If there's an assassin... we'll take care of him right there.

C: 啊…好像有点困了呢。光芒好温和，照得身上的毛都暖洋洋的，想睡觉……
E: Hnngh... I think I'm getting sleepy. The light feels so nice and warm. Even my fur's toasty warm. I can fall asleep any...

C: …神明却选择了他。
E: ...The gods have chosen him.

C: 等等，还有事没做。
E: Wait, I still have some things to do.

C: 请上前来，两位。
E: Both of you, please come forward.

C: 拍拍…拍拍……
E: *slap*... *slap*...

C: 她离开涡心，回花园了。我们去找她吧？{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}是小蝶一直在找寻的泰坦，无论有没有线索，没人比她更了解「死亡」。
E: She has left the Vortex and returned to the garden. Shall we go and look for her? {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} is the Titan that Cas has always been looking for. Regardless of whether there are any clues, there's probably no one else that understands Death better than her.

C: 冥界…子虚乌有……
E: The nether realm... Nothing but an illusion...

C: 我从未对她忠诚过，谈何背叛？
E: What betrayal is there to speak of when I was never loyal to her to begin with?

C: 您是想说，{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}并未真正死去？
E: Are you suggesting that {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} may not have truly passed?

C: 哎…一颗脑袋里怎么会同时住着两个疯子？
E: ...How do two lunatics coexist in the same brain?

C: 哼…可算是来了。
E: Hmph... It's finally time.

C: 好景致哪…这下，汝也该承认泰坦十足壮观了吧？
E: What a splendid view... Isn't it about time you recognized the magnificence of us Titans?

C: 量力而行罢——要是在死者当中走得太远，可连吾都将束手无策喔？
E: Know your limits. Wander too far among the dead and even I might not be able to save you.

C: …谢谢您，阿格莱雅大人。
E: ...Thank you, Lady Aglaea.

C: 缇宝大人，你分明知道…那句*明天见*只是一个善意的谎言。
E: Lady Tribbie, you know perfectly well... that see you tomorrow is nothing but a white lie.

C: *敲门声*
E: *Door knocks*

C: 你好，赛飞儿。
E: Hi, Cipher.

C: 这是通往冥界的摆渡费用。但这次就不真的问你们要了，我垫付，咱们做个样子就行。
E: That's the ferry fare for entering the nether realm. However, I honestly won't ask you to pay this time. I'll pay. And then we'll just have to go through the motions...

C: …异邦的勇士？
E: ...Foreign warriors?

C: 等等，这一幕是……
E: W—Wait, this is...

C: 你们听闻了我在此进行的伟业，特来送上炼成的最后一样材料？
E: Did you hear about the great work that I'm doing here, and have thus arrived to give me the last material that I need for transmutation?

C: 我明白，您当初是为了保护那位与死亡相伴的女孩，遐蝶，才选择对这故事缄口不言……
E: I understand that you chose to remain silent about the story to protect Castorice, the girl who coexists with death...

C: 但，或许你的话语…能真正为我指明前进的方向。
E: Your words might truly guide me toward the path forward.

C: 我所流下的全部眼泪，都由比我更强者判定——我将为此稍感宽慰。
E: I will at least derive some comfort... If all the tears that I had shed were determined by some mightier being above.

C: 「金织」女士呢？为什么派这家伙来压台？逐火之旅真要结束了？
E: Where's Lady Goldweaver? Why is she sending this guy to give the last speech? Is this really the end of the Flame-Chase Journey?

C: 灾厄的长臂只会掣肘懦弱的人，你是弱者吗？
E: Only the weak will be hindered by the far-reaching grasp of Calamity. Are you one of them?

C: 那求而不得的心愿，终于能够实现。在崭新的世界里，每一朵绽放的生命，都将高举起双手，诉说这一刻的意义……
E: The wish I once sought but could never grasp is now within reach. In this brand-new world, every blooming life will lift its arms in celebration, and recount the profound meaning of this very instant...

C: …嗜权如嗜腐的苍蝇。
E: ...Crave power like a fly craves rot.

C: 在白厄成长为预言中的领袖之前，我必须维系逐火之旅，引领众人…哪怕只有一具空壳，只能前进寥寥几步。
E: Until Phainon grows into his position as the prophesied leader, I must continue to lead everyone on the Flame-Chase Journey. I must keep inching forward, even if only as an empty shell.

C: 老师…你永远都这样。
E: You never change, do you, Professor?

C: 言尽于此。别了，各位，来世再会。
E: That's all I have to say. Farewell, everyone. May we meet again in the next life.

C: 好啊，来古士——你不会觉得，我想问的是一个名字吧？
E: Alright, Lygus. But you can't possibly think that I'm just asking for a name, can you?

C: 说实话，对那位「金织」大人心怀怨言的人可不少……
E: To tell you the truth, there are many people who hold grudges against that Lady Goldweaver...

C: （这是…亡灵……）
E: (This is a... departed spirit...?)

C: 祸不单行也无可奈何。你还要为阿格莱雅查清树庭之灾的始末，总得走这一趟。路上多替{NICKNAME}留意下「死亡」泰坦的文献吧，也算不虚此行。
E: Bad luck tends to come in streaks, so don't beat yourself up over it. Besides, Aglaea needs you here to uncover the truth behind what happened to the Grove. Let's just make the most out of this trip and keep a lookout for any documents related to the Death Titan. They could be useful to {NICKNAME}.

C: 从命运重渊到悬锋城，我已见过许多泰坦造物，树庭里也有不少{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}创造的生灵。
E: From the Abyss of Fate to Castrum Kremnos, I've seen many a Titan creation during my time in Amphoreus. Lifeforms created by {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} can also be found in the Grove.

C: 如今昼夜失序，为了方便你们理解星空，天文学者借助泰坦神迹，变换光线，将「过去的夜晚」投影在这里……
E: The day-night cycle has been lost to this world. So that students like you may still learn about the night sky, astronomers have harnessed the Titans' miraculous power to manipulate the light, projecting the "nights of the past" here for you.

C: 很多时候，人们并非真正无知，而是必须装作无知。
E: Often, people know more than they let on. They simply choose to feign ignorance because they have no other choice.
Hmm...

C: 汝…有把握复活一位泰坦？
E: You can revive a Titan?

C: 我来作为{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}重新诞生，并按它的方法再造世间万物，不就是了吗？
E: If I'm reborn as {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, I can rebuild the world and all within it as they once did. Simple, is it not?

C: 这是……
E: That's...

C: {RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}在上，以神礼观众之名，我见到——
E: By {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} above, as the Theoros, I have observed...

C: 究竟哪一条路，才能为凡人带来理想的明天？
E: Now, which of the two would lead mortals to an ideal future?

C: 稍等一下，我还没准备好。
E: Hold on. I'm not ready.

C: 而后，她选择了与艾格勒融为一体，彻底摒弃了折磨她一生的人性。
E: ...And then she chose to merge with Aquila, casting aside once and for all the humanity that tormented her all her life.

C: 看吧，黄金裔…你与那些卑劣之人并无不同。
E: Look, Chrysos Heir... you are no different from the rest...

C: 哪怕要在此赌上我拥有的、以及尚未拥有的一切…我都必须在您面前跪坐乞怜，为自己争取一线生机…也为向您证明，凡人有能力救赎自己！
E: Even if it means risking everything I have and everything I have yet to gain... I must kneel before you, begging for a chance at life. I need to prove that mortals are capable of redemption!

C: 它以一则被粉饰的谎言为始，却铺下了凡人跨越千年的救世之路。
E: It began with a whitewashed lie, but it laid down a path of deliverance for humanity over thousands of years.

C: 维持百界门，真的是件很累的事情呀…这几天，*我们*感觉自己的身形都变小了好几圈。更别说，奥莱诺斯的领主还在四处搜捕*我们*……
E: Maintaining the Century Gate takes everything I have. Lately, it feels like we are getting smaller and smaller. And to make matters worse, the lord of Oleinus is still closing in on us...

C: 不能再耽搁了。各位，快走！
E: We can't delay any longer. Everyone, move quickly!

C: 「——激起往昔的涟漪！」
E: "—and stir up ripples of past reverie!"

C: 什么？这是什么声音……
E: Wait... what was that sound?

C: 雷云在聚集……
E: Storm clouds are gathering...

C: …哎唷，终于被我找到了！
E: ...Ah, I finally found it!

C: 我实在没有勇气…将圣城黎明的倒计时，残忍地刻在公民的心中啊……
E: I lacked the courage to carve the countdown to the city's new dawn into the hearts of its people...

C: 必须由我……
E: It has to be me...

C: 同为{RUBY_B#死亡，纷争，诡计}「灾厄」{RUBY_E#}神权的继承者，我当半神的经验——可比那小狮子多出整整一千年哪。
E: As a fellow heir to the divine authority of {RUBY_B#Death, Strife, Trickery}Calamity{RUBY_E#}, I've been a demigod for a thousand years longer than the little lion.

C: 若时间允许，我也会一同追查三月七小姐的下落。
E: If time allows, I will also investigate March 7th's whereabouts.

C: 哎，这一连串话说得，我嘴皮子都快磨破了！斯缇科西亚的财宝还在水底下等着咱们哪，赶紧让我见识见识「岁月」的神力吧，灰子？
E: Phew. That was a long speech. I'm getting thirsty at this rate! The treasures of Styxia aren't gonna float up on their own. Come on, Gray Mystery, show me what the authority of "Time" can do!

C: 可…问题的关键不是在艾格勒身上吗？
E: But... isn't the real issue with Aquila?

C: 哈哈，该说不说，效果还挺明显的？
E: Ha, it's working pretty well, wouldn't you say?

C: 呀，吓我一跳！
E: Whoa, you scared me!

C: 此情此景，我只怨自己还不够冷漠。因为你的邪恶…无药可医。
E: In this moment, I only regret not being more ruthless. Because your evil... is beyond cure.

C: 终于读出我的想法了？哈…你果真变得迟钝了。为了让你清晰地看见，我可是一直尽力在脑子里维持那个画面啊。
E: You finally figured it out? Ha... you have grown dull. I've been holding that image in my mind this whole time to make sure you could see it clearly.

C: 若此计不成，我们本还准备了数十样精彩的临别赠礼…半神，你要听听么？
E: If this plan fails, we still have dozens of splendid parting gifts prepared... Demigod, would you like to hear about them?

C: 现在…该放手了。我该庆幸…庆幸自己还是等来了这一刻——<color=#dbc291ff>能将我的离去筑成众人的长阶。</color>
E: Now... it's time to let go. I should be grateful... grateful that I've reached this moment — <color=#dbc291ff>to let my departure become a path for others to follow.</color>

C: …跟你们这些有钱人打交道可真麻烦，浪费我的时间！算了，你不收，别处还有的是人……
E: ...Dealing with you rich people is such a pain, always wasting my time! Fine, if you don't want it, there are plenty of others who do...

C: 看吧，贴近些。
E: Look. Come a bit closer.

C: 桀桀…没想到是这么简朴的故事，真是让人大失所望啊。
E: Hehe... I didn't expect such a simple story. How disappointing.

C: 大姐头，这回咱们指定赚得盆满钵满，不知你打算怎么消费？
E: Boss Lady, we're set to make a fortune this time. Got any plans on how to spend it?

C: 「没错。<color=#dbc291ff>此时此刻，我的身形已经破碎。在这世间，我作为『人』的旅程已经来到了终点。</color>」
E: "That's right. <color=#dbc291ff>At this moment, my physical form is already shattered. My journey as a human in this world has come to an end.</color>"

C: 「我们此前的约定，现在到了兑现它的时候了。」
E: "It's time to fulfill our pact."

C: 圣城卫士上前查看时，她已经没有生命迹象了。
E: She showed no signs of life by the time the Holy City Guards approached to check.

C: …感谢你，克拉特鲁斯阁下。
E: ...Thank you, Lord Krateros.

C: 丹恒，能请你帮我一个忙吗？
E: Dan Heng, can you do me a favor?
Hee...

C: 但是，在我看来——
E: But to me —

C: 当然。我听闻，在黎明云崖的某处藏着一颗「全世宝石」，传说它是从黎明机器上脱落的碎屑。
E: Of course, it has. I heard there's a "Gem of All Worlds" hidden somewhere in Dawncloud. Apparently it's a piece that fell out of the Dawn Device.

C: 噢，我明白了。你怕她会狗急跳墙，对吧？
E: Ah. I see. You're afraid she'll do something wild now that she's pushed into a corner, aren't you?

C: 也许我的回答有些空泛，没有意义，阿那克萨戈拉斯教授……
E: Perhaps my answer is a bit vague and meaningless, Professor Anaxagoras, but...

C: 嗯，前提是我们真的能破除「天外之界」的诅咒…尽管我有种预感，此事不会那么一帆风顺。
E: Yes, assuming we can actually break the curse about 'worlds beyond the sky'... I have a feeling it's not going to be smooth sailing.

C: 当然——<color=#dbc291ff>「在彩虹桥的尽头，天空之子将缝补晨昏。」</color>
E: Yes. <color=#dbc291ff>"At the end of the rainbow bridge, the Skyfolk will mend dusk and dawn."</color>

C: 收下我的祝福吧，雅辛忒丝。初见你时，我心中确有担忧……
E: Take my blessing, Hyacinthia. When I first saw you, I indeed had my doubts...

C: 风堇通过彩虹匣召唤出了先祖的英魂……
E: Hyacine used the Chroma Coffer to summon the heroic spirit of the ancestor...

C: 谢谢诸位的祝福！请放心，我们已经做好了万全的准备。
E: Thank you all for your blessings! Rest assured. We're fully prepared.

C: 我，天空一族的雅辛忒丝，准备好引领人子重登天空了。
E: I, Hyacinthia of the Sky people, am prepared to lead the children of humanity back to the sky.

C: 她战力值这么高？
E: Was her ATK really that high?

C: 如你所见，我们都是雅辛忒丝的伙伴，她的战友。
E: As you can see, we are all Hyacinthia's companions and comrades.

C: 如今的艾格勒，恐怕早已失去理智……
E: I fear the Aquila of present has long lost their sanity...

C: …什么，女孩？
E: ...What is it, girl?

C: 聆听：塞涅俄丝与艾格勒的决战
E: Listen to the final battle between Seliose and Aquila

C: 她很特殊。她的决心，比偏执更甚。
E: She is special. Her resolve goes beyond mere stubbornness.

C: …雅辛忒丝，我们将服从你的意愿，将力量借予诸位，令艾格勒的本体现身。
E: ...Hyacinthia, we will heed your wishes, channeling our strength to reveal Aquila's true form.

C: 我们会执行你的意志，风堇姑娘，一如我们曾遵守对塞涅俄丝的承诺。
E: We will carry out your will, Miss Hyacine, as faithfully as we kept our promise to Seliose.

C: 直到妈妈离开以后…*我们*才发现，折纸本身其实并没有多么快乐…*我们*很快就忘记了那个陪伴了*我们*半个童年的爱好。
E: It wasn't until after Mama left that we realized origami itself hadn't been the true source of our joy. We soon left behind the hobby that had occupied so much of our childhood.

C: 恐怕她也没奢求过他人的同情。但……
E: She may not have sought sympathy from others, but...

C: 它…它到底在说什么呢？！
E: What... What are they talking about!?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>创世涡心…缇宁大人，在等待。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Waiting at the Vortex of Genesis... Lady Trinnon is.</color>

C: <color=#dbc291ff>我绝不会让你们的旅途在这里画上句号，{NICKNAME}。</color>在翁法罗斯人从未触及的天外，还有很多人在等着你们回家。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>I won't let your journey end here, {NICKNAME}.</color> Somewhere beyond the sky, where Amphoreans have never reached, there are many people waiting for you to come home.

C: 且不论神谕，我们现在也回不去。
E: And even if we ignore the prophecy, we can't go back now.

C: 带着这份愿望走下去吧…成为开启一切的人……
E: Take this wish with you... Be the one who begins it all...

C: 这是男人最初的记忆。为免您枯坐席间，我希望阁下将其视作一场「沉浸式戏剧」……
E: These are his first memories. Rather than watching, why not join in? Think of it as "immersive theater"...

C: 原来你也是导演？
E: Oh, you direct plays now?

C: 你在对谁说话？
E: Who's that supposed to be?

C: 有您替我保管，我就放心啦。要是想让我占卜，随时乐意效劳。
E: Thank you for keeping it safe. You know you can always just ask if you want me to divine something.

C: 听起来还真…消极。不过，我明白你想表达的意思。
E: Not the most optimistic take, but I see your point.

C: 那可以被我的双手照拂的花朵…一定生在死亡的荫蔽下吗？
E: These precious flowers I care for with my own hands... are they destined to bloom only in death's embrace?

C: 她是个无私奉献的人。
E: She's truly selfless in her dedication.

C: 如何？我能感觉到，你内心的迷雾似乎已经散去些许了呢。
E: So tell me... has the uncertainty in your heart begun to fade?

C: 你是专程来剧透的吗？
E: Are you here just to spoil the story?

C: 他继续辗转，直到逐火的呼声响彻大地。在预言描绘的风景中，人类将战胜众神，摘得火种，为翁法罗斯带来新生的黎明。
E: Onward he walked until the call of the Flame-Chase Journey thundered across the land. In the vision painted by prophecy, humanity would triumph over the gods, seize the Coreflames, and ignite a new dawn for Amphoreus.

C: 他下定决心，响应「金织」号召，远赴圣城。可面对年轻的战士，元老们只面露不屑，冷笑间便将他投入军营。
E: When the Goldweaver called, he answered, traveling to the holy city. There, the Elders met his warrior's spirit with nothing but scorn, condemning him to the barracks in derision.

C: 理解世界的重量，才有背负它的资格…是要以此称量我们的信念么？
E: Which means only those who understand the world's weight are worthy to carry it... Is this how you plan to test our convictions?

C: 如果*我们*说，这场对决的意义不在胜负，而在于你的选择呢？
E: What if we told you this duel isn't about winning or losing, but rather in the choice you make?

C: 一言为定。
E: It's a deal.

C: 请随我来，两位异乡的战士——这世上的英雄多如繁星，而此刻，我们被长夜的火光聚集在一起……
E: Follow me, brave outlanders — heroes of this world are as countless as the stars, and at this moment, we find ourselves gathered here by the light of the flames of the long night...

C: *模糊的呢喃*
E: *Indistinct mutters*

C: 这一定是个不同以往的浪漫故事……
E: This will be a romantic story like none that has come before...

C: 感到不知所措么？如您所见，此情此景正是戏剧《翁法罗斯》的最后篇章……
E: Feeling a bit lost? As you now see, this scene marks the final act of the drama "Amphoreus"...

C: 树干潮湿，小心别滑下去啦。
E: Watch your step, the trunk's slippery!

C: <color=#dbc291ff>卡厄斯兰那，背负混沌之人</color>，此名非一人所有，它是神话中刻法勒的化身，亦是「英雄」的代名词。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Khaslana, the name of one who bears chaos</color>, does not belong to a single person. Rather, it is the embodiment of the mythical Kephale and a symbol of all heroes.

C: 不，只是这答案来得太过突然，反而少了追根究源的乐趣。
E: No, it's just that the answer came so suddenly, there was no fun in tracing it back to its roots.

C: 容我拒绝。身为「死亡」的半神……
E: I must refuse. As the demigod of "Death"...

C: 呵…那怎么行呢……
E: Ha... now that just won't do...

C: 正是为了反抗那样的结局，对么？
E: It's all been for the sake of defying that end... hasn't it?

C: 那么，被我们留在身后的这个世界，这个在我心中，希望尚存的家园……
E: Then the world we leave behind, this world, my home, where hope still lingers...

C: >>>十二黄金裔生命周期依次结束，对象卡厄斯兰那回退演算进程。
E: >>> Lifecycles of the twelve Chrysos Heirs terminated in sequence. Subject Khaslana regressed the extrapolation process.

C: 他们是两个超级、超级让人省不下心的家伙！少了我这个主心骨，他们在新世界只怕是寸步难行吧？
E: They're absolute disasters waiting to happen! They won't last five minutes in a new world without me!

C: 能听懂他们的解释吗？
E: Can you understand their explanations?

C: 在想什么呢？
E: Thinking hard over there?

C: 如果还是不适应，就像以前一样称呼人家为「迷迷」吧。嘻…开个玩笑。
E: If you still can't get used to it, just call me Mem, like you did before! Teehee~ Just kidding.

C: 我们斩落对方面具，发现他的脸孔竟然与白厄无异。而当他的身体被仪式剑贯穿时，海量记忆喷涌而出，有关白厄、盗火行者和翁法罗斯的种种也终于浮出水面……
E: We struck down the enemy's mask, only to discover that his face was identical to Phainon's. When his body was pierced by the ceremonial blade, a flood of memories surged forth, revealing the truth about Phainon, the Flame Reaver, and Amphoreus...

C: 「便可▀▄越过最终协议█▄修改「负世」火种█▄扭转「再创世」█▄▀」
E: "Then you can ▀▄bypass the final protocol█▄modify the Coreflame of 'Worldbearing'█▄and reverse 'Era Nova'█▄▀"

C: 所以，只要你愿意停止干涉，让最后一次「再创世」自然发生。我会保证…列位无名客毫发无损，顺利返航。
E: In other words, as long as you are willing to stop interfering and let the final "Era Nova" carry out its natural course... I'll guarantee the safety of all Nameless and ensure you return unscathed.

C: 异常量：{NICKNAME}。
E: Outlier: {NICKNAME}.

C: 是呀，<color=#dbc291ff>欧洛尼斯</color>凭借这一道神谕彻底改变了翁法罗斯。不过，其中关于「救世主」的部分，除了你的外貌和降临时间，就没有更多细节了。
E: Indeed! <color=#dbc291ff>Oronyx</color> reshaped Amphoreus through the prophecy. Although, regarding the Deliverer... there were not many details beyond your appearance and the time of your arrival.

C: 我是哀丽秘榭的昔涟，这位是{NICKNAME}！我们初来乍到，人生地不熟，想向您请教一件事……
E: I'm Cyrene of Aedes Elysiae. This is {NICKNAME}. We're new here and wanted to ask you...

C: 那便就此噤声，向我手中这枚火种献上最高的敬意。
E: Then be silent, and offer up the highest respect to this Coreflame in my hand.

C: *诸代表议论纷纷*
E: *Representatives chattering*

C: 所谓信任和忠诚，于我耳中皆为虚言。
E: So-called trust and loyalty are but empty words to me.

C: 神礼官…真是不妙的名字啊……
E: Theoros... what an ominous name...

C: 你以为我想来么？奉劝你多烧些友邦进贡的香薰吧，别让我的作品染上鱼腥。
E: Do you think I wanted to come? I suggest you burn some more of the incense offered by our allies, lest my creations be tainted by the reek of fish.

C: 又一轮逐火开始了吗？
E: Another round of Flame-Chase is starting?

C: 凯撒？她一般不会这么早就步入席中。按她的话说，爱臣私语的话所，君王应该保持沉默。
E: The Imperator? She usually wouldn't arrive this early. She believes that rulers should stay silent in places where their subjects hold private conversations.

C: 阿雅，要是你喝不惯蜜酿，*我们*就去要一口锅，给你煮些燕麦粥喝。
E: Agy, if you can't get used to the honey brew, we will go ask for a pot and cook some oatmeal for you.

C: 干杯——
E: Cheers!

C: 贵客无须担心，宴会的安保不会因此削弱分毫——她根本喝不过我！
E: Don't worry, dear guests. The banquet's security won't be compromised. I'd never get drunk before her!

C: 太近了，会被发现的啦！
E: We're too close! They'll notice us!

C: 噢，我知道了，是那个吧？
E: Oh, I got it. It's tha—that thing, right?

C: 恕我失言，凯撒大人。
E: Forgive my transgression, great Imperator.

C: 果然。那神礼官的阴谋…昭然若揭。
E: As I expected... That Theoros's schemes have been revealed.

C: 呵，欢畅的气氛更能映衬出诸位的决心。我相信，法吉娜一役，众爵也定会和过去一样竭智尽力……
E: Hah, a joyous atmosphere is a better fit for showing me your resolve. I believe that you, my dukes, will do all you can to assist in the campaign against Phagousa, just as you always have...

C: 对，{NICKNAME}……
E: That's right, {NICKNAME}...

C: 您仍然没能看清自己的立场。请容我重申——
E: I fear you are still quite unaware of your current situation. Allow me to reiterate...

C: 终于见到真家伙了啊，*前辈*。
E: Finally, we get to meet face-to-face... Senior Society Member.

C: 来古士阁下，请允许我指出：现在，{RUBY_B#「律法」}终极协议{RUBY_E#}的{RUBY_B#火种}读取权限{RUBY_E#}已在我们手中，掌握{RUBY_B#神权}写入与执行权限{RUBY_E#}只是时间问题。
E: Please allow me to spell the situation out for you, Lord Lygus: {RUBY_B#Coreflame}Permission to read{RUBY_E#} the {RUBY_B#"Law"}Ultimate Protocol{RUBY_E#} is already in my hands. It'll only be a matter of time before we acquire the {RUBY_B#Divine Authority}authority to write and execute commands{RUBY_E#} as well.

C: 「当那颗最明亮的星辰，那颗预示黎明的星辰升起时……」
E: "When that brightest star, that star heralding the dawn, finally rises..."

C: 难道是太久不见，想我了？但现在没时间磨磨蹭蹭啦，黄金裔和天才们都在等你呢，对不对？
E: Has it been so long that you're still missing me? There's no time to waste, though. The Chrysos Heirs and the geniuses are all waiting for you.

C: 而且，涡心本就是与世隔绝的禁地——换句话说，全翁法罗斯最适合当监狱的地方。
E: Besides, the Vortex is cut off from the world. No place in Amphoreus makes a better prison.

C: 翁法罗斯在「毁灭」的命途上狂飙了太久，「再创世」的底层逻辑已经彻底被污染了。我和螺丝花了很多力气，也只能勉强覆写其中的一小段逻辑……
E: Amphoreus has been racing down the Path of Destruction for too long, and the underlying logic of "Era Nova" has been completely corrupted. Screwy and I put in a lot of effort, but we could barely manage to overwrite a small portion of its logic...

C: 你应该听过这样一则寓言——「在一座幽暗的洞穴中，有一群人：他们自出生起便被缚住双腿和脖颈，无法环顾、互望，或是看到自己。」
E: You should have heard of this fable. "In a shadowed cave lived a people, imprisoned from childhood and chained so that their legs and necks are fixed, forcing them not to look around at the cave, each other, or themselves."

C: 「在他们身后是一团火，面前则是洞穴的岩壁。火光为他们留下投影，而岩壁向他们投射回声……」
E: "Behind them is a fire, and before them loomed the stone wall of the cave. The flames cast shadows, while the rocky surface threw back echoes..."

C: 我不需要理解你。
E: I don't need to understand you.

C: 于是，她在空虚的漫游中终于找到了新的目标，如同天光直射深海。
E: And thus, in her hollow drift, she finally found a new purpose, like sunlight piercing the deepest trench.

C: 那火灼伤了我的鳍，令我感受到痛楚，还有……
E: It scorched my fins, made me feel pain, and...

C: 「她的一只眼睛看见光荣，另一只眼睛看见尸身。」
E: "One eye of hers sees glory. The other sees corpses."

C: 请快来这边，让我们一同欢庆！
E: Come quick. Let's celebrate together!

C: 你面前的地狱，就是那场战役的重现。
E: The hell before you... is the re-creation of that very battle.

C: 我不认可这个答案，但是我认可你对他们的赞许，容我收回方才的失言。
E: I do not agree with that answer, but I respect your tribute to them. Allow me to take back my earlier words.

C: 而你，救世主——也将见证这金色的死亡。
E: And you, Deliverer, shall bear witness to this golden death.

C: 祭拜海洋的宫殿，与涡心相连的圣所，也曾是第一次逐火的战场……
E: The palace that worshiped the ocean, the sanctuary connected to the Vortex, was also once the battlefield of the first Flame Chase...

C: 致那些为了新世界而献身的黄金裔们——他们的命运谨如神谕所示，也许无论时空如何轮转，都会恰逢世界所需之时降世，只为行其职责、全其夙愿。
E: To the Chrysos Heirs who gave their lives for a new world — Their fates, as foretold by prophecy, are to be born whenever the world needs them, irrespective of how time and space may shift, all to fulfill their duty and answer their calling.

C: 况且，现在的你——根本没机会抽走我们的{RUBY_B#开拓者}王牌{RUBY_E#}哪。
E: Besides, in your current predicament, there's no way you can take our {RUBY_B#Trailblazer}trump card{RUBY_E#} away.

C: 「律法」的神权，将会落入何人之手？
E: Who will own the divine authority of "Law"?

C: 我即是「律法」。凯撒的冠冕，岂有拱手相让的道理？
E: I am the "Law." Why should I give my imperial crown to any other?

C: 不惜欺骗所有人，为什么？
E: You lied to everyone! Why!?

C: 漫长的时光里，我只能眼睁睁看着人们走进记忆之门。那些人看不见我，也听不见我的呼唤。天外之音总会给出安全的承诺，但我从没见过有人平安归来……
E: For ages, I've watched people walk through that door. They couldn't see or hear my calls. The voices beyond always promised safety, but I've never seen anyone return safely...

C: 「星期日呢？他没和你在一起吗。」
E: "Where's Sunday? Did he not come back with you?"

C: 绝大多数忆者都相信，当宇宙不可避免地走入熵增的末路，浮黎将以包容世界的「记忆」重塑银河……
E: The majority of Memokeepers believe that when the universe inevitably reaches its death, unable to sustain increasing entropy, Fuli will use the "memories" of everything to reforge the cosmos.

C: 对，那位少女。<color=#dbc291ff>她率先被「记忆」劫持，却用忆质中和了防火墙，让你们二人得以进入翁法罗斯。</color>
E: Exactly. <color=#dbc291ff>She was the first to be hijacked by the Remembrance, but she used memoria to neutralize the firewall, allowing you two to enter Amphoreus</color>.

C: 有理由怀疑，在权杖彻底坠入「毁灭」前，浮黎的目光曾一度掠过这个世界。
E: I have reasons to suspect that Fuli's gaze once swept over this world before the Scepter completely fell into Destruction.

C: 要和我们重逢的人不是你，「长夜月」。
E: You're not the one we want to reunite with, "Evernight."

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>欢迎访问：德谬歌矩阵</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Welcome to the Demiurge Matrix</color>

C: 也会「咻」地一下，自己钻进相机里去！
E: I'd "whoosh" right into the camera!

C: 是啊，我完全能理解，三月七。
E: Yes. I get it, March 7th.

C: 你说，你没看见三月。
E: You said you didn't see March.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>你是为了银河的愿望而启程的。在以你为主角的故事里，宇宙会逃离「终末」的命运。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>It was a wish of the cosmos that set you in motion. And in the tale where you are the protagonist, the stars themselves will defy the destiny of "Finality."</color>

C: 「恳请你降下光芒，令一切阴翳无所遁形！」
E: "Cast your light upon us! Let no darkness remain concealed!"

C: 为什么，要逃离？
E: Why run away?

C: 「时间宝贵，请加快脚步。」
E: "Time is precious. Let's pick up the pace."

C: 结束这个话题吧。我不打算评判「丹枫」，更无意再与他产生纠葛。
E: Let's move on to another topic. I have no intention of passing judgment on "Dan Feng," and I have even less desire to become entangled with him again.

C: 丹枫，你心中可有一丝悔意？
E: Do you have any regrets, Dan Feng?

C: 这回答，毫不意外。
E: Your answer does not surprise me.

C: *哀伤的轰鸣*
E: *bereaved roar*

C: 海瑟音女士，可否请你为我掩护？接下来，我必须全神贯注，恐怕无暇顾及周遭。
E: Miss Hysilens, would you give me cover? I'll need to focus completely on what's ahead and may not be able to pay attention to my surroundings.

C: 列车组还好吗？
E: How's the Express Crew doing?

C: 倘若是小灰鱼儿对我印象深刻，我自然欣喜。
E: If I made that much of an impression on Little Gray Fry, then I am naturally delighted.

C: 本想潜伏在暗处，避免正面冲突。但……
E: I wanted to hide in the shadows to avoid direct conflict, but...

C: 真是无孔不入啊。
E: You folks are truly everywhere.

C: 但那也意味着，我无法再以相同的方式骇入了。
E: But that means I will no longer be able to hack in via the same method.

C: 它只为{RUBY_B#「开拓」}「负世」{RUBY_E#}而燃烧。
E: It only ever burned for {RUBY_B#Trailblaze}"Worldbearing."{RUBY_E#}

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「大地」荒笛</color>，它在无人知晓的历史中陨落。此事疑点重重，与三千万世的演算相悖……
E: In a history known by none, <color=#dbc291ff>Terravox, the "Earth,"</color> fell. This matter has remained extremely mysterious, contradicting the extrapolations of thirty million cycles...

C: 至于铁墓肚子里那些更棘手的恶意程序，就只能见招拆招了。
E: As for those nastier malware programs lurking inside Irontomb's belly, you'll have to deal with them as they come.

C: 恕我直言，瓦尔特先生，这让我想起一些「同谐」的负面传闻。万籁俱寂……
E: Pardon my frankness, Mr. Yang, but this reminds me of some unsettling rumors about the Harmony. Complete silence...

C: 同样是个人爱好。
E: Also a personal preference.

C: 「死亡」和「纷争」不再为人们所惧怕，「诡计」也成为孩子们天真的游戏。
E: Death and Strife are no longer feared by people, and Trickery has become the innocent games of children.

C: 「前进吧，英雄们。向着深渊进军，实现翁法罗斯的夙愿。」
E: "March on, heroes. March into the abyss, and fulfill that long-cherished wish of Amphoreus."

C: 「那片承载群星的大海，等待你奏响凯旋的乐章。」
E: "The star-borne sea awaits your song of triumph."

C: 必然的胜利，无需被称作奇迹。
E: Our assured victory is more than just a miracle.

C: 「第二座考场，我们到了。」
E: "We're here. The second test site."

C: 虽然乍一看只是座雕像，但是……
E: It looks like just a statue, but...

C: 想你了，缇宝老师。
E: I missed you, Lady Tribbie.

C: 乘着西风，所有人一同出发！
E: Riding the west wind, let's all head out together!

C: 对哦，轮到本姑娘出马了？
E: Oh right, it's my turn to shine now?

C: 祂的注视，没有让权杖过载么？
E: THEIR gaze didn't overload the Scepter?

C: 我看见，最高的那座名为「奥赫玛」，圣城的身影已初见雏形。
E: I see that the tallest among them is named "Okhema," and the form of the holy city is already taking shape.

C: 我们，还没有输…
E: We.. haven't lost... yet...

C: 一切都静止在美好的瞬间，这座花园就是你的「记忆」……
E: Everything's frozen in the most beautiful moment. This garden is your "memory"...

C: 「累了吗，{NICKNAME}？」
E: "Tired, {NICKNAME}?"

C: 其实，人家一直都觉得你很了不起呀。毕竟「开拓」的道路也没有神明指引，只能由人一步步踏出……
E: Honestly, I've always thought you were really incredible. After all, no god guided the path of the Trailblaze. It could only be forged by those who dare to take their steps one at a time...

C: 「『开拓』前路的英雄，守望『记忆』的妖精……」
