E: "The hero who Trailblazes the way forward and the fairy who watches over Remembrance..."

C: 那男人刚才离开了这里，甚至连一杯都不想多下肚——呵，不识抬举。
E: That man just left. Wouldn't even stay for another drink. Hah, he needs to show more respect.

C: 终于逮到你了，缇安。在别人家里跑得这么快，多没礼貌呀。
E: I finally caught you, Trianne. Running so fast in someone else's home... how rude of you.

C: 而那些可能成为浮黎的人，具备相同的特征——
E: And those who might become Fuli all share the same characteristics...

C: 说不定，我的心中也藏着一个阴谋呢…一个能让每个人都收获幸福的阴谋~
E: Maybe I have a scheme of my own... a scheme that will bring happiness to everyone~

C: 原来{RUBY_B#我}她{RUBY_E#}一直站在我的身边，还这么美丽呀。
E: {RUBY_B#I}She{RUBY_E#} was always standing beside me. And she is so very beautiful.

C: 这是「哆」，也是「一」，一如初见的一……
E: This is "do." It is also the first note, the one from the first time we met...

C: 「看啊，你多美丽！」
E: "Look, how beautiful you are!"

C: 他们将会去爱，将会受伤……
E: They will love. They will get hurt...

C: 然后，要再加上「一」——不同以往的「一」，向前开拓的「一」♪
E: Then, we'll add "one." A "one" like none that has come before, a "one" that blazes new trails ♪

C: 吓…吓鼠…！
E: Scared... so scared...!

C: >>>大小…，灰度…，比例…，阈值…
E: >>> Size... Grayscale... Proportions... Threshold...

C: >>>注释：桃子 = 爱？
E: >>> Comment: Peach = Love?

C: 昔涟是，笑着道别的，柔软的，粉色的，像是花的。
E: Cyrene was, smiling when she said goodbye. Soft. Pink. Like a flower.

C: 我告别这美丽的世界，不愿成为黑潮的容器。
E: I bid farewell to this beautiful world, unwilling to become the black tide's vessel.

C: 是呀。所以我相信，这一切都是真实的。就像水晶花跌落的瞬间……
E: Indeed. That's why I believe all this is real. The moment the crystal flower fell...

C: 请把它们当作美丽的祝福。第一次写诗时，我为自己起了这个笔名：「昔涟」。希望文字像石子点水，自往昔投下，向未来送去涟漪。
E: Please take them as a beautiful blessing from me. I gave myself the pen name "Cyrene" the first time I wrote a poem. I want my words to be like pebbles falling into a pond, dropped from the past to send ripples into the future.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>那名为《如我所书》的诗篇。</color>
E: And they shall become the epic known as As I've Written.

C: 我不需要你的同情。
E: I don't need your pity.

C: 螺丝咕姆，难道你看不到吗？她机会渺茫，但并非不可能。
E: Can't you see what's going on, Screwllum? Her chances may be small, but it's not zero.

C: 呵呵。
E: Hehe.

C: 不回答。
E: Don't answer.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「阿基维利！」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Akivili!"</color>

C: 随手打的坐标，没什么讲究。你很关心那只虚卒的去向吗？
E: Some random coordinates, not important. You care about where that Voidranger ended up?

C: 所以黑塔的防御系统破解起来真的这么麻烦？
E: Is Herta's security system really that difficult to crack?

C: 温队长说我失踪了？明明是他派我出来的呀。
E: Mr. Wen said I was missing? But he was the one who sent me here.

C: 你要是有什么疑惑，拿着这封调任启示，先回去问问温明德队长吧……
E: If you have any doubts, just take this transfer order. Go back and ask Mr. Wen Mingde about it...

C: …哎，有了这次经验，在小队内部设立暗号迫在眉睫，以免同样的闹剧再次上演。
E: Hey, we learn from our mistakes. It is imperative to set up a secret code within the squad to prevent the same farce from ever happening again.

C: 裂界侵蚀的月台。
E: The railway platform corroded by the Fragmentum.

C: 就是忘了带汽水起子，哎，这种事上还是不得不服老啊。
E: I just forgot to bring the opener. Sigh... I must admit I am old.

C: 金牌调饮师何塞•拉萨罗
E: Legendary Drink-Maker Hosea Lazaro

C: 正在同步监控信息…解析中…请稍后——
E: Currently synchronizing to surveillance data... Analyzing... Please wait—

C: 不，这个方式不科学，小囡很早以前就发现了，「爸爸，你烫个爆炸头吧，这样我就能从一堆同科室的科员伯伯中把你一眼认出来了」。
E: No, this method is not scientific. My daughter worked it out a long time ago, "Daddy, you should get a more luscious hairstyle, then I can tell you apart from the other old guys in your department."

C: 这里的人也会写信？
E: Do people here write letters too?

C: 我们从密卷科<unbreak>101</unbreak>个星神密仪中有哪些是需要用到古恩的胡子，聊到……
E: We talk about everything. We talk about which of the <unbreak>101</unbreak> Aeon instruments in the Department of Insight would require Gunn's beard, and...

C: 纪录在这时候损坏？！
E: Why was the record damaged here?

C: 受伤的科员正在医疗舱内接受治疗……
E: The injured researcher is under medical treatment in the medical cabin.

C: 年轻人不学习，净知道瞎转悠。
E: Young people should spend more time studying instead of wandering around.

C: 没有，她毫发无伤。而且，她答应了洛奇的表白。
E: No, she is safe and sound. And she said yes to Rocky's confession.

C: 怎么会这样…莱斯莉，拒绝了我？
E: I can't believe it... Lesley rejected me?

C: 那些诗歌，记录着他的心事。某种程度上，也是他人生的一部分。全撕了确实可惜，可叹。但是……
E: Those poems are records of his feelings. To some extent, they are part of his life. It's a shame that he tore them up. However...

C: 复兴计划？
E: Project Revival?

C: 听起来很有条理。
E: Sounds very organized.

C: 但我一过来就碰到了件难事，就是、就是……
E: But as soon as I came here, I encountered a problem about, about...

C: 其实刚刚念着鼓劲口诀，我也已经想明白了…既然{NICKNAME}都帮我完成了任务，让我还能留在小队中，我就一定要找出杀死阿尔弗瑞德的怪物，为他报仇。
E: Actually, when I was reciting the chant, I figured it all out... Since you've helped me complete my task already, I can now continue to stay on the team. And I will eventually hunt down the monster that killed Alfred and avenge him.

C: ——什么「智力竞赛为荣，体力消耗为耻」，都是杜撰！体力工作，难道就不是工作了吗？
E: ...What is this? "Battle of intellects is a source of pride. Physical exertion brings shame"? It's complete nonsense! So physical labor doesn't count as work now?

C: 三个。你发现了吗？
E: Three. You see?

C: 老、老东西？
E: Old farts?

C: 你紧盯着熄灭的屏幕，若隐若现的荧光似乎要进行危险的倾诉。你静静等待了一阵，但是什么也没有发生。
E: You stare at the empty screen. The faint fluorescent light seems ready to begin its dangerous display. You wait quietly for a while, but nothing happens.

C: （在影像记录的现实中，她明明离开了空间站。甚至…已经罹难了。）
E: (In the video recording, she clearly left the space station. She even... died.)

C: 结果还是不出我所料，接下来得清除一下乔安感染的病毒，让她「重回正轨」了。
E: Anyway, the overall result is as expected. Next, we should weed out Joanne's virus and get her "back on track" to her old self.

C: 黑塔•全景系统提示您：已锁定监控目标，通行密钥已识别。
E: Prompt from the Herta Panopticon System: Locked onto target, identifying key.

C: （频频点头，表示认同）
E: (Nod in approval)

C: （……它真的是靠气味辨别吗？）
E: (...Is he really using scent to track?)

C: 丹恒先生所言极是。
E: Dan Heng was right.

C: 对…对！我手头也还、还有很多活呢！比如那个，还有那个……
E: Th—That's right! I still have so much work to do! Like that one, and that one...

C: 呵，有多恐怖？我可一点不害怕。要是让我撞见，碰个瓷，刚好还能逃了最近的课题。
E: Huh? How scary can it be? I'm not afraid, not even a little bit. If I ever ran into it, I'd play it up a little. I might even be able to use the encounter as an excuse to escape from work.

C: 还有什么线索吗？
E: Anything else?

C: 想打听照片上的诡影…
E: I want to learn about those photoed spectral things...

C: 不可能。我说过了，它们不会害人，只会遵从恣意妄为的简单本能。
E: Impossible. As I have said, they are not malicious. They only act in accordance with their most basic instincts.

C: 没有密谋，我是在自言自语。你们有听到这只呜呜伯说一句话吗？
E: There's no conspiracy. I was just mumbling to myself. Did you hear the Wubbaboo talking?

C: 是负责防护网的科员？
E: The one who's handling the Protection Net?

C: 愤怒的…
E: Angry...

C: 不过，今后你或许能多来和呜呜伯聊聊…就当是这场相遇的某种纪念吧。
E: However, perhaps in the future, you can drop by more often to have a chat with them... Think of it as a commemoration of this encounter.

C: 没想到吧。
E: Are you surprised?

C: 是在给你穿小鞋吧。
E: She's getting revenge on you.

C: 凭空消失了？
E: It just disappeared into thin air?

C: 是的。不用担心，我的朋友，这张卡带从未离开空间站。
E: Yes. No need to worry, my friend. The cartridge has never left the space station.

C: 我想起一个故事，听闻在朋克洛德，涂鸦是一种特别的符号。骇客将现实视作一场宏大的游戏，追寻着生命的「通关」。
E: I recall a story about Punklorde. It is said that graffiti is a special kind of symbol there. Hackers see reality as a magnificent game and attempt to finish the stage we know as "life."

C: 你们从一开始就知道？
E: You knew everything from the start?

C: 孩子眼中的游戏当然是快乐的，但对于大人，游戏并不是解决问题的唯一方式。
E: *sigh* Games are always fun in the eyes of a child... but to an adult, they are but one among many ways of solving a problem.

C: 当然啦，这一切都离不开你的帮助。请让我再一次向你表示感谢…谢谢，朋友！
E: Of course, it wouldn't have happened if you didn't help. Allow me to thank you once again... Thank you, friend!

C: 我们没分开多久吧。
E: We just saw each other not that long ago.

C: 你没有其他朋友吗？
E: Do you not have any other friends?

C: 没问题，这就出发！
E: No problem, let's go!

C: 列车窗外怎么变成…这个样子了？红红的…这是发生什么了？
E: Everything outside is... red. What's going on?

C: 就是你追尾了列车？
E: Did you crash into the train?

C: 上面有一个探测摄像头，视野非常大，把它遥控到天上，可以观察到视野范围内的全貌…重要的是，还可以看到各种拐角角落！
E: It's got a nifty wide-angle lens on it. Once we zip it up into the air, we'll have eyes on the whole scene. Not a single nook or cranny will be able to hide from us!

C: 呃，原来在银枝眼里，呜呜伯也是美丽的化身呀……
E: So, in Argenti's eyes, Wubbaboos are a thing of beauty...

C: 虫族这样丑恶的威胁，在临死前的话不知是否可参考，毕竟「虫之将死，其言也善」……
E: I wonder if the dying words of those ugly menaces can be trusted. As the saying goes: "Even an insect speaks kind words when death is near."

C: 我想可由我下列车去，正面迎击巨型真蛰虫——用长枪向其胃壁攻击，令其痉挛，将列车呕吐出来。
E: I propose that I disembark from the Express to confront the Giant Sting directly... My strategy is to pierce its stomach with my lance, triggering spasms that may cause it to eject the Express.

C: 爱人的眼睛。
E: A lover's eyes.

C: 没想到竟再次碰面…「真蛰虫」。
E: I did not envision seeing True Stings again.

C: （艾丝妲不在么…去跟黑塔说一声好了。）
E: (Is Asta not here...? I'll go let Herta know.)

C: （仔细想想，那个时候我好像在……）
E: (I think I was...)

C: 哟，猹哥，什么风把您给吹来了？好久不见，想死兄弟我了。
E: Hey, what brings you here, Rich? It's been so long!

C: （这里也是…记忆里的只言片语似乎混在了一起。）
E: (Here too... My memories are just a jumbled mess of words.)

C: 我年纪大啦，眼也花啦，你看要不……
E: I'm not getting any younger and my eyesight is failing. Do you think you can...?

C: 要毁灭的，恐怕不止信任。
E: I'm afraid more than trust will be destroyed here.

C: 不想坐以待毙，就采取行动。你，跟我走。
E: We need to start acting now if you want to survive. You — come with me.

C: 这…这……
E: Th—This...

C: 现在该怎么办？
E: What do we do now?

C: 近期正值特殊时期，各科室都在为迎接天才俱乐部的大人物到来做准备。
E: It's a special time — all departments are preparing to welcome distinguished guests from the Genius Society.

C: 她只是随便找了个荒无人烟的地方试验她的「生命螺旋体系」吧。阮•梅很有才华，可惜她几乎不与人往来，活得像个隐居者。
E: She just wanted somewhere uninhabited to experiment with her "Life Helix System." Ruan Mei is certainly very talented, but she hardly interacts with anyone. She lives like a hermit. Pity.

C: 行了，能成为黑塔学术伙伴的人，还用多说什么呢？{NICKNAME}，听够了就出发吧。看你能不能找到她咯。
E: Anyway. What more needs to be said for someone smart enough to become Herta's research partner, hmm? Hurry up and head out, {NICKNAME}. See if you can find her.

C: 不喜欢吗？我为它付出了很多努力，你应该尝尝。
E: You don't like it? I worked very hard on it. You should at least have a try.

C: 但不知是哪里出了差错，它们拥有了自己的意识，却和天才全然无关。
E: I don't know where it went wrong. They possess their own sentience, but are nowhere near geniuses.

C: 我追随「芝士流心」。
E: I follow Molten Cheese Tart.

C: （哇咔咔——我就是天才，天才中的天才！）
E: (Wakaka — I'm a genius! A genius among geniuses!)

C: 如果来的人是波尔卡•卡卡目呢？
E: What if the responder is Polka Kakamond?

C: 如今，那里存放着我的「大麻烦」。
E: And now my "headache" is stored there.

C: 在那里，一眼可以望见地平线尽头的恒星。
E: From there, you can glimpse the stars that lie at the very edge of the horizon.

C: 黑塔女士的危险奇物收容。嘶嘶。
E: Storage for Madam Herta's dangerous Curios. *buzz*

C: 炒冷饭，嘶嘶。
E: Fry leftover rice. *buzz*

C: 我想查询访客记录。
E: I want to see visitor logs.

C: 好漂亮的星空……
E: What a beautiful starry sky...

C: 空间站特产在哪儿？
E: Where are the space station souvenirs?

C: 输入的数据比较少，它还需要接收大量的外部训练。带上它吧，跟着你一起，它会越来越智能。
E: There hasn't been much data uploaded to it, it will still need a massive amount of external training. Take it with you, and it will gradually grow smarter as you travel.

C: {NICKNAME}，好久不见，你来得正好。请允许我隆重的向你介绍我的挚友，伟大的科学家，宇宙真理道路上的探索者——雷金先生。
E: {NICKNAME}, it's been a while. You came at just the right time! Please allow me to introduce my dear friend, great scientist, and explorer on the path of universal truth — Mr. Regin.

C: 你俩居然能成为朋友？
E: I didn't expect you two to be friends?

C: 在离开贝洛伯格之前，总得留个纪念吧，不如我们仨拍张合照怎么样？下次再见面要很久以后了。
E: I have to leave behind a little memento before I leave Belobog. How about we take a picture together? All three of us? It will be a while before we are able to meet again.

C: 呀，跟您聊了这么久，都忘记招待其他客人了。你先自己品品茶，有什么需要尽管叫我。
E: Oh dear, I've been talking to you for so long that I've completely forgotten to serve my other customers! Please take your time tasting the teas. If you need anything, just call me.

C: 算我拜托各位了，下次轻点，真的。铁卫碰见你们可不会躲雪里，你们呢？就得蹲牢里啦……
E: Seriously though, try treading a little lighter next time, hmm? If you run into the Guards, they won't hide in a snowdrift... and you'll be in a cell before you know it.

C: 你说这个白球是…这里？是我们住的地方？这也太……
E: ...You mean to say that this... white ball... That's here? That's our home? How can that...

C: …很久很久。
E: ...A long, long time.

C: 你们还没进来之前，托帕已经警告过我了…如果债务拖欠太久，公司给了她采取「强硬措施」的权力。
E: Before you both arrived, Topaz warned me that if payments were delayed, the IPC would give her the authority to employ "strong measures."

C: 怎么了，小三月？看你一脸笑容，是有什么值得开心的事吗？
E: Hey, March. That's a big smile on your face — what's the good news?

C: 我听说，雅利洛-Ⅵ之所以能摆脱星核的影响，跟「开拓」势力的援助脱不开关系，难道你们两位就是……
E: I heard that Jarilo-VI only stepped out of the Stellaron's shadow thanks to the direct intervention of the Trailblazers. Surely, you two aren't...?

C: 真不好意思，因为我的事打扰你们老友重聚了！公事已经聊完了，接下来各位可以慢慢叙旧——先走一步咯，回见~
E: I'm sorry our business got in the way of a reunion with old friends. I'll get out of your way.

C: 嗯，想想也是。要不然它的标本也不会被陈列在这里。
E: I suppose it probably is. Otherwise, it wouldn't be on display here.

C: 矿区里面现在是什么情况，有人知道吗？
E: What's going on inside the mine? Any ideas?

C: 托帕不在吗？
E: Is Topaz around?

C: …哼唧？
E: ...Oink?

C: 谢谢你的承诺，三月。我要去召集大臣们了，晚些时候我们再在这里碰面。
E: Thank you, March. I'll assemble the ministers. Let's meet up again here later.

C: 也就是说…「造物引擎」是由贝洛伯格人自主研发的战争兵器？
E: So what you're saying is... the "Engine of Creation" was a weapon constructed by the Belobogians themselves?

C: …很可惜，收并雅利洛-Ⅵ是得到公司高层点头的战略决策。即便我有意颠覆这个决定，想说服上面的人也非常困难。
E: ...Unfortunately the acquisition of Jarilo-VI is a strategic decision that's been approved by the IPC's top brass. Even if I wanted to overturn it, convincing them would be extremely difficult.

C: 哦？是什么事，居然需要收集我的意见？
E: You need my opinion? Happy to help.

C: 不对，还漏了一个人！咱们还没去问希儿的意见呢！
E: Wait a minute, we forgot to ask Seele! Let's go see what she has to say.

C: 「几率很低」——史瓦罗先生都这么说了……
E: "Unlikely, potential..." meaning there could still be conflicts...

C: 话说回来…他们正在修的，莫非就是之前跟我们战斗过的那台大机器人？我有印象，你当时夺取了它的控制权，帮我们打赢了可可利亚！
E: Speaking of solutions... Are they repairing that giant robot — the one we fought against? I remember you took control of it and helped us defeat Cocolia!

C: 能和你们这样闲聊真是太好了。
E: Hehe, I'm glad we're able to discuss some lighter topics.

C: {NICKNAME}，你要去哪？回来回来！
E: {NICKNAME}, where are you going? Come back!

C: 万一病人手上没钱呢？
E: What if a patient doesn't have the money?

C: 没错，只靠我自己的力量救不了所有人…如果有必要，我可以放弃吃饭和睡觉的时间来为他们治病。
E: You're right, I can't save everyone alone... but if I must, I would sacrifice food and sleep to treat them.

C: 你相信他的理想吗？
E: Do you share his vision?

C: 当时的我无条件地信任瓦赫。想来真是可笑又可悲……
E: I trusted Vache with all my heart. Funny, isn't it? And pathetic.

C: 各位观众，请看！坐镇擂台西角的，正是在磐岩镇引起巨大轰动、武艺高超的新秀战士——
E: Next up, we have! Sitting in the west corner of the ring, the newcomer fighter who caused a huge stir in Boulder Town with {M#his}{F#her} superb skills and moves...

C: 请睁大眼睛吧，观众们——精彩的对战即将上演！
E: Don't blink, or you might miss a moment of this brilliant spectacle!

C: …我到底什么时候才能变得更勇敢一点……
E: When can I become braver?

C: 你们都不用工作的吗？
E: Don't you all have to work?

C: 我的那份还是给我吧，刚好凑个整……
E: Oh fine, just give me one. It'll complete the collection...

C: 在人家睡得正香的时候搞突然袭击，也太卑鄙了吧！
E: Imagine launching a surprise attack when your enemy is fast asleep. The cheek!

C: 呃，{NICKNAME}…你怎么随身带着这种东西？
E: Um, {NICKNAME}, why are you carrying that thing with you?

C: 毫不意外地，此处的地砖也被刻上了<color=#dbc291ff>「顺时针旋转箭头」</color>的图案。
E: Unsurprisingly, the tiles here are also engraved with the pattern of <color=#dbc291ff>a clockwise rotation arrow</color>.

C: 我试图操作机关，结果发现栈桥居然因为紧急制动抱死了——
E: I tried to control that thing, but the bridge was locked by an emergency brake.

C: 我们还是尽量避免战斗，小心前进吧。
E: Let's avoid fighting them and move forward with care.

C: 瓦赫…要说我们家谁和花的缘分最浅，应该就属他了吧？
E: Vache... Out of everyone in my family, I think he probably appreciated flowers the least.

C: 后来我才知道，「初雪八落」的花语里有「美好的回忆」这层意思。我还没来得及感谢他们…感谢他们给了我美好的童年。
E: I only found out later that First Snow represents "beautiful memories." My parents gave me a beautiful childhood, and I still haven't had the chance to thank them for that...

C: 奥森先生？你不是陪着妈妈先回去了吗？怎么……
E: Mr. Oswell? I thought you headed back home with mom. How come...?

C: 我们快些走吧，{NICKNAME}。得在身体冻僵之前找到瓦赫留下的线索。
E: Let's hurry up, {NICKNAME}. We need to find any clues that Vache may have left behind before both of us become ice sculptures.

C: …市民？在城墙外面？喂，你们两个，给我站住！
E: ...Citizens? Outside the walls? Hey, you two, stop right there!

C: 他给的药功效极强，只要一小瓶就能让人连续一个星期感受不到寒冷。
E: The medicine is extremely potent — a small vial can keep someone warm for a week.

C: 应该就是这只箱子了…打开它看看吧，{NICKNAME}。
E: {NICKNAME}, this must be the box. Let's open it...

C: 艾丽斯小姐，从今天开始，{NICKNAME}就要开始兼任博物馆经理的岗位了。有关展馆开放和运营的相关事宜，还麻烦你和{F#她}{M#他}做同步咯。
E: Eris, starting today, {NICKNAME} is going to be our museum manager. Please keep {F#her}{M#him} updated on matters related to the opening and operation of the exhibits.

C: 迫不及待了。
E: You bet I would.

C: 唔…光用语言形容可能有点抽象，我尽量给你解释清楚。这尊雕塑是用许多齿轮零件和机械结构拼凑合成的，大概有一人多高，重量…反正单靠一两个人肯定抬不动。
E: It's a little hard to describe — sort of... abstract. It's made up of gears and mechanical parts, and it's about the same height and weight as the average person... Basically, it's too heavy for someone to just pick up and run off with.

C: 嗯，毕竟铁卫的职责就是帮市民解决问题嘛。咱们该去哪找出了问题的机兵，克拉拉，你能带路吗？
E: The duty of the Silvermane Guards is to serve the people. So, where can we find these robots? Clara, can you lead the way?

C: 克拉拉拆开了机器人的外壳，进行了一番检查……
E: Clara opened up the robot's casing and conducted an inspection...

C: 投影仪本身倒是没什么问题，但作为展出内容最为关键的那卷<color=#dbc291ff>「微缩胶片」</color>却在此前失窃了。
E: The issue isn't the projector, but the <color=#dbc291ff>microfilm</color> that goes into it. It's the most crucial piece of this exhibit, and it was stolen.

C: {NICKNAME}，我听说你之前已经帮忙找回了不少贵重的展品，而且还作为兼职经理运营了博物馆一段时间——关于这起连环失窃案，你有什么见解吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, I heard that you helped recover a number of valuable items for the museum, and that you've been running the museum as a part-time manager — do you have any insights into this serial theft case?

C: 反正现在也没有别的合适人选。你能帮我们这个忙，顺便自己也乐在其中，不是挺好的嘛？
E: It's not like we don't have any other suitable candidates for the position... Isn't it great you can help us with such an enjoyable job?

C: 很好，很好，干得不错。耐心点，马上咱们都要发大财咯。
E: Very good, very good. Well done. Patience, soon we will all be rich.

C: …怎、怎么回事？！你们两个是谁？
E: Wh—What's going on? Who are you two?

C: 你好大的胆子，居然还敢教唆手下乔装成银鬃铁卫…我倒要看看裁判团会怎么给你量罪。
E: You had the audacity to tell your men to disguise themselves as Silvermane Guards... I'll be interested to see what kind of sentence the adjudication panel gives you.

C: 呜…「寒腿叔叔」，这种时候该怎么办…救救我啊！
E: *whimper* ...Mr. Cold Feet, what should I do in a situation like this? Save me, save me!

C: {NICKNAME}，又见面啦，气色不错嘛。
E: {NICKNAME}, nice to see you. You're looking in good spirits.

C: 诺尔伯特说，他一般会<color=#dbc291ff>隔着歌德宾馆的房门</color>跟「寒腿叔叔」沟通。平常约定的会面时间…就是现在。
E: Norbert said he usually communicates with Mr. Cold Feet <color=#dbc291ff>through the door of a room in the Goethe Hotel</color>. The usual agreed meeting time is... right now.

C: 留在你眼前的选择有，且只有一个……
E: There is only one choice left in front of you...

C: 你听到一阵清脆的「咔哒」声。寒腿叔叔打开了房门。
E: You hear a "click." Mr. Cold Feet opens the door.

C: 进来吧，赶紧进屋来，咱们好好讨论下接下来的生意怎么进行。
E: Here, hurry up and come inside. We need to discuss the details of our next operation.

C: 不，这些和我没关系。
E: Nope, nothing to do with me.

C: 啊，这么说来，艾丽斯小姐刚才还在找你呢——要不，你还是去博物馆找她聊聊吧？
E: Ah, speaking of which, Miss Eris was just looking for you — why don't you go to the museum and talk to her?

C: 这次想要请您帮忙联系的是银鬃铁卫戍卫官<color=#dbc291ff>杰帕德</color>——拜托您了，{NICKNAME}！
E: Could you help us contact the captain of the Silvermane Guards, <color=#dbc291ff>Gepard</color> — thanks, {NICKNAME}!

C: 你还记得吗，{NICKNAME}？「风雪免疫」那件事里，你和我一起见了凡妮莎——也就是我的养母一面。
E: Do you still remember, {NICKNAME}? Back during those Blizzard Immunity days, when you and I met Vanessa — my adoptive mother?

C: 呵呵，佩拉小姐猜得不错。那时我们很少接到随军出征的任务，平时都在门诊接待普通居民，和在仁爱医院实习没什么差别。
E: Hehe, you're right. Back then, we rarely received expeditionary orders and mostly treated normal citizens, which wasn't really any different from doing an internship at Charice Hospital.

C: 别问，问就是好玩的。
E: No questions, just know it's something super fun.

C: 我先帮你看看简历合不合适…
E: Let me give your resume a look...

C: 她怎么不自己上？
E: Why can't she be here herself?

C: 事情…好像不该这样发展的……
E: This isn't what I expected...

C: 我该怎么办，{NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}？
E: What should I do, {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}?

C: 这也…太正式了吧……
E: This is... so formal...

C: 是的，交给我就好！我这就把您的简历转交给佩拉小姐进行审核。
E: Yes. Please give it to me! I'll pass your resume on to Miss Pela right away!

C: 不。要是真要遇到那种事，喊银鬃铁卫来就好了。
E: No. If there were such a dispute, you should need to summon the Silvermane Guards.

C: 别忘了，你现在的职责之一是「守护」我这个大守护者——你可不能因为这种事情受伤。
E: Don't forget that protecting me is now one of your duties. You can't just gratuitously get yourself hurt.

C: 我听那些流浪者说，史瓦罗在炉心附近保护了流浪者的营地，我以为是什么大善人呢，嘁！就来干这些破事？
E: I heard the vagrants say Svarog was protecting their base near the Furnace Core. Tsk, and there I was thinking he was one of the good guys.

C: 你们藏在里面干嘛，不知道矿区现在出什么事儿了吗？
E: ...Whoa, easy! Why are you hiding in there? Don't you know what happened in the mine?

C: 哔嘟…好伙伴们，需要找东西吗？查宝可以帮忙。
E: Beep, beep, beep... Friends, do you need to find something? Findie can help.

C: 一般人身上会有这么明显的气味吗？
E: Not too many people smell like this...

C: …你哪位？
E: ...Who are you?

C: 这个问题…我选择不发表意见。
E: I... withhold my opinion toward this question.

C: 虎克知道了，偷走老爹探测器的犯人就是你！
E: Hook figured it out, you're the one who stole daddy's detector!

C: 你等着，虎克接下来就去找到证据，到时候你就会向虎克求饶了！
E: Just you wait. I'll find evidence, and then you'll be begging me for mercy!

C: 虎克知道了，偷走老爹探测器的犯人就是你！
E: Hook figured it out, you're the one who stole daddy's detector!

C: 我们刚刚就是在商量该怎么感谢他们，毕竟矿队现在也是囊中羞涩……
E: I was just discussing how to repay them. It's a shame the mining team is hard up right now.

C: 呜、呜…爸爸，妈妈……
E: *sob* Mom... Dad...

C: 不过我也碰巧在博物馆帮忙，索性就随她在这里等你了。
E: I happened to be helping out at the museum, so we both ended up waiting for you here.

C: …啊，它注意到我们了。
E: ...Ah, it noticed us.

C: 嗯？玲宝…你是不是有什么话想说？
E: Huh? Lynxy... is something the matter?

C: 就不用再强调一遍七百年了吧……
E: You don't have to emphasize the "<unbreak>700</unbreak> years" part, y'know...

C: 我像那种乖小孩吗？当然没有。
E: Do I seem like I was a goody two-shoes? Of course not.

C: 走，就算把这片市集翻个底朝天，也得把东西找出来。
E: Let's go then. We need to find something, even if we have to search every corner of this market.

C: 要是当时大家就能团结起来对抗裂界…说不定我们不用这么快就抛弃家园。
E: Y'know, if we could've worked together to push back the Fragmentum... maybe we wouldn't have had to take off and leave our homes behind.

C: 我们到了！居然已经隔了这么久了啊…这里倒是一点都没变。
E: ...We made it! It's been so long... but this place hasn't changed one bit.

C: 这是什么…胸针？
E: What is this? ...A brooch?

C: 不过就算这样，尤利安还是决定勇敢应战——而且还赢了一大堆五颜六色的玻璃珠回来，真是太神气啦！
E: Nonetheless, Julian bravely accepted the challenge... and triumphantly returned with a pile of colorful glass marbles he won! It was incredible!

C: 明白了，我去找找吧。
E: Got it, I'll start looking.

C: 工坊？是指铆钉镇上那座「淬火工坊」吗？
E: Workshop? Oh, do you mean the Tempering Workshop in Rivet Town?

C: 零件，帕斯卡，收集，不停。铆钉镇，修缮，不停！
E: Parts, Pascal, collect, non-stop. Rivet Town, repair, non-stop!

C: 不知道…从帕斯卡的日志里找不到答案。
E: I don't know... I can't find the answer in Pascal's diary.

C: 那孩子的话，我大概明白…她是想照顾受伤的流浪者吧？克拉拉一直很善良……
E: ...If she was there too then... I understand. She wants to look after the injured vagrants, right? Clara's always been a kind-hearted girl...

C: 八十八度矿底
E: <unbreak>88</unbreak> Degrees Bedrock

C: 他的应对方案，是为了让下层的人们能远离灾难的源头，多生存一段时间……
E: His plan is to keep the Underworlders away from the source of the disaster, so they can survive for longer...

C: 指出「变量」。
E: Point out the "variable."

C: 哪有那么夸张，我只是…说了自己的真实想法而已。
E: It was nothing. I just... said what I truly felt.

C: 集中精力防御——或者集火把它干掉。
E: Defense or offense, we need to pick one and go all in.

C: 变量一：克拉拉的诉求…变量二：外来者的动机。
E: Variable 1: Clara's request... Variable 2: Outsiders' intentions.

C: 医生怎么会亲自上战场？
E: When did doctors start carrying weapons around?

C: 你们的出现，推翻了我绸缪许久的计划雏形——为此，我更该对各位表示感谢。
E: Your arrival unraveled that carefully crafted yet rudimentary plan, hehe... and for that, you have my utmost thanks.

C: 再后来，「地火」的规模越来越大。老实说，我最早也没想到会有这么一天。
E: Afterwards, Wildfire began to grow. To be honest, I never thought a day like this would come.

C: 虎克该怎么办！荣誉队员，你快想想办法！
E: What should I do? Honorary member — you think of something!

C: …拍卖会，流浪者营地的那个吗？
E: ...The auction, the one at the vagrant camp?

C: 感觉这东西也卖不了多少钱。
E: He doesn't seem like he'll fetch too high a price.

C: 别这么悲观！
E: Don't be so pessimistic!

C: 歌蒂的侄女过几天就要回磐岩镇了。前段时间她还在问我，拍卖会上有没有适合送给小孩子的礼物。
E: Gertie's niece will be returning to Boulder Town in a few days. She asked me a while ago if there were any gifts suitable for children at the auction.

C: 别着急啊！但是，但是——我知道那份合同被搞到哪里去了！
E: Not so fast! I... I know where the contract is.

C: 七百二十冬城盾一次！
E: <unbreak>720</unbreak> going once!

C: 虎克？
E: Hook?

C: 下一件竞拍品是……
E: The next item up for auction is...

C: 说十遍「谢谢你，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}。」
E: Then how about you say "thanks for the help, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}" ten times in a row?

C: 「大功臣」？
E: "Big hero"?

C: …老爹！我、我想告诉你……
E: ...Daddy! I—I have to tell you something...

C: 访客来了，克拉拉。
E: You have visitors, Clara.

C: 你、你别说了，我害怕…
E: Please, I can't carry on. I'm too terrified...

C: 不、不能让它跑掉！它还拿着叔叔阿姨们的零件呢！
E: No! We can't let it escape! It still has the vagrants' parts!

C: 难道说，它是被人遗弃的「机械宠物」失败品吗…？
E: Is it a failed robot pet creation that has been abandoned...?

C: 唔…克拉拉也不知道有没有人在卖这种东西。不过……
E: Hmm... I'm not sure if anyone sells this kind of thing, however...

C: 直接格式化算了，一了百了…
E: We should just format the robot and call it a day...

C: 我明白。史瓦罗先生和{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}一直都在帮助我…克拉拉一定会努力的。
E: I know. You and Mr. Svarog have helped me so much, someone needs to do the same for those poor robots... I've got to do my best.

C: 但克拉拉也明白，这世界上的「情感」不全都是温暖的…如果有太多糟糕的「情感」跑出来搞破坏，就需要有人站出来阻止它们。
E: But I'm also aware that not all emotions in this world are positive... If there are too many negative emotions that go unchecked, then someone needs to step in and stop them.

C: 它只会一遍又一遍地忘记你。
E: Pascal will forget you over and over.

C: 接下来…要拜托你乖乖听话，不要动。
E: Now... please be a good boy and don't move.

C: 希望克拉拉做出了正确的选择……
E: I hope I made the right decision...

C: 不、不太，运行，不太、顺利，很，很抱歉！
E: Not, not quite, running, smoothly! Very, apologies!

C: …唉，我就说凡是要交涉的情节，最后都会开打吧！
E: ...Ugh, didn't I tell you? All our negotiations end in combat!

C: 你就是希儿？身手不错，但不像是铁卫的战法。
E: You must be Seele? You are a skilled fighter... your combat style is nothing like that of the Guards.

C: 铁卫为我们打开了通路，不要辜负他们。
E: The Guards have opened up a way through for us, we can't let them down.

C: 我们上，{NICKNAME}。下手再重也没关系——铁卫的军医技术可是一流的。
E: Let's kick their butt, {NICKNAME}! No need to hold back! As you know, the Silvermane Guards have first-class medical support.

C: 然后…是黑暗。我只能记起这些片段…除此以外是一片黑暗。
E: And then... darkness. All I can remember are these flashbacks... other than that, it's total darkness.

C: 这里是…宇宙？
E: Is this... the universe?

C: 总要有人保持乐观啊。况且…我们已经迈过了最艰难的一关。
E: Hehe, start thinking, we're going to need all the humor we can get... At least the biggest hurdle is behind us.

C: 一枚金色的饰品留在了地面上，安静地等待着你将它拾起。
E: A golden ornament remains on the ground, quietly waiting for you to pick it up.

C: 「星际和平家电」…「星际和平」……
E: Interastral Peace Appliances... Interastral Peace...

C: 咳，「星槎测速员」这份工作，司辰宫里的同事们都觉得这是职场食物链的底端。谁要是被派来一日体验，都会觉得是对自己工作能力的羞辱。
E: Ahem. So, the position of starskiff speed tester is known by everyone in the Palace of Astrum as the bottom of the occupational pecking order. Anyone who got sent here for a one-day experience would think that this job is an insult to their intelligence and skills.

C: 没问题，就交给我吧。
E: No problem, leave it to me.

C: 你应该直接去丹鼎司医馆。
E: You should head to the Alchemy Commission apothecary straight away.

C: 好的好的，芦慧姑娘说了算，你说俺要俺就要，你说俺不能要，俺就不要。
E: Alright, I'll listen to you. If you say I have to take it, I will take it. If you say I can't, then I won't.

C: 啊？那姑娘你要怎么办，再请一个人吗？
E: Hah? What are you going to do then? Are you going to recruit someone else?

C: 芦慧姑娘，你最好还是再请一位。
E: Ms. Luhui, it is best that you hire another housekeeper to help you.

C: 你在后悔吗？
E: Are you regretting it?

C: 我会在这里待一会儿，就不再打扰您了，祝您的生活愉快。
E: I'll stay here for a while. I should stop bothering you now. Have a nice day.

C: {NICKNAME}，把这玩意儿的样本带一份来吧。这对你来说不难吧？
E: {NICKNAME}, bring me a sample of this ingredient. It shouldn't be too hard for you, right?

C: 你怎么了？
E: What's wrong?

C: 线索拿到了不少…
E: We've got plenty of clues...

C: 你还好吗？
E: Are you all right?

C: 小聪让我找你回去。
E: Cong sent me to get you.

C: 我本短生种，以有涯之身而能造访仙宫，余愿足矣。
E: I'm a short-life species. To visit the Celestial Hall during my days is more than enough to sate me.

C: 我在拍仙舟美人图，有男有女。
E: I'm taking pictures of good-looking people on Xianzhou. All genders included.

C: 此情此景，不写一首诗，实在是浪费！谁赞成，谁反对？
E: I must write a poem dedicated to this breathtaking scenery! Yay or nay?

C: 二四一三五六七。
E: Two is one plus one.

C: 这比你之前的打油诗写得好多了。但我看不到你的感情，这不是你自己写的诗吧？
E: This is much better than the doggerel before, but I can't feel your affection. You didn't write this, did you?

C: 我曾经也为爱疯狂过。可如今爱意在我心中根本泛不出一圈涟漪，我不愿意欺骗小聪，他最好趁早放弃。
E: I used to do wild things for love too. But now, love does not leave a single ripple in my heart. I don't want to lie to Cong, so I hope he can give up as early as possible.

C: 你关心蘑菇，你是个好人。
E: You must be a kind person to show concern for a mushroom.

C: 拿着好处，你快去吧。
E: Take your pay and start searching.

C: 平仄你也不会吧，你得记好了！
E: You know nothing about meters, don't you? Listen to me carefully!

C: …算了，我还是和你解释一下吧。
E: ... Fine, let me explain.

C: 黛青小姐姐，嘿嘿，我的黛青小姐姐～
E: Ms. Daiqing, heheh, my Ms. Daiqing~

C: {NICKNAME}涉嫌违法诈骗活动，我们将立即执行逮捕，全部涉案人员不许反抗，违抗者将直接暴力逮捕。
E: {NICKNAME} is suspected of illegal and fraudulent activities. We will carry out the arrest immediately. All persons involved in the case are advised not to resist arrest, and those who disobey will be arrested with violence if required.

C: 你就是狐仙啊？
E: Are you the foxian beauty?

C: 也不是不可以。
E: I won't say no outright.

C: 你放心，我不会说的。
E: Don't worry, I won't say anything.

C: 你们离开了流云渡，随后不久「狐仙黛青」向所有人公布了自己的真实身份。
E: You leave Cloudford. Not long after, Foxian Beauty Daiqing announces his true identity to everyone.

C: 艾丝妲代理站长，我认为我们还是应该加强和仙舟方面的科研技术合作！
E: Acting Lead Researcher Asta, I think we should strengthen our cooperative relationship in research technology with Xianzhou!

C: 行了行了，你先回去写外驻申请吧，在那之后我们再做决定。
E: Fine, fine. Go ahead and write me an off-station transfer application, and we'll see.

C: 劫、劫匪？！呔，光天化日，朗朗乾坤……
E: R—Robbers!? Strolling around in broad daylight, in a civilized age such as this...

C: 你能不能有点格局，我们现在就去见到本人！
E: Ugh, get with the program! What we really want is for you to take us to visit Ms. Daiqing.

C: 你可真是一个体贴的好站长啊。
E: You are indeed a thoughtful Lead Researcher.

C: 看来，之前帮助老夫进行的研究让你感到不安了？我以博识尊的名义起誓，你贡献的调查成果，绝不会用在任何有违道义的地方！
E: Looks like you are quite perturbed after helping with my research last time. I swear, on Nous's name, that your investigation will not be used immorally!

C: 哈哈哈，用仙舟人的话该怎么表达呢？真是「铭感五内」啊！
E: Hahaha, how should I express my gratitude in the Xianzhou language? I'll forever be "in your debt"!

C: 我想去一趟鳞渊境，凭吊一下我的老师。{NICKNAME}，我的朋友，你能为我引路吗？
E: I'd like to visit Scalegorge Waterscape to pay respects to my teacher. {NICKNAME}, my friend, could you be my guide?

C: （五个人的剪影？不知这些人是谁……）
E: (Five silhouettes? I wonder who they are...)

C: 你来了啊，{NICKNAME}。
E: Oh it's you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 现在用「老夫」已经不妥了，因为这个身体已经不再衰老了。
E: Although I probably shouldn't say "old," because this body doesn't grow old anymore.

C: 奇怪的药方，模糊的笔记上写着「延缓魔阴身」。
E: The strange prescription has a note in scribbled writing: "slowing the mara-struck process"

C: 这段证词，和这枚漂亮的徽章…没有产生什么矛盾。
E: The testimony doesn't seem at all at odds with the beautiful badge...

C: 很久以前——有多久呢，对长生种来说都算的上很久了，仙舟把这个信奉「寿瘟祸祖」的组织连根拔起了。
E: A long time ago, even by the standards of long-life species, the Xianzhou eliminated an organization that worshiped the "Plagues Author."

C: 是我。
E: It's me.

C: 需要我帮你做些什么？
E: What can I help you with?

C: 那些疯子只把短生种视作入药的材料，可消耗的实验品。
E: Short-life species are expendable to those maniacs — they use them in experiments to develop their medicines.

C: 有时候我会想，就这么快进到下一个一百年吧，生活实在是太无聊、太琐碎了，直接快进到生命结束都没问题。
E: Sometimes I'd feel like a century was a pointless, trivial blink of an eye... and that it wouldn't matter if it was all over by the next blink.

C: 不行，你知道自己现在是什么状况吗？你放心，我会找到梁沐，医好他的。{NICKNAME}你把半夏送回星槎海的医馆去。
E: No way. Do you know how bad your condition is? Don't worry, I'll find Liangmu and treat him. {NICKNAME}, send Banxia back to the apothecary in Starskiff Haven.

C: …你这是求饶的样子吗？冲我背后作揖干什么！
E: ...Is that how you beg for mercy? What the heck are you doing?

C: 汝…是在对吾下令？
E: ...Are you giving me an order?

C: 那个女孩，把头抬起来。神色游移，眸焦涣散…莫不是有了魔阴身的征兆？
E: You, girl — raise your head. You have a wandering look in your eyes... A mara-struck look, perhaps?

C: 在云骑军的护送下，你们被带到了流云渡较为安全的地方。
E: Under escort of the Cloud Knights, you were taken to a safer place in Cloudford.

C: 这可是你的主意喔！
E: You said it, not me!

C: 快快快，我们已经通过哨卡了，现在可以去那里把衣服换回去了。
E: Quick, we've passed through the sentry post, let's change back into our clothes.

C: 是白露大人的治疗生效了吗？谢谢你，要不是你……
E: Lady Bailu, is this a result of your healing? Thank you. If it weren't for you...

C: 莫名其妙！我们都是被骗了的人，你应该向那个臭婆娘……
E: Ridiculous! That woman tricked all of us. You should've told her to take a—

C: 对了，本小姐姑且还在逃亡，你有没有什么推荐的好地方？
E: *sigh* Anyway, do you know any good hiding places? I'm still on the run...

C: 「古海之水，奉龙尊号令，在此镇伏玄根。」
E: "Water of the ancient sea, upon High Elder's command, subdue the eternal roots."

C: 我是不会原谅你的。你不配持有龙尊之力，这是罗浮持明族人的力量，不是你的。持明族不能因为你一人中断了龙尊传承。
E: I will never forgive you. The High Elder's power belongs to the Vidyadhara of the Luofu — you are unworthy. The Vidyadhara must not sever the High Elder succession tradition just because of you.

C: 我们继续走吧。
E: Let's keep going.

C: 很大胆，你可不许半途而废啊。
E: Yes, it is. Don't you dare give up halfway.

C: 没错！我是三月七，他是瓦尔特！我们是来帮忙哒！
E: That's right, I'm the first one, he's the second! We're here to help!

C: 我脚下一滑，就掉沟里了。我的好搭档，喊了一句「别慌！阿往前来支援！」就跟着我一起掉下去了。
E: I lost my footing and slipped right in. My associate here, Forth, yelled after me: "Don't panic! Forth's got your back!" Two seconds later, he landed on my back.

C: 那地衡司早就抓人了…
E: The Realm-Keeping Commission would have arrested him by now...

C: 对，我看见他就来气！
E: Yup, he just rubs me the wrong way!

C: 四二三一
实在不好意思，我当时只想找个地方踏踏实实读书，没去太仔细观察他，也没太仔细观察那两个黑衣人。
E: Sorry, I was only trying to find a place to read, I didn't pay much attention to him... or the two in dark clothing.

C: 所以，「撕书」这个行为，也许的确是问题的关键。
E: I think that by removing the page, Luocha may have provided us with a key piece of the puzzle.

C: 啊？你们没给他吧？
E: What? You didn't give him the money, did you?

C: 是呀，犯错就是成长的一部分呢。
E: That's right. Making mistakes is part of growing up.

C: 懒得跑图就直说。
E: Or to put it another way: "I'm too lazy to explore the map."

C: 还没有，稍等一下。
E: Not yet, give me a second.

C: （这普洱，做事还挺有原则。）
E: (Didn't take Pu'er for a man of rules.)

C: 在长乐天闹得这么大，云骑很快就会出现…快点离开这里吧。
E: Fights like these don't go unnoticed in Exalting Sanctum — Cloud Knights could show up any minute... Better get going.

C: 让我来尝尝这个。嗯，味道令人怀念。
E: Let me try. *glug* Hmm, a nostalgic experience.

C: 我想想…应该是一个方方正正的小物件？我记得她一直贴身带着这样一个挂饰。
E: Lemme think... It should be a little square thing? She's usually got something like that on her.

C: {NICKNAME}，看来到你的专业领域了。
E: {NICKNAME}, this is your area of expertise.

C: 景元将军？直接去问他合适吗…哦，也对，二位本来就是将军的贵客…但即使如此，这也太给二位添麻烦了……
E: General Jing Yuan? Are you sure it's okay to go straight to him? ...Oh, right, you're the general's guests... Even so, this is asking a lot of you...

C: 诸位对仙舟巡猎星海之事耳熟能详。但一定甚少听闻「丰饶民战争」。在仙舟清除不死孽物的同时，丰饶孽物的联军也多次突破战线，将仙舟逼入危境。
E: I'm sure you're both familiar with the Xianzhou's long galactic hunt, but have you heard of the Denizens of Abundance Wars? As the Xianzhou has continued to cleanse the universe of immortal abominations, so too has the Abundance Axis succeeded in breaching our defensive lines. They pushed the Xianzhou to the brink of disaster.

C: 天才也有幸运和不幸之分…
E: Even a flying ace can get into trouble...

C: 今天宙域晴朗！正是适合飞行的好天气！
E: System space all clear today! Great weather for flying!

C: 在星神的伟力之下，凡人的牺牲，都像是笑话一样…什么都不是…什么都不是……
E: Under the might of an Aeon, the sacrifices of ordinary creatures are but a joke... we are nothing... we mean nothing...

C: 这里面有一封信，你帮我打开一下吧。
E: There's a letter inside! Help me open it.

C: 我才不在乎。
E: I couldn't care less.

C: 啊，那是犯规呀！…唔，游戏就得双方自觉遵守规则才行，但就算你犯规，我也不会知道，只有让道德来审判你了。
E: Ah, that's not allowed! *sigh* The game only works when both sides follow the rules, but I'll be none the wiser if you break them. Let morality be your guide.

C: 我试试说服他们走开…
E: How about I try persuading them to leave...

C: 所以教导你的重任就落在我的头上，把我整得焦头烂额，一逮到机会就立刻把你甩给列车啦。
E: ...so the burden of mentoring you fell on me. It was a stressful job, and I dumped you on the train as soon as I got the chance.

C: 以前的我？…曾经是个「恶魔猎人」。
E: The old me? I used to be a Devil Hunter.

C: 对。
E: Correct.

C: 三月，用六相冰给伤口紧急止血，掌握好尺度，别冻伤他。
E: March, use your six-phased ice to stop the bleeding. Go easy, we don't wanna add frostbite to his list of complaints.

C: 这名顶盔贯甲的战士已毫无生气，奇怪的是，僵硬的身躯上却不见任何伤口。
E: This armored soldier had already passed away. Surprisingly, there are no visible wounds on the body.

C: 喂，你们几个！快来帮忙呀～
E: Hey, you there! We need your help~!

C: 我本来是不担忧，但她一副胸有成竹的样子，我就担心起来了……
E: I was perfectly calm until she volunteered to help...

C: 阔别许久回到这里…
E: A long time has passed since I visited this place...

C: 白露把脉片刻…
E: Bailu is taking someone's pulse...

C: 呵，也许他想索求的是另一种药方吧。
E: Hm, he's probably looking for a different kind of medicine.

C: 联盟法度，不容更改…可惜，你们的下一站并非虚陵，而是「玉阙」。
E: The laws of the Alliance cannot be subject to change... Unfortunately, your next stop will be the Yuque.

C: 我记得你，但不多。
E: I remember you, but barely.

C: 与此同时，鳞渊境深处，显龙大雩殿中…
E: Meanwhile, in the Dragonvista Rain Hall, Scalegorge Waterscape...

C: 很快我将负枷受审，此去一别，也许是永别。所以我要在离开之前发出邀请，邀请各位在这初聚之地道别。
E: Soon, I will be shackled and tried. This will be the last you see of me. This is why I sent out the invitations before departing, hoping that everyone would be gathered here for my final farewell.

C: 等等！镜流，在你离开之前，你还欠我一份报酬。
E: Wait! Jingliu, before you leave, you still owe me my due.

C: 也许谛听根本就没想去找小吃摊。
E: Maybe Diting was not looking for a food stall.

C: 所以你懂它的话，对吧？
E: So you understand what it's saying, right?

C: 汪！
E: Woof!

C: 人不可貌相，小小年纪就能当上将军的侍卫，一定有什么过人之处。
E: Can't disqualify him just for being a widdle baby! If he's the general's retainer, there must be more to him than meets the eye.

C: 又或许，刃根本没打算逃走。
E: Or perhaps he had no intention of escaping in the first place.

C: 天舶司乱成一团，丢了的船也不知能不能找回。
E: Tsk, the Sky-Faring Commission really made a mess of this — who knows if we'll ever find all these missing ships.

C: 小弟弟，你要不要，接我一剑？
E: What say you to that, young man?

C: 结束记录读取
E: Stop record checking

C: 先说好了，我帮你抄完经，你可要帮我打掩护，我得去神策府通风报信……
E: Listen carefully — I help you copy the text, you cover for me, and I get word out to the Seat of Divine Foresight...

C: 你的食指有些疼，肩膀也有些酸…可这才是第一遍。还有四百九十九遍在等待着你。
E: Your index finger has a slight cramp, and your shoulders feel a bit sore... But you've only made the first copy. There are still <unbreak>499</unbreak> copies waiting to be written.

C: 你将云骑带回了安全的地方。
E: You take the Cloud Knight to a safe place.

C: 累了，你们一起上吧。
E: I'm done. Let's do this. You can come at me together.

C: 她一定愿意帮助神策府。
E: She'll certainly be willing to help the Seat of Divine Foresight.

C: 说实话，我是第一次见到十王司的判官…你们都负责什么呀？
E: You're the first Ten-Lords Commission judge I've met. What do you guys do, exactly?

C: 你们怎么不走？
E: Why are you still here?

C: 那就有劳素裳姑娘了。
E: We are most grateful, Miss Sushang.

C: 你是故意清除了每个错误答案吗？
E: Did you clear every wrong option on purpose?

C: 我能理解少女对发光宝石的热爱……
E: I can understand a young girl's fondness for glittering gemstones...

C: 姬子小姐说你的身体并无大碍，但也不知道你什么时候才会醒来……
E: Himeko said that your vitals were all stable... she just didn't know when you'd regain consciousness...

C: 但这场梦…它是一段尚未经过修饰和打磨的新鲜记忆，生猛又刺激。
E: ...However, this dreamscape will feature unfiltered and unpolished fresh memories. It will make for a very vivid experience.

C: 准备好体验黑天鹅女士的美梦了吗？——请您闭上眼睛，将额头抵在梦泡上。
E: Are you ready to experience Miss Black Swan's dreamscape? Please close your eyes, and rest your forehead on the dream bubble.

C: 就像是不断往铸炉中添加燃料一般，随着每次挥剑出击，持剑人渐渐会被掌中之剑汲取血髓，日日不竭，油尽灯枯。
E: It's like continuously adding fuel to a forge. With each swing, the sword drains the wielder's blood and essence. Day by day, the fuel will run out, leaving nothing but an empty husk.

C: 除了爷爷，我很少向外人提起「含光」这个名字，就像你猜测的那样——我或许一直在逃避着再去谈论他，可只要我仍在猎取魔剑，我就没法避而不谈……
E: I rarely mention his name to anyone other than Grandpa. Maybe, like you said, I've been avoiding having to talk about him. But as long as my mission to hunt down cursed swords continues, it's impossible to avoid the topic forever...

C: 别开玩笑了，剑怎么可能自己逃走？
E: Don't be ridiculous. How can a sword escape from a case on its own?

C: …另一种器物？
E: ...Something different?

C: 含光所造的其余武器，你还打算继续回收吗？
E: So, are you planning to continue melting down the rest of Hanguang's swords?

C: 从什么时候开始，假面愚者也要遵守约定了？
E: Since when did the Masked Fools suddenly start respecting agreements?

C: 那么接下来…我们来聊聊你这位「同伴」吧。
E: Then on to the next order of business — let's discuss your companion, shall we?

C: 多谢你的良苦用心，那我们就假装被「红鲱鱼」误导了吧。嗯…这个玩偶也和案件有关吗？
E: I see — thank you for your keen insight. Then let's pretend we were misled by a Red Herring. Hmm... this doll... Could it be connected to the case?

C: 原来里面存了个戒指，这也是证物吧。为什么要多此一举放在机关里呢。
E: So there's a ring inside. This is evidence, too. Why was it planted inside another device?

C: 对于案件我没有疑问，只是有些好奇…花火是怎么操纵你的？
E: I have no questions about the case, but I'm just curious... How did Sparkle manipulate you?

C: 花火小姐也是用它袭击了沙马里先生吧。
E: Miss Sparkle also used it to attack Mr. Shamari.

C: 彼此行于不同命途，何来竞争？联盟矢志巡猎一切不死孽物，公司一门心思实现它的「存护」。联盟和公司偶有合作，但毕竟不是同道中人。
E: How can we compete when our paths diverge? The Alliance has taken an oath to hunt down undying abominations, while the IPC is dedicated to their "preservation." The Alliance and the Corporation occasionally work together, but ultimately, our ways are different.

C: 走吧，阿刃，还有两个地方要去。
E: Let's go Bladie. Two more places to visit.

C: ——咱们这组人今年都毕不了业，出不了师了……
E: None of us will be able to graduate this year...

C: 师姐，你有见过性质如此罕见的材料吗？
E: Yunche, have you ever seen material like that before?

C: 见过怎样，没见过又怎样？难不成你还准备从那巨木上刨一块下来不成？
E: What if I have — you gonna go get a sample for me?

C: 确实。除了传送距离太短，消耗能量太大之外，这宝贝完全可以取星槎而代～之！
E: Indeed. With limited range and energy costs aside, to every starskiff soon shall woe betide~!

C: 这本是受云骑军所托研制的武器，威力无比，除了……
E: I invented this weapon for the Cloud Knights. It's incredibly powerful, but...

C: 怎、怎么回事？洞天要塌了吗！
E: Wh—What's happening? Is the delve collapsing?

C: 听说，药王秘传封闭了丹鼎司。
E: I heard the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus shut down the Alchemy Commission.

C: 咱们罗浮虽然没怎么受过它们的侵袭，但也算得上是有过几段孽缘。今天这一折，就是那当中的一段……
E: The Luofu — upon which we live — never had to endure their encroachment, but we have had some encounters and attached strings with them. The story I shall tell today is one of them...

C: 你来了。从脚步听来，你的状态不错。
E: Ah, you're back. From the sound of your stride, I sense you're in good spirits.

C: 那我去喊地衡司来。
E: I'll call the Realm-Keeping Commission over then.

C: 老大没来长乐天的时候你就抢我零食，现在老大来了长乐天，你还抢我零食，那老大不是白来了吗？
E: You always steal my snacks when the boss isn't here. Now that he's arrived in Exalting Sanctum, it's payback time.

C: 三个小孩骂骂咧咧地离开了现场。你也带着小姑娘离开了这个是非之地。
E: The three children flee from the scene while disgruntled. You take the chance to lead the girl away from this site of conflict.

C: 多谢你能保护那个孩子。{NICKNAME}，在下能否拜托你另一件事？
E: Thank you for looking after the child. Could I ask you for another favor, {NICKNAME}?

C: 我完全不记得发生了什么…
E: I don't remember anything at all...

C: 你是药王秘传的老大？
E: You're the head of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus?

C: 唉…我可怜的法乌努斯红毛羊啊，离开残酷的兽栏还没几天，没来得及过上几天逍遥自在的好日子，就…唉，救苦救难的丰饶之主，可不要为此罚没我的功德啊……
E: Alas, my poor Faunus Red Sheep. They didn't even get to enjoy much freedom after leaving the harsh pen... Oh, Aeon of Abundance who spares us from suffering, please don't forfeit my merit for this!

C: 你们是药王秘传？
E: Are you the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus?

C: 机械生物？机巧鸟和谛听那种吗？
E: Do you mean mechanical creatures like cycranes and Ditings?

C: 这座城市能从寒潮里幸存下来，我认为只是筑城者的遗民善用了祖先留下的科技罢了。
E: In my opinion, this city was able to survive the Eternal Freeze only because the remnants of the Architects made good use of the technology left behind by their ancestors.

C: 希斯曼，你看起来不是很满意呀？
E: Heathmann, you don't seem too happy about this.

C: 这是…咳，应该是某种控制这台机器的装置吧？我不懂，这和我的定义什么关系？
E: This is, ahem, a certain device that controls this machine, isn't it? I don't understand how it is related to my definition of plants.

C: 我…我在等丹鼎司的救护星槎…这个全身粉碎性骨折……
E: I... I'm waiting for the rescue starskiff of the Alchemy Commission... I have fractures all over my body...

C: 这样真的好吗…
E: Is this appropriate...

C: 不行啊，我、我们去把桂乃芬小姐找回来吧…
E: Oh no... W—We have to find Miss Guinaifen...

C: 这声音好像有些熟悉……
E: That voice sounds familiar...

C: 两位，咱们可以上路了吗？
E: ...Excuse me, can we go now?

C: 她应该也被困在某个角落里。
E: She's probably trapped somewhere around here.

C: 救命啊，我被岁阳附体了！
E: HELP! I got possessed by a heliobus!

C: 要是我在你进餐时问「吃下一堆蛋白质和碳水化合物有意思吗」，你会怎么想？
E: Does the Xianzhou sail through the cosmos?

C: 我…我真的不适合干这份工作。要是能活着回去，我还是向十王司递交辞呈吧。
E: I... I'm just not cut out for it. If I make it back alive... I'm handing in my resignation.

C: 浮烟也许另有目的。
E: Cirrus may have ulterior motives.

C: 尾巴大爷，接下来咱们要一起面对很危险的敌人，请你也助我一臂之力吧。
E: Mr. Tail, we're gonna fight some really dangerous enemies now. Please lend me your strength, too.

C: 我能做的还有很多，{NICKNAME}，我会一直存在。
E: There are many, {NICKNAME}... I will exist forever.

C: 我们去调查别的镜子吧。
E: Hmph... Let's go look at the other mirrors.

C: 藿藿，快来，快到姐姐这边来。
E: Huohuo, sweetie! Come to big sister Xueyi.

C: 可是……
E: But...

C: 我、我可不是靠关系上位的呀。
E: I—I didn't have any connections at all!

C: 我问得差不多了。
E: That's all I have to ask.

C: 你如何看待藿藿的尾巴？
E: What do you think about Huohuo's tail?

C: 所以，我们接下来……
E: So, we're gonna...

C: 柯柯娜略带茫然地看着你——明明你们不久之前还交谈过。
E: Cocona looks a tad lost at the sight of you — but you two just chatted a few moments ago.

C: 我记得不久之前，她还接受过特别的「治疗」——是不是又发生了什么刺激到她的事？
E: I recall that she received special treatment not too long ago... Did something happen again to upset her?

C: 真的没事了吗？
E: You sure you're really all right?

C: 这架钢琴就像我的朋友。无论喜悲，它总能和我一同分享，带给我安慰。
E: This piano is like my friend. Joy or sorrow, it will always share them with me and bring me comfort.

C: 给你一句过来人的忠告：这些小把戏足够让你找到一份体面的工作，但想凭这些手段敲开上流社会的门？还是趁早死了这条心吧……
E: A word of advice from someone who's been around the block: These parlor tricks are enough for you to find a decent job, but to knock on the door of the elite with such moves? You're better off giving up right now...

C: 哎呀，没关系的…你还这么年轻，做事张扬点也很正常。你以为这里的前辈不想走捷径吗？条件不允许而已……
E: C'mon, it's fine... You're still young, and it's perfectly normal to be showy about these things. You think the more senior staff don't think about using relationships to skip ahead? They just don't have the means for it...

C: …我知道了。
E: ...I see.

C: 太危险了…非得参加那个比赛吗？
E: It's too dangerous... Do you have to compete?

C: 正如她的心灵在沉默中珠残玉碎。
E: Just like her heart shattering mutely among splintered pearls and jade.

C: 她把唱片丢进花坛，磕碰到边缘时发出一声闷响。
E: She hurls the record into the flowerbed, and it emits a dull echo as it hits the edge.

C: 抓住柯柯娜的手。
E: Grab Cocona's hand.

C: 不是我嚼舌根，但柯柯娜…
E: I'm not trying to be a tattle-tale, but Cocona...

C: 什么门票，什么音乐。
E: Tickets, music...

C: 我看你好像眼熟…
E: You seem familiar...

C: 后来有人提醒了我，银河间还有匹诺康尼这方天地——在梦境世界里，我能做回曾经的那个莱斯利•迪恩，忘记那场灾难给我带来的伤痛。
E: That was when someone reminded me of the existence of Penacony... In this dream world, I am able to return to my life as the Lesley Dean I once was and forget the pain that this tragedy inflicted on me.

C: 对，就是他！
E: Yes, that's him!

C: 将莱斯利的情况转述给艾丽。
E: Explain the situation to Alley.

C: 我会将情况转告给猎…啊，转告给家族的工作人员——相信他们后续会对此事进行妥善处理的。
E: I shall inform the Blood... Ah, I shall inform a member of The Family's staff. I'm sure they will handle this situation appropriately.

C: 等等…事情有些不对劲。如果在莱斯利•迪恩这样的大人物身上发生了什么变故，家族不可能置之不理。
E: Wait... Something isn't right. If something had happened to a great man like Lesley Dean, The Family would not likely just ignore it.

C: 我来帮助你。
E: Let me help you.

C: 星穹列车方此前已向我方确认，正式授权您为「晖长石号」的管理者。换句话说，您就是这艘空艇的现任船长——祝贺您！
E: The Astral Express has also confirmed with us — they have officially authorized you to be the administrator of the Radiant Feldspar. Which means, you are the present captain of this airship. Congratulations!

C: 再多了解一下「冷芯」。
E: I'd like to learn more about Caldwick.

C: 过了一段时间，忙完招聘事项的佩德罗主动求见。
E: Some time later, Pedro, finished with recruitment, asks to meet with you.

C: 吨…吨吨…吨……
E: Glug... glug glug...

C: 好的，罗伊罗伊•布奇布嘎•巴登…
E: Alright, Royroy Bougiebooga Baden...

C: 这个切入角度我还真没想到。
E: I didn't expect this angle of interpretation.

C: 原、原来是这样吗？！对、对不起，您家这么大，我一不小心就认错了！
E: I—Is that so? S—Sorry, your place is so grand, I got confused!

C: （…青雀？！她来匹诺康尼干嘛？）
E: (...Qingque!? What's she doing in Penacony?)

C: {NICKNAME}，我们一起拍张照片吧？就当是为这段旅程留个纪念。
E: {NICKNAME}, how about we take a picture together as a memento of this journey?

C: 的、的确，矲主大人亲口说过，绝对不能相信巨人的花言巧语……
E: In—Indeed. The master told us to never be swayed by the giants' blarney...

C: 你放弃了——无论你怎么做，都无法让青雀意识到你就是她的{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}{NICKNAME}。你必须想别的办法把她营救出去……
E: You gave up. No matter what you did, you failed to make Qingque realize you were her companion, {NICKNAME}. You need to come up with another way to get her out.

C: {F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}！我就知道，你肯定会来救我的！
E: My friend! I knew you would come to my rescue!

C: 那个，呃，您不会…不会是来叫我回去上班的吧？您看，我现在手气正旺，这么宝贵的运势，想必像您这样善解人意的{F#女士}{M#先生}一定不会忍心把它割断吧……
E: You... I mean... you're not here to get me back to work, right? Look, I've got a winning streak going on here, and I'm sure a thoughtful and caring {F#lady}{M#gentleman} like you wouldn't want to interrupt it...

C: 你不舍得？
E: Are you feeling sad?

C: 这可真是好时机啊！
E: This is a great opportunity!

C: …还是让我来解释一下吧。
E: ...Let me explain.

C: 公输师傅没有明说，他的心里肯定也是这么想的。
E: Master Gongshu didn't say anything to me, but I know he's thinking it deep down.

C: 这里面就是格物院了，如无意外，会有意外。
E: This is the Sapientia Academe. Stay sharp and expect the unexpected.

C: 我其实也每天都这么想…但是工作不能不干。于是我的思维降级，从「如何不上班」改成了「如何偷懒」，你应该多学学我。
E: That's how I feel every day actually... But work has to get done. That's why I downgraded my mantra from "How to avoid work" to "How to slack off at work." You should learn from my work philosophy.

C: 要不，我们再去别处转转？
E: How about we go elsewhere for a walk?

C: 那些老师傅们挑选学徒要求可高了。我这人天资平平，投师无门、四处碰壁。在我心生退意的时候，没想到是莱恩师傅收留了我。
E: The old masters had high requirements for selecting apprentices. I was but a person of mediocre talent, and kept hitting setbacks when looking for tutelage. Just when I was thinking about quitting, I never expected Master Ryan to take me on.

C: 我感觉现在浑身充满了动力，我要回去大干一场，我先走了。再次感谢二位的帮助！
E: I feel like I'm filled with motivation now. Once I get back, I'll go all out. I'm off, then. Thanks again to both of you for all your help!

C: 你来了啊，太好了！我在这里一边研究设计稿，一边等你。
E: You're finally here! I've been studying the design manuscript while waiting for you.

C: 我…必须做到。
E: I... must do it.

C: 没错，不过就是一些工造设计上的失误嘛。哪里错误改哪里，很快就能解决了！
E: You're right. They are just glitches in the artifex design. Just fix what's wrong, and everything will be fine!

C: 好！找零件的事情就交给{NICKNAME}，我去找公输师傅，咱们分工明确，出发！
E: Sure! {NICKNAME} will be in charge of getting the parts, and I'll visit Master Gongshu. Let's go!

C: 上下左右前后，得有几十艘星槎……
E: There will be dozens of them from all directions...

C: 这是莱恩那小子做的系统吧？
E: Ryan made this system, didn't he?

C: 十王司若要太卜司对这些叛徒有更精确的占算，就要提供充足的信息。
E: If the Ten-Lords Commission wants a more precise divination from the Divination Commission, they will need to provide enough information.

C: 铖杰将事情的始末讲了出来，并期望能够获得帮助。
E: Chengjie explains the matter, hoping to get help.

C: 逝者冥寐未尽，暂得清醒。尔等须抓紧时间，切莫闲聊，徒留遗憾。
E: The deceased's lucidity only lasts for a brief moment. Please hurry up and skip the chitchatting.

C: 再见了，星槎。
E: Goodbye, starskiff.

C: 别担心，希儿，他只是体力不支晕过去了。看得出来，史瓦罗这次刻意没下狠手。
E: Don't worry, Seele. Like I said, it was just the exhaustion. Svarog was deliberately holding back.

C: 丑话说前面，要是他懒得搭理你这个「挑战者」…我们立马就离开这儿。
E: Lemme say this first — if he doesn't wanna deal with you as a challenger, then we're getting out of there ASAP.

C: 只是，区区一个演武仪典，却能劳动「朱明」和「曜青」的两位天将同时到来，恐怕也不仅仅是为了观礼吧？炎老这次前来，元帅可有什么吩咐？
E: Yet, the fact that a simple martial arts ceremony has attracted esteemed generals from the Zhuming and the Yaoqing implies intentions beyond mere spectating. Might there be any specific instructions from the Marshal?

C: 这就是整件事情不寻常的地方了。
E: That's what makes this entire thing so unusual.

C: 将军此时正承担着莫大的压力。可我竟全然不察将军的苦恼…真是幼稚！
E: The general is under tremendous pressure right now, but I was completely oblivious to his troubles... How naive of me!

C: 你当然可以把仙舟的本事吹上天，说到底你不过是他们请来的说客罢了。
E: Yeah, go ahead and brag about their skills. After all, you're just a negotiator they hired.

C: 呵呵呵，你当我是吓大的吗？可大怎么说，可小又怎么说？
E: Hehe, you think you can scare me with that? What exactly do you mean?

C: 仙舟先民深知这一节，才会将守望建木玄根的职责付与持明族，但持明也不过是凡物。
E: Our Xianzhou forbears knew this well, and that's why they entrusted the duty of guarding the Roots of the Arbor to the Vidyadhara. However, the Vidyadhara are still only mortal beings.

C: 哎呀，彦卿大人怎么脸色都变了？
E: Alas, why is your face turning pale, Yanqing?

C: 正好，趁此良机，我来给你介绍介绍，这位彦卿大人是……
E: Well, let me take this opportunity to introduce you to Yanqing...

C: 你刚刚说我将景元视作敌人…不，我的敌人从来只有自己。
E: You asked if I view General Jing Yuan as my enemy... No, my real enemy has always been myself.

C: 重复一遍，以一刻为限，看谁在时限内斩除的孽物最多，便判谁的剑术更胜一筹。
E: Let me say it again: The one who kills the most abominations within fifteen minutes wins.

C: 彦卿、云璃，既然切磋结束，是不是该有礼貌地感谢飞霄将军的指点，然后安静地握手言和了？
E: Now that the sparring session is over, Yanqing and Yunli, shouldn't you politely thank General Feixiao for her guidance and bury the hatchet?

C: 三月，还不快拜见师父？
E: March? Show some respect to your master.

C: 你、你要怎么样？
E: Wh—what will you do?

C: 彦卿，三月就拜托你了，可别对她太客气了。
E: March is in your hands now, Yanqing. Don't be too easy on her.

C: 练剑需要身法步法配合，这套衣服剪裁贴身，便于活动。我还特意备了些小配饰，可是花了我不少心思。
E: Sword practice requires precise movements. This outfit is tailored to fit perfectly and allows for smooth movements. I even added some small accessories. I put a lot of thought into it.

C: 唉唉，怎么才第一节课，两位师父就吵起来了！你们快别吵了，步法和发力我早晚都是要学的，先学哪个不都一样嘛？
E: Hey, it's only my first lesson, and you're already arguing! Come on, calm down, masters! I'll have to improve both my footwork and strength anyway, so it doesn't matter which one comes first!

C: 三月小姐的双剑技巧已经小有所成。即便是到了演武仪典之上与人争锋，也绝不逊色。
E: Miss March's sword skills are really coming along. She'll hold her own just fine in the Wardance.

C: 不认识。
E: No.

C: 但只有在我挥剑时，我能感觉到自己可以放下一切。我喜欢那个倾尽全力向前方阻碍挥出一剑，一往无前的我。
E: But when I wield my sword, it feels like I'm letting go of everything. I love the feeling of giving it my all, facing any obstacle in front of me, pressing forward.

C: …只是想起了几位故人，一些旧事。
E: ...Oh, nothing. I was just reminded of some old friends and old tales.

C: 怎么，你想躲起来一个人练剑？想得美。
E: What? You want to secretly practice swordplay by yourself? Dream on.

C: 明天礼炮一响，所有人的注意都会被吸引，不会有第二次机会——
E: When the guns go off tomorrow, all eyes will be on it. That'll be our only chance...

C: {NICKNAME}小朋友说的没错。这次建木重生，根须蔓延，还凿穿了罗浮的造化洪炉，误走了其中所封印的岁阳妖火。此事倒是可以作为旁证。
E: Just as {NICKNAME} said, when the Ambrosial Arbor resurrected, its roots broke through the Creation Furnace on the Luofu, accidentally releasing the heliobus fiendfire sealed inside. This can be used as circumstantial evidence.

C: 但很遗憾，自报告上呈之日起，联盟内就充斥着流言和臆测。就连罗浮内部也有人参本上奏，指责将军疏怠职守，放任建木重生。
E: But unfortunately, ever since the report was submitted, the Alliance has been filled with rumors and speculation. Even within the Luofu, there are people accusing you of neglecting your duties, resulting in the Ambrosial Arbor's resurrection.

C: 不管是在天上还是水底，要逃出去都易如反掌。
E: Whether it's in the clouds or underwater, breaking free would still be a piece of cake for me.

C: 看来在我和三月七不知不觉的时候，你已经在罗浮仙舟上颇有人缘了啊。
E: Looks like while March 7th and I were clueless, you already made many friends on the Xianzhou Luofu.

C: 两位这边走。
E: Please come this way.

C: 为罗浮守擂的云骑剑士英武非凡，剑光如电。异邦的挑战者一头火发，一只手竟是镔铁铸成，拳锋如雷。两人相斗良久，难分胜负。
E: The Cloud Knight who was the Luofu's ringmaster was an amazing swordsman, and their sword flashed like lightning. The outworld challenger had fiery red hair and a hand made of steel which roared like thunder. They battled for a long time before a winner could be declared.

C: 这些箱子…看起来有些眼熟。
E: These crates... they look oddly familiar.

C: 在下是「犀犬猎群」一介小小的策问官，你可以叫我…末度。
E: I'm just a humble counselor of the Rhinohound Pack. You can call me... Mok Tok.

C: 要想尽快抵达幽狱之底，必须借助某些工具。
E: We need a few tools if we want to reach the bottom quickly.

C: 有一名曜青使者逃脱了？另外一人被挟持向上逃去？
E: One of the Yaoqing messengers escaped? And the other one was taken hostage and brought upwards?

C: 哪两方人马？
E: Which two parties?

C: 那些搜捕的事情当然要做，但罗浮之上的一切必须照旧如常，至少看起来一切如常。
E: We'll search for the prisoners while maintaining order on the Luofu, acting as if nothing has happened.

C: 什么？你不去守擂了？
E: What? You're not going to defend the ring?

C: 我比灵砂小姐活得久些，也多经历了几场战事。对于联盟，步离人始终是最难缠的敌人。而呼雷则是连步离人自己都畏惧不已的怪物。
E: I have lived a bit longer and engaged in a few more battles than you, Miss Lingsha. To the Alliance, borisin have always been the most formidable adversaries, and Hoolay is a monster feared even among his own kind.

C: 「隐藏行迹」？
E: Hide their tracks?

C: 愿帝弓庇佑，保他平安无虞。
E: May Reignbow's blessing keep him safe.

C: 你回来了，椒丘。
E: You're back, Jiaoqiu.

C: 七百年未曾噬人的恶兽，在演武仪典召开前潜入了罗浮街巷，这才是如今的局势最凶险难测的地方。
E: A vicious beast, who hasn't tasted blood and flesh in seven centuries, is now lurking on the streets of the Luofu right before the Wardance. This is what makes the situation treacherous and unpredictable.

C: 那个士兵应该只是有些走神，我认为最可疑的应该是天舶司职员。
E: I believe he was just slacking off. In my opinion, the staff members from the Sky-Faring Commission appear more suspicious.

C: 我看这个人反而是为排查星槎而来的。最可疑的应该是天舶司职员。
E: I think he's genuinely here to investigate the starskiffs, as he claimed. In my opinion, the staff members from the Sky-Faring Commission are the most suspicious.

C: 相信椒丘的判断，继续监视，我们马上就来。
E: Trust his judgment, and keep watching. We'll be right there.

C: 原来如此，难怪那个狐人战斗时所展现的力量，果断和残忍…如此惊人！那全是拜她的步离血脉所赐。杂种…可憎的杂种将军。
E: Now I understand. No wonder she displayed... such astounding power, determination, and cruelty in battle...! Turns out it's all because of her borisin bloodline. Mutt... despicable mutt.

C: 说起来，三月小姐要代彦卿骁卫守擂的事已经公示了。我刚才从选手大厅经过的时候，听见选手们正在议论纷纷，其中最多的问题就是——「三月七是谁？」
E: The news that you will be the ringmaster in place of Lieutenant Yanqing has been made public, Miss March. Just now, as I passed the contestants' hall, I overheard them all discussing this news. The most common question I heard was... "Who is March 7th?"

C: （扮猪吃老虎，让对方轻敌也算是一种战术吧？）
E: (Tricking the opponent into underestimating me is a valid tactic too, right?)

C: 有的。
E: There are.

C: 汪汪，汪汪汪汪汪？
E: Woof woof, woof woof woof woof woof?

C: 你当大家今天是来闹着玩呢？
E: You reckon we're all here just to play around today?

C: 听说来到竞锋舰上的…
E: I heard that everyone who came aboard the Skysplitter...

C: 全是精锐中的精锐！
E: ...Are cream of the crop!

C: 下次要是她出现，记得离她远远的。你应该也不希望自己变成一块一块的回列车吧？
E: Next time she appears in battle, make sure you keep your distance. You don't want to return to the Express in pieces, I'm sure?

C: 你永远也用不上它了。你会和它一同埋葬在这儿。不过，你始终是个幸运的家伙……
E: But you will never have a chance to use them. You will be buried with them right here. Although, you are a fortunate one...

C: 仙舟翾翔，云骑常胜！仙舟翾翔，云骑常胜！
E: Xianzhou soars, Cloud Knight roars! Xianzhou soars, Cloud Knight roars! Xianzhou soars, Cloud Knight roars!...

C: 我本以为最好的战况不过是你们几个能联手拖住这头凶兽，自保不失。但…你们合力击败了呼雷，真是后生可畏。
E: I originally thought, in the best-case scenario, you would team up and hold this beast back while protecting yourselves. However... You joined forces and defeated Hoolay! The youth are truly to be feared and respected!

C: 来吧，为免夜长梦多，该是将呼雷重新囚禁起来的时候了。
E: Come, we need to lock up Hoolay once again before anything unexpected happens.

C: 哼，「金蟾啮锁烧香入」，焚香迎客本是雅事一件。哎，可惜 ，可惜。
E: Hmph, the burning of incense is a respectful way of welcoming guests. Such a refined tradition, sadly, seems to be forgotten here.

C: 联盟与丰饶民血战千年，但一直未决出胜负，你们考虑过为什么吗？因为若联盟得胜，必将成为下一个丰饶民；若作战失利，联盟将陷入灭绝的地步。
E: For a thousand years, the Alliance has been engaged in brutal warfare against the Denizens of Abundance, yet victory has remained beyond reach. Have you ever wondered why? Should the Alliance emerge victorious, they will inevitably become the next Denizens of Abundance. However, if they suffer defeat, the Alliance will face extinction.

C: 仙舟的盟誓，管不了我手中的枪！
E: The oath of the Xianzhou means nothing to the spear in my hand!

C: 凭着持明在联盟中的根基，你真以为能对我们做些什么？
E: Given the Vidyadhara's foundation within the Alliance, do you really think you can do anything to us?

C: 这样过家家比较真情实感！
E: This kind of make-believe adds a genuine touch!

C: …我不懂该怎么说些宽慰人心的话，对怎么治好别人的病也一窍不通。
E: ...I don't know how to offer words of comfort, nor do I know much about curing others' ailments.

C: 「仪典首日，有步离凶徒妄图制造恐慌，幸得前来观礼的天击将军率云骑化解危机，击毙狂徒。」这样的英雄故事不但货真价实，传开了也人人爱看，最能平息谣言非议。
E: "On the Wardance's opening day, rogue borisin attempted to stir up panic but were swiftly neutralized by the Merlin's Claw and the Cloud Knights." A genuine tale of heroism that will captivate and calm the public.

C: 皇上，过会儿一起去唱K呗？
E: Your Majesty, karaoke session later?

C: 你真有这么大面子，连家族都能说动？
E: You really have so much pull that you can persuade The Family?

C: 蒂索克二世刚开始自称「皇帝」的时候，其实没什么人理她。但她后来不仅以「皇帝」自居，还做了很多好事：寻人寻物、调停矛盾、还有协助家族工作之类的。
E: When Tizocic II first started to call herself "Emperor," no one really acknowledged her. But she's done a lot more than just call herself Emperor — there were many good deeds she performed: Locating missing people and items, resolving conflicts, and even helping The Family.

C: 我这不也是找个借口出来逛逛嘛。你是不知道，我们这些皇亲国戚，平时根本没什么机会离开那个迷宫似的鬼地方。
E: It was just an excuse to come out for a stroll. You probably don't know — we imperials rarely get any opportunities to leave that labyrinthine hellhole.

C: 可我还是小孩呀！
E: But I am!

C: 在政治领域，小孩子有小孩子的武器。小孩子不会撒谎、不会玩弄权谋、不会被利益牵扯——至少大家都是这么认为的。
E: In the realm of governance, even children have their own weapons: They don't lie, plot, or vie for power — or at least that's how everyone thinks of them.

C: 灰骑士，朕等你很久了。又有不少穷人被叛党煽动，聚集在一起企图推翻朕的统治。
E: Gray Knight, I've been waiting for you for a while. Once again, the impoverished plot another insurgency, rallying together in an attempt to overthrow my rule.

C: {NICKNAME}…很独特的名字。
E: {NICKNAME}... What a special name.

C: 我能感觉到，那位老爷爷身上肯定缺了什么东西！嘀嗒，他很可怜！
E: I can sense that the old man is missing something! Tick tock, what a poor guy!

C: 我准备好了，孩子。
E: I'm ready.

C: <size=28>二……</size>
E: <size=28>Two...</size>

C: 「智慧」，多么令人迷惑的词汇。有人以为它是一切问题的答案，一切美德的终点。
E: "Wisdom." What a perplexing word. Some see it as the answer to every problem and the ultimate of all virtues.

C: 你…怎么会知道？
E: How... did you know?

C: …但「阻断药」的效果远比想象中好。它不止屏蔽了我脑海中的知识，甚至还阻断了我学习相关知识的能力。
E: ...But the drug was surprisingly effective. Not only did it block my access to the related knowledge in my mind, but it also hampered my ability to learn the knowledge.

C: 我对你的了解并不深刻，博士。相识百年，你我见面不过寥寥三次。
E: I don't know you very well, Doctor. We've known each other for a century, yet we've only met three times.

C: 家族的人不会这么轻易地让步，你给了他们什么？
E: The Family doesn't budge so easily, what did you offer them?

C: 呵，费歇尔就是个说大话的骗子。他再也没有回来过，其他人也没回来过。「钟表匠」和加拉赫，他们也都等到了自己的「完美结局」。
E: Ah, Fischer is just a huge liar. He has never been back, and neither has anyone else. The Watchmaker and Gallagher both waited for their own "perfect ending."

C: 小鸟扇动翅膀，它的身体逐渐变得透明，他的模因身体正在逐渐飘散。
E: The bird flaps its wings, its body slowly becoming transparent, its memetic body gradually drifting away.

C: 真想看看他们的表情。
E: I really want to see their faces now.

C: （这里是「湛蓝爵士」的内心世界…咦，那几只折纸小鸟就在前面。）
E: (This is Dr. Blues' inner world... Hmm? Those origami birds are up ahead.)

C: 勤奋不是好事吗？
E: Being hardworking is a bad thing?

C: 嗐，那里面有雅努斯的祭司，圣城需要他们的协助。特殊时期，人才总是最珍贵的嘛。
E: Those are Janus priests, the holy city needs their help. Talented individuals are a precious commodity in times of need.

C: 早在那场袭击发生之前，就偶尔有逃难的外邦人来这里寻求庇护。他们的城邦已经毁灭，仅凭自己没法在荒原上长期生存。
E: Before that attack happened, an occasional outlander seeking refuge would come here for shelter. Their cities had been razed to the ground, and they could not survive long in the wasteland.

C: 可是，吾师…药品在奥赫玛是战略物资，现在管控严格，一般公民很难买到的。
E: But, teacher... All medicine is now considered wartime supplies in Okhema — distribution is under strict control. Most people won't even be able to buy any.

C: 我再看看。
E: I'll take another look around here.

C: 傻孩子，人家怎么会稀罕一个苹果呢？再说这本来就是人家的东西……
E: Silly child, why would our benefactors be satisfied with just an apple? And it was theirs to begin with...

C: 小友，你来了……
E: You're here, young friend...

C: 你没有给出那个苹果，苏克提瑞斯苍白地笑笑，低下了头。似乎也没什么可聊了。
E: You don't give him the apple. Soctires smiles palely and lowers his head — there is nothing left to be said.

C: 我曾亲眼见过那些外邦人，他们确实处在危机之中。如果不是苏克提瑞斯为他们搞到了药，后果不堪设想。
E: I once saw those outlanders with my own eyes, and they were indeed in dire danger. If not for Soctires securing medicine for them, the consequences would have been unimaginable.

C: 支持富人拉莱德的控诉。
E: Support Wealthy Liluder's complaint.

C: 这个世界上不缺少因善而生的恶。倘若动机能替行为辩护，那谁都会说自己「本意是好的」。
E: This world has no lack of evil borne of compassion. If motives could replace a defense, everyone would say their "intentions are good."

C: 物资这种东西，死了也带不走。为什么不趁着还拥有当下，多跟别人分享分享呢？
E: Supplies can't be taken with you when you're dead. Why shouldn't we seize the present and share them with whomever we can?

C: 首先，吾师是为了救人性命才出此下策。虽触犯法律，却已是那种情况下的最优解。
E: Firstly, my teacher only resorted to such measures in order to save lives. He may have violated the law, but it was the best possible solution under the given circumstances.

C: 闪！
E: Out of the way!

C: 帕里斯到底是谁？
E: Who is this "Paris"?

C: 姑娘为我想的称号还真是丰富，但我还是更希望你叫我的名字——<color=#dbc291ff>帕里斯</color>。
E: You have so many nicknames for me, miss. But I would prefer you to call me by my name: <color=#dbc291ff>Paris</color>.

C: 我嘞个逃兵。
E: They really are deserters.

C: 再等等。
E: One sec.

C: 姑娘，你都快没气了，就少说点丧气话吧。
E: Miss, your strength is fading. Do not waste it on pessimism.

C: 算碑，圣物，欧洛尼斯的。解开预言，改变时空，很难。
E: Calculation tablet, divine object, Oronyx's it is. Unravel prophecy, change time and space, hard it is.

C: 到现在也不知道阿卡迪亚到底在哪里…帕里斯未来真的去到那个地方了吗？
E: We still don't know where Arcadia is... Did Paris really make it there in the future?

C: 呵呵，他还真是难缠。
E: Hah, he just doesn't give up.

C: 呵呵，在战场上怯懦如鼠，却有胆量咒骂命运的神明，你可真是把勇气用错了地方。
E: Hah. You cower on the battlefield, yet wield the courage to curse the gods of fate. I believe this courage of yours is misplaced.

C: 哼，本以为你已成为了奥赫玛的子民，结果不能对你寄予期望。
E: Hmph. And I believed that you had become a citizen of Okhema. I knew it was wrong to place any hope in you.

C: 你们的那些什么浪漫…爱…是我们用牺牲和鲜血来维护的…而我还要舍命保护你们这些盲目的愚者……
E: You and your romance... Your love... It is us that have sustained it with our blood and sacrifice... And now I have to pay with my life to protect you blind fools...

C: 我、我不能冒这个险，万一她真的背叛了我…我一个普通人在眷属面前，不就像蝼蚁一样脆弱吗？我可不能死，我不能死……
E: I... I cannot take this risk. What if she really betrayed me... I, a normal man... am I not as frail as an ant before the Titankin? I cannot die. I cannot die...

C: 随着记忆谢幕的余音散去，你们又回到了飘着硝烟的悬锋城。
E: As the lingering echoes of the memory fade, you return to the smoke-filled streets of Castrum Kremnos.

C: 阿卡迪亚在什么地方？
E: Where is Arcadia?

C: 如果雅努萨波利斯注定要沦陷，求援也不过是让更多人在这里送命而已。
E: If Janusopolis is destined to fall, reinforcements will only cause more people to forsake their lives here.

C: 如同痴傻的疯子，{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的狂信徒，谁会选择一个理智全无的家伙？
E: Like a foolish madman, a fanatic disciple of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}. Who will choose an irrational person?

C: {NICKNAME}！{NICKNAME}！
E: {NICKNAME}! {NICKNAME}!

C: 塔兰顿在上，你已通过了它的考验，愿律法常在你心。
E: By Talanton, you have passed their trial. May laws remain forever within your heart.

C: 在那之前，要好好长大！
E: Before that, you need to grow up properly!

C: 但无论如何，它都为你留下了一段回忆，不是吗？
E: But no matter what, it left you with a memory, didn't it?

C: 今日我们不说那背芒灵官迈德漠斯，且说那「负阳逐火白厄真君」。这白厄真君生于村舍巷陌，起于微末之中。何奈黑潮无情，凌虐乡野，瓦尽无存，唯他一人得生。
E: Today, we shall not speak of Mydeimos, the Backlit Spirit Warden, but of the "Lord Phainon, the Flame-Chasing Harbinger of Light." Born in a humble village of bucolic background, Lord Phainon rose from the most modest beginnings. Alas, the merciless black tide ravaged the countryside, leaving nothing but ruins, and he alone survived.

C: 只是「铁墓」身具三千万世所积愤怒，又有谁能为其敌手？可惜啊可惜，恨雨仇云遮天幕，三军尽灭万事休。
E: Yet Irontomb bore within it the rage of thirty million lifetimes... Who could stand against such an adversary? Alas, alas! Vengeful rain and hateful clouds veiled the heavens, the three armies were destroyed, and all was brought to ruin.

C: 谁说的？
E: Who said that?

C: 甚至连那位「寂静领主」，都听从了黑塔女士的号召？想到那场面，我…我简直无法呼吸！
E: Even that "Lord of Silence" answered Madam Herta's call!? Just thinking about that scene... I—I'm gonna hyperventilate!

C: 欢迎光临我们一起写下的故事，这一页因你而存在的「永恒」♪
E: Welcome to the story we wrote together! This page of "Eternity" exists because of you ♪

C: （当初留在匹诺康尼时，米哈伊尔是否也是同样的心情？）
E: (Did Mikhail feel the same way when he stayed in Penacony back then?)

C: 梦里的消息不似外面那般灵通。这故事的每一个情节，都出乎我的意料。
E: News doesn't travel as fast in dreams. Every plot twist in this story caught me completely off guard.

C: （虽然只标注了大概的方位，但还是快点过去看看吧！）
E: (The direction marked is only approximate, but I must hurry over to have a look!)

C: 古恩让我当你的老师。
E: Gunn made me your teacher.

C: 我想不到更好的了。
E: I can't think of anything better.

C: 埃美丽急匆匆地离开了，你留在原地休息了会儿。
E: Emily leaves in a hurry. You stay where you are and rest for a bit.

C: 埃美丽小姐真温柔…她真的…我哭死！
E: Miss Emily is so gentle... She really is... I'm gonna cry!

C: 生物载体是不可能的，这一点我已经试验过了。
E: Biological receptacles are not possible. I've already tested that out.

C: 应该不是幻觉…
E: It shouldn't be a hallucination...

C: 是的！这次的故事是某位科员的投稿，她正在创作以这个故事为背景的小说：
E: Yep! The story this time is submitted by a researcher. She's currently writing a novel based on it.

C: 怎么样？是不是很「怪」！
E: How is it? Is it really creepy?

C: 但她却告诉我，再去找她的时候要说出接头暗号是——我说「小小的马桶」，她说「大大的期待」。
E: But then she said, I need to give her the password when I go find her again. I would say "a small toilet seat," and she would answer "a big expectation."

C: 小小的马桶？
E: A small toilet seat?

C: （将见闻告知阿德勒）
E: (Tell Adler what you found.)

C: 想要重启人生…
E: I want to reset my life...

C: 择日不如撞日，我们现在就开工。来，先以这永冬铭碑为背景，帮我拍一张照片吧。
E: There's no time like the present. Let's start now. Come on, take a picture of me with the Everwinter Monument as the backdrop.

C: 我带了他的照片…
E: I brought a picture of him...

C: 你听过塔米拉这个名字吗？她是贝洛伯格当红的舞台剧明星。我一向希望能结交有天赋的艺人朋友，和他们聊天一定会大有收获。
E: Have you heard of Tamila? She is a popular stage actress in Belobog. I've always wanted to make friends with talented artists. Chatting with them will surely be rewarding.

C: 原来是这样啊…我大概知道「信鸽」是什么了。{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}，可以再帮我找找类似的纸团吗？我想，应该还有三个吧。
E: I see. I think I have an idea what the "pigeon" is now. {M#Sir}{F#Ma'am}, can you find more paper balls like this for me? I think there are three more.

C: 那还用说嘛？当然没有！
E: Of course not!

C: 就把快递包裹放他旁边吧——哦对，记得在上面写上鼹鼠党的名字！
E: Let's leave his package next to him. Oh right, don't forget to put The Moles' name on it!

C: …这些你拿着吧，就当是耽误时间的赔礼了。
E: ...Anyway, thanks for stopping by. Here, for your trouble.

C: 当然不能！你把银鬃铁卫的规章当成什么了？
E: Of course not! What do you think the rules of the Silvermane Guards are for?

C: 呜…呜哇！原来是这么巨大的机器人吗？
E: Wh—Whoa! That's one big robot!

C: {NICKNAME}，年轻人——你愿意再帮我一次吗？我写了封信向母女俩解释这件事，要是你能替我捎给莉拉那就再好不过了……
E: {NICKNAME}, young one, are you willing to help me once again? I wrote a letter to my wife and child to explain my situation. If you could deliver my letter to Lila...

C: 就来一株「侯爵夫人」吧。
E: I'll take a bouquet of Marquises.

C: 即使相隔两地，也要彼此理解、互相体谅——这才是家人之间的相处方式呀。
E: Be understanding and considerate to each other even when separated. This is the meaning of family.

C: 选项3是错误的。
E: Option 3 is incorrect.

C: 你这么聪明，只要稍加训练，一定就可以答出这些题目，将论文交到我手上了吧。
E: You're so smart. With a little training, you'll definitely be able to answer these questions and then turn in that paper to me.

C: 「<unbreak>14</unbreak>」。
E: "Fourteen."

C: 我刺探到他们的题库了。
E: I tried their quiz pool.

C: 哎呀，是您——经过上次的会面，波瓦大臣对您赞赏有加，还评价您是贝洛伯格学术界冉冉升起的新星。
E: Oops, it's you. Minister Bova has been singing your praises since last time, calling you a rising star in the Belobog academic circle.

C: 转达瓦丝卡的话…
E: Relaying Vaska's reply...

C: 没问出来？不，这信息量可比小女子想象中大多了~谢谢你~
E: You couldn't get the info? No, this is far more intel than I ever could have imagined. Thank you so much~

C: 小女子听说塔米拉小姐今天会去买书，拜托你去书摊看看她是怎样买书的吧~谢谢你啦~
E: I heard that she's going to buy some more books today. Please, can you go to the bookstore and observe how she buys her books? Thank you so much~

C: 好久不见了，菲丝，最近有什么好书可以推荐吗？
E: Long time no see, Fizz! Have you got any book recommendations for me today?

C: 喔喔，原来如此…小女子对塔米拉小姐的理解更深了~
E: Ooh, I see... I have a deeper understanding of Tamila now.

C: 可如果真的站在贝洛伯格的广场上，却会发现…任何一个人类勉强可以居住的地方，都会变得生机勃勃。
E: But if you stand in the Belobog plaza and observe, you'd realize that... Humans have the power to turn even the barely habitable places into a land of exuberance.

C: 是什么？你说啊？
E: What do you do? Spell it out!

C: 嘿，这事就算是解决咯。感谢老爹！
E: Hehe, well this is as good as done. Thank you, dad!

C: 哈哈哈…没想到还有这种事啊。不过，这也正是我们「会社」存在的意义。
E: Hahaha... I didn't think this would happen, but that is indeed why the Society exists.

C: 我要「黑面包汽水冰山」。
E: I want a Rye Bread Soda Iceberg.

C: 这街上居然会有人，真稀奇啊。
E: It's rare to see someone walking down this street.

C: 如果你发现了类似的情况，<color=#dbc291ff>你可以自己处理掉，或者你不放心的话，仍然可以交给我们。</color>
E: If you come across any similar circumstances, <color=#dbc291ff>you can take care of them yourself, or hand them over to us if you're feeling uneasy.</color>

C: …说真的，你们到底在哪里？
E: ...Honestly, where are you people?

C: 不要乱动，冷静地听我问完。你，为什么要拿走我的手枪？
E: Don't move. Keep quiet and listen to my question. Why are you taking my pistol?

C: 你刚刚不是耳后冒汗了？
E: Didn't you just get sweaty behind your ears?

C: 你随手拿起一卷展开，第一条就写着：「切勿直接饮用浴池中的泉水。」——看来前人在此吃过不少苦头。
E: You pick up a scroll to read. The first line writes: "Please refrain from directly using the bath's springwater." — it appears that someone suffered quite a bit to come up with this tip.

C: 饰壁里拉
E: Wall Lyre

C: 「诸世界重建计划」顺利进入第三阶段，弁才天国文化复兴成果显著。
E: The ongoing "Worlds Reborn Initiative" has officially entered its third phase, as Benzaitengoku continues to make remarkable strides in cultural revitalization.

C: 此后，世界获救了，摆脱了混沌的暗流。
E: Then, the world was saved from the undercurrent of chaos.

C: 向你祈祷，尼卡多利，请用纷争赐我以丰盛的和平！
E: I pray to you, Nikador. Please grant me abundant peace through strife!

C: 巨人的梦语垂入大地，长成参天的我。
E: The dreams of giants sank into the earth and grew into towering colossus like me.

C: 切记，天球在右，三角在左，受审判者则站在相反的位置。错误的砝码，只会让天平保持沉默。
E: Remember: The celestial sphere goes on the right and the triangle goes on the left. The person undergoing judgment stands on the opposite side. If you place the wrong weight in the wrong location, the scales will remain silent.

C: 进入神殿者，当受天平审判。
E: Enter the temple and be judged by the divine scale.

C: 不必麻烦了…这可能是我最后一次来取火山玻璃了。
E: There is no need for you to go to such trouble... This is likely the last time I shall come to collect volcanic glass.

C: 不惮搏命拱卫，以显牺牲之傲骨。
E: Undaunted of risking life to protect, embodying corpus of sacrifice.

C: 莫要让你的母亲、你的族人们失望啊，迈德漠斯。
E: Do not let your mother or your people down, Mydeimos.

C: 很显然，你爱上了这种感觉。
E: Clearly, you've fallen in love with this feeling.

C: 这时你才想起来，那位学者似乎并没有询问你的名字……
E: It's only now you realize — the scholar never asked for your name...

C: 这是…八音盒吗？缇里西庇俄丝，你的手可真巧。以后给你讲故事的时候，就有好听的音乐伴奏啦。
E: Is this... a music box? Tribios, you're so talented! Now whenever I'm telling you a story, we can have beautiful music playing in the background.

C: 你呀，就别操心啦。多吃饭、多识字、多读读翁法罗斯的故事，看到你茁壮成长，妈妈比什么都高兴。
E: Honestly, you mustn't fuss over me. Just make sure you eat plenty, practice your reading and read lots of stories of Amphoreus. Nothing makes mommy happier than seeing you grow and thrive.

C: 切莫假托神谕之名，给人以虚假的希望。否则…命运定会将那城邦覆灭的罪责，归于你的头上。
E: Do not give people false hope under the guise of prophecy. Otherwise... fate will place the responsibility for that city's destruction on your head.

C: 不过，你竟还念及我们的往日交情…多么令人意外啊。
E: Although, the fact that you still consider our former friendship... I must admit I am surprised.

C: 求援绝非逃兵所为。若无赌上性命的觉悟，半途就会死于黑潮的截击。
E: Calling for aid is not desertion. If you were not prepared to risk your life, the black tide would simply intercept you and kill you before you made it to Okhema.

C: 黑潮怪物…想要伤害阿塔卡玛，倒是试试看啊！
E: Monsters of the black tide... You want to harm Artakama. Why don't you just try it!

C: 先用些简单的问题试试？毕竟那么久都没说过话了，也不知道它的智慧还剩下几分。
E: Let's ease in with some simple questions first. After all, they haven't spoken in ages, and we have no idea how much wisdom they still possess.

C: 冥界…果然是一片花海。
E: The nether realm... truly a sea of flowers.

C: 你坐下，群星般的光芒在你面前荡漾，水波璀璨，空气中仿佛有阵阵回响。
E: As you sit down, the light of the stars begins to ripple before you, the waves shine, and the air seems to resonate with echoes.

C: 据我所知，她并非黄金裔，灵魂也早已落入塞纳托斯的怀抱。
E: To my knowledge, she was not of the Chrysos Heirs, and her soul has long since fallen into the embrace of Thanatos.

C: 嗯…有位织者喜爱偷懒。金丝带来消息，它正趴在<color=#dbc291ff>某把躺椅上</color>，快乐地忙里偷闲呢。
E: Hmm... there's a Weaver who enjoys idling. The golden threads bring word that the Weaver's lounging <color=#dbc291ff>on a lounger</color>, gleefully sneaking in some rest.

C: 预言…已完成…感谢……
E: Prophecy... fulfilled... thank you...

C: o((•'ω´• )っ「不知道我这么大力，值不值得一个奇迹！」)∋
E: o((•'ω´• )っ "I wonder if my strength is also worthy of a miracle!" )∋

C: o((⊙'ω´⊙ )っ「唷吼唷吼~唷吼吼吼~」)∋
E: o((⊙'ω´⊙ )っ "♪ Yar har~ blubber de dee~ ♪" )∋

C: o((>'ω´• )っ「无论你需要治疗、闲聊还是一个抱抱，豹豹都会一直在这里~」)∋
E: o((>'ω´• )っ "Whether you need healing, conversation, or just a good hug, I'm always here for you~" )∋

C: Σ(:３っ「其实，嘭嘭海豹第一次向本豹推荐『超级英雄』生发秘膏的时候，本豹是拒绝的！」)∋
E: Σ(:３っ "Actually, when Boom Boom Seal first recommended the Superhero Hair Balm to me, I refused their offer!" )∋

C: 有比赛咯！看比赛咯！
E: A match is happening! Match time!

C: 随着你的触碰，金色的流体缓缓上升。那流体仿佛有生命般舞动，在装置顶部凝聚成一团温暖的光球。
E: Golden liquid rises slowly at your touch. It moves and dances as if alive before coalescing into a warm ball of light on top of the device.

C: 圣烛中的金色流体缓缓流转，仿佛在丈量着时间的刻度。
E: The golden liquid within the holy candle flows steadily, as if measuring the very passage of time.

C: 熄灭圣烛。
E: Extinguish the holy candle.

C: 别说傻话！你还年轻，待会儿老老实实跟在我们身后，别傻乎乎一个人冲锋。
E: Stop talking nonsense! You're still young. Stay behind us later and don't charge ahead alone.

C: 我的「羽翼」…被他们放在哪里了？
E: My "wings"... Where did they put them?

C: 记忆的残像似乎晃了晃，过往对话的回忆因其承载的情感之重杂糅在一起……
E: The fragment of memory seems to waver — memories of words once spoken blend together due to the emotion they contain...

C: 去嘶声用你们肮脏的肺腑詈骂，去撕咬为每一粒石砾争夺。
E: Go screech with your dirty lungs, go fight over every pebble.

C: 专门为小妖精设计的信箱，里面塞满了五花八门的邮件——看来这些小家伙的书信往来相当热络。
E: A mailbox made just for fairies, stuffed to the brim with colorful letters. Seems like these little folks have a friendly game of pen pal going.

C: 耀眼的火…点亮它的眼睛，也灼伤了它的鳍与鳞……
E: The dazzling flame... lights up its eyes, but also scorches its fins and scales...

C: 丹枫留下的物什，丹枫的名字，丹枫的力量…舍弃它们，就能意味着与过去告别吗？
