E: Dan Feng's belongings, Dan Feng's name, Dan Feng's strength... Would abandoning them truly mean saying goodbye to the past?

C: 我们原本背靠背，是彼此最忠诚的兄弟！但那阵爆炸真的太吓虫了…我被巨风掀翻，又连摔四五个跟头，现在是彻底不知道虫在哪了……
E: We were once back-to-back, the most loyal of brothers! But that blast scared the shell off me... I was tossed by the great wind, rolled four or five times, and now I have no idea where I ended up...

C: 别沮丧嘤，绕个路就能到楼上去了嘤。
E: Don't be upset. Just take a detour, and you'll reach the upper floor, eep.

C: 既已行至此处，就抛弃恐惧吧。我们，终将在崭新的未来重逢喀。
E: Now that we've come this far, cast aside your fears. We shall meet again in a brand new future, crrk.

C: 我真是天才喀…
E: I'm such a genius, crrk...

C: 那面镜子是怎么回事？
E: What's the deal with that mirror?

C: {NICKNAME}乘客发现什么了吗！
E: {NICKNAME}, have you found something?

C: 赶快想想办法，{NICKNAME}！
E: Come on, {NICKNAME}, think of something!

C: 商店「光锥呈现」。
E: Shop "Light Cone Manifest"

C: 开始吧。
E: Let's begin.

C: （这门卡住了汪！别乱动，这门很重，会砸伤你的！还是同步到我身上来吧！）
E: (The door's stuck, woof! Don't move unnecessarily! The door might fall on you! Better sync up with me!)

C: 汪汪！汪汪汪！
E: Woof woof! Woof woof woof!

C: 门禁系统？我之前没见过这东西，路过的时候有些好奇，就摸了摸。
E: Access controls? I have never seen this. It piqued my interest when I walked past it, so I touched it.

C: 它沉默着，盯着地板上不存在的缝隙，恨不得想钻进去。
E: It keeps its silence, staring at the non-existent gaps in the floor, wishing it can hide within.

C: （…这样啊，还是回去问问小姐汪？）
E: (...Ah, should we return and ask Miss Asta, woof?)

C: 不可以不眠！皮肤会变差的，还会水肿！水肿哦！！
E: You can't stay up all night! It's bad for your skin, and you'll end up all puffy — really puffy!

C: 好给你剧透。
E: Just so I can spoil it for you.

C: 我「笑」迷迷？
E: I "see" Mem?

C: 堆积的货物太多了…
E: The pile of goods is too much...

C: （又来了…好吧，来都来了……）
E: (Here we go again... Well, we've already come this far...)

C: 正因如此，现在流云渡才会人手不足啊。只有像你我这样武功高强的人，才能在这个残酷的货运码头生存下去……
E: Because of this, Cloudford is now understaffed. Only people with excellent martial arts skills like you and I can survive in this cruel freight jetty...

C: 还行、挺不错的，嗯。
E: Not bad. Hmm.

C: 今天还有武器测试吗？
E: Are there weapon tests today?

C: 有徒弟说，不如把金人进一步大型化用作载具，然后再把这「匣里流光」整合到活动骨骼上；再搭配姿态制御向量喷射器，便可确保大型金人机动性……
E: Some of my apprentices said that it is better to further enlarge the aurumaton as a vehicle, and then integrate the Luminflux Pyxis into their skeletal structure. Together with the posture control vector injector, the mobility of the large aurumaton is ensured...

C: 好吧，我就不过问了。
E: Alright, I won't ask.

C: 不可能…绝对不可能！绝对是你运气好！
E: No... no! Impossible! Absolutely impossible! You... you must be lucky!

C: 我们继续吧，我出题，你接题！
E: Let's continue. I'll provide the puzzles, and you'll answer them!

C: 一如既往的惨烈失败。
E: Another bitter defeat is coming, just like it always has.

C: 你可以附身在聪明人身上。
E: You can possess someone smart.

C: 好主意！
E: That's a good idea!

C: 岁阳就算了吧！再把十王司的铁拳给引来……
E: Heliobi? Just forget about 'em! Don't let the iron fist of the Ten-Lords Commission chew us out again...

C: 哼！你给我记住，今天输给我以后，我不准你再玩「寻径指津」。
E: Hmph! You'd best remember this: If you lose to me today, you're forbidden from ever playing "Pathfinder" again.

C: …跟你说一个秘密，在这艘空艇上我还有三个好兄弟。你要是能找齐我们四个，我会把你引荐给我们的头儿。
E: ...Just between you and me, I have three buddies on this airship. If you can find all four of us, I'll introduce you to our Boss.

C: 我带着新鲜的战令来啦。
E: I'm here with new Hex Passes.

C: 要怎样做游戏才会被抓进牢里？
E: How do you get arrested and sent to jail for developing games?

C: 哎呀，不好意思，突然搭话是不是把你吓了一跳？放心，我是志愿者！
E: Ah, sorry, did I startle you with my sudden interjection? Don't worry. I'm a volunteer!

C: 跟先前的不太一样啊？
E: Seems a little different from before?

C: 「美好的愿望会实现，只需要努力到自己认可的程度，再加上一个小小的契机。」
E: "Wonderful wishes will be realized, as long as you work hard to a degree that you can accept, along with a little opportunity."

C: 拼凑神的躯体并非易事。若虫们必须体察万物，从众人的言语中搜集智慧与爱，供墨涅塔编织金丝。它们因而拥有一个别称：「织者」。
E: Reassembling a divine body is no easy task. The nymph must perceive all things, gathering wisdom and love from the words of others to provide for Mnestia's weaving of the golden threads. Thus, they have an alternate name: "Weavers."

C: 嗯…有位织者试图窥见泰坦的真容。金丝带来消息，它正潜伏在<color=#dbc291ff>一座神像的头部</color>，去那里找找看吧。
E: Hmm... a weaver is attempting to spy on the Titans' true form. The golden thread brings tidings: It has infiltrated <color=#dbc291ff>the head of a divine statue</color>. Go look for it there.

C: 哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
E: Where are the remaining nymphs?

C: 提供「记忆残晶」。
E: Provide Memory Crystal Shards.

C: 总之，既然是预言的指引，那应该多多益善。先由你保存着吧，贵客。
E: In any case, the prophecy has led us here, so this must be of some use. Please, my esteemed guest, keep it first.

C: 嗯…有位织者满腔怒火，想要向尼卡多利发起挑战。金丝带来消息，它正趴在<color=#dbc291ff>一座剑之神龛下</color>，挥舞自己的双颚呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver consumed by fury, eager to challenge Nikador. The golden thread brings tidings: They now lie low <color=#dbc291ff>beneath a sword shrine</color>, their jaws agape, ready to strike.

C: 大浴场的搓澡巾？
E: Bath towels from the public baths?

C: 我就是用这个法子，偷到了一个难以想象的秘密…也正因如此，咱现在才得以站在你的面前。
E: I used just this method to steal an unimaginable secret... Which is also the reason why I'm standing here before you.

C: 扎格列斯老祖留下的名言警句可多着呢，可惜现在的人有眼无珠，只认可瑟希斯的智慧——殊不知，瑟希斯的那点小聪明，都是扎格列斯老祖偷剩下的呢。
E: Ancestor Zagreus left many pearls of wisdom. Alas, people nowadays are selectively blind, only heeding Cerces' words — they can't even fathom that the paltry tricks of Cerces are all that remains after Zagreus stole everything else.

C: 我投降了…
E: I surrender...

C: 哦！那我懂了，你原来是想和我巴特鲁斯做游戏！
E: Oh! I get it now — this is all a game to you!

C: 你丢了一个铁斧头，我还你一个金斧头，这不是很正常嘛。
E: You dropped an iron axe, I'm returning a golden one. That's how it works, isn't it?

C: 不过，架都打了，您不妨就听老巴特鲁斯再讲个小故事吧。
E: Now that we've dueled, how about letting Old Bartholos here spin you a quick yarn?

C: 咳咳，是你啊。巴特鲁斯说过，你是它的好朋友…所以这里会有一场试炼。
E: Ahem, it's you. Bartholos has spoken of you as its good friend... which means there will be a trial here.

C: 那肯定改啊！
E: Of course, they should change it!

C: 理性的选择！不过…你怎么知道老巴特鲁斯不会一时兴起，偷偷调换了宝物所在的位置呢？
E: Smart move! But... how do you know old Bartholos didn't secretly switch the treasure while you were thinking it over?

C: 您真的想知道？长话短说，还是短话长说？
E: You really wanna know? Should I give you the long story or cut to the chase?

C: 翁法罗斯，是否让您留下了遗憾？
E: Do you have any regrets about your time in Amphoreus?

C: 您搁这儿玩绕口令呢。
E: I'm not interested in mental gymnastics.

C: 哦？看来「瑟希斯之心」已经帮我们计算出了结果？
E: Oh? It seems the "Heart of Cerces" has completed the calculations for us?

C: …婆婆的甜饼可是连先代圣女都赞叹不已的美味，我本想留到日后慢慢享用的…过后我要去找那个祭司算账。
E: ...That grandma's cookies are a delicacy even the former Holy Maiden praised. I was saving them to enjoy later... Now I'll need to have a strong word with that priest.

C: 和神话传说有关？
E: Mythological connections?

C: 辅祭，虽说我先前推荐你来圣殿就职，实际上，这并不是份好差事。祭司的生活枯燥乏味，还常要与愚昧贪腐之人同流合污，我实在不愿在此久留……
E: Acolyte, though I've previously recommended you for a position in the temple, truthfully, it's not a great career. A priest's life is dull and monotonous, often involving dealing with ignorance and corruption. I've no desire to linger here longer than necessary.

C: 是虫子的尸体在说话？
E: Is that the corpse of a bug talking?

C: 和外出旅行之后，回家做完大扫除的感觉一样呢——祭司说的，我不懂，哗啦。
E: It's like coming home from a trip and doing a thorough cleaning. That's what the priest said — I wouldn't know. *whoosh*

C: 难道出货了？！
E: Did we pull the jackpot!?

C: 虽然惭愧，但这确实是我们重要的收入来源。
E: Embarrassing as it is, this is one of our main sources of income.

C: 秘锁消融、褪去，贮藏其中的物事缓缓显现……
E: The seals unravel, fading away as what lies within slowly comes into view...

C: 啊，不…没关系。不打紧。请您继续解开下一个火种匣吧！
E: Ah, no, no, it's fine. I'm fine. Please, let's keep going. Open the next Casket.

C: 刻法勒在上，哪位英雄能来救一下啊！
E: For Kephale's sake, could some hero please come to the rescue!

C: 不过嘛，至少这一次你有我的保护，也没什么可担心的啦。选吧。
E: But at least this time you'll have my protection, so there's nothing to worry about. Make your choice.

C: 你看到了<color=#dbc291ff>卡芙卡</color>。她的身躯被拉扯、变形，和她手里的伞揉在一起，变成水滴落在你脚边。
E: You see <color=#dbc291ff>Kafka</color>. Her body is stretched, deformed, and rubbed together with the umbrella in her hand, turning into water droplets and falling at your feet.

C: ……嘀……嘀……你的意识已被切断……正被重新接入模拟宇宙……
E: ...Beep ...Beep ...Your consciousness has been cut off... Reconnecting to the Simulated Universe...

C: 对了，有个模拟宇宙配套的图鉴装置在那边，你要是闲着没事可以去看看，没兴趣就算了。
E: By the way, there is a Simulated Universe Index over there, you can check it out if you have nothing else to do. But if you're not interested then forget it.

C: 你的手脚突然不听使唤。黑塔——「模拟宇宙」的最高权力者又冻结了你的行动权限，人偶没好气的声音在耳边响起：「你怎么不去打那个东西？」
E: You suddenly lose control of your limbs. Herta — the Simulated Universe's most powerful being — has revoked your permissions again, and the puppet's angry voice sounds in your ear: "Why didn't you hit that thing?"

C: 「模拟宇宙」要关闭一阵子了，我们想给系统来一次大升级，顺便看看虚拟阿哈这事怎么处理。
E: The Simulated Universe will be closed for a while. We want to give the whole thing a big overhaul, and think about what to do with the simulated Aha.

C: 对「模拟宇宙」这么酷的项目，他也提不起劲儿。斯蒂芬帮了我们一点忙，他本人要求匿名，不想大张旗鼓，可能有些天才就是不愿意成为天才吧。
E: He can't even get himself excited about something as cool as the Simulated Universe. Stephen did us a favor and asked to remain anonymous — he doesn't want to make a big splash at all. Perhaps some geniuses wish they weren't one.

C: 「模拟宇宙」里的可破坏物还会掉宇宙碎片哦。
E: Destructible objects in the Simulated Universe will drop Cosmic Fragments.

C: 太难了。
E: It was way too hard.

C: 引导意识？
E: Guide my mind?

C: 此刻，一种异样的感受袭来：你察觉到一个含糊的感受！「繁育」正在被稀释…祂的死亡像淡彩墨水在海的咸味里散开，「存护」正在将祂的碎壳、躯体与心脏剥去…接着还有第二份概念在被抽离…祂正被继续稀释，集群的力量也从崩离中逃离，更多或暴虐、或冷静的力量分解着祂……
E: At that moment, an odd feeling strikes you, and you perceive a subtle sensation! The Propagation is being diluted... THEIR death is similar to a blot of light-colored ink that spreads out in the ocean. The Preservation is stripping the Aeon of THEIR broken shell, body, and heart... Next, the second concept is extracted... The Aeon is being further diluted, and the collective power is escaping from the disintegration. More forces, whether violent or calm, are disintegrating THEM...

C: 「起床。」阮•梅言简意赅，她示意黑塔该让你起床。
E: "Wake up," Ruan Mei speaks straightforwardly, signaling Herta to wake you up.

C: 弄兽人起舞，以脚腕与趾尖勾勒方向，顺那一抹光芒，合唱者被潮水淹没后失语， 兄弟丢下桂冠后拥抱泣涕，然则世间更多哀亡，被吞没时更是悄声无息——接着，那头凶兽吸下虫潮时终于将盛怒止休，它如吞吐哀怒轻烟，身披彩宝鳞甲，仰头跳升向天空，却发出坠于海中的浪潮声。
E: The beastmaster dances and controls his movements with his ankles and toes following the streak of light. The choir members fall silent after being drowned by the tide, and the brothers cast aside their crowns and embrace each other in tears. Yet, more deaths have taken place in the world, and most of them happened in silence. The ferocious beast takes in the swarm next, finally putting an end to the Furor. It exhales the smoke of fury and is clad in colorful armor. With its head held high, it leaps to the sky and disappears. Only the sound of it plunging into the waves can be heard.

C: 此刻，另一种光辉将你笼罩——你躁动的恨意突然停止了喧嚣。一切变得温顺，你的思维与行为，甚至情绪都被祂用线仞熨好。
E: At this moment, another type of light envelops you, appeasing your intense hatred all at once. Everything becomes peaceful. Your mind, your actions, and even your emotions are smoothed by the Aeon with threads.

C: 你看向祂——祂也同样看着你……
E: You look at THEM, and THEY look at you...

C: 我怀疑黑塔早就知道这件事…
E: I suspect that Herta already knew the answer...

C: 你决定从窗户跳进去，拉开大嘴，屏气凝神，对她哇啦哇啦做个鬼脸！这比傻瓜的安慰对她更*好*！
E: Driven by a sudden urge, you leap through the broken window and give her a good grimace! For her, this will be a *better* solace than those fools' comforting words.

C: 你摸一块怀表摸得如痴如醉——哼哼，只有你知道，里面的「求救记录」频率表被以摩斯电码的形式记录了下来，记在表针挪动时的微小偏差里。
E: In the eyes of others, you appear to be fondling and indulging in your pocket watch... But you alone know that the "distress records" frequencies have been inscribed as Morse code and are noted via the minute movements in the watch hands.

C: 可怜的诺巴蒂II型。
E: Poor Norbati II.

C: 你把腰调成直角——这一刻你感到浑身肌肉酸疼，「神」的连接…似乎没能治好你为信用点不停工作而引发的腰疼……
E: You adjust your waist to a right angle. Your muscles start cramping up. This connection with God... It doesn't seem to have healed your waist, pained from working non-stop for credits...

C: 时间缓慢流逝。你们靠在一起。真的…只是在「等待」，除「等待」外，什么也不做。
E: Time passes slowly. You lean in close to each other. Truly... there is only "waiting." Besides that, there is nothing else to do.

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了金属与黄金互相碰撞而发出的轰鸣。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face and THEIR voice turns into a cacophonous clash between metal and gold.

C: 反有机战争•其一
E: Anti-Organic War (I)

C: 「嗯。第三个选择：『技术部』<color=#dbc291ff>德•维恩</color>。那些渴望打破规则、野心勃勃的人才会选择追随他！他们擅长古语、编程、破译新语言，也被称作『机密破解部』。他们有自己的外部雇佣兵团队——他们的技术能力很强，可惜，其他部门的人总把他们称为『<color=#dbc291ff>野路子</color>』。」
E: "And your third choice: Follow <color=#dbc291ff>De Wayne</color> from the Technology Division. Only those who are eager to break the rules and ambitious will follow him! As they are good at ancient languages, coding, and deciphering new languages, the division is also known as the Decryption Division. They have an external mercenary squad at their disposal, and their technical capabilities are exceptional. Yet, the other divisions still call them the <color=#dbc291ff>Mavericks</color>."

C: 再睁开眼时，你被绑在椅子上——那女士正在你面前，她举着一把手术刀。你不知道这位女杀手的名字。她把食指放在唇间，你读出暗语——「你的死也是必要的一环…因为这里需要…『骚乱』。」
E: When you open your eyes again, you find yourself being tied to a chair. The woman stands before you with a scalpel in her hand. You do not know the name of your assailant. As she places her index finger on her lips, you read the secret message aloud, "Your death is a crucial part of the plan... This place requires a little bit of... 'Chaos.'"

C: 她没有回应。
E: She doesn't respond.

C: 智械。
E: An Intellitron.

C: 改变现有的认知。
E: Change their existing ideas.

C: 太无聊了。
E: Bo—ring.

C: 你打开展柜，翻出两台可以互相吐唾沫的电视机，可它们的唾沫星子都在屏幕里，所以永远都到不了对方脸上。这是你最得意的发明之一，它能让来到这里参观的商人竞相露出鄙夷的神情。
E: Opening the display cabinet, you find two televisions that can spit at each other. They can only spit onto their screens, meaning the spit never goes into the other's face. This is among your proudest inventions, and it leaves visiting merchants with a look of utter disdain on their faces.

C: 现在，你可以回答这个问题了，你是谁？
E: Now then, can you please answer this question? Who are you?

C: 你坐下来，惬意享受着星云的燃烧，弹起毁灭的钢琴曲。
E: You sit down, savoring the burning of the nebula as you strum a threnody of destruction.

C: 行星燃烧的光焰在星空中闪烁，招引来趋光的虫裔们，环形的信息素分布为它们引导出螺旋式的行军路线，遮蔽天空的甲壳代替了云翳，为地表投下阴影。
E: The radiance of the scorching planet flickered in the starry night sky, drawing the bugs to its light. The donut-shaped pheromone distribution guided them into a spiral marching route, and the shell blotted out the sky, casting a shadow on the surface of the planet.

C: 这样的手段无法改变群体的流动，就像是入海的河流，膨胀的红巨星，一旦开始便再难阻止。
E: This method cannot change the flow of the collective, much like a river leading to sea or an expanding red giant — what has begun cannot be so easily stopped.

C: 死亡的命运不可遏挡。
E: Death is my inevitable fate.

C: 我信仰您。
E: I have faith in you.

C: 「你只要做一件事：当地时间七月五日上午十点，在白鸽广场喷泉处投下一枚五分硬币，然后爬到钟楼顶静静欣赏就可以了。」
E: "There is only one thing you need to do: At <unbreak>10</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak> local time on the fifth of July, throw a five-piece coin into the Dove Plaza fountain. Then, climb to the top of the clock tower and enjoy the view."

C: 这就是你被邀请参加会议的原因？你没明白，一块布料是如何与「永久性地解决能源危机」扯上关系的。
E: Is this why you were invited to join the talk? You can't grasp how a cloth could be related to "permanently resolving the energy crisis."

C: 被学士们占据的伊斯梅尔，博识学会和学士的和谈遥遥无期。前者试图训诫后者，学士因学会而辉煌。后者则竭力向前者证明，学会的辉煌正出于学士。
E: Izmael is held by the scholars, and the discussion between them and the Guild goes on without a foreseeable end. The latter is doing all they can to reprimand the former, saying that they only obtain glory because of the Guild. The former contrarily is doing all they can to show that the supposed glory of the Guild is solely derived from the scholars themselves.

C: 她看到一片花海，盛开在无机物上的，有机生命的花朵。高大的倒三角墓碑屹立于中央，轮廓残破。建造者独自将坟场中的金属堆砌，一点点地打造成眼前的墓碑。
E: She sees a vast field of flowers. Organic floral life is blooming atop the inorganic. In the center, a gigantic upside-down triangular tombstone looms, casting a silhouette of disrepair. The constructor piled up all the metal in the graveyard alone, creating the tombstones you see before you bit by bit.

C: 「…我现在才明白，这才是学会想要虚构史学家藏起来的东西。」
E: "...It is only now that I realize... this is what the Guild wants History Fictionologists to conceal."

C: 「如果我连通鲁珀特二世留下的所有『权杖』进行思考，就像那位帕提维娅……创造出一个<color=#dbc291ff>知识奇点</color>呢？我是说，既然祂如你说的那般，要将宇宙限定在完美的枷锁里，又何必准许帝皇造出那些用于思考的『天体神经元』…那些『权杖』，准许他跨出知识的圆圈？」
E: "If I connect to all the Scepters that Rubert II left behind and start to think, just like how that Patavia... How she created a <color=#dbc291ff>Knowledge Singularity</color>? What I'm saying is, if THEY are going to confine the universe within the fetters of perfection as you claim, why would the emperor have been allowed to create those 'Celestial-Body Neurons' used for thought... Did those Scepters allow him to step beyond the circle of knowledge?"

C: 数百米高的巨大铁人踏碎了模拟宇宙的天空球，一只脚踏起了山摇地动。筑城者用巨大的扩音器高喊，「虚假的壁垒，亦是琥珀王对我的试炼！」
E: An iron giant hundreds of meters tall crushes the Simulated Universe's skybox, each step sending shockwaves across the ground. Through the loudspeaker, the Architects bellow: "The false bastion is a trial meted unto me by the Amber Lord!"

C: 无数个角落里，数据如暴雨和狂风钻出：厄兆先锋的铃声，悲悼伶人的哭泣，焚化工点燃喷火器的热浪——它们只是这个宇宙中安分守己的代码，但在这一刻却一齐涌现。
E: From countless corners, data erupts like torrential rain and howling winds: The chime of the Omen Vanguards, the sorrowful wails of the Mourning Actors, and the scorching heat from The Cremators' flamethrowers — these were just compliant lines of code within this universe, but at this moment, they all surge forth.

C: 他们都离开了。
E: They have all left.

C: 我们有意为模拟宇宙项目提供支持，并希望能购买与公司相关的推演数据。
E: We'd like to support the Simulated Universe project and purchase the derivation data related to the IPC.

C: 他们愿意掏钱，我没阻止的理由。这事很有趣，我答应了。加油收集公司秘闻吧。
E: Since they're willing to pay for it, I see no reason to stop. This is an interesting proposal, so I'll say yes. Do your best and keep collecting IPC secrets.

C: 在你探索的时候，我产生了一个想法，然后马上去做了：等着也是等着，我决定和这位小跟班分享模拟宇宙的见闻。
E: An idea hit me while you were exploring, so I immediately went for it. I decided to share my insights about the Simulated Universe with my sidekick here while I waited for you.

C: 所以这骰子是个智械？
E: So, this die is an Intellitron?

C: 你获得了一些宇宙碎片。
E: You have obtained some Cosmic Fragments.

C: 在废弃星系的古城，你遇到了一群远古的渴血巨兽。热气腾腾的喘息声拂到你的脸上……
E: You encounter a group of ancient bloodthirsty behemoths in an ancient city of an abandoned star system. Their hot, steamy breaths brush against your face...

C: 你获得了一个*完美*的「黏土玩偶」！
E: You've won a *perfect* clay doll!

C: 他非常开心！你终于领略到他用尽一生所推动的事业——令众人都能理解集成式交换咕咕钟的快乐！
E: He is over the moon! You finally comprehend the great work he spent his life setting into motion - The great work of making everyone understand the joy of ensembled tradeable cuckoo clocks!

C: 「我已经遗忘*自我*了。很快，我就要扬升登神！」机械咕母一边理着头发，一边骄傲地说，星球碎片变成它耳上的碎钻闪闪发光，它准备好*一飞冲天*。
E: "I've already forgotten my *self*. Soon, I'll ascend to become a god!" Screwllita declares proudly as they fix their hair, as fragments of planets turn into glittering diamonds on their ears. They are ready to soar into the sky.

C: 老人微笑着向你道别，宛如道别一位许久未见的朋友。
E: The old man waves goodbye to you with a smile, as if you were long-lost friends.

C: 快！让他再讲个笑话！
E: Get him to tell another joke! Quickly!

C: 留得键盘在，不怕没代码敲。作为朋克洛德第一精致的骇客，你显然不会被这些蝇头小利蒙蔽双眼。
E: There is always more code to be written as long as you still have your keyboard. As the most exceptional hacker in Punklorde, these trivial gains clearly won't sway your resolve.

C: 这伙妖人宣称自己是天生神力，从未染指寿瘟——能先把背后的丹炉藏起来吗？
E: This sorcerer claims to be born with the power of gods and has never been touched by the plague. He could at least hide the elixir crucible on his back first.

C: 什么也没有发生。
E: Nothing happens.

C: 那是一只以人类和牲畜为食的怪物，趁它尚在沉睡，你一跃而起，刺瞎它的眼睛。
E: That is a monster that feeds on both humans and livestock. As it slumbers, you lunge forward and pierce it in its eye.

C: 纷争的种子已长成参天大树，就连瑟希斯的学者，也懂得征战的知识。从尼卡多利的身姿映入世人眼帘的那一刻起，便再也无法停息。
E: The seeds of strife had blossomed into a giant tree, with even the scholars of Cerces learning the knowledge of warfare. From the moment Nikador's imposing form was seen by the people, the unrest never ceased.

C: 塞纳托斯撕裂了大地，令无数生灵被吞没。尼卡多利带来了纷争，让人子们自相残杀。伟岸的全世之座在大地上徘徊，终究因悲伤流下了血泪。
E: Thanatos ripped the earth asunder, swallowing countless souls. Nikador sowed discord, prompting the children of humanity to turn on one another. The majestic Throne of Worlds, wandering in sorrow, wept bloody tears.

C: 是引渡死者的船。
E: The ferry of the dead.

C: 众神相聚一堂的过去已成往昔。再回首，不免叫人以为，这都是诗人们的杜撰而已。
E: The gatherings of the gods are now distant memories. Looking back, one might dismiss them as nothing more than the fanciful tales of poets.

C: 瞧，昏昏沉沉的法吉娜仍在歌唱，浪花是它醉后的笑声，漩涡是它轻盈的舞蹈。
E: Look, the dazed Phagousa is still singing. The waves are their drunken laughter, and the whirlpools their graceful dance.

C: 若不是众多英雄在海上来来往往，谁知道它们会怎样兴风作浪。
E: If not for the many heroes traveling the seas, who knows how these creatures would wreak havoc?

C: 你的头罩被粗暴地扯下，映入眼帘的是恢宏的环形竞技场、躁动的观众、以及一地的尸体，你立即意识到自己危险的处境，但好消息是你还活着。
E: Your hood is yanked off, and in an instant, your senses are assaulted — a grand circular arena, a frenzied crowd, and corpses strewn across the bloodstained sand. Your instincts scream danger, but at least there's one silver lining — you're still breathing.

C: 「我能感受到智慧已经汇聚在天平的一侧，待天平归正之时，我会再次找到你。」修士微微一笑，转身离开。
E: "I can already sense wisdom gathering at one end of the scale. When the balance is restored, I will return to you." With a faint smile, the friar turns and walks away.

C: 人类不能有点主观能动性吗？
E: Can't humans be more proactive?

C: 当时悬锋城准备吞并邻国小城，欧洛尼斯降下神谕，宣布了出征的失败。悬锋将军也会死于清泉关的隘口，死因是落马坠崖。
E: At that time, Castrum Kremnos prepared to annex its neighboring smaller city. Oronyx delivered a divine decree, foretelling the campaign's failure, and declaring the general of Kremnos would meet his end at Clearspring Gorge's narrow pass, doomed to fall from his steed to the cliffs below.

C: 关于欧洛尼斯的沉默，祭祀和学者争论不休，一种说法是欧洛尼斯在过去颁布了太多预言，透支了自己的神力，等它休养生息完毕，便能再次开口。
E: Priests and scholars argue endlessly regarding Oronyx's silence. One hypothesis claims Oronyx exhausted their divine power by delivering too many prophecies in the past, and that once restored, their voice will return.

C: 那天，所有人抬头就能看到一颗硕大的飞星。飞星所经之处，巨树漂浮空中，河水倒灌农田，城内偷盗横行。
E: That day, all who looked up saw a colossal shooting star. Where it passed, giant trees floated midair, rivers flooded fields, and theft ran rampant through cities.

C: 最后连尼卡多利都拔出长矛，抵着扎格列斯的喉咙，逼它交出了天平。
E: Even Nikador finally drew their spear, pressing it to Zagreus' throat until the scales were surrendered.

C: 这场小小争端还带来一个后果，那便是陆上的动物们一旦遇到暴雨，便纷纷放弃觅食和休憩，四处寻找避雨处。
E: This small dispute had another consequence: Whenever heavy rain came, the land animals would give up hunting and resting, scattering in all directions in search of shelter from the rain.

C: 可是天上没有泥土，艾格勒也没有耐心，它只能随便揉捏一团团气，造出了一朵朵不规则的云。
E: But the sky was devoid of mud, and Aquila was hollow of patience, so they could only knead balls of air to create irregular clouds.

C: 反之，如果他们将麦田里的食物全部吃掉，即使身为刻法勒的造物，人类也将就此灭绝。
E: On the contrary, if they devoured all the food in the wheat field, humanity would face extinction, even though they were Kephale's creation.

C: 有始须有终。
E: There's a beginning, and there must be an ending.

C: 然而，圣树却渗出金黄的汁液，将羽翼们包裹其中。墨涅塔的蝴蝶飘落在地，被落叶和泥沙遮蔽，层层叠叠，至坠地心。
E: However, the Sacred Tree exuded golden sap, encasing the wings within it. Mnestia's butterflies fell to the ground, covered by fallen leaves and sand, layer upon layer, until they sank to the core of the earth.

C: 赞美阳光！
E: Praise the sun!

C: 艾格勒盘旋于天幕，听到身下传来芸芸众生的哀求，不免心生恻隐。于是它便缓缓闭上一对眼眸。
E: Aquila circled across the sky, hearing the countless pleas rising from below. Moved by a tinge of compassion, they slowly closed one pair of eyes.

C: 毫无意外。
E: Well, that's no surprise.

C: 餐点正在为您派送中，请您耐心等候。派送中…派送中…派送成功，「空间站高级科员专享至臻套餐」已发放，祝您用餐愉快。
E: Delivery in progress. Please be patient while the meal is being delivered to you. Delivery successful. The "Senior Researcher Exclusive — Supreme Meal Package" has been delivered. Enjoy your meal.

C: 下一版我改…嗯，一定改……
E: I'll revise that part in the next version... I'll definitely revise it...

C: 播放这首《危机预知》。
E: You decide to play that song: "Crises."

C: 啊停停停！别伤害我！要是喝了这个，空间站就会缺少一株正直善良并拥有独立思考意识的植物啦！
E: Ah, stop stop stop! Don't hurt me! If I drink this, the space station will no longer have an honest, kind, and conscious plant!

C: 空间站真是鱼龙混杂，听说机械贵族螺丝咕姆过阵子要来访问这里哩。
E: This space station really is a mixed bag. I heard the mech aristocrat Screwllum is going to pay us a visit soon.

C: 你有什么事情…吗？
E: How... can I help you?

C: 里面是什么？
E: What's inside?

C: 平平无奇的小机器人，为空间站提供着平平无奇的生活服务。
E: A very ordinary little robot providing very ordinary life services aboard the space station.

C: 呃是的…就跟你刚刚一样。
E: Uh, yeah... Like you just did right now.

C: 它们判令你有罪；它们决心以哲人的法律处决你，逼迫你饮下面前的毒药…它们乐于见证你的陨落，见证有机生命的陨落，见证哲学家联合与理性的陨落！
E: They convict and punish you according to the law of Philosophers, forcing you to drink the poison before you... They are happy to witness your death and the demise of organic lifeforms, the Philosopher Union, and rationality!

C: 「是时候结束这一切了…」你正想提笔，却见虚卒如浪潮般破门而入。
E: "It's time to end this..." As you are about to pick up your pen, hoards of Voidrangers break down the doors and pour into the hall.

C: 尽管如此，它却不知因何故保持着四百纪之前的崭新面貌。这一谜题实在令你抓心挠肝…你可是资深的武装考古学派专家！解开一切历史谜题就是你的志愿！
E: Despite its age, it mysteriously appears as if brand-new, just as how it would have looked four hundred AEs ago. You are confounded by this enigma... You are a seasoned Armed Archaeologist! You long to unravel all historical mysteries!

C: 哼哼，追得上吗？
E: Heh, can you even catch up?

C: 家人，别卷了…
E: Please stop that, my brethren...

C: 不要靠近…不要靠近我……
E: Venture no closer... to me...

C: 其他熟人呢？
E: Where are the others?

C: （感觉有点可怕…不知道以后还会不会在这里遇到他。）
E: (This is all getting creepy... I wonder if I'll run into him again.)

C: 好、好可怕！
E: S—Scary!

C: ——但还不至于让你忘记自己此行的目的：贪婪的开拓者，不惜跟矿工和流浪者抢夺饭碗，只为了搞些零花钱。
E: But it's not enough to make you forget your goal. You are the greedy Trailblazer who is taking jobs away from miners and vagrants, so long as it makes you some pocket money.

C: 不敢相信…
E: Doesn't seem real...

C: 唔，<unbreak>3000</unbreak>…倒也说不上多贵。
E: Oh, <unbreak>3000</unbreak>... That's not too expensive.

C: 也包括现在这个选择吗？
E: Does that also include this choice right now?

C: 鼹鼠党，解散！各回各家睡大觉！
E: Moles dismissed! Sleep well and see you tomorrow!

C: 于是，你闭口不作声，决心在小巷的阴影中继续潜伏……
E: And so, you remain silent, having decided to remain hidden in the darkness of the alley.

C: 「我去看过了，」男人的声音有些沙哑，「<unbreak>237</unbreak>号房间里什么都没有。他应该只是太无聊了，想引起我们注意，才故意把自己弄成那个样子……」
E: "I took a look there." The man says with a slightly hoarse voice. "There's nothing in Room <unbreak>237</unbreak>. The boy must just be bored and want us to pay attention to him. He's acting like that on purpose..."

C: 可以吗？
E: Is that alright?

C: 冠军也有我的三分之一。
E: Sounds like one-third of that win belongs to me.

C: 一株蘑菇？
E: A mushroom?

C: 这座塑像正庇护着一小片鸟巢，鸟巢的周边做了装饰，显然经常有人照料。但鸟巢的主人已不知去向。
E: This statue is sheltering a small bird's nest, with decorations around it. It looks well taken care of. However, the owner of the nest is nowhere to be found.

C: 这座塑像旁放着一本半掩的卷轴。或许在树庭尚且热闹时，学生们会聚在它的身边读书、学习，交换知识与思考。
E: There's a half-opened scrolled by this statue. Perhaps, when the Grove was still bustling, students would gather around it to read, learn and exchange knowledge and ideas.

C: 你是真正的抗争者。这是你自己赢来的。
E: You are a truly defiant soul. You have earned this prize.

C: 大家都躲好了吗？我要来抓你们了哦！
E: Ready or not, here I come!

C: 荣誉队员，如果你不会玩捉迷藏，可以向我请教！虎克是不会嫌弃你笨的！
E: Honorary member, if you don't know how to play hide-and-seek, just ask me! I won't laugh at you for it.

C: <size=36>……</size>
E: <size=36>...</size>

C: 今天就先到这里——我们下次再一起玩吧！鼹鼠党，解散！各回各家睡大觉咯！
E: Time to call it a day. Let's play again next time! The Moles, dismissed! Go home and get some sleep!

C: 哈哈！这下可糟糕咯。
E: Haha! This isn't going to end well.

C: 一小时、两小时…你从没想过下层区竟然有这么多居民！他们支付信用点，满怀感激或敬意，又或是纯粹来凑热闹，排队捧起你的手，视之若珍宝，反复摩挲……
E: One hour, two hours... You had no idea there were so many people who lived in the Underworld! They paid in credit and came up to shake your hand, either due to being grateful, respectful, or just there to join the excitement. They viewed it as a rare opportunity and continually patted your hand...

C: 一块拳头大小的地髓结晶落在你的脚边。它的形状近似正十二面体，颜色橙红剔透，核芯周围甚至还反射出几抹靛蓝。
E: A Geomarrow crystal the size of a fist falls next to your feet. It has a shape similar to a dodecahedron, with a clear, orange-red color. There are even some shocks of indigo that radiate from the core of the stone.

C: 痛快！我就喜欢跟你这种人做生意。来吧，一手交货，一手交钱。
E: Delightful! I love doing business with people like you. Come on then. You take the money, and I take the goods.

C: 最终，不得不僵持在路途的中央。
E: In the end, I am left stranded in the middle of the journey.

C: 我…我还行！
E: I... I got this!

C: 给我也来一口。
E: Gimme a sip, too.

C: …那个，要是不嫌弃的话，我请你一杯仙人快乐茶？
E: ...Well. If you don't mind, I can treat you to a glass of Immortal's Delight.

C: 来呀，你来嘛，快来嘛……
E: Come on over. Hurry up...

C: 先别纠结这些事儿啦，走吧，走吧，我们赶紧开溜。
E: Don't get so hung up on that stuff. Let's go, let's go. We better scram.

C: 真没有发现，还以为你是周边。
E: No really. I thought you were a piece of merchandise.

C: 行，是我失误了，你接着提第二个问题吧。
E: Alright, I made a mistake. Let's move on to the second question.

C: 只说假话的鸟。
E: A cycrane that only tells lies.

C: 暴饮暴食、与人打赌、或者欣赏戏曲…统统都没意思，但我已经不再想用你们人类的娱乐观念来规范自己了。
E: Pigging out, gambling, or attending a show... It's all a snorefest to me. I'm not going to bother using human concepts of entertainment to amuse myself any longer.

C: 既然是赌输了…拿着吧，这是我给你的一点奖励，再见！
E: Seeing as I lost the bet... Take this. It's a prize for you — so long!

C: 哎哟喂！
E: Ouch!

C: 我的内存要满了，系统运行…有点…困难难难难……
E: My memory is full, and the system is a little... s—s—slow...

C: 问的好啊，也许我们俩是同道中人。
E: That's a great question. Perhaps we have the same hobbies.

C: 我只是路过而已，没想去找你？
E: I'm just passing by, so nope — not looking for you actually.

C: 从大资本家的角度来看，你回答的可能没有错。
E: From the capitalist's perspective, your answer might not be wrong.

C: 夕葵面上挂着冷酷的微笑，向岩明走去。
E: With a grimace, Xikui strides on over to Yanming.

C: 我就喝一口。
E: A sip.

C: 这是鹤运物流准备的谢礼，感谢我们的「机巧鸟捕手」为我们提供的帮助。
E: Here's a thank-you gift from the Heron Express for being our ace cycrane catcher.

C: 力场状况如何？引擎是否就绪？
E: How's the status of the force field? Engines ready?

C: 我向吾主起誓，再休息一刻钟，就一定去打听多目盲者的秘密。忽然间就电闪雷鸣，劈在了跟前的石柱上！
E: I swore to my master that after just one more quint of rest, I would go and investigate the secrets of the many-eyed blind one. And suddenly, lightning flashed, striking the stone pillar right in front of me!

C: 谁把我活干了？
E: Who stole my task?

C: 森森在你和雷力的肢体关节处贴上了符纸，符箓上光纹流转，以相同的频率闪动着。
E: Sensen attaches some talismans to the joints of both your and Leili's limbs, and the talismans glow with shimmering patterns and pulse at the same frequency.

C: 什么？！你竟然真的拥有六个崇高道德的赞许……
E: What!? You actually have six Praises of High Morals...

C: （刚才发生了什么事？炸弹爆炸了吗？）
E: (What happened? Did the bomb go off?)

C: 也是，你明明就是个化外民，怎么可能是你…也怪我，刚刚没动脑子。
E: Also, you are clearly an Outworlder. How could it be you... I guess it's my fault for assuming earlier.

C: 你的…粉丝？
E: Your... your fans?

C: 看什么看，没看过现充啊？！
E: What are you looking at? Never seen anyone living a fulfilling life before?

C: 哈努兄弟主题的密室逃脱店，可以提供风味十足的换装服务。开业时间尚不确定。
E: The Hanu-themed escape room offers stylish dress-up services. The opening hours have not yet been set.

C: 还在播放动画片的老旧电视，黯淡的橱窗里写满了物是人非。
E: There is an old television that is still playing cartoons. The dark, dim window makes it clear that no one has been here for some time.

C: 必须抓紧机会反攻匹诺康尼，不是他们死，就是我们亡！
E: We need to seize the moment and counterattack Penacony. At this point, it's either their death or ours!

C: 但我们的钱从哪来？
E: But where will we get money?

C: 你懒散地瘫倒在沙发上，享受起人生的片刻清闲。
E: You lounge lazily on the sofa, basking in the idyllic moments of life.

C: 大剧院如同青色的茧房，悬于梦中遥远的天空。可即便「同谐」的蝴蝶终将飞渡银河，人世间的一切纷争便能止息了么？
E: The Grand Theater hangs like a cyan-colored cocoon, suspended in the distant sky of dreams. But even if the Harmony's butterflies finally fly across the cosmos, will the conflict of humanity cease?

C: 螺丝星的技术…
E: Planet Screwllum's technology...

C: 噢，我就说这情节很熟悉。
E: Ah, no wonder I found the narrative familiar.

C: 恐怕，太晚了。
E: I fear... it's too late.

C: 你为了阻止女人继续投币，冲上前去攥住了她的双手。她大声呼喊，终于引来了地衡司的执事。
E: You rush forward and grab both her hands to prevent her from tossing the coin. She cries out and makes a scene — attracting the attention of officers from the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 呜，好好喝…可是…可是帕姆看到它的配料表上……
E: Ooh, delicious... but... I just saw its ingredients and...

C: 糟糕，完全忘记后面应该讲什么了帕！！
E: Drats. Pom-Pom completely blanked on what comes after!

C: （将没莓果汁配方交给帕姆）
E: (Hand over the No-Berry Juice recipe to Pom-Pom)

C: （稍微多增加几厘米）
E: (Slightly add a couple of extra centimeters)

C: 制定中，现在是意见收集阶段。
E: It's a work in progress that's currently in the consultation stage.

C: 怎么办？凉拌！
E: What are we gonna do? Go and ask the crew!

C: 诶？这样就可以缓解吗？帕姆还以为要吃药呢！
E: Eh? Is that enough to make the pain go away? I thought I would need some medications!

C: 总之辛苦{NICKNAME}乘客替帕姆询问医生了，之后的事情…就交给帕姆自己吧！希望可以早点康复帕……
E: Anyway, I really appreciate your help, {NICKNAME}. I'll take it from here! Hopefully, I'll recover soon...

C: 有什么好笑的！
E: What's so funny?

C: …怎么回事？你在干吗？
E: ...What's going on? What are you doing?

C: 唔，这次就算了，下次可不能这么调皮了，记住了帕？
E: I'll forgive you this time. Can you promise me you won't pull this off again?

C: 现在的灯光真的太沉闷了吗…得找个人问问才行帕！
E: The lights around here seem a little dull... I should consult someone on this!

C: 绚烂的灯光以及频繁的闪烁突如其来，整个列车仿佛变成了舞厅。
E: Various rays of flickering light in vibrant colors take over the Express and turn it into a nightclub.

C: 我说不是吧…
E: I don't think so...

C: 我想借小机器人…
E: I want to borrow some little robots...

C: 瓦尔特乘客以前是位动画师，他好像对自己的作品十分自豪帕。闲着的时候，也会主动使用「拟态」能力复现出来播给大家看。
E: Welt used to be an animator, and he seems to be very proud of his work. Whenever things got slow and everyone had some downtime, Welt would use his "mimicry" ability to re-broadcast his show for everyone.

C: 像三月乘客那样要求提供无限畅饮的果汁，这种事情自然也难不倒我。
E: A request for "unlimited juice" — put forward by passenger March — does not even pose the slightest challenge for a conductor such as myself.

C: 有些日子，帕姆为他送去餐点时，他似乎都做了不愉快的梦，偶尔还会被帕姆惊醒。
E: Some days, when I went to bring him his meal, it seemed that he was having bad dreams. Sometimes I even wake him up.

C: 列兵，出阵！
E: Troops, assemble!

C: {NICKNAME}教官！真没想到，我们这么快又见面了！
E: Drillmaster {NICKNAME}! I never thought we'd be meeting again so soon!

C: 唷，又见面了，{NICKNAME}！我就知道，你这热心肠的家伙肯定不会袖手旁观的。
E: Here we are again, {NICKNAME}! I knew someone as kind as you wouldn't watch the trouble from the sidelines.

C: 干得好，{NICKNAME}！在你的帮助下，咱们又拿下一场大胜！
E: Awesome, {NICKNAME}! We've achieved another great victory with your help!

C: 你是贝洛伯格某望族旁系第二十三代正统继承人；你天生丽质——秀发如彩霞，挥泪即珍珠；你家境殷实——卧榻逾半亩，出恭须驾车……
E: You are the <unbreak>23</unbreak>rd generation and rightful heir of a certain famous Belobog family. You are beautiful — your hair spreads as rosy clouds and even the tears you cry seem like pearls. You are wealthy — you're waited on hand and foot and given the best in life...

C: 您放心！我们「正当权益会社」向来使命必达！
E: Don't worry. The Rightful Rights Society always comes through!

C: 听我口令！三、二——
E: On my signal... One, two...

C: 出剪刀！
E: Scissors!

C: 先随便出一个，然后再换手！
E: Distract and switch!

C: 确实黑暗！
E: Dark, indeed!

C: 好了，时候不早了——玛丽，汤姆，戴维，我们回诊所吧！
E: Okay, it's getting late. Mary, Tom, and David, we should get back to the clinic.

C: 黑暗拳斗大师
E: Master of the Dark Fist

C: 今天弟兄们就要让你知道，破坏禁区公物要付出什么代价！给我上！
E: We'll show you the price to pay for damaging public property in the restricted zone! Get 'em!

C: 居然以破坏公物为乐…该死！我怎么会输给这种人……
E: How I can lose to someone who relishes in the destruction of public property?

C: 没有那个镀金的、健美的、昂扬的大拇指人像，你就不能做坏事！明白吗？
E: Without that proud-looking, gold-plated, thumb-sized bodybuilder figurine, you can't do anything bad! Got it?

C: 一阵尖锐的叫骂声从下水道中传来。
E: Angry curses are heard coming from the sewers below.

C: 井盖会说话？！
E: The manhole cover can talk now!?

C: ——「受死吧，宾馆恶魔！」
E: "Die! You hotel devil!"

C: 你、你不要得寸进尺！
E: You—you're asking too much!

C: 转动星球仪，复兴地理学！
E: Spin the globe. Revive geography!

C: 当然，这个古董星球仪上没有直接标识出「贝洛伯格」几个大字——你之所以能找到它的确切位置，全凭此前在列车上看到的雅利洛-Ⅵ全景资料。
E: Of course, "Belobog" is not inscribed anywhere on the surface of this antique armillary sphere. The only reason you can pinpoint its exact location is that you've once seen Jarilo-VI's panoramic view on the Express.

C: 你的右脑开始飞速运转，形成一幅图像。你仿佛看到了高耸的山峰插入云霄，从尚未被白雪覆盖的山崖向远处眺望，好一番恢弘壮阔的景象。
E: Your right cerebral hemisphere is now running at full speed, conjuring up a vision where you seem to catch a glimpse of cloud-piercing summits and a breathtaking view on top of a mountain ridge that is yet to be covered by snow.

C: 那么，你认为自己是哪一种人呢？
E: So then, which kind of person are you?

C: 五五计数法。
E: Count in fives.

C: 你摸出一枚本地硬币，掷入空中，同时心中默默许愿。愿望许完，硬币已经沉入泉水，成为无数反光物中平平无奇的一员了。
E: You pull out a local coin and make a wish as it flips through the air. Afterwards, the coin sinks down into the water, becoming just another unremarkable reflection among all the others.

C: 裂界中一片死寂。粘滞的空气几乎在这座废弃电话亭的周围结成了块状，你感觉自己像被淹没在融化过程中的棉花糖里，喘不上气来。
E: All's quiet in the Fragmentum. You feel like you're drowning in gooey cotton candy in the stagnant air that seems to congeal around the phone booth.

C: 所以，你打算怎么赔我？
E: So how are you gonna pay me back, then?

C: 罐中仙报以沉默。这种沉默可能是一种独属于它的幽默恶作剧，也可能只是一个单纯的掠食陷阱。
E: The Immortal in a Vase remains silent. The silence might be a prank, or it could simply be a predatory trap.

C: （把头探进去。）
E: (Stick your head in.)

C: 我带来的只是垃圾…
E: All I brought you was some trash...

C: 没关系，没关系…毕竟是我们有求于人，还得看你的时间安排。
E: No worries... After all, we were the one requesting help. We'll work around your time.

C: 没事，你慢慢考虑。
E: No problem. Take your time.

C: 我们毕竟是个秘密组织嘛。
E: Well, we're a secret society, after all.

C: 不发布个前瞻预告吗？
E: Aren't you going to post a preview?

C: 你的生活想必很不如意吧。
E: Your life must be very unhappy indeed.

C: 男人突然不再聒噪，仿佛一台播音器被突然拔掉了电源；他的表情和肢体也陷入僵直。
E: The man suddenly clams up, like a pair of headphones that just had its cable ripped out. His expression and body both stiffens up.

C: 一定有什么地方出错了——对，是游戏，一定是游戏本身的问题！
E: Something must have gone wrong — yeah, the game. Something must be wrong with the game itself!

C: 虽然不知道他们究竟用了什么手段，但肯定和那女…哦，差点忘了你。
E: I don't know what methods they used, but they must have involved that girl... Oh, I nearly forgot about you.

C: 嗯？还有什么事吗？想和我这个「疯子」把酒言欢？
E: Well? Anything else? Would you like to drink, chat, and be merry with a "madman" like me?

C: 可千万小心别被那家伙缠上，哈哈。
E: Be careful not to get tangled up with that guy, haha.

C: 皮皮西安静地望向你，神色柔和——你知道那是M。
E: The Pepeshi watches you quietly, with a gentle look — you know that is M.

C: 这工作听上去很辛苦。
E: This sounds like hard work.

C: 是啊…确实很辛苦，但同时也很快乐。
E: Yeah... It really is hard work, but it's also lots of fun.

C: 我平时就在这里当班，如果有需要，您可以随时来找我。
E: I'm normally on shift here. Come find me anytime you need something.

C: 但即便如此，我们也是爱着彼此的…我们姐妹之间的联系牢不可破。她<color=#f29e38ff>永远都是我最重要的妹妹</color>。
E: But even so, we also love each other... Our sisterly bond is unbreakable. She will <color=#f29e38ff>always be my sister and the most important person to me</color>.

C: 眼前的奎茵看起来分外平静，你却莫名能够感受到她心中的愤怒。
E: Quinn may look extremely calm, but you can feel a kind of rage deep in her heart.

C: 要知道，事件视界之外也是有引力的，而且越靠近中心、引力就越强。我那艘船的发动机不是尖货，没法保证取到信标后还能出来……
E: Y'know what, there is gravity outside the event horizon, and it gets stronger the closer you get to the center. My ship's engine wasn't the best, and there was no guarantee that we could even get out once we'd nabbed the beacon...

C: 我想要听听你的经历。
E: I'd like to hear about your experiences.

C: 就在我聚精会神、眼观六路的时候，一个张牙舞爪的外星人忽然飘到了驾驶窗前……
E: Just as I was focusing all my attentions on the six directions around me, the snarling teeth and claws of this alien suddenly floated into sight...

C: 谁说不是呢？但即便这样豪华的阵容， 也远远称不上胜券在握。
E: Who said it wasn't? But even with such a luxuriant lineup, victory was far from guaranteed.

C: 哪怕认错了，她也必须出来接受调查！
E: Even so, she must still submit to our investigations!

C: 我的钱什么时候付？
E: When am I going to get paid?

C: 怎么突然开始念诗了？
E: Why are you waxing poetic all of a sudden?

C: 这个故事我已经听过了。
E: I have heard of this story.

C: 「新伦蒂尼恩的居民们，过去一年来大家都做得不错，公司效益取得了显著提高，环保工作也向前迈了一大步。」
E: "Citizens of New Londinium, all of you have been performing well for the past year. IPC's efficiency has also improved tremendously, a big step forward for environmental protection."

C: 等到发现实力差距时，对面已经俘虏了我的全部船员，正在挨个房间搜查漏网之鱼。
E: By then, the guards had already captured all my crew members and were going from room to room hunting down escapees.

C: 呃…朋克洛德最有名的虚拟现实应用开发商之一，奇迹本杰明？听说过吧？没有？
E: Um... Miracle Benjamin, one of the most famous virtual reality application developers in Punklorde? You must have heard of that name! No?

C: 给我讲讲「奇迹本杰明工作室」。
E: Tell me about "Miracle Benjamin Studio."

C: 多谢你，伙计。要是没有你帮上这一手，我怕是等到城区交付的那天都要被蒙在鼓里。这些代币你拿去吧，不用客气！
E: Thank you so much, buddy. If it weren't for your help, I might have been kept in the dark until the day I delivered the project. Please keep these tokens of my appreciation.

C: 可笑我当时竟真中了他的圈套，满心愧疚与惶恐无从宣泄，只好借苏乐达……
E: Foolishly, I fell for his trick at that time. As I had no other means to vent my guilt and fear, I sought solace in SoulGlad...

C: 电视新闻？
E: The TV news?

C: 你该感到荣幸才对，可不是人人都有机会在老艾默里奇面前表现自己。
E: You should be honored. Not everyone gets a chance to impress ol' Emmrich.

C: 一般人会是这个反应吗…
E: Is that how a normal woman would react...?

C: ——唉，真是和我当年一样啊。
E: ...They are just like how I used to be back in the day.
Huh!?

C: 这还差不多，算你识相！
E: That's more like it! You know how to read the room!

C: 希望他们能做好心理准备——选择一条崎岖的路，就要面临更多的挫折与苦难。
E: I hope they have mentally prepared themselves. They're bound to face more setbacks and hardship when they choose a path less traveled.

C: 这…拉洛丝，你怎么突然害怕起这种事情了。你之前想唱「纯美之歌」的时候，不是说自己不怕争议吗？为了实现梦想，你可不能这么胆小啊……
E: But... Larose, since when did you start to let those things hold you back? Didn't you say you weren't worried about controversies when you asked to perform the "Song of Beauty"? You can't be so timid if you want to realize your dream...

C: 为了走上更大的舞台，我必须唱自己厌恶的歌曲，做自己不想做的事，对没品位的观众承欢献媚…这样的折磨还要到底还要持续多久？
E: How much longer do I have to sing songs I hate, do things I have no interest in, and cater to an audience with no taste... just to make it to the big stage?

C: 是的，我是全宇宙最差劲的警探。
E: Yes, and I'm the worst kind in the entire universe.

C: 我以前在这里尝试过几次，都成功了。但就像你说的，最后不外乎是回到现实、再做几轮噩梦罢了。
E: I've tried it many times here and succeeded. But just like what you said, the worst that happened was returning to reality and having several more rounds of nightmares.

C: 自从发生那件事后，每当我凝望夜空，眼前都会浮现出那孩子的脸。
E: After that incident happened, I kept seeing the girl's face whenever I stared into the night sky.

C: 为了不看清她的脸，我每天都要用酒精灌醉自己。一旦停下，窒息感便会再次包裹我。
E: To avoid seeing her face, I got real familiar with the bottle. The suffocating feeling would envelop me again once I stopped.

C: 我以前在梦里尝试过几次跳楼，都成功了。但就像你说的，最后不外乎是回到现实、再做几轮噩梦罢了。
E: I've done it many times here and succeeded. But just like what you said, I only ended up returning to reality and having several nightmares.

C: 算了，我也不指望你能完全明白我的境遇！每当我面对业界的打压抵制还有忘恩负义的员工时，那种扑面而来的压力……
E: Forget it! I never expect you to fully understand my plight! The pressure of dealing with the boycott against me in the industry and my ungrateful employees is just too much sometimes...

C: 可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
E: Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?

C: 喏，你来尝尝——就连这{RUBY_B#苏乐达}气泡水{RUBY_E#}，它在匹诺康尼的口味都要比银河中的别处更加甜美！
E: Here, taste it. Even this {RUBY_B#SoulGlad}soda{RUBY_E#} tastes better in Penacony than other places across the cosmos!

C: 那座高耸的<color=#dbc291ff>酒店大楼</color>曾让我心潮澎湃，希望你把它拍完整些。
E: That <color=#dbc291ff>towering hotel</color> took my breath away. Please include every part of the building in the photos.

C: …如果当时我完成了使命，母星的情况会不会真能好转起来？
E: ...If I had been able to complete my mission back then, would the situation on my home planet have taken a turn for the better?

C: 你为什么在身上刻自己的名字？
E: Why did you carve your name into your body?

C: …我闻到了邪恶的味道…就在酒店深处——都给我消失吧！！！
E: ...I sense evil... deep inside the hotel... Away! Away, all of you!

C: 这才是聪明人。
E: That's a clever choice.

C: 派对瘾太大了？
E: Because you're addicted to partying?

C: 是吗，他们什么反应？
E: Is that so. How did they react?

C: 你好，亲爱的阿图罗小鸟，请允许我这样称呼你。我是猫头鹰老师，一只总是在关注小鸟们健康成长的老鸟。
E: Hello, my dearest fledgling Arturo. I hope you'll permit me to refer to you as such. I'm Professor Owl, an old bird who has been closely watching the growth and health of my fledglings.

C: 你也是…诶哟，我这老腰。
E: You too. *sigh* My back...

C: 满意离去。
E: Leave in satisfaction.

C: 最近情况怎么样？
E: How have things been lately?

C: 上次我们已经把他们的底牌逼了出来，这次看谁能笑到最后！
E: Last time we got them on the ropes, let's see who gets the last laugh this time!

C: 你居然不吃甜汤？异端！
E: Sour instead of sweet soup? Heresy!

C: 谢谢理解啾！我要去别的地方检查了啾！
E: Thanks for understanding, tweet! I'm off to patrol other areas now, tweet!

C: 我的坐骑啾，可以让我漂浮在这里…虽说这点小高度对我来说算不了什么！但是要保持长期滞空的话我的腿会受不了的。
E: My mount, tweet! It's what keeps me airborne here. Don't get me wrong, I can handle the height, but hovering for too long tires out my legs.

C: 人类应该不会介意我偷听的吧？人类好像没有这种规则啾……
E: Humans won't mind if I listen in, right? I don't think they have a rule against it, tweet.

C: 所以我们到底在排什么啾？
E: Tweet, what are we queuing for, actually?

C: 五指手臂。
E: A hand with five fingers.

C: 就它了。
E: This one.

C: 再想想。
E: Let's keep thinking.

C: 关于造物之柱的工程材料...

E: Huff... No, I mustn't be too loud. The fire burns fiercely, it will be gone before long...

C: 你意识到自己好像错过了些什么，在尚处于白昼的圣城奥赫玛。如果有机会的话，你或许可以回去再探索一番？
E: You realize you may have missed something back in the Holy City of Okhema, while it still bathed in daylight. If the opportunity arises, perhaps you could return and explore once more?
...Woof?

C: 请无关人员迅速离开，不要妨碍我们工作。
E: If you are an outsider, you should leave. Do not interfere with our work.

C: 你挫败绝灭大君阴谋的事迹我已了然，拥有如此非凡天赋的新人可不多见，这是你应得的东西。希望你在未来的人生中，也可以保持当时的英勇。
E: I heard how you destroyed the schemes of a Lord Ravager. It is rare for a youngster to have such outstanding talents, and you've earned this reward. I hope you retain the courage you showed at that moment throughout your life in the future.

C: 没有人能做到在经历那样一场灾难之后，还保持心情愉悦吧？
E: After such a disaster, who can be happy? Am I right?

C: 工作的定义是什么？是坐在实验桌前为了一个模糊的数据投入无尽的时间？还是为了一份绩效考核不断思考该如何完成一场非凡的演讲？
E: What should be counted as work? Is it sitting behind a desk all day, devoting all your life to some random pieces of ill-defined data? Or racking your brain, trying to come up with a way to deliver convincing arguments for the sake of a performance review?

C: 什么事呢……
E: What is it...

C: 我有一些问题想要问你…
E: I've got something to ask you.

C: 你也是年轻人，比我这种老头子说话更有感染力。你要是有空，也去劝劝我那个傻徒弟。
E: You are a youngster too. Your words are more influential than mine. When you have time, please talk to my student.

C: 想不到你还记得啊。哎，小姐一直都有这个坏习惯，消费起来有点大手大脚，要是把密钥还给她，真不知道她会买些什么东西回来。
E: Ah, you still remember. Well, Lady Asta is known to spend more than what she could bring home. Who knows what she would buy had she gotten the encryption key?

C: 可以呀，你想聊些什么？
E: Of course. What do you want to talk about?

C: 还是不打扰你了。
E: I better leave you alone.

C: 「公司」旗下的平台很多，我个人推荐「寰宇佳品」，他们家的服务态度特别好。
E: The IPC owns a lot of platforms. My personal recommendation would be Cosmo Premium. They have good customer service.

C: 还是不打扰你了。
E: I better leave you alone.

C: 你注意到它在跟着一种奇怪的旋律哼唱着，尽管唱歌水平在你看来和帕姆有得一拼。
E: You notice it humming a strange tune with a voice almost as bad as Pom-Pom's.

C: 你手短短…
E: Your fingers are short...

C: 哎，一天到晚不是故障就是宕机，烦死了！看到这些金属壳子就烦！
E: I can't take this anymore! They are either malfunctioning or crashing all day long! The sight of these metal casings is driving me nuts!

C: 它这么消极，怎么会得到阮•梅的肯定？让它把消极的气味传递给其他造物，这样可不好！
E: How is it supposed to gain Ruan Mei's recognition with all that negativity? We don't want it to spread its pessimism to other creations!

C: 有缘的时候再见吧，希望那时候我已经能找到自己的答案了。
E: Until we meet again. I hope I'll have already found my answer by then.

C: 我想问…
E: I'd like to ask...

C: 算了…你说话也有点噪音，可能是你那边信号不好，没认出我也正常……
E: Never mind... Your voice is a bit distorted, probably because of poor signals on your side. That might be why you can't recognize me...

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I have no more questions.

C: 空间站似乎是吸取了先前的某些教训，在小机器人的功能按键上加装了身份识别程序。
E: The space station seems to have learned from past lessons by installing a verification program into the function keys of the little robot.

C: 昨日扎格列斯托梦，说我今天会交上好运。要是不把握住机会，它一定会用硬币狠狠砸我的脑门儿，质问这里面到底装着什么！
E: Zagreus came to me in a dream yesterday, saying that my fortune will be delivered today. If I don't nab this chance, it will surely pelt my head with coins, and demand to know what's stored inside!

C: 前所未见，如此脆弱的材料。
E: Such flimsy material, I've never seen.

C: 很好的论题。我得说，这个疑问困惑过我很长的时间。被黑潮摧毁后的阿卡索斯城看不见，摸不着，即使去到原先的地点，也只能找到一堆断壁残垣。
E: A very fine topic. I must say, this question has troubled me for a long time. Having been devoured by the black tide, one can no longer see nor touch Icatus. Even if you go to its location, all you will see is a pile of ruined remains.

C: 不错，漂亮的三段论。知识必须从存在的事物中来，我们拥有关于「阿卡索斯」的知识，因此可以推断出「阿卡索斯」必然存在。
E: Not bad. Textbook syllogism. Knowledge must come from things that exist. We have knowledge of "Icatus," therefore, we can deduce that "Icatus" must exist.

C: 难道数学家的知识，和那些小孩子是相同的吗？要真是这样的话，修辞学也不存在了，人们直接在集市里便能学到所有的论辩知识。
E: Are you saying that the knowledge of a mathematician is equal to the knowledge of such children? If that is in fact the case, then the study of rhetoric also does not exist. People can learn everything they need with regard to debate at their local market.

C: 是。我承认这事儿干得不地道，是我对不起他们…但我还不是为了你吗？
E: Yes. I confess that this wasn't the best idea, and I'm sorry about them... But am I not doing all this for you?

C: 天台不愧为约会圣地，你在无意间撞见了一对正在幽会的爱侣。
E: The rooftop is a must-go for lovebirds, and you accidentally walk straight into a couple's secret tryst.

C: 即使黄金战争已结束这么多年，即使悬锋孤军已与奥赫玛握手言和，我的家族已随先王政权的崩塌而灭亡…可，这份仇恨从未消失……
E: And even though the Chrysos War has long finished, even though the Kremnoan Detachment has made peace with Okhema, and even though my family was wiped out with the fall of the old king's rule — none of this animosity has disappeared...

C: 怎么会出现在这里？
E: What's it doing here?

C: 哼，确实挺失败的。要不是你们的计划败露，我还没法爱上这个险些被谋害的可怜人呢！
E: Hmph, you sure failed, majorly. And if your plan hadn't been exposed, I'd never have fallen in love with that poor man who was nearly killed!

C: 你单挑泰坦眷属也没问题的。
E: You could solo a Titankin. no problem.

C: 你想找我帮忙，调查线索。
E: You want my help to investigate the clues, don't you?

C: 科洛埃、尼科马库斯、安德烈亚斯…树庭的大家…愿你们在塞纳托斯的怀抱中安眠。
E: Clio, Nicomachus, Andreas... everyone at the Grove... may you rest in the embrace of Thanatos.

C: 这样看来……
E: From the looks of it...

C: …没关系了，姐姐，都一样的。老爹会为我们骄傲的。
E: It doesn't matter anymore, sis... We'll all end in the same way. Dad would be proud of us.

C: 冥界再见吧，老提图斯…保重。
E: Let us meet again in the nether realm, Old Titus... Take care.

C: …也罢。我家那兔崽子小时候也老爱看这种东西，都被我训怕了。
E: ...Whatever. The little brat at home used to love this kind of stuff. I scared that out of him, though.

C: 这就成拖累了，啊？该犟的时候反而不知道犟了…这个死脑筋，每次吵架的时候，怎么就没见他这么体贴人？
E: Now suddenly he's a burden? Ha! When he should be stubborn, he gives in... That old fool, where was all this consideration during our arguments?

C: 椰冻奶盖拿铁最好喝！
E: Coconut milk lattes are the best!

C: 你看你前面引用的文献，这个…还有这个…都是过时的条文。
E: The literature you cited here, right here... and here... they're all from outdated texts.

C: 创新咖啡怎么赚外快？
E: How does an innovative new coffee end up making money?

C: 答案是病毒营销。
E: The answer: Viral marketing.

C: 我都来了这么久了，怎么还没能晋升啊？
E: I've been here so long. Why haven't I been promoted yet?

C: …嗡嗡。
E: ...Grumph.

C: …这位朋友，我看你既不认识我们，也不涉及利益相关。你古道热肠，定能在这种「未有先例之事」上赏罚分明。而你的决断，我们俩皆能信服。
E: ...My friend, you appear to know neither of us, nor do you have any stake in this. With your impartiality and sense of justice, you're the perfect choice to rule on this "unprecedented matter." We both agree to trust your decision.

C: 自己动手。
E: Handle it yourself.

C: 这、这种有点好笑又有点难过的情绪，是怎么回事！
E: Wh—What's with this funny yet sad feeling!?

C: 作证？你又做什么坏事啦？
E: Vouch for what? What've you nicked now?

C: 别吵架啊，有话好好说。
E: Please don't resort to violence. We can talk things through.

C: 你当然知道，所谓「刻法勒」的回应，是女孩口中「好心的守卫叔叔」假扮的。
E: As you know, the supposed response from "Kephale" was done by "Mr. Nice Guard," who the girl told you about.

C: 可惜，他已经牺牲了啊……
E: But, sadly, he fell...

C: 但是，他已经牺牲了啊……
E: But he lost his life ...

C: 啊？对的，对的对的。
E: Ah? Yes, of course.

C: 其实…刻法勒的声音是怎么回事，还有好心的守卫叔叔是谁，我全都知道。不太会骗人的人…瞒不了别人太久。
E: Actually... I know about Kephale's voice, who Mr. Nice Guard is, all of it. Bad liars... can't really keep the lie for very long.

C: 其实，我们并非看不见小维吉妮娅心中柔软之处，只是无从触及。
E: To be honest, we can see the tenderness in little Verginia's heart... we just can't reach it.

C: 看起来这台雅努斯迷津还能够继续使用，不过只能等有机会再回来探索了。
E: Looks like this Janus' Maze is still operational, but we'll have to come back and explore it another time.

C: 欢宴的主人，海瑟音……
E: Hysilens, the master of the feast...

C: ——至少，曾经是这样的。
E: ...or that's how it used to be, at least.

C: 正是，每瓶「专属心酿」的味道各不相同。只是……
E: Exactly. Every "exclusive soul brew" should taste different. But unfortunately...

C: 晶紫色液体在空中划出流线，随即收入瓶中——一罐蜜酿悄然封装。
E: Glimmering streaks of purple liquid swirled through the air and flowed into the vessel in waiting, a flask of honey brew now sealed and ready.

C: …她呼唤我们到她身边，却从未消解那份孤独。好在，阁下现在身在此处。
E: She gathered us around her, yet never escaped her solitude. Now that you're here, perhaps that will change.

C: 阁下是这么想的吗…不过，无论何种论点，都算不上错谬。
E: So that's what you think... Still, no opinion is truly wrong here.

C: 说得没错。
E: That's not a bad idea.

C: 是，但又不是。
E: Yes, and no.

C: 列车更漂亮！
E: The Express!

C: 你看，这里到处都金灿灿、亮堂堂的…这个石头地板还能照出虎克的脸呢！
E: Everything is so shiny and sparkly... I can see my face in the floor!

C: 这可是很珍贵的东西——虽然虎克不懂，但老爹是这么说的！
E: It's worth a lot according to daddy. I don't know much about it, but daddy is always right.

C: 平时的维护也是…如果可以的话，也让克拉拉来帮忙维护列车吧！
E: Not to mention routine maintenance... If possible, you should let me help fix the Express, too!

C: 而且…帕姆看起来毛绒绒的，摸起来手感也很好……
E: Not to mention how fluffy and soft they are...

C: 希望{NICKNAME}{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}会喜欢这些漂亮的小石头……
E: I hope you like these pebbles, {F#big sister}{M#big brother} {NICKNAME}...

C: 之前我一直都埋头于空间站的防卫工作，差点忘记劳逸结合才是最有效率的方法了。
E: I've been so focused on the station's defenses recently — it's easy to forget that work-life balance is the best way to stay on top.

C: 抱歉，好像说到别的地方去了。{NICKNAME}，请别在意。
E: Oh, uh, what were we talking about again? Coffee! Sorry, {NICKNAME}.

C: 你靠谱吗？
E: Can I trust your judgment?

C: 没那么严重……
E: It's not that serious...

C: 以利亚萨拉斯让全银河的科技水平获得了一次飞跃，这次黑塔女士的出现，或许也会是一次科技革命……
E: Elias Salas's contributions ushered forth a great galaxy-wide technological leap. Now that Madam Herta is on the scene, perhaps another technological revolution looms...

C: 三月七，快逃！
E: March 7th, quick, make a run for it!

C: 你揉了揉眼睛，刚刚的一切仿佛都是一场幻觉。
E: You rub your eyes, and everything that transpired just now seems like an illusion.

C: 真的？
E: Is that so?

C: 谢谢你，我很喜欢。
E: Thank you, I like it.

C: 没有。
E: Nope.

C: 对呀对呀，就别再拒绝了嘛！
E: That's more like it, now don't say no again!

C: 哎，别提了。还记得之前拉明娜干的好事吧？现在整个空间站的人，都把我视作过街老鼠，人人喊打！甚至以前那些自称永远不会离开后援会的科员，现在还带头找我麻烦！
E: Oh, it's terrible. Do you remember what Lamina did? Now everyone on the space station spites me and ostracizes me! Even those who said they would never leave my fan club are taking the lead in opposing me!

C: 关于卡波特…
E: About Capote...

C: 如果我真的是一个有勇气的人，是不是更应该在遭受压迫的时候，第一时间给他说出不呢？又或者是说早一点和他谈一谈，而不是以这样的方式画上句号呢？
E: If I really am brave, shouldn't I have said no to him the first time he oppressed me? Or should I have talked with him earlier, so that things wouldn't have to go down this way?

C: 哼，很快我就可以写完这份报告书了…卡波特，你等着吧！
E: Hmph, I'm going to finish writing this report very soon... Just you wait, Capote!

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all questions I have.

C: …喜欢。
E: ...I like it.

C: 我手上有些东西……
E: I have something with me...

C: 不多不多。一是糖分可以快速让大脑恢复活力，二是这个方子颇为苦涩，不放那么多糖，实在是难以入口……
E: No, no — glucose can rapidly revitalize the brain. Furthermore, this recipe is quite bitter. Frankly, the tea is hard to swallow unless it has that much sugar...

C: 给账账喂「虚无硬片」。
E: Feed Numby Hard Chip of Nihility.

C: 呼…呼……
E: *snoring*

C: 祝你旅行顺利，{NICKNAME}。
E: May your travels be fruitful, {NICKNAME}.

C: …原来是{NICKNAME}呀，请不要从背后吓唬我。
E: ...Oh it's you, {NICKNAME}. Please don't sneak up on me like that!

C: 嘿嘿～{NICKNAME}，我给你带了这个……
E: Hee-hee~ {NICKNAME}, I got this for you...

C: 如果喜欢的话，下次我得多准备些。
E: Should you take a liking to them, I'll make sure to prepare more next time.

C: 你们的友情也不赖嘛。
E: But you're still good friends, right?

C: 孤绝的世界，星海间的银轨，充满未知的冒险之旅…太让人向往了。
E: Shimmering trails among the stars, boundless adventures... How wondrous...

C: 惬意，闲适，古老，有时还有一丝危险和紧张的气息。
E: Relaxing, classic... and at moments, a bit tense.

C: 不知道丹恒兄弟懂不懂玄学，要不找他来调查调查？
E: Maybe Dan Heng knows about paranormal stuff. Should we get him to check it out?

C: 我去找找。
E: I'll go look for some.

C: 谢谢你，希望下次来的时候不会打扰到大家。
E: Thank you. I hope the next time I come I won't disturb anyone.

C: 能听到如此动人的乐曲，感受其中蕴含的情感和故事，我很满足。
E: I'm content with being able to hear such a moving tune and feel the emotions and story behind it.

C: 你完全无法想象那里的氛围，我才待了一天，就赶紧溜出去了…真的，那儿连我这种没心没肺的人都受不了！
E: You can't even imagine the atmosphere there — even someone as heartless as me got the chills! I only stayed for a day before I couldn't take it anymore and slipped away.

C: 这些记忆碎片微小如灰尘，构不成忆泡，很难用肉眼看见，甚至只有少数忆者才能感受到。
E: These memory fragments are as fine as dust, and can't form memory bubbles. They're hard to see with the naked eye — even most Memokeepers can't sense them.

C: 是啊，照片往往记录着一些值得珍藏的回忆。
E: Yes, photographs often record very precious memories.

C: 除去助眠的香薰，还有…我想你会喜欢的。
E: Apart from the incense that helps you sleep, there's also... something I trust you will like.

C: 请容我再次赞美你，{NICKNAME}，拥有一个智慧的灵魂和炽热的心——你，真的很美。
E: Please allow me to sing your praises once again, {NICKNAME}. With an erudite soul and a blazing heart, you are truly beautiful.

C: 喝就不必了，多谢你的好意。
E: I appreciate the gesture, but I'll pass.

C: 你说，它们可是因为被彼此照亮，才识得自己也是星星，也能荧荧闪烁？
E: Do you think they only realize that they're stars and capable of radiance after experiencing another's illumination?

C: 并非小女子自言自语，这是一位名叫巴德•巴比巴伯•巴拉的谜语大师所言之语。在恩公看来，此话何解呢？
E: I'm not just talking to myself. It's something a Riddler named Baden Babbibalo Bala once said. What do you think those words mean, benefactor?

C: 不得不说，牛油融化的「泪水」真的好香，我好喜欢！
E: I have to say, pineapple-scented tears sure smell sweet. I love it!

C: 天才遗留的手稿散落在桌面上，你试图拿起，但纸页却纹丝不动。上面究竟承载了怎样沉重的知识，你不得而知……
E: The genius' manuscripts are scattered over the desk. You try picking them up, but the pages won't budge. What kind of weighty knowledge do the manuscripts carry? You have no means to find out...

C: 「杠上开花」算什么，我刚刚还自摸清一色了呢。
E: "Dead Wall Draw"? That's nothing. I just drew a Pure Suit.

C: （沉默不语）
E: (Silence)

C: 嗯？有什么值得一瞧的东西吗？
E: Hm? Are you trying to have a staring contest or something?

C: 客户就不能是朋友吗？
E: Can't clients be friends?

C: 倒也没有什么特别有趣的事，不过就是感觉…特别舒服！
E: Things have been pretty quiet here recently... but at least it's always cozy!

C: 你捕捉到曼娅的目光扫了一眼旁边的垃圾桶。
E: You notice Manya's fleeting glance at the trashcan next to her.

C: 只是很简单的常识问题，想请教一下您的看法。
E: Just one of those general questions. I'd like to hear your take on it.

C: 宇宙、时空、过去、现在…灵感就要降落了，啊！灵感！
E: Universe, time and space, past and present... I'm onto something! Eureka!

C: 不知道。
E: I don't know.

C: 真的吗？
E: Really?

C: 有是有，不过…我这种水平，写的净是些没营养的小说，都是垃圾文学。
E: Technically, yes. But... the novels I write aren't exactly highbrow. They're all trash literature.

C: 你很出名吗？
E: Are you a celebrity?

C: 你有所不知了——在音乐剧圈，无论男女演员，「花期」都非常有限。
E: You might not know this, but musical artists only look good on stage for a very limited period of time.

C: 您喜欢什么品种的花呢？是打算摆在房间里，还是要送给谁吗？
E: What kind of flowers do you like? Are you looking for indoor plants? Are you gifting them to someone?

C: 这些花虽然颜色各异、价格不同，但是它们都有着其他花无法替代的价值。请问你对哪种花感兴趣？
E: These flowers come in a variety of colors and prices, but really, they are all priceless. Which one are you interested in?

C: 「球牡丹」？
E: Ball Peony?

C: 还批评说什么「贝洛伯格在改变，但音乐剧还是那么老土做作」…总之啊，在那之后小女子又接了些小角色来演，想好好打磨下演技啦～
E: They even said something like, "Belobog has changed, but its musicals are still singing the same ole tune." The point is, after that, I start taking on small roles. I want to polish my acting chops.

C: 我？脾气大？你哪只眼看出来的？
E: Me? Grumpy? How can you tell?

C: 最近过得怎么样？
E: How have things been?

C: 啊？你说什么呢？
E: Huh? What are you talking about?

C: 桑博？哦，你说的是那个诈骗犯的假名吧？
E: Sampo? That con artist's alias?

C: 怎么做到的？
E: How?

C: 要是各位在资金周转方面遇到了什么困难，欢迎随时来找我帮忙。
E: Feel free to come to me when you have financial problems.

C: 你问我？要我说，那好处肯定大于坏处。
E: You asking me? I reckon the good outweighs the bad.

C: 但如今封锁解除，那状况可就大不相同了。我手里的资产现在可以用在各种投资上，等雪球越滚越大再坐享红利——这才是生财之道。
E: But now the blockade's lifted — well, things are completely different. I can invest my assets into anything I want, and I'll wait for that compound interest to start snowballing — that's how you make money, see.

C: 嚯哈哈哈，你听说了吗？上下层区马上就要重新打通，那帮银鬃铁卫也要下来了！
E: Bwahaha, did you hear that? They're lifting the blockade between the Overworld and the Underworld, and the Silvermane Guards will be coming down here!

C: 哼哼，我可千万不能放过这种机会——这可是发大财的好时机啊。搞不好还能忽悠几个新兵蛋子来给我打拳，甚至还能在地上开分馆，啧啧啧……
E: Hmph, I mustn't waste this opportunity — now's the time when fortunes are made. Maybe I can fool a few rookies to take a crack at me, or even open up a branch up in the Overworld, tsk tsk tsk...

C: 那么遥远的事，想它干嘛…放心吧，我肯定饿不死的啦！
E: That's far in the future. Why think about it now...? Don't worry so much. I won't starve to death!

C: 为什么是件好事？
E: Why is it good?

C: 哈，借你吉言。
E: Ha, I'm counting on it.

C: 我怎么没听说过这苔藓？
E: I've never heard of this type of moss before.

C: 尤利安究竟是怎么伪装的？
E: How exactly do you disguise yourself?

C: 任务的目标…就是把下层区所有的跳跳糖都搜刮过来，嘿嘿！
E: The goal of the mission is to... get my hands on all the popping candy in Underworld. Hehe!

C: 那你是什么人？
E: Who are you?

C: 哪、哪儿能呢！你、你们已经帮了我们太多。这是我们内、内部的事，我们自、自己会解决。
E: O—Of course not! Y—You have already done so much for us. This is an in—internal affair. We will d—deal with it ourselves.

C: 不过，没关系…我会配合奥、奥列格老大，想办法说、说服他们的。
E: Still, everything is alright... Together with O—Oleg, I'll try to c—convince them.

C: 告诉你吧…其实我正在试着制造一台能与人类进行「情感互动」的机器人。
E: Okay, I'll tell you... I'm trying to build a robot that can interact with humans emotionally.

C: 当然可以。你想了解什么？
E: Sure. What do you want to know?

C: 至于你说的那个老歌德…按辈分论的话，我和他其实是同辈呢，哈哈哈！
E: As for the Old Goethe you mentioned... According to seniority, we are actually the same generation, hahaha!

C: 谢谢你，你先忙吧。
E: Thank you. I shouldn't keep you.

C: 哎呀，这信里说的东西可真不少。不过除了些家长里短，这还有个大新闻呢！你看看，我这亲戚信里说了：「大守护者马上就要解除封锁政策」……
E: Ah, there's lots to go over in this letter. But besides all the family gossip, there's some big news! Check it out, they said here, "The Supreme Guardian is lifting the blockade soon"...

C: 原来如此。
E: I see.

C: …但站在民众的角度来看则不然。「大守护者」在他们眼中是一个分量极重的符号——它象征的不仅是城市的领袖，更是未来的希望。
E: ...But not from the point of view of the people. For them, the Supreme Guardian is a powerful symbol — not just of the city's leadership, but also of a future with hope.

C: 所以…我们换个话题吧，{NICKNAME}。
E: So, let's talk about something else, {NICKNAME}.

C: 其实从公司决定介入这件事起，我们就没有多少选择的余地。如果不是那位托帕小姐高抬贵手，现在的局势想必会麻烦许多。
E: Honestly, ever since the IPC decided to get involved, we've ceased to have any freedom to make our own decisions. If it weren't for the mercy of Miss Topaz, the current situation would be a lot more dire.

C: 详情不便透露…
E: I can't say anything specific...

C: …咿？！你什么时候冒出来的！
E: ...Eh? When did you get here?

C: 你的语气…好欠打……
E: Your tone... is annoying...

C: 无妨，想到哪里就聊到哪里，不必感到拘束。
E: It's fine. Feel free to speak your mind. No reason to hold back.

C: 再次演算——结果与最近五十五次演算结果一致，暂不对已有数据进行重新编辑。
E: Recalculating — Result identical to previous fifty-five calculated results. Existing data will temporarily not be altered.

C: 再见，史瓦罗。
E: Goodbye, Svarog.

C: 无论如何，你的选择尊重了克拉拉的信念与决心。
E: Regardless, your choice has respected Clara's resolve and determination.

C: 多亏了我们的鼹鼠党哇！
E: It's all thanks to us Moles!

C: 内燃机说唱总冠军八十八度矿底，在这里，占领下层区说唱的跑道——
E: Internal Combustion Engine Rap champion — <unbreak>88</unbreak> Degrees Bedrock — in the house and owning the Underworld rap scene —

C: 你是极地探险家？
E: So, you're an extreme environments explorer?

C: 这些…请你不要告诉他们——尤其是姐姐，她会膨胀的。
E: Please... don't mention this to anyone, especially not Serval. She'd get all puffed up.

C: 「机械热潮」的前一任键盘手是邓恩大哥。他毕业以后军务缠身，就离开了乐队——而我补上了键盘手的位置。
E: Dunn was the keyboard player for Mechanical Fever before I joined, but he got caught up in military duties after graduation and had to leave the band, so I filled in.

C: 那就帮我升级吧。
E: Please help me upgrade my phone.

C: 我想和你聊聊…
E: Can we talk...?

C: 祝您玩得开心！
E: Have a great time!

C: 银河中有句箴言：「扑满的屁股摸不得」，即便它又小又可爱。
E: There is a saying across the cosmos: "One must never touch a Trotter's butt," no matter how cute or small it is.

C: 这个称呼让扑满很不满，它不是猪。
E: The Trotter does not like this name at all. It is not a pig.

C: 是啊，可惜故事烂尾了。
E: Yeah, a pity that it never got finished.

C: 本次旅行的目的地是磐岩镇，首先我们要去歌德大饭店办理入住……
E: Today's destination is Boulder Town. First up, let's check in to our lodgings at the Goethe Grand Hotel...

C: 臭小子，别起哄！
E: Quit heckling, brat!

C: 请严格遵守会场秩序。
E: Please follow the rules.

C: 每多挖一镐子…
E: Every pickaxe swing...

C: ...好日子就会更近一些。
E: ...Will bring us closer to a brighter future.

C: 哎哟，我想起来了——哈哈，你瞧我这记性！
E: Oh, now I remember! Haha, my forgetfulness!

C: 哎，贝洛伯格的专业人才还是太少了啊。
E: *sigh* There are still too few professionals in Belobog.

C: 你好，欢迎来到贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆。我是志愿导览员莉拉，如果你需要任何帮助，都可以告诉我。
E: Good day, welcome to the Belobog History and Culture Museum. I am volunteer tour guide, Lila. If you require any services, please let me know.

C: 你好，我是伊蕾恩，贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆的志愿导览员。如果你需要任何帮助，都可以来告诉我！
E: Good day, I am Elaine, a volunteer tour guide of the Belobog History and Culture Museum. If you require any assistance, please let me know.

C: 好拗口一名字…
E: What a tongue twister...

C: 好大的加热器呀！
E: What a huge heater!

C: 小店提供更改运势的服务，<unbreak>199</unbreak>套餐「避凶驱邪」，<unbreak>299</unbreak>套餐「逢凶化吉」，<unbreak>599</unbreak>套餐「以后都只有好事发生」，还挺划算的，老板觉得如何？
E: We provide fortune-changing services, like the "Evil Begone" bundle for <unbreak>199</unbreak>, "See No Evil" bundle for <unbreak>299</unbreak>, and the "Only Good Things From Here On Out" bundle for <unbreak>599</unbreak>. All great value! What do you think?

C: 真没意思，还是跟老板您聊天有意思。今天是要测运势呢，还是要闲聊呢？
E: Well, that was boring. It's much more interesting to talk to you. Are you here to determine your luck, or just to chat?

C: 其实建木生发不是件好事，但…咱们私下里偷偷说…我特别喜欢建木的外观。
E: The Arbor's growth isn't actually a good thing... But let's talk somewhere more private... I love how beautiful the Ambrosial Arbor looks.

C: 其实客人要是感兴趣，就将那些书里对应「书签」取下，靠近自己的玉兆，就能下载阅读了。
E: In fact, if you want, you can take the corresponding "bookmark" you like from the books, hold them close to your jade abacus, and download them to read later.

C: 换了我也看不上你。
E: I wouldn't like you either.

C: 其实我也试了一下仙舟词牌…你听一下我这个……
E: Yeah, I tried some Xianzhou sonnets... What do you think about this one?

C: 噢，你来了，找我有什么事吗？
E: Oh, you're here. What brings you here?

C: 我发现写诗没有想象中那样严肃…我好像爱上写诗了。
E: It turns out that writing poems isn't as serious a business as I used to think... I've fallen in love with it.

C: 忧郁到底是什么呢？忧郁的时候，饱受折磨；不忧郁的时候，又会怀念它。
E: What exactly is melancholy then, you might ask? When you're experiencing the emotion, you'll be in agony. When you aren't, you'll miss it.

C: 还是觉得你像把伞…
E: You still look like an umbrella to me...

C: 具体…区别…区别就是…这是文化！这是艺术！是艺术你懂吗！
E: The exact... difference... is that... This is culture! This is art! It's art, you know!

C: 不打扰你们了。我没别的事了。
E: I won't bother you two. I've nothing else to say.

C: 建木的事你们听说了吗？
E: Have you guys heard about what happened to the Ambrosial Arbor?

C: 这是一道数学题啊？
E: Is this a math question?

C: 客人慢走，阿合马铁窗集团竭诚为您服务！
E: Take care! The Arma Correctional Group will always be at your service!

C: 后来，一只机巧鸟飞到了我的牢房前，扑腾着扔下了几包奇巧零食，说要购买我挠下来的毛。
E: Then one day, a cycrane flew to my cell and dropped a few packets of Trick Snacks on the floor. It said it wanted to buy the fur I had scratched off.

C: 你这些产品真的不是骗人的吗？
E: Are you sure there's no tricks involved here at all?

C: 哎，罢了罢了，不聊这些伤心事。
E: Hey, that's enough for now. Let's not linger on such a morose topic.

C: 能没注意到吗！
E: How could I miss it!

C: …至少在我的辖区内，别出任何要我负责的事……
E: ...Or at least, please don't let there be any accidents in my jurisdiction...

C: 了解一下神策府的工作…
E: I'd like to learn more about the Seat of Divine Foresight's work...

C: 朔雪在景元怀中缓缓睡去，就像它年轻时那样。
E: Snowmoon slowly drifted off to sleep in Jing Yuan's arms, just as it had when it was a cub.

C: 这里的石狮子哪位是雪狮三公？
E: Which of these stone lions here is Snow Lion the Third?

C: 你慢走，我就不送了。下次如果有任何正经事要商量，欢迎你再来找我。
E: On your way, then. I won't see you out. If you have any serious business to discuss next time, come and find me.

C: 咦…来者何人？糟糕！难不成是犯人又跑出来了？武弁！武弁在哪里啊？救命啊！又有人越狱了！
E: Eek! Who's there? Darn it! Did one of the prisoners get out again? Warden! Where is the warden? Help me! One of the prisoners has escaped again!

C: 嘿嘿，你先别走，只要我们还在这闲聊，就不会有新的工作找上我。再聊一会儿吧，{F#好妹妹}{M#好兄弟}。
E: Hey, don't leave just yet. As long as we're chatting here, there won't be any new tasks assigned to me. Let's chat a little longer, {F#miss}{M#sir}.

C: 说实话，感觉比罗浮最乱的时候还忙…之前我也没想通，怎么事情结束了，我反而越来越忙了……
E: To be honest, it feels even busier than when things were at their most chaotic at the Luofu. I don't get it. How is it that after everything is over, I only find myself getting busier and busier...

C: 我想买个过期邮包试试手气。
E: I'd like to buy an abandoned parcel to try my luck.

C: 您知道赛伯邑超导合金吗？我手上屯了不少，准备来仙舟赚票大的，但是没想到那个麦尔彦也有相同的打算，她打算抢我的生意。
E: Ever heard of Cybercity superconducting alloys? I had a whole stockpile and was ready to come to the Xianzhou and make it big... Until I found out about Maryam having the same plan and wanting to steal all of my business.

C: 您都这样说了，我也不好驳您的面子，聊吧。
E: If that's the case, how can I refuse? Chat away.

C: 再说了，我都能察觉，太卜能不察觉吗？
E: Besides, if someone like me can already see through her, could it possibly have escaped the master diviner's eyes?

C: 嗯好…哦对了，差点忘了，你要是来参观穷观阵的，你远远地看一眼就好，未经太卜大人许可，外人可是不准靠近的。
E: Fine... Oh yes, I almost forget. If you come and visit the Matrix of Prescience, please view it from a distance. Outsiders are forbidden from approaching it without permission from the master diviner.

C: 我见多识广，连景元都认识……
E: I've been around the block. Ever heard of my friend, Jing Yuan...?

C: 没事，不打扰，不打扰。要是想聊聊天，你可以随时来找我。我平时也找不到谁能跟我聊这些。
E: All good, it's no bother at all. Any time you want to chat, just come and find me. I usually can't find anyone to talk with about this stuff.

C: 蜕生后就是新的「我」？
E: So after hatching rebirth you're a new "you"?

C: 欢迎客官您下次再来。
E: I warmly invite you to visit again next time.

C: 再说了，我还有一个身份，就是阿合马铁窗集团的首席物流官。犯人们从阿合马那买的东西，还得眼巴巴的等着我给他们送过去呢。
E: Plus, I have another role — I'm the chief of logistics for the Arma Correctional Group. Prisoners have to rely on me to deliver whatever they bought from Arma.

C: 究竟是不是好事，我不知道。
E: I'm not sure about that.

C: 人在说谎的时候，流汗的味道也不一样，*嗅嗅*我嗅觉很灵敏的，你这味道……
E: People's sweat smells different when they're lying. *Sniff* Guess what my keen nose just picked up? This smell... is the smell of...

C: 放心吧，雾生老～弟很强的，别人早就被干掉了。
E: Don't worry, Kiryu is very strong. Any other person would have died ages ago.

C: 无关我的道德或者信仰，我只是在做上面安排的工作而已。
E: It has nothing to do with morals or beliefs. I'm just doing my job for the higher-ups.

C: 放生就是行最大的善，所有功德，莫过放生！
E: Releasing something into the wild is the greatest of good deeds! No other virtue can compare!

C: 不过我确实也不太可能变成牛和苹果啦…要是总变成低智慧生物，我会变傻的。
E: But it is unlikely for me to turn into a cow or an apple... If I turn into a low-intelligence creature, I'll get kinda dumb, too.

C: 这与你只剩下一颗头有关系吗？
E: Does this have anything to do with the fact that all that's left of you is a head?

C: 对了，这个东西你拿上，送你的。
E: By the way, take this. A gift for you.

C: 我来仙舟数日，也一直没找到他。哎…{NICKNAME}，你最近还有见过老师吗？
E: So I came to the Xianzhou ship looking for him, but to no avail... Have you met with Master lately, {NICKNAME}?

C: 到那时候，在这幽囚狱中继续进行以前的研究，也不是不可能…嘿嘿嘿～
E: When that happens, I may even be able to pick up where I left off and continue my research here at the Shackling Prison, hehehe.

C: 今日来神策府是所为何事？还是说只是随便聊聊。
E: What brought you here today, or are you just here for a casual chat?

C: 现在每次去那边玩，那些商贩都可热情可热情了！简直是拿我当英雄对待！
E: I'm given such a warm reception every time I visit there. They see me as their hero!

C: 景元回到神策府了？
E: Has Jing Yuan returned to the Seat of Divine Foresight?

C: 我该走了。
E: I've got to go.

C: 你们怎么被抓进来的？
E: How did you get captured?

C: 不想出去溜达溜达？
E: Don't you feel like going out for a walk?

C: 下次再聊吧～
E: Let's catch up another time~

C: 守灵顺手拿出了藏月瓠，并用葫芦口对准了你。
E: The guard takes out the Lunaumbra Gourd and points the mouth at you.

C: 还有别的事，先不聊了。
E: I got to go. Talk to you later.

C: 你是什么？
E: What are you?

C: …还要继续讲下去吗？
E: ... Do you want to go on?

C: 一则，这些「旧物」遍布仙舟，垂手可得，人家也犯不着从我这儿购入。
E: Firstly, Xianzhou's filled with this "old stuff." It's not even hard to find them. People don't have to buy it from me.

C: 没有什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 难道说你做得就很好吃了？
E: What, so the food you make is tasty?

C: 这么短的记忆，肯定不方便吧。
E: It must be a real hassle having such a short memory.

C: 和老周一起生活的那些年，我每年都比上一年更怕他走。直到他活到一百岁的时候，我才意识到，自己做过头了。
E: With every year I spent with Old Zhou, my fear for his death grew and grew. It wasn't until he lived to a hundred years old that I realized I had overdone it.

C: 其实我降落的那个世界里，外来者不只有我这个冒牌仙人。丰饶孽物当然也不会放过那些没有开化，没法保卫自己的世界。
E: When I crash-landed on that world, there were already other charlatan celestials there. The Abominations of Abundance would never overlook primitive worlds that had no means to defend themselves.

C: 你肯定以为我是在说瞎话是吧？你要不信，你问他去。
E: You definitely think this is a bunch of hogwash, don't you? Go ask him if you don't believe me.

C: 没有的事儿，全是胡说八道，这马褂儿给你啦。
E: Nah, it's impossible. The whole thing's a bunch of bunk.

C: 您要是方便，不妨跟我们也透透底儿，甭担心泄密的事儿。我俩嘴严着呢！
E: You can tell us a little about it if it's fine with you. Don't worry about us leaking the secret! We'll stay tight-lipped!

C: 你练块练魔怔了。
E: You're becoming a bodybuilding maniac.

C: 仙舟人的体质决定了，无论我们怎么运动，长出的肌肉都会缓慢消失，回到最初的状态。但这只是表象。
E: The bodies of the Xianzhou people are built in a way that we eventually lose any muscle mass we build. Our muscles will gradually revert to their original state, no matter how much we exercise... Or so it seems.

C: 你做这些的意义是什么？
E: What's your purpose behind doing all of this?

C: 有很多不遵守交通规则的人吗？
E: Do many people speed?

C: 嗨，真是揣着聪明装糊涂。不过嘛…这里也不太适合谈论这个话题。
E: *sigh* You sure know how to play dumb. Then again... it's not something to be discussed openly here.

C: 接下来有什么计划？
E: What plans do you have next?

C: 前段时间整理房间时，我从书柜里翻出了一本《客商一览醒迷》。是停云借给我的，竟然一直忘了还给她。
E: A while ago, while tidying up my room, I found a book titled A Guide to Merchants and Mysteries in my bookshelf. Tingyun lent it to me, and I keep forgetting to return it to her all this time.

C: 看来是我自作多情了。不过你既然是化外民，想要与仙舟互通贸易，还是应该了解一下仙舟的天外行商团。
E: I was hoping for too much then. But since you're an Outworlder, if you wish to engage in mutual trade with Xianzhou, you should at least understand the workings of Xianzhou's intergalactic merchant guilds.

C: 你看看他们。出拳无力，剑法不精，脚步松散，反应迟钝…如此水平也敢来丢人现眼。
E: Just look at them. Feeble punches, unrefined swordplay, clumsy footwork, sluggish reflexes... It's a mystery why they even think they're good enough to be here.

C: 你支持我，哼，你根本就没听到我的主张是什么…不过算了，我还是很感谢你的支持。
E: You're all for that? You don't even know what I'm for yet! Still, I appreciate the sentiment.

C: 有人会来询问我会喜欢什么样的人，我只能说「我不喜欢人」。
E: When people asked me what's my type, I'd say, "No one's my type."

C: 我提前练了一个月的长跑和关节技，鞋都磨破了好几双，就是为了提升自己的速度和力量。
E: To raise my speed and strength, I trained so much in running and grappling techniques for a month that I even wore out several pairs of shoes.

C: 你有和彦卿说话么？
E: Did you manage to talk to Yanqing?

C: 最近行情不好啊…
E: Business hasn't been well these days...

C: 你把被拖的写进去了！
E: You wrote down what needs towing away!

C: 要小心别有用心之人…
E: Look out for people with ulterior motives...

C: 我这边文件已经堆积成山了，你那边怎么样呢？
E: I'm absolutely snowed under with paperwork. How are things with you?

C: （拿出「毁烬焚骨的大公」）
E: (Take out The Ashblazing Grand Duke)

C: 我打算辞去天舶司的工作。
E: I plan on resigning from the Sky-Faring Commission.

C: 那小孩边哭边跑，跑到门边，却只发现所谓的门根本就不存在，乐得我都不行了。要不是有旁人来叫唤他，这小孩还会继续徒劳地跑下去。
E: That kid ran off crying, straight to the door — only to discover that it doesn't exist. It was so fun, I almost couldn't take it. If it weren't for someone calling him, this kid would have kept on running.

C: 岁阳喜欢新鲜激烈的欲望。但长生种的念头，却像放陈了几百年的饼，又硬又干像块石头。真不知道他们一路是怎么过来的……
E: Heliobi love fresh, intense desires. But long-life species... their thoughts are like biscuits dried out in the sun for a hundred years. It's all hard and dry like a stone. I really have no idea how they've even made it this far in life...

C: 使点劲，宝贝，你打不坏我的！
E: Put some effort into it, darling. You can't break me!

C: 妾身本想快刀斩乱麻，尽快清除掉几个拉帮结派的害虫。可他们偏偏占据着关键岗位，我手头又一时找不出更合用的人才，实在没办法直接把他们都清退。
E: Originally, I planned to make quick and decisive action and clear out these clique-forming pests as soon as possible. However, they have occupied key positions and I cannot currently find suitable personnel to take their places, so there is no way for me to simply get rid of them.

C: 哎，谦虚又不会让我的工作减少，你放心，我并非是自谦。
E: Ah, modesty will not decrease my workload. Fear not, I am not putting myself down.

C: 灵砂大人，你好香啊。
E: Master Lingsha, you smell lovely.

C: 我该走了，给我算一卦吧。
E: Please do a divination for me before I go.

C: 怎么又这样啊？
E: Again?

C: 此情此景，我应该写首诗！
E: This moment right now... I ought to write a poem!

C: 您不能持有这个…
E: You can't have this...

C: 这棵树都枯萎了几千年…打我祖辈在「长乐天」定居开始，就能瞧见那半截残桩。
E: This tree has withered for thousands of years... Back when my ancestors first settled in the Exalting Sanctum, it was already half a stump.

C: 仙舟律法十恶之首便是「令堕长生」。你要是动了念头，我劝你趁早死心。
E: The first of the Ten Unpardonable Sins of Xianzhou is Involuntary Immortalization. If you have any thought about attaining it, I'd advise you to give up any hopes before it's too late.

C: 听说戒严以后工造司就提前放假了……
E: I heard the Artisanship Commission got off early due to martial law...

C: 绝对不会强制购物！
E: No compulsory purchases!

C: 我怕你爸爸出来收拾你。
E: Your dad might come out and give you a whooping.

C: 大家都说让我来照顾你。
E: Everyone told me I should take care of you.

C: 我睡不着……
E: I can't sleep...

C: 抱歉，此处暂不通行。
E: I'm sorry. This area is blocked off.

C: 而且，她可不是孤军作战…嘿嘿，哈哈哈。
E: And, she's not fighting alone... Heh heh, bwahaha!

C: 我曾梦想做个棋士，四处云游，以棋会友…可惜翁法罗斯不能一日无君，这个想法也就一直被我搁置了。
E: I once dreamed of being a chess master, traveling the world, and making friends through the game... But alas, Amphoreus can't go a day without its ruler, so that idea has been shelved away.

C: 哈哈…爸，这也不是我一个人的功劳。
E: Haha... Dad, I can't take all the credit for this.

C: 哈哈，难得有人还对「大地」的族裔过去的历史感兴趣。
E: Haha, it's rare to find someone who is still interested in the history of Earth's descendants.

C: 「开山者」变得开朗了好多。
E: Mountainbreaker has become much more cheerful.

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 翁法罗斯的持明卵？
