E: An Amphorean Vidyadhara egg?

C: 嗯…如你所言，{NICKNAME}阁下。这来之不易的安宁时光，我的确该好好珍惜才是。
E: Yes... As you say, {NICKNAME}. I should indeed cherish these hard-earned moments of peace.

C: 被小小灰猜到了，*我们*的心思！该挑什么礼物，想了很久呢。
E: Little Gray saw right through us! We spent a long time deciding what gift to pick.

C: …不得不说，大受震撼。
E: ...I must say, I'm absolutely stunned.

C: 那么——敬翁法罗斯的明天。
E: Well then, here's to Amphoreus's tomorrow.

C: 你将「时光硕果」投入泉水，那些身影逐渐在空气中成形……
E: You cast the Fruit of Time into the fountain, and those figures gradually materialize in the air...

C: 这里个个都是人才。
E: Everyone here is so talented.

C: 干完今天，我就回家结婚。
E: After today, I'll go back home and get married.

C: 竟然和你这种人齐名。
E: Why am I put on the same level as someone like you?

C: 你这是光冒犯没见艺术啊。
E: But you're just simply offending others. There's no art to speak of.

C: 罗浮室外温度这么暖和！这得是有多大的暖炉啊！
E: The outdoor temperature is so warm in the Luofu! You must have a huuuuge heater!

C: 你预选赛过了吗？
E: Did you pass the prelims?

C: 啧啧，你怎么年纪轻轻就一把年纪了，思想太保守了。现在观众想看的都是跨界。
E: Oh, come on. You're so young, but your heart is already so old! That's conservative thinking. What the audience wants now is cross-disciplinary performances.

C: …另一侧的脸会「只说假话」。
E: ... and the other side only tells lies.

C: 感觉被针对了呢…
E: Why do I feel targeted...?

C: 猜～猜～我～是～谁？
E: Guess~ Who~ I~ Am~

C: 电子改造人。
E: A man-made cyborg.

C: 请不要问如此破坏气氛的问题，专注于眼前！
E: Please don't ask such vibe-killing questions, pay attention!

C: 「没、没什么。」纸盒竭力装作一副若无其事地样子。但颤抖出卖了它内里的恐慌。
E: "I—I'm okay." The package tries its best to look fine, but its trembling reveals its anxiety.

C: 不好意思问一下，请问你是谁啊？
E: Sorry to bother, but who are you?

C: 那白毛是公司的高管…
E: That white-haired one is a senior executive in the IPC...

C: 你放心，她下手有分寸。
E: Don't worry, she knows what she's doing.

C: 他果然能打赢复活赛！
E: He really won!

C: 卢卡加油啊！
E: Go, go, Luka let's go!

C: 画面中充斥着异样的生物材料和数不清的术语，专业性简直要溢出画面了。
E: The screen is filled with unusual biological materials and lots of technical terms. That is a lot of knowledge to take in.

C: 星槎种子脱离控制的姿态充满野性，极具美感。
E: The way the starskiff seed breaks free from the control is wild and beautiful.

C: 检索「时间」的阵基，可以从变幻莫测的时间洪流中标定出与检索对象相关的时刻。
E: This is a base terminal of time. It can filter the moments relating to your target by searching from the unpredictable flow of time.

C: 「所有生还者的证言都指出，用于捍卫行星的科技会陷入崩溃紊乱，最终甚至倒戈指向主人，受污染的通信频道中只回荡着几个词『智慧的溃败』」
E: "According to the survivors, the technology used to protect a planet will collapse and eventually even turn against its owner. In the corrupted communication channel, a voice echoes, 'The failure of knowledge.'"

C: 「星历<unbreak>7200</unbreak>-<unbreak>8100</unbreak>年间，星际和平公司共观察到了一百二十二个世界陷入不明原因的混乱，最终它们被反物质军团全数击溃。」
E: "In the years of <unbreak>7200</unbreak> to <unbreak>8100</unbreak> SC, the Interastral Peace Corporation saw <unbreak>122</unbreak> worlds falling into chaos due to unknown reasons. All of them were eventually destroyed by the Antimatter Legion."

C: 「巡海游侠，同样奉行『帝弓司命』的天旨行事的游侠组织。巡海游侠主张实现人类最朴素的公义，驱除暴恶。」
E: "The Galaxy Rangers are a group of rangers that abides by the Reignbow Arbiter. They advocate human justice and the elimination of evil."

C: 该…说实话吗？
E: Should... I be honest?

C: 一只严丝合缝的快递盒。密封数字单据的货品名称一栏声明，其中的货物将被用于放生。
E: A courier package that's a perfect fit. The digital label clearly states that the item inside will be used for a controlled release.

C: 直觉告诉你，它很可能又是一个幽默（或者不那么幽默）的小把戏。但如果不打开它，你就无从求证。
E: Intuition tells you that it's likely to be a prank from another funny guy (or not-so-funny). But without opening it, you have no way of knowing.

C: 你皱了皱眉，随意打开路边的箱子，从自我道德准则的层面是你所无法接受的——
E: You frown. Opening any unclaimed box on the side of the road is unacceptable to you based on your own moral standards —

C: 一只被打开的快递盒，就这么搁在路边，半掩的箱盖下银光闪闪。谁会把贵金属就这么丢在街上？真阔气。
E: There is a courier package left open on the roadside. A silvery light sparkles out from under the half-opened lid. Who would have just left precious metals like this out on the street? Such opulence.

C: 「米糕没幻戏社的各位：我很希望成为贵社的一员，但今年已是我应聘失败第三年——这一次请务必对我的答卷进行点评！」
E: "Dear Mellow-Golden-Mayor Immersia Club: I am very interested in becoming a member of your club, but this is the third year in a row now that I've failed — please can you leave some comments behind on my quiz entry?"

C: 可惜，这些食物显然因为某种意外滞留于此——不知道那位饿了三天的可怜人现在如何了。
E: Unfortunately, the food is stuck here because of some accident. You wonder how the poor guy who has starved for three days is faring.

C: 此处是太真丹室，古时候丹士们曾在这里阐演仙道，汲取「建木」之力，将无数奇想化为现实。
E: This is the Aureate Elixir Furnace. In ancient times, the alchemists practiced the way of immortality here. They absorbed the power of the Ambrosial Arbor and turned countless fantasies into reality.

C: 这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
E: The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.

C: 你想起燃烧殆尽的丹炉，曾将黑暗撕开一道口子，但此刻连发亮的痕迹也无处可寻。你低头望去，这才看清这颗持明卵壳上沾染的并非什么炉灰，只是一些露水，却莫名灼热。
E: You think about the burnt elixir crucible that once tore the darkness apart. But now, not a single trace of light is in sight. You look down at the egg and finally notice it is not stained by the ash from the crucible, but just some dew that is somehow scorching hot.

C: 音乐是我内心的呼喊！
E: Music is the outcry of my heart!

C: 够了，你不想看狗血感情戏。
E: Enough. I don't want to see any more of this cringy romance drama.

C: 让爸爸抱抱你。
E: Left hand or right hand.

C: 你尝过恋爱中的情绪吗？
E: Have you ever tasted someone in love?

C: 不叫「合二为一」。
E: We don't say "two become one."

C: 你不知道这些杂物箱里究竟装着什么，但肯定不会是爱和希望。
E: You don't know what exactly is within the box, but it definitely won't be love and hope.

C: 架上的书籍没有半点灰尘，但你确信它们已经许久不曾被翻动。
E: There isn't a speck of dust on the books on the shelf, but you're sure they have not been touched in a long time.

C: 很多人都没有意识到，我们在梦境中设立的规则并非严格的法律，它们更像是一些…「建议」。
E: What many don't realize is that the rules we established in the Dreamscape aren't strict laws. They're more like... "recommendations."

C: 惠特克爵士露出一丝笑意。
E: Sir Whittaker cracks a subtle smile.

C: …我真傻，真的。
E: ...I'm such a fool.

C: 担心突如其来的事故难以承担吗？想为家人留下意外后的保障吗？欢迎选购我们新推出的人身安全险套餐！苜蓿草银行——为您的未来保驾护航。
E: Concerned about sudden happenings that overweigh your burdens? Want your family to be financially secure if you meet with an accident? You're more than welcome to explore our newly-launched life security package! Alfalfa Bank — navigating secure passage for your future.

C: 您是值得信任的对象，我想…把自己的真实身份告诉您。这样，即使有一天我永远地从梦中消失，您也不会感到意外。
E: You are a trustworthy person, and I think... I want to tell you my real identity. That way, even if I forever disappear from the dream, you will not be surprised.

C: 前段时间，我去探望了几个老朋友，都是智械，上了年纪，许多年没见了。
E: I went to visit a couple of old friends recently. They're all Intellitrons entering ages of rust, whom I hadn't seen for a long time.

C: 说起来…无意冒犯，但您身上有一种…非常特殊的气质。硬要比喻的话，大概就像冰一样坚硬清透、像雪一样柔软纯白，但在那冰封雪藏之下……
E: Speaking of... I mean no offense, but you have a sort of... very special air about you. If I had to describe it, it'd be clear and solid as ice, soft and ivory as snow, but buried beneath that frost...

C: 哼哼哼，我就猜到会有人提出这种问题。很遗憾地告诉你，在整个匹诺康尼，我就是最高的皮皮西人！不然你以为我是怎么得到这份工作的？
E: Hmmph, I knew someone would ask me that question. I regret to inform you that I'm the tallest Pepeshi in all of Penacony! How else do you think I got to work this gig?

C: 我对你们的俱乐部没有兴趣。
E: I'm not interested in joining your club.

C: 要是持有贵宾卡也可以…你有吗？哼，看你就没有。
E: You can if you've got a VIP card... Do you? Hmm, you don't.

C: 恪守自己的职责，最终将爱情也拒之门外……
E: Abide by your duty, and in the end, shut out any doorway to love...

C: …你确定不再考虑下吗？
E: ...Are you sure you don't want to think about it some more?

C: 除非…您能帮忙消耗掉我们的库存。
E: Unless... you can help deplete our inventory.

C: 你无法再容忍这只调皮捣蛋的呜呜伯了，它就该被关在空间站的收容舱里！活活关上整整一百万个琥珀纪！
E: You can no longer tolerate this cheeky, mischievous Wubbaboo. It should be locked up in the space station's containment cabin! For a million Amber Eras!

C: 看来我的工作确有价值——没什么比这更值得庆贺了！
E: Looks like my work has some value after all — and nothing's worth celebrating more than that!

C: 能在那个舞台上展现天赋是多么令人羡艳的一件事，你恐怕没有概念吧？聚光灯每每亮起，我能感受到来自银河间上亿双眼睛的热切注视。
E: I'm guessing you have no idea of how jealous people can get when you showcase your talents up there on that stage, right? Every time the spotlights flickered on, I could feel the fiery gaze of a million eyes from all across the cosmos.

C: 你摧毁了我灌注心血的道具，我会永远铭记这一刻！你永远都别想让我原谅你，永远！
E: You've destroyed my precious item, and I will remember it forever! I'll never forgive you. Never!

C: 我会帮你留意。
E: I will let her know.

C: 太好了，{F#小姐}{M#先生}——您真是个大好人！
E: Thank you, {F#miss}{M#sir}... You truly are a kind person!

C: 你之前是干什么的？
E: What did you do before this?

C: 广告牌跳起了一首滑稽的交际舞。
E: The billboard is performing a hilarious ballroom dance.

C: 同僚？
E: Fellow craftsman?

C: 不过呢，我其实是猎犬家系的护卫组长。守护行人安全是我的职责。
E: But, I'm actually the Bloodhound Family's Guard Leader. Protecting travelers is my duty.

C: 没事了。
E: That's all.

C: 别冲动！
E: Don't be rash!

C: 算了，或许演奏家终有一天会被这些没有灵魂的机巧淘汰吧——就让我在被世人遗弃的边缘演奏至最后一刻吧。
E: Forget it. Perhaps one day, all artists will be replaced by these soulless ingenia. Let me perform until the very last moment before the world abandons me and my craft.

C: 管得这么严，还让不让人活了！
E: So strict! How about we just dig ourselves a grave!?

C: 好啊，我同意。
E: Alright, I'll do it!

C: 丹西的神态突然开始扭捏起来，眉头时而紧锁、时而舒展……
E: Dancy's expression began to warp, brow furrowing and relaxing...

C: 平田平次皱着眉头，眼中含着泪，似乎正为母国的动漫产业而忧心。
E: Hirata Heiji furrows his brow, with a tear in his eye. It seems that he is deeply concerned for the future of the anime industry in his homeland...

C: 我一向不觉得这是好事。这让很多匹诺康尼的筑梦师沾染上了「务虚」的恶习，建造出了一堆非用户友好的垃圾建筑。
E: I have never thought that it's a good thing. This allows Dreamweavers in Penacony to fall into the bad habits of "focusing on ideology" and constructing a load of non-user-friendly garbage structures.

C: 我没事了。
E: That's all.

C: 试图吸引其注意。
E: Try to capture his attention.

C: 你为什么不入梦？
E: Why don't you enter the Dreamscape?

C: …我…哎呦，我突然想起等会还有个约会，就先不奉陪啦？
E: I... Oh... I just remembered that I have an appointment to attend, so I'll take my leave, alright?

C: 你能提供什么帮助？
E: How can you help me?

C: 嗯…您在梦境中的初始形象将与您入梦时状态相同，所以请确保自身穿戴齐整。
E: Well... your default appearance in the Dreamscape is based on how you were when you entered the dream, so please ensure you are properly dressed.

C: 叮铃铃——叮铃铃！
E: *ring*... *ring*!

C: 剧情没有按照你设想的方向推行下去——你感到既恼火又沮丧，于是挂断了电话。
E: The plot takes an unexpected turn, leaving you both irritated and frustrated. You hang up the phone.

C: 叮铃…叮铃…叮铃……
E: *ring*... *ring*... *ring*...

C: 嘟…嘟…嘟……
E: *dial tone*

C: 珠宝，腕表，包袋，高级定制…您可以在这里买到匹诺康尼最高端和最奢侈的商品。
E: Jewelry, wristwatches, handbags, and haute couture... You can find the most high-end and opulent merchandise in Penacony here.

C: 悲伤击中了柯柯娜…但她早已习惯了这种处境。
E: A wave of sorrow hits Cocona... but she is already used to it.

C: 广告牌上的车造型奇特，让你怀疑它会不会在行驶时卡住。
E: The vehicle shown on the billboard has a peculiar design that makes you wonder if it will get stuck while moving.

C: 你是谁？
E: Who are you?

C: （继续保持沉默！）
E: (Continue remaining silent!)

C: 咳咳…您好，尊贵的客人，欢迎来到朝露公馆。
E: Ahem... Hello, dear guest, welcome to the Dewlight Pavilion.
Alas...

C: 这过的都是什么日子啊！
E: What a horrible life it would be!

C: 每到一个地方，我就要四处寻找宝箱，将里面的财宝尽数掠走，无论它们是否属于我。
E: Every new place I'm at, I will scour the area for chests and plunder all the valuables in them, even if they don't belong to me.

C: 为什么在梦里也要打打杀杀，到底是谁这么想不开？就不能老老实实地坐下来欣赏艺术吗！
E: Why must violence be committed even in dreams? What're these people angry about? Why can't they just sit back and enjoy art!

C: 我…？我是个梦泡艺术家。哈…很神奇对不对，「艺术家」和「打工人」这两个词看起来明明如此不相干……
E: Me...? I'm a dream bubble artist. Ha... Amazing, isn't it? When these two words "artist" and "employee" do not seem related at all...

C: 这么一说…哦，我想起来了…你是那时候拜托安娜帮忙的年轻人吧？
E: Oh, I remember you. You were the youngster who asked for Anna's help back then, right?

C: 再见，下次再聊。
E: Catch you later.

C: 公司的人打过来了？
E: Are the IPC here to attack us?

C: 必须抑制这危险的情感。要忍耐…对，忍耐……
E: I have to suppress this dangerous emotion. I need to be patient... pa... tient...

C: 哦…哦！这是什么？我的战甲正在以<unbreak>12</unbreak>倍功率运转，感觉好像要飞起来了！
E: Oh... Oh? What's happening? My armor is overlocking <unbreak>12</unbreak> times more than its original rate! It feels like I'm going to fly!

C: 这一天天的，我快无聊死了。倒不是说这梦里不好，不过嘛……
E: Living day after day like this... I could just die of boredom. I'm not saying that the dream world is bad, it's just...

C: 老三沃尔纳倒是还好，人够机灵，还能说会道，相处下来也算舒坦；但那个沃尔普…唉，听说他以前是个银河知名的运动健将，但在我看来完全就是糙人一个！
E: The youngest, Warner, wasn't that bad. He was smart enough and quite eloquent. We got along pretty well. But that Wolpe... Ah, I hear he used to be a famous athlete across the cosmos, but I just think he's an oaf!

C: 果然偏远小行星出来的…就是上不得台面……
E: Turns out he's just from some remote minor planet... Not suitable to be seen with in public...

C: 聊聊美梦小镇。
E: Let's talk about Dreamville.

C: 要说这人和人啊，还真就不一样！有的人整天奔波劳碌，才勉强交得起酒店房费；有的人生来屁股下面就摆满了金砖，能在黄金的时刻里肆意挥霍……
E: People really just aren't born the same! Some people have to work themselves into the ground all day just to be able to scrape hotel fees, some are born with a silver spoon in their mouths and get to spend all their time whiling their lives away in Golden Hour...

C: 也祝你在这过得开心。我们的调饮师。
E: Enjoy your time here as well, our drinksmith.

C: 哟，您想找我聊聊，完全没问题！想看看我训练的物品吗？
E: Hey, if you'd like to talk, I'm all ears. Maybe you'd be interested in the props I've trained?

C: 有大剧院事件在先，那些潜伏已久的叛徒们纷纷闻风而动。这个筑梦师嘛，就是其中一员。
E: There was the Grand Theater incident that happened before. Those traitors who had been lurking in the shadows for so long caught wind of what was going on and took action. The Dreamweaver was one of them.

C: 想要借「秩序」来实现自己私欲的，往往没法掀起太大的波澜。真正可怕的，是那些自以为在救赎世人的家伙。
E: If these people are using Order to achieve their own desires, then they can never amount to anything. The truly scary ones are those who think they are saving the world.

C: 变成有钱的宾客！
E: I want to become a rich patron of this theater!

C: 怎样，是不是你听着也开始羡慕了？
E: Just listening to me must have you feeling envious, right?

C: 很多人都喜欢做白日梦，如果自己出生在更富裕的家庭会怎样，可也就是想想而已。不够努力才是他们没钱的原因。
E: Lots of people like to daydream. They'll think about what life would be like if only they had been born into a richer family, but that's just empty thinking. The reason they don't have money is that they aren't working hard enough.

C: 但我可以亲手改变自己的生活，只要踏实肯干，就像那些盛会巨星，名不见经传的小人物也可以成为闻名世界的大商人。
E: But I can change my life with my own two hands. I just need to be down-to-earth and work hard, just like the Festive Superstars. An unknown figure can become a world-famous businessperson.

C: 我曾受邀为暴君筑碑、佞臣塑像，故得见如何人命草芥、荒谬荒唐。他们许我以万千金纸、无限荣光，而我自然当倾情以报、答此重赏——
E: I have been invited to erect monuments in honor of tyrants and sculpt statues for sycophants — I have witnessed both the absurdity of the world and the insignificance of human lives. They have bestowed me with countless riches and infinite glory, and naturally, I am honor-bound to return the favor and respond to these hefty rewards...

C: 天啊，洛莲！你又为什么要发出那种声音？请注意我的手势！…哎，算了算了，今天就到这里吧！我们改日再排练。
E: Ack, Lorraine! Why are you making that noise again? Please, pay attention to my conducting! ... *sigh* Enough, forget about it. That's all for today! We'll rehearse again another day.

C: 一个人也能排练吗？
E: Can one person rehearse alone?

C: 托斯卡尼对着空气念念有词，满脸都是断定自己即将走上人生巅峰的喜悦。
E: Toskani mutters a few words to himself, ecstatic in the belief that he is about to reach the zenith of his life.

C: 「石剑」伸手在你的眼前虚晃了下，忽然你的视野闪过了几缕华丽光彩。
E: Stoneblade lifts his hand up and does a flick. Suddenly, a glorious brilliance flashes before your eyes.

C: 可惜啊…梦里什么都有，但连夜空都是假的。这里没有星星。
E: It's a shame though... We have everything here in the dream, but even the sky is fake. There are no stars here.

C: 你知道吗？刚来这边的时候，我看到餐厅竟然和垃圾站比邻，只觉得头皮发麻……
E: Did you know? When I first got here, I saw a restaurant right next to a waste collection station... It gave me the shivers...

C: 听上去是有些掉价，可许多宾客都是这样进入流梦礁的——他们的反应比我夸张多了。
E: It may be a little disappointing, but many guests entered the Dreamflux Reef in this way... though their reactions were a lot more dramatic than mine.

C: 指不定，哪天我甚至可以在宇宙间大摇大摆地逛荡，再也不用看其他人的脸色…嗐，希望我能活着见到那一天吧。
E: Who knows, maybe one day I'll be able to roam the vast universe as I please, without having to answer to anyone ever again... Ah, I hope I live to see that day.

C: 你在利用我？
E: You were using me?

C: 歌手知更鸟闻名银河的作品，《使一颗心免于哀伤》。
E: It's a famous piece by Robin, a singer known across the cosmos: If I Can Stop One Heart From Breaking.

C: 我来阻止！
E: Let me do it!

C: 怎么喜欢上钟表小子的？
E: What's your reason for liking Clockie?

C: 教教养生秘诀？
E: Keen to share your secret to good health?

C: 这里有我的乐坊、我的「家人」们。我可以隔着薄薄的橱窗玻璃，看它们演出、看它们用音符为人们带来欢乐。
E: Here, I have my band and my "kinsmen." Through just a razor-thin piece of glass, I can observe them performing — plus all the joy that their melodies bring people.

C: 每次小麦粉到货，我们坐在店里，将一大块面包切成小块大家轮流分享，连咖啡也是你喝一小口，再传给我喝一小口。
E: Every time a flour delivery arrived, we'd all sit in the store and chop a big loaf into smaller pieces of bread for everyone to take turns sharing. Even the coffee was shared between people, sip by sip.

C: 大家团结在一起度过难关，有这么好的一群人，流梦礁未来也一定不会差——这话我跟科玫不知说了多少次，她还年轻，她太相信那些数字，然而重要的是我们的心。
E: With such a talented group all working together to overcome hardships, the future of the Dreamflux Reef is looking great — I don't know how many times I've said this to Kaimee because she is still young and still trusts the data too much, but what's most important is our spirit.

C: 这时，一位老人开始每天光顾我的小店，他点了一杯咖啡，自己画着钟表小子的分镜，一条黑犬趴在他的脚边打盹，日复一日……
E: Just then, this old guy started visiting our cafe every day. He'd order a coffee and doodle pictures of Clockie while a dog snoozed at his feet. Day in, day out...

C: 关于折纸小鸟…
E: Tell me about the origami birds...

C: 嗯…有只好奇心很强的小鸟，总往人多的地方钻。最近<color=#dbc291ff>拜访「钟表匠」的客人</color>很多，那小鸟估计也在附近吧。
E: Hmm... There's an extremely curious bird that always likes to squirrel away in crowded places. Recently, there've been <color=#dbc291ff>many guests visiting the Watchmaker</color>. That bird must be nearby as well.

C: 但偶尔也会出现一些不合群的小家伙…所以我为它们修建了「清醒村」啾！
E: But sometimes, folks who don't get along with us do show up... So I built Rouseville for them, tweet!

C: 我看见凝固的时光流淌，满城灯火辉映举目蛮荒\n群星浮游于梦与梦之间，在神秘的忆海漾开微浪
E: I see the flow of time frozen, a city full of lights shining on the gaze of the savage.\nStars float between dreams, sending ripples across the mysterious sea of memories.

C: 这里就像一块未经打磨的原石，而我已按捺不住自己的想象——想象着如何将其雕琢成美玉，就如将质朴语词勾连为精巧的诗……
E: This place is like a rough stone, and I can't suppress my own imagination — about how to sculpt it into a fine jade, to connect plain words into an exquisite poem...

C: 恒久的幸福从未诞生于此，短见的欢愉总在人心痴缠\n闪耀的星辰难逃寂灭暗淡，神圣的谐乐早已荒腔走板
E: Eternal happiness was never borne of here, fleeting joy so alluring to the heart.\nScintillating stars struggling to flee solitary doom, the sacred harmony long lost in the cacophony.

C: 你看我，从来不在乎苏乐达赚了多少钱，我在乎的只是能不能把苏乐达的快乐带给更多的人——这就是同谐的伟大精神。
E: Look at me — I've never cared about how much money SoulGlad makes. I only care about whether I can deliver SoulGlad's happiness to even more people. This is the essence of Harmony's spirit.

C: 对于匹诺康尼而言，我是一名无籍的「偷渡客」；对于我的母星而言，我是「LOV-E三代量产型<unbreak>3451</unbreak>」；对流梦礁的居民而言，我叫「基尔克」。
E: To Penacony, I am a stateless stowaway. To my home planet, I am LOV-E III Mass Production Model <unbreak>3451</unbreak>. To the residents of Dreamflux Reef, I am Kirk.

C: 下次见。
E: I'll see you next time.

C: ——于是我一路探寻真相，来到了流梦礁，见到了与哈努努为伴的那位「钟表匠」。听他讲述了过去的事情，我才找到答案…至少在我这里，他是个英雄。
E: ...And so, I relentlessly sought the truth, arriving at the Dreamflux Reef, and met with that friend of Hanunue's — the Watchmaker. Upon hearing him narrate the past stories, I finally found the answer... he was a hero, at least in my heart.

C: 好，那这份纪念品就给你了——
E: All right, I'll give you this souvenir...

C: 朋友，这也是为什么我要跟你讲哈努努的故事，因为只有「传承」，才能抵御岁月的流逝……
E: Friend, this is why I need to tell you Hanunue's story. Only by telling the past to the next generation can we resist the flow of time...

C: （用表情表达你的困惑）
E: (Look bewildered)

C: 做水手没什么不好，不然我一开始也不会这样选择，可是…我小时候所听说过的水手，可完全不是现在这样。
E: There's nothing wrong with being a sailor, otherwise I wouldn't have made such a choice from the very beginning. However... the stories of sailors that I heard when I was young don't seem to match what I'm experiencing right now.

C: 又见面了啊…唉…可为什么偏偏就「又见面了」呢？
E: We meet again... but why did we "meet again," I wonder?

C: 我志向高远，只是时机未到。
E: While my ambitions are sky-high, it's not yet time to act on them.

C: 啊…没错，就是这种感觉，我已经等了很久了……
E: Yes, that's it. That's the feeling I've been waiting so long for.

C: 他到底是自己悲伤，还是想让别人感到悲伤，一时之间你似乎难以分辨了。
E: You can't tell if he's the one feeling sad or if he's trying to make others feel sad.

C: 我之前见到过一位客人，千里迢迢赶来，只为了能在梦境中品尝到他家乡的一种传统美食。
E: I once met a guest who traveled all the way from distant lands to the Dreamscape just so he could get a taste of a traditional dish from home.

C: 在投资理财这方面，或许您也更青睐激进一些的方案？
E: Perhaps you'd prefer more exciting investment proposals.

C: 它们来自遥远的异星，完全由一个细胞构成，你很难认为它们是一种具有灵知的生物。
E: They come from a distant planet and are composed of a single cell. You wouldn't think they are creatures that possess any intelligence.

C: 我想和你聊聊…
E: I want to chat with you...

C: 原始森林的肥美甲虫。
E: A plump forest beetle.

C: 「这是你被困于原始森林的第五天，为何一场美食寻觅之旅会酿成灾难！
E: "This is the fifth day you've been lost in the forest. What started as a quest for ingredients has turned into a tragedy."

C: 我想和你聊聊…
E: I want to chat with you...

C: 「厨师向你展示今晚的牛排——
E: "The chef shows you the steak cut used for this evening —"

C: 她讪笑着，眼神飘忽躲闪。如果不出意外，她内心深处还是将你归类到「有身份的客人」里了…虽然这么觉得也没错就是。
E: She offers a hesitant smile, her gaze flitting about. Subconsciously, she will still categorize you among the "guests with fancy statuses"... Well, it's a fair assumption to make.

C: 你真是个工作狂。
E: You're a true-blue workaholic.

C: 我喜欢这种消耗脑力的活儿。根据我手头上的信息，无论谈判成功与否，我都能为自己留一手。
E: I enjoy intellectual challenges like this. With the information I have at hand, I'll be able to emerge unscathed no matter how the negotiation turns out.

C: 嗯哼，这下人家就能想起来了啾……
E: Uh-huh, now I can remember what happened, tweet...

C: 让我想想…对了，有个好心的孩子总是害怕别人发生危险，可以去<color=#dbc291ff>靠近游艇边缘</color>的地方找找看啾~
E: Let me think... Oh yeah, there's a compassionate child who is always afraid that others will encounter danger. Go and check out the <color=#dbc291ff>area close to the edge of the airship</color>, tweet~

C: 宠勿饮将全副身心都扑在工作上，它永远只在乎如何用苏乐达讨好每一位顾客。
E: Soda Pop Pup is deeply engrossed in its work, only ever concerned with how it can delight every guest with SoulGlad.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 深呼吸，稳住……
E: Deep breaths now, keep it together...

C: 不得不说船长{F#她}{M#他}本人比玩偶更可爱…不知道能不能要个签名，有亲签的话这算不算全匹诺康尼最珍稀的限量款？。
E: Wow, captain does look much cuter IRL than {F#her}{M#his} doll... I wonder if I can get an autograph. Would it be the most priceless limited-edition merchandise in the whole of Penacony if captain signs it {F#herself}{M#himself}?

C: 搞成这个局面真的很抱歉…如果时间能倒流就好了……
E: I'm really sorry for causing so much trouble... If only I could turn back time...

C: 纵观空艇人员现况，我们缺的并不是技能如何娴熟的侍从，而是那些热心且更懂得珍惜机会的船员。
E: Looking at the current situation of the airship staff, what we lack isn't skilled attendants, but enthusiastic crew members who cherish the opportunities they are given.

C: 您有什么想说的，尽管吩咐吧，老佩德罗随时候命！
E: Just say the word! Old Pedro's always raring to go!

C: 我选塔塔洛夫！
E: I'll go with Tatalov!

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I have nothing else to ask.

C: 我…倾心于她的率真。但或许，我是在羡慕她的无忧无虑…唉……
E: I... like how she lives true to herself. Or maybe I'm just envious of how carefree she is... *sigh*

C: 但他们怎么明白？所有朋友都只记得你的家庭，却对你本人的努力与成就不屑一顾，多么悲哀啊。
E: I don't expect them to look past any of that. People around you only bother remembering your background, not your efforts or achievements. Sad, huh?

C: 你都有哪些渠道？
E: Tell me about your business connections?

C: 你可以把字体改大点。
E: You could just make the text bigger?

C: 行啊，稍微满足下你的好奇心也无妨…毕竟这东西就像脑子，有总比没有强。
E: Alright, I guess I could satisfy your curiosity... Curiosity is like a brain — it's always better to have it.

C: 呃…没兴趣不要紧，你听我讲完就有了！不会耽误太久，真的！
E: Uh... If you're not interested now, hear me out and you will be! I won't take much of your time, I promise!

C: 虽然官方发出声明，说是鸢尾花家系在测试什么「拟梦技术」时发生了机械事故，但这种说辞也就能骗骗傻子。
E: Although the official statement was that the Iris Family were testing some kind of DreamSim Tech and there was some kind of mechanical malfunction, only simpletons would fall for an excuse like that.

C: 你又在骗我了！
E: You're lying to me again!

C: 所以我就放弃啦。世界上的各种*侠*那么多，也不缺我一个吧。
E: That's why I gave up. There are all kinds of *heroes* all around the world. It won't make a difference without me.

C: 我问过他们的想法，但可惜…契波同学对组乐队没有兴趣，而艾尔菲同学则是有很明确的目标，打算离开匹诺康尼，就只好作罢了。
E: I asked them about it, but... Czipo isn't interested in forming a band, and Arfey's got a clear goal in her mind — she intends to leave Penacony, so I had to abandon that idea.

C: 嗯，我在学校里没什么朋友，现在联系最频繁的，也就是契波同学和艾尔菲同学。我们经常聚在一起，聊聊学校的事，还有未来的打算。
E: Mm, I don't really have a lot of friends at school. The ones I talk to the most are Czipo and Arfey. We usually hang out together to talk about school stuff and future plans.

C: 我不同意你的观点。
E: I disagree with your perspective.

C: …有时候真是不得不服老啊。
E: ...Sometimes one has to admit one's age.

C: 都说艺术是永恒的，可作为创作者，我的身体和精神又能撑多久呢。热情和灵感总是会慢慢磨灭，等到了那个时候，我该靠什么来支撑生活？
E: It's said that art is eternal. But as a creator, how much longer can my body and spirit endure? Passion and inspiration are being slowly ground to dust — when that time comes, what will I rely on to survive?

C: 我也希望——不过我很清楚自己的演技还不够优秀，但能在大家面前露脸只是第一步，以后肯定能成名的，就像你一样！
E: I hope so too! I know that my acting skills are not polished enough, but being able to show my face in front of an audience is the first step. There will be a chance to become famous in the future, just like you!

C: 非常好！自从在芮克先生的新片里露过面，邀请我的逐渐多了起来，但我还要兼顾自己的视频更新，还是挺忙的…不过为了梦想，再辛苦也是值得的！
E: Very good! Ever since I showed up in Mr. Reca's new film, I've been getting more invites. But I still have to maintain my video updates, so it's been pretty busy... It's all for my dream though, so all this trouble is worth it!

C: 我现在的成绩很难毕业，但我也不想继续为了自己不喜欢的事情耗费时间了…我更想拿这些时间去研究甜品，去研究经营商店……
E: Graduation will be difficult with my grades, but I don't want to waste time on matters that I don't like doing... I'd rather spend that time researching desserts and managing a shop...

C: 实在不行，「铁血金刚」、「光轮<unbreak>12000</unbreak>」、「神钢机甲」之类的，我也可以接受。
E: If those don't work, something like "Ironblood Titan," "Photon Wheel <unbreak>12000</unbreak>" or "Divine Metal Mech," I would have accepted those as well.

C: 你担心它的怒火会追逐着我，无论我去向何处？请放心。若有类似的可能性，我定然不会道出登上列车的请求。
E: Are you concerned that I won't be able to escape its wrath, no matter where I go? Rest assured, if that were truly a possibility, I wouldn't have made the request to board the Express.

C: 花是最忠诚的朋友，它们美丽，芬芳，而且不会说话。
E: Flowers truly are the most loyal of friends. They are gorgeous, fragrant, and don't talk.

C: 哈努兄弟不怎么爱看以他为主角的作品，但《钟表小子》系列却翻了一遍又一遍。
E: Hanu doesn't really like to view works starring himself as the protagonist, but he has gone through the Clockie series over and over.

C: 本梦境迷钟为展出限定款，具体尺寸请以到货实物为准。
E: This Dream Ticker is a limited exhibition edition. Please treat the actual merchandise's dimensions as accurate.

C: 请看下集，一台比钟表小子还要厉害的钟。
E: Please stay tuned for the next episode: A Clock Stronger than Even Clockie.

C: 万众瞩目的巨星之路，只为唯一的星中之星敞开，目前正在休赛维护中。
E: The path to becoming a megastar is only open to superstars above superstars. Currently, it is undergoing maintenance during the off-season.

C: 你见过太多奇景，这里的景色也没什么特殊的地方，你有些乏了，不愿多看。
E: You've seen plenty of breathtaking views, and this one here isn't anything special. You're bored of it and don't wish to admire it any further.

C: 救生艇牢固地悬挂在船身上，无论沿途风景多么壮丽，安全才是旅行的第一要义。
E: The lifeboat is firmly secured to the ship. No matter how splendid the view during the journey is, safety is always first on a voyage.

C: 你懂什么，这是船长的雕像，估计最近是刚摆上去的。
E: What do you know. That's the statue of the captain. It's probably something that was put up recently.

C: 此处人来人往，不时有人盯着你的雕像看得出神。你观察着住客们的表现，住客们也发现了你。
E: There are people coming and going all the time. Occasionally, some of them become lost in thought as they stare at your statue. As you observe the behavior of the guests, the guests start to notice you as well.

C: 看你面生，念你初犯这次就放过你，下次可别再乱跑了！
E: Since you don't look familiar, I'll let you off this time, considering it's your first offense. Don't let me catch you running around again!

C: 可是…报社最重要的就是传播真相啊。
E: But... the most important thing a newspaper does is disseminate the truth.

C: 我保证！我亲自体验过了！
E: I promise! I've experienced it myself!

C: …碰见同事也就算了，怎么还是那个罗格斯啊！
E: ...It's bad enough bumping into a colleague. What's worse, it turned out to be that Rutgers!

C: 不对，还得是《末世班尼》…
E: No... It's got to be Apocalyptic Benny...

C: 房卡…我房卡放哪了？
E: The keycard... Where did I put my keycard?

C: 四个知更鸟，炸！
E: Four robins. Checkmate!

C: 这玩意怎么骂人！
E: Why is it cursing!?

C: 跟那些享誉星际的大人物相比，我算个啥啊我！
E: I'm nothing compared to those cosmic superstars!

C: 然后就又被打回去了。
E: And then it got rejected again.

C: 真是！简直丧心病狂，竟然对那些可爱…咳！我是说，竟然如此肆无忌惮地破坏匹诺康尼的公共财产！
E: They're insane! They dare to harm those lovely... Ahem! I mean, they dare to vandalize the public property of Penacony! That's unacceptable!

C: 没错！只要那坏东西一天没落网，美梦剧团就一天免不了担惊受怕……
E: Exactly! The Sweet Dreams Troupe won't be free from fear until they catch the culprits...

C: 吃瓜也算我一个。
E: A scoop? I want ice cream, too!

C: 所以，我们…
E: So, are we...?

C: 可以看到，海选的反响非常热烈。
E: As you can see, the turnout for the auditions is very high.

C: 就你刚才直勾勾地盯着人照片那样，也好意思说我？
E: You're one to talk. You were gawking at her photo just now!

C: 那是一位踏星河而来的红色骑士，为人真诚，实力超群，绝对是选手中的极品。
E: That was a Red Knight who came through the ocean of stars, an earnest character with talents beyond most — a true luminary among the contenders.

C: 我最担心的是，有人指证我们也是叛徒，但我们又没有证据自证清白。
E: What I'm most worried about is that someone accuses us of betrayal as well — we have nothing to prove our innocence.

C: 累死了，说什么紧急疏散，跑了一大圈……
E: Gosh, I'm tired out. What's this nonsense about an emergency evacuation? They made us run in a circle...

C: 这些行李箱要是出了什么问题，把我亲兄弟卖了都赔不起……
E: If anything goes wrong with these suitcases, I wouldn't be able to pay for the aftermath even if I sold my brothers...

C: 不嘛，我还想玩！
E: Nooo, I still wanna play!

C: 乖，听话……
E: Be a good kid and listen to me...

C: 这如黄金般的岁月啊…它们如同泡沫一般消逝……
E: Ah, these golden moments... They vanish as swiftly as bubbles popping in the air.

C: 咳咳，很抱歉打断二位的对话。餐厅包房已布置完毕，二位有事相谈，何不暂缓，待挪步至餐厅再聊？
E: Ahem, I apologize for interrupting your conversation. The restaurant's private room is ready. If you two have matters to discuss, why not enjoy a brief adjournment and continue later in the restaurant?

C: 哎…只是我真的搞不懂，先前临时取消，现在口碑破产，再复排又有什么用呢？我们的表演真的能挽回人们对匹诺康尼的信任吗？
E: *sigh* ...I just really don't understand. It was canceled at the last minute, to begin with. Now that the event's rep is in shambles, what's the point of even resuming rehearsals? Can our show truly salvage the people's trust in Penacony?

C: 唉，都这个时候了，就别管什么公司不公司了。还是先把我们的本职工作做好。
E: *sigh* It's too late to be concerned about whatever the IPC is up to. We should just focus on our jobs first.

C: 要不是听说知更鸟小姐会登台，哼…但愿大典的表演不会让我们白来一趟。
E: If it wasn't for the fact that Miss Robin would be performing, hmph... I hope the festival's performances won't disappoint us.

C: 公司那边来的贵宾……
E: The guests from IPC...

C: 孩子，你先别急……
E: Child, don't be anxious...

C: 我听说按下按钮，就会爆炸！
E: I've heard that once you hit the button... BOOM!

C: 这位客人，我很抱歉……
E: I profusely apologize...

C: …你能靠谱点吗？等事情闹到学院那边去，看你还笑不笑得出来。
E: ...Can you be serious? If this goes back to the academy, let's see if you can still laugh about it.

C: 你和镜子里的自己猜拳，最后打成了平手。
E: You and your reflection play rock-paper-scissors, and in the end, it's a tie.

C: 作为永远行走在潮流前沿的开拓者，你当然不会错过时下最流行的乐队题材。音乐就是有着能让所有人沉浸其中的魅力，你相信那些美妙旋律正是你内心的呼喊。
E: As a Trailblazer who is always at the forefront of style, of course you won't miss out on the trendiest band-themed bandwagon. Music has that immersive allure, and you believe that those melodious rhythms are an outcry from your soul.

C: 传奇永不灭。在这个由梦境与潜意识组成的混沌世界里，你获得了永生。
E: Legends can never die. In this chaotic world formed from the dreamscape and subconscious, you have attained immortality.

C: 问得好，问得好！初来乍到的客人，还不知道「窥梦电话」的神奇之处！
E: A wonderful question! Please allow me to introduce you to the wonders of the Dreampeek Call, dear new guest!

C: 叮铃铃——感谢您使用窥梦电话服务！欢迎您下次再来！
E: *ring* Thank you for using the Dreampeek Call service! Please come back next time!

C: 叮铃…叮铃…叮铃……
E: *ring*... *ring*... *ring*...

C: 别害怕，那些噪音是有人按错了琴键。让我们来演奏正确的旋律，引导他们吧。
E: Don't worry. Those sounds are just someone pressing the wrong keyboard keys. Let us play the correct melody to guide them.

C: 《公司<unbreak>1800</unbreak>》
E: IPC 1800

C: 这是一款模拟经营类游戏，你将扮演「血锦之纪」的某位普通职员，在那个伟大却残酷的时代，书写属于自己的传奇！
E: This is a simulation managerial game where you will play as an ordinary employee in the Gloryblood Era, writing your own legend in that great yet cruel time!

C: 哼～唧！
E: Oink~ squeal!

C: 它小声应答。似乎在避免「喧哗」。
E: It answers softly, as if trying to avoid making noise.

C: 怎么一觉醒来，我回到自己的房间了？
E: How did I wake up back in my room?

C: 没错，那人小心翼翼，生怕将你惊醒。
E: That's right. That person was cautious, afraid of waking you.

C: 你的目光扫过收藏架上的藏品，最后停留在「星槎航模」上。
E: As you cast your gaze across the collectibles on the display shelf, it lands on the "Model Starskiff."

C: 那当然，艺术家的版权意识可是很到位的。
E: Definitely. You know, artists take their copyrights seriously.

C: 无…无可奉告，我不会透露客户隐私的。
E: I... I'm sorry, but I won't delve into my customers' privacy.

C: 为我好？呵，一般说这句话的人，真正想说的都是：「我其实是为了自己好，而你只是我的工具和踏板。」
E: For my sake? Hah! You know, when people say "for your sake," what they really mean is, "I'm doing this for myself, and you're just a means to an end."

C: 您想来点什么呢？本地的特色美食，还是那些早已失传的外邦菜肴？
E: What would you like to eat? Local specialties? Or perhaps something more outlandish that has been lost to time?

C: （我就在这里）
E: (I'm right here.)

C: 哈哈，谢谢你，年轻人。但用不着这么客气，我本来就很喜欢小孩子，只要你能多来和我聊聊天，我就已经很开心啦。
E: Haha, thank you, but there's no need to be a stranger, young one. I enjoy spending time with you young folks. Feel free to drop by anytime for a chat, and that would already make me very happy.

C: 谢谢，我在工作，这只是基本要求。一码归一码，还是被训了。唉，只好把嘟噜炖掉，请客道歉。
E: Thank you. That's the basic requirement of my work. But I won't cancel out the fault that got me in trouble, so I had to stew the Dollo for everyone to make up for it.

C: 我当厨师更厉害…但他们说，山之民当厨师，太浪费了。
E: I'm even more skilled in the kitchen... but they said it's not right for a Mountain Dweller to be a cook. It's a waste of my talents.

C: 我做过的，最好吃的东西，全烧角猪。
E: The best dish I ever had was a whole roasted hornswine.

C: 忙一点好哇！我们这些人可能就是太闲了，所以才会庸人自扰——谁知道呢？
E: Business? Good. Staying busy is good. Being idle can often lead to self-inflicted trouble. Well, who knows?

C: 要是有什么能全职看书的工作，好像也不错啊。
E: Wouldn't it be a dream to read books all day for a living?

C: 啊…虽然同为研究者，但我对树庭还真没什么了解。之前说过，有位人缘不好的教授曾经帮我给树庭写了封推荐信——
E: Well... despite being a researcher, I'm not well-versed in the Grove. As I mentioned, a not-so-popular professor wrote a recommendation letter for me...

C: 哎呀，那当然没有问题。虽说老身也是外地人，知道的东西绝没有那真言狮口多…但你放心，像我们这样年纪大的人，最不缺的反而就是时间。
E: No problem at all. While I may not be as wise as the Lion's Maw of Truth, and I'm an outlander myself... time is one thing us elders have in abundance.

C: 怎么不是全免费？
E: Why isn't it all free?

C: 又走神了？
E: Daydreaming again?

C: …说实话，我没想到您真的会掏钱。啊，请不要误会，我没有贬低您的意思，只是单纯因为太久没人买过了。
E: ...Honestly, I didn't expect you'd really do this. Ah, please do not misunderstand, I had no intention of disparaging you, it was simply because it's been ages since someone joined our membership.

C: 正因如此，缇安才主动接过「门匠」的职责，用「百界门」帮助人们从危险的地方脱身。
E: That is why Trianne actively took on the role of "gatekeeper" and uses the "Century Gate" to help people escape from danger.

C: 我的战友，我的队长...他们一个接一个被黑潮吞噬。不！不是这样的！艾格勒的光芒明明驱散了黑暗！我记得我们胜利了！
E: My allies, my captain... They were devoured by the black tide one-by-one. No! That's not right! The light of Aquila dispelled the darkness! I remember we were actually victorious!

C: 别提他！说起他我就来气，原来多好一孩子，现在也和那些外邦人学坏了——
E: Don't even get me started on him! Just thinking about him makes me mad! He was a good kid, but he's picked up all those outlanders' bad habits...

C: 哟，这位客人，您莫不是闻到了我包里的宝贝？
E: Yo, excuse me. Did you just smell this treasure in my bag?

C: 这东西可说来话长…您要是愿意听的话，我可以给您讲个故事。
E: It's a long story... But if you're down to listen, then I'm keen to tell it.

C: 我没什么想聊的了。
E: That's all for now.

C: 没问题！你想知道什么？关于布料或者木材的知识，或者躺椅本身的历史？
E: No problem! What do you want to know? The fabric or wood that it uses? Or maybe the history of the lounger itself?

C: 这就是我的信条——宁失荣耀，勿失性命。在强于自己的对手面前，要利用一切优势、搏至无憾。
E: This is my creed... I would rather lose my honor than my life. When you're facing an enemy who is stronger than yourself, you have to use every advantage that you can and fight without regret.

C: 问得好。很多悬锋战士踏上战场，就是为了迎接荣耀之死，所以他们都不怎么注重防护…这是习俗，没办法。
E: A fine question. Many Kremnos Warriors go to the battlefield in order to claim an honorable death. So they do not pay too much attention to defense... This is a custom, and there is nothing that can be done.

C: 多谢了，伙计，我相信会有那一天的。
E: Thank you, friend. I trust that day will come.

C: 异邦勇士，有什么需要？
E: Warrior of the outlands, what need you have?

C: 就聊这些吧。
E: Let's leave it there for now.

C: 我自己就能操作啊？
E: I can control it myself?

C: 告辞。
E: Goodbye.

C: 啊…一段略感熟悉的跫音。{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，有幸与你再度重逢。
E: Ahh... A rather familiar footstep. {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME}, it's a pleasure to see you again.

C: 难得再会，要多聊几句吗？
E: It's such a rare occasion to run into you again. Would you like to chat?

C: 请听。我们所有的知识，都从存在的事物中来。将军看到阿卡索斯，会思考该如何在城墙上布防；农夫看到阿卡索斯，会盘算这里的土壤适合种什么作物。
E: Listen. All of our knowledge comes from objects in existence. When a general sees Icatus, they will think of how to post defenses along the city walls. When a farmer sees Icatus, they will assess what kind of crops are suited to the earth at that locale.

C: 知识并非必须从存在的事物中来，只有依靠感官获得的知识才是如此。你刚才的推论中，已经蕴含了反面例证。
E: Knowledge does not have to come from things that exist. Only knowledge that comes from the senses is obtained this way. You already mentioned an example that disproves this in your previous argument.

C: （论证：「阿卡索斯」确实存在。）
E: (Theory: "Icatus" does actually exist.)

C: 你认识阿格莱雅？
E: Do you know Aglaea?

C: 刺激吧？它们就好这口。第七杯水清完，差不多味道就能散去了。这是我的经验之谈。
E: Quite a kick, right? They just love the flavor. By the seventh glass of water, the taste should start to fade — that's what I've learned from experience.

C: 整理出这些结论可费了我不少功夫，还得感谢山之民的兄弟们给我提供了不少主意，毕竟吉奥里亚的造物间能实现心有灵犀，说实话，我都有点羡慕。
E: Figuring all this out took quite a bit of effort, and I owed a lot to the Mountain Dwellers for their ideas. Creations of Georios have a kind of natural telepathy. I have to admit, I'm a bit envious.

C: 更高难度的捷足战舞会在点燃的炭火上进行——参与者需要事先淋湿自己的双脚，趁着水没有干，快速地在炭火上跳完所有的动作，然后一鼓作气平安撤离！
E: The more advanced version of swift-footed dancing is performed over ignited charcoal — participants must first wet their feet and, while the water is still wet, quickly complete all the movements on the hot coals, then make a swift escape carried by inertia before the water evaporates!

C: 速度不错，孩子，但你身后跟的这群人是怎么回事？
E: Nice speed, kid, but what's with the crowd trailing behind you?

C: 无论是民众还是黄金裔，都难以做到完美无瑕，缺憾一词与我们如影随形。
E: Whether it's the common people or the Chrysos Heirs, perfection is hard to achieve. The word "flaw" follows us like a shadow.

C: 呵，几十年前，这条胳膊被尼卡多利的眷属抢跑了去，留在了拉冬城里。还多亏一位拉冬勇士恰好在附近，不然现在站这跟你说话的就是别人了。
E: Heh, decades ago, this arm was snatched away by Nikador's kin and left in Ladon City. It was only thanks to a warrior from Ladon being nearby that I can stand here and talk today.

C: 嗨——朋友，我们还真是有缘啊！想要聊聊天吗？我随时奉陪哦，免费的~
E: Hey — friend, what a delightful coincidence it is to meet you! You wanna chat? I'll be here anytime! And for free too!

C: 等一下，路过的这位老师！
E: Wait a second! Hey, the master passing by!

C: 在这末世中，也就只有书卷的清新味道能带给人些安宁…哈哈，安宁得都忘了自我介绍了。
E: In this post-apocalyptic world, the fresh scent of books is about the only thing that brings peace... Haha, I've gotten so caught up that I forgot to introduce myself.

C: 和传说中的猫一样，菲莉丝兽拥有灵活优美的体型，直立的三角形耳朵和又大又圆的眼睛使它们成为出色的猎手，即使在光线昏暗的环境中也能轻松捕捉猎物。
E: Similar to the cat of legend, the Felys has a dexterous, elegant physique. Its upright triangular ears and big round eyes make them excellent hunters, able to deftly capture prey even in environments with dim lighting.

C: 地行龙是一种在黑潮刚出现的时期，就已经灭绝的野生动物，体型很小、靠吃虫子过活…但有着和奇美拉几乎相同的尾巴。
E: The Terrazard is a wild animal that was already extinct in the early days of the black tide. It was small in stature and subsisted on insects... but had a tail that largely resembles the chimera's.

C: 灵魂在得以质变擢升之前，就因肉体的衰败而枯萎——这将是何等的悲剧！
E: For the soul to wither and decline before achieving elevation because of a debilitated body... What a tragedy that would be!

C: 好吧，下次有机会再聊。
E: Okay, we'll talk next time.

C: 种子其实就是我们树庭的一些研究成果，在瑟希斯的祝福下，我们将自己的心血储存在特殊的「知识树」上，攫取其成熟的果实。
E: Seeds are actually some research outcome from the Grove. With Cerces' blessing, we stored our efforts in a special "Knowledge Tree," then harvest its ripened fruit.

C: 到底是什么原理才能让它在空中悬停的？或许应该先研究一下它的<color=#f29e38ff>操作石台</color>。
E: Why and how is it suspended in midair? Maybe you should investigate its <color=#f29e38ff>stone operating platform</color>.

C: 切换为通讯助手模式。
E: Switching to "Communication Assistant" mode.

C: 尤利安给你累计发送<unbreak>21</unbreak>条语音，内容均来自小学数学练习册的习题，我已经给他解答过了，目前暂无新消息。
E: Julian has sent you a total of <unbreak>21</unbreak> voice messages, all with questions from elementary math workbooks. I've already answered them for him. No new messages for now.

C: 跃渊。
E: Yueyuan.

C: 总之，科学研究是超长周期投资，我相信他有足够的耐心。
E: Anyway, scientific research is a long-term investment, and I believe he has the patience for it.

C: 这也就是个普通景点。
E: The view looks pretty average to me?

C: 根据黄金世留下的记载，雅努斯之门是{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}建立在世界尽头的无数道门扉。
E: According to records left behind from the Era Chrysea, the Gates of Janus are a countless number of doors set up by {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} along the edge of the world.

C: 有专程来朝圣的信徒，有研究历史的学者，也有来探索未来运势的商人。
E: The temple attracts devout pilgrims, scholars studying history, and merchants looking to glimpse their future fortunes.

C: 先聊到这儿吧，告辞。
E: Let's stop here for now. Goodbye.

C: 尼科马库斯加入推理协会的原因，说起来有点好笑——他是为了和科洛埃小姐有更多私下相处的时间才报名的。不过他确实博学多才，看过的故事比我们都多。
E: He joined the Deduction Society partly to spend more personal time with Miss Clio, which is... quite a ridiculous reason. He is a capable scholar at heart, though, and he's read more than any of us.

C: 是！阁下，请讲！
E: Yes, esteemed one, please speak!

C: 「昏光庭院」存世已久，只是因天空一族式微而逐渐凋亡。风堇让这个名号再临世间，以微光与温柔疗愈众人…想必也背负着殷切的梦想吧。
E: The Twilight Courtyard has existed for a long time, though it faded into obscurity with the decline of the Sky people. Hyacine has brought this name back into the world, healing others with her gentleness and light... She must be carrying her own deep dreams and aspirations.

C: 我要把你卖到花园去！
E: I'm going to sell you to the Garden!

C: 我想…给你一个拥抱。
E: I want... to give you a hug.

C: 托阁下的福，如今逐火之旅将近终点，世人企盼已久的新世界已然在向我们招手。
E: Thanks to you, the Flame-Chase Journey is nearly at its end, and the new world the people have long awaited is now reaching out to us.

C: 我喜欢做的事情还挺多。但论得上爱好的…恐怕也就只有战斗和鉴宝了。
E: There are quite a lot of things I enjoy. But as for what I'd call a hobby... I'm afraid only fighting and treasure appraisal make the cut.

C: 我没有阿格莱雅的思虑与手腕，没有万敌的信念与心性，没有遐蝶的理智与审慎…而与缇宝老师她们比起来，我还少了一份乐观与执着。
E: I don't have Aglaea's foresight and strategy, Mydei's conviction and resilience, or Castorice's rationality and caution... I even lack Tribbie's optimism and determination.

C: 拿我问罪的人都是坏人！
E: Anyone accusing me is a bad guy!

C: 坏了，我没有搞懂！
E: Wait... I don't get it!

C: 呵呵，太好了，我起初还有点担心观众会不理解呢。
E: Wonderful! I was a bit worried that the audience might not understand at first.

C: 你不是要来签名的吗？
E: You're not here for an autograph?

C: 还有君主饱受痛苦，她命令着医生说「杀了我，否则你就是弑君者。」
E: Another one suffered so much pain that she gave this order to her doctor, "Kill me, or be guilty of regicide."

C: 我明白了。
E: I see.

C: 不过说来好笑，他们总说我太过温和，对信众太过包容。但在我看来，正是这份包容，才是{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}最重要的教诲。
E: Though, amusingly, they often say that I'm too gentle and too forgiving with the followers. But to me, this very compassion is what embodies {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale's{RUBY_E#} most important teaching.

C: 铭记，并向众人宣扬——是奥德里西安的「门瑟」家长子，泰坦勋章的持有者，立志引导人们前行的贵族，尤里萨·门瑟本人，于刻法勒的注视下，向你伸出了援手。
E: Remember this and tell everyone — The eldest son of House Mentes of Odressian, holder of the Titan Medal, and a noble who's determined to lead the people forward — Ulysse Mentes, offered you a helping hand under the gaze of Kephale.

C: 元老院没这么不堪吧？
E: The Council of Elders isn't that bad, is it?

C: 我想起来了…有位织者小心翼翼又充满好奇心。它正趴在一座<color=#dbc291ff>隐秘房间的双开大门上</color>，猜测门的背后有什么呢。
E: I remember now... A weaver is cautious yet full of curiosity. It is lying on the <color=#dbc291ff>double door of a hidden room</color>, guessing what lies behind the door.

C: 如今，白日已经落幕、长夜依然无垠。不知到了下一个门扉时…我们还能否再度相见，又能否仍识得彼此呢。
E: Now, daylight has faded, and the long night stretches endlessly. When the next Entry Hour comes... I wonder if we'll meet again, and if we'll still recognize each other.

C: 我，无法原谅…怪物，更无法原谅。
E: I cannot forgive myself... and the monsters, even so.

C: 哈哈，只是一个玩笑。所有生命都有它存在的意义。
E: Haha, just kidding. All living beings have a reason to exist.

C: 我会的。您也多保重，客人。新世界再会吧。
E: I will. You take care as well, guest. See you in the new world.

C: 可如此说来，常有祭司和黄金裔可得见灵魂，你如何解释呢？
E: Yet priests and the Chrysos Heirs often claim to see souls. How would you explain this?

C: 翁法罗斯人的灵魂是不灭的吗？很可能。
E: Are the souls of Amphoreans immortal? Quite possibly.

C: 来古士老师不是也说过？我们找到的那些句子…可能是过早翻开的答案。
E: Didn't Mr. Lygus say as much? Those verses we uncovered... might be answers revealed before we understood the questions.

C: 走吧，走吧！就像{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}抛弃我们一样。
E: Go then, go! Just as {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} abandoned us all.

C: …贵客，我们来继续搜集若虫吧。
E: ...Honored guest, let's continue gathering nymphs.

C: 若发现若虫，请唤它们回来。拜托了。
E: If you find any nymphs, please call them back. I beg you.

C: 抱歉，艾格勒并不欢迎金丝的探访，没有记忆残晶，金丝无法违逆它的权柄。
E: Sorry, Aquila does not welcome the visit of the golden thread. Without the Memory Crystal Shard, the golden thread cannot defy their authority.

C: 提供「记忆残晶」。
E: Provide Memory Crystal Shards.

C: 总之，放心吧白厄哥，我可是你的头号小弟。就算你出去闯荡了，我也能把村子里的小崽子们治得服服帖帖。
E: Anyway, don't worry, Mr. Phainon. I'm your number one follower. Even if you leave to explore the world, I'll keep all the brats here in line.

C: 好好学武艺，别想那些有的没的。就算当不了神话里的救世主，守不住这个世界所有人，你也得回来守好咱这座小村庄啊。
E: Focus on your swordsmanship. Don't get lost in idle thoughts. Even if you never become the Deliverer they sing about in legends or can't protect the whole world, you still need to come back and protect this little village of ours.

C: 真想把面条嗦个不停，一直到肚子撑得鼓鼓的迷。
E: How I want to slurp and slurp until my belly's all full and round, mem.

C: 只许用「徕」一个音符伴奏的舞会马上就要举行啦，敲风铃就当你报名了迷。
E: The "re"-only dance is starting soon. Ring the wind chime, and you're in, mem!

C: 调味…地底深处的岩盐。
E: Seasoning... rock salt from deep beneath the earth.

C: 唉，真是一代不如一代了迷。
E: Alas, every generation, worse than the last, memi.

C: 这段时间很难捱，但希望就在眼前，一定要坚持住迷！
E: Times are tough right now, but hope is just ahead. Hang in there, memi!

C: 我也摸不着头脑迷。
E: I haven't the slightest clue, memi.

C: 不想动弹…
E: So comfy, don't wanna move...

C: 这只若虫努力地提着风铃，试图给出某种提示——希望它不会感到疲惫。
E: The nymph is trying its best to lift the chime. Looks like it's trying to tell you something. Hope it doesn't get too tired.

C: 这个嘛，作为往昔记忆的载体，若虫很容易受到混乱信息的影响：穿墙、闪烁、卡顿、原地不动…相信你已经在它们身上见到了许多异象。
E: Well, nymphs are basically vessels of old memories, so they're very prone to glitches: phasing through walls, blinking around, lagging, freezing in place... I'm sure you've seen plenty of weirdness from them.

C: 趴在桌子上休息时，远远就瞟见{NICKNAME}过来啦，和记忆中一样干劲满满呢。
E: I was just resting on the table when I spotted {NICKNAME} coming from afar. Still bubbling with energy, just like in my memories!

C: 好呀！那我们就放轻松，随便逛逛。我来当{NICKNAME}的导游吧？
E: Great idea! Let's take it easy and go for a walk. I'll be your personal guide, {NICKNAME}, how's that sound?

C: 哦！贵客，你来得正好，普鲁登蒂亚女士采访了凯撒的将领、士兵，甚至冒着生命危险采访凯撒的仇敌，这才写出如此宏伟的巨著啊！
E: Oh! Honored guest, you've come at just the right moment! Miss Prudentia interviewed the Imperator's generals, soldiers, and even risked her life to speak with the Imperator's enemies, all to craft such a magnificent epic!

C: 你，你也知道，咱这的蜜酿都是，不，不标浓度，也不标味道的！主打一个抽奖——
E: Y—You know, there are no concentration or flavor labels on these honey brew drinks! It's all down to luck—
Snore— Roar— Snore—

C: 断锋爵。
E: Dux Fragoris.

C: 太美丽了…
E: How beautiful...

C: 这座人台躲藏在广场的角落，仿佛被过往的舞台剧排除在外。
E: This mannequin hides in a corner of the square, as if excluded from all past stage plays.

C: 不给~
E: Nope~

C: 我没什么别的爱好，就是爱花钱，尤其是给中意的东西花钱。
E: I don't have many hobbies, but I do love spending money, especially on things I adore.

C: 这…浴场图书室中可寻得物证！曾有教章中，黄金裔一词赫然在列，但金血却以其他名词替代…
E: You... You can find solid evidence in the bath's library! The Chrysos Heirs were prominently mentioned in scripture, but other terms replaced "golden blood"...

C: 没想到在奥赫玛也能享受到这样的手艺…
E: Who knew I'd be able to enjoy such a soothing massage in Okhema...

C: 那必须的！不然你以为我平时喝秘酿的钱是哪来的！
E: Of course I won! How else do you think I got to pay for the ambrosia?

C: 确实…不过…
E: Indeed... However...

C: 嗷呜呜…嗷呜嗷呜？
E: Awoowoo... Awoo awoo?

C: 园丁都好温柔哦。
E: The Gardeners are all so kind.

C: 咕咕——小鸟要和和气气，不要吵架喔。
E: Hoot hoot... Birds must get along now. Don't fight.

C: 虽然它们有些调皮，但其实做事很有逻辑，还很重情感。
E: Although they can be mischievous sometimes, they are very logical and they value relationships a lot.

C: 稍等……请问这位科员，你是找我有什么事情吗？
E: Hold on... are you looking for me?

C: 这就说来话长了。你可以理解为对于星神相关的文化记载。
E: It's a long story. You can say it's a record of cultures related to Aeons.

C: 凭我跟你现在的关系，我还不能把所有的消息都告诉你。
E: With our current relationship, I can't tell you everything I know.

C: 那他们又该有谁去铭记，谁去哀悼呢？
E: Who will remember them? And who is going to mourn them?

C: 正因如此，我决定成立拟态保护协会，去保障非人生物的各项权益。
E: For this very reason, I decided to establish the Mimicry Protection Association to protect the rights and interests of non-human creatures.

C: 很遗憾，这里的科员大多数是一些自私之辈。他们过分关注眼前短浅的利益，升职加薪一类的事情更值得他们去付出心血。
E: Unfortunately, most of the researchers here are selfish. They care too much about short-term interests. They are more willing to put their efforts into things like promotion and salary.

C: 我是那位年轻有位的星神学者莱斯莉的妹妹，目前在密卷科担任科员，我叫埃美丽。
E: I'm the younger sister of Lesley the prodigy Aeon scholar. I am Emily. I currently work as a researcher at the Department of Insight.

C: 应物科都是按照什么规矩分发奇物？
E: What is the Department of Implement Arts' regulations in terms of distributing Curios?

C: 除了波少，谁还可以不走流程就拿到奇物？谁还可以自行挑选奇物？你以为你这样初来乍到的新人，就能拥有波少的学识和水平吗？
E: Except for Master Capote, no one gets Curios without going through the normal process. No one gets to choose Curios. You think a newbie like you can match Master Capote's knowledge and standard?

C: 年轻的时候吧，这伯纳德情窦初开，想要追密卷科一个姑娘。我们这些做兄弟的能不帮忙吗？那前前后后，忙了好一哆嗦。
E: Back when he was young, Bernard fell in love for the first time with a girl from the Department of Insight. As his brothers, we all helped him to pursue her for a while.

C: 就聊到这里吧。
E: That's it for now.

C: 嗷呜嗷呜～在出发之前，我暂时打算在树庭停留一段时间。我还记得不少荒笛大人的故事，你如果想听的话……
E: Awoo awoo~ Before setting off, I plan to stay at the Grove for a while. I still remember quite a few stories about Lord Terravox, if you'd like to hear them...

C: 你没看见吗？我们之间已经隔了一层{RUBY_B#空气墙}可悲的厚障壁{RUBY_E#}了喀…
E: Can't you see? There's already a {RUBY_B#invisible wall}pathetic thick barrier{RUBY_E#} between us, crrk...

C: 那就合理了——穿越虫洞本来就会晕晕的喀！
E: Then it makes sense. You'll get dizzy passing through a bughole anyway, crrk!

C: 就没人发现我在偷懒了！
E: No one would notice I was slacking off!

C: 嗯…有位织者四处行盗。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>水淹的木箱上</color>，于洪水前踯躅呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver on a stealing spree. The golden thread brings tidings: They are lurking on <color=#dbc291ff>flooded wooden crates</color>, hesitating before the flood.

C: 哈，这两位还是老样子呢…利波近来可没少从他们身上取材，新作的诗歌就连赫西俄德老师都忍不住发笑呢。
E: Heh, these two haven't changed a bit... I have been getting plenty of material from them lately. Even Master Hesiod couldn't help but laugh at my latest poems!

C: 斐第斯叔叔，我刚刚表现得怎么样？
E: Uncle Phedes, how did I do just now?

C: 你们聊得很开心啊。
E: You guys seem to be having a great time.

C: 好久不见，{NICKNAME}。我来介绍一下：这两位是费贝尔老爹的女儿；这是德墨忒尔婶婶家的波瑟芬妮；还有这位，来自悬锋城的天谴猎手小姐。
E: It's been a while, {NICKNAME}. Allow me to make introductions. These lovely ladies are Old Fabio's daughters. This is Possephone from Aunt Demetria's family. And this distinguished warrior is the Furiae Archer from Castrum Kremnos.

C: 对了，你们的「探险队」什么时候打算再招收新人？我会踊跃报名的哦。
E: Speaking of which, when will your "expedition team" be accepting new recruits? I'd be very interested in signing up.

C: 命运如此厚待，我、我该如何证明自己的感激与虔诚……
E: Fate has been so kind to me... H-How can I ever prove my gratitude and devotion...

C: 原本四个人的社团，就变成了两两的组合。认识了这么多年，你们竟然！唉……
E: We used to be a club of four, but now it's split into pairs. After all these years together, I can't believe you two... *sigh*

C: 这没办法，老朋友。无论天地如何剧变，人们对秘酿的渴求始终如初。
E: Can't help it, old friend. No matter how drastically the world changes, people's thirst for ambrosia remains the same.

C: 哟！来，跟我一起！健身！锻体！赞美悬锋军！
E: Yo! Come on, work out with me! Let's get fit! All hail the Kremnos Army!

C: 你错过了餐馆的开张！
E: You missed the restaurant's grand opening!

C: 但外面的世界，充满了全新的挑战……
E: But the world out there is full of brand-new challenges...

C: 可骑士放下剑柄，又能做些什么呢？
E: What else can a knight do once they lay down their sword hilt?

C: 我是来加入你们的。
E: I'm here to join you.

C: 诶诶，咱们还是不是好搭档了？虽然我把背负的「记忆」和「心愿」都托付给了你，也不要在这种时候全部揭露啊……
E: Hey, hey, aren't we still partners? Even though I entrusted you with my memories and wishes, there's no need to reveal everything at a time like this...

C: 我解读一下：约定一直作数。
E: Let me break it down: The promise still stands.

C: 往凯撒头上贴纸，你是头一个。
E: A sticker on the Imperator's head... You're the first one to ever pull that off.

C: 去送快递。
E: You could make deliveries.

C: 可以用火箭发射过去。
E: You can launch it over with a rocket.

C: 阁下，天外一定也有繁花似锦的世界吧？若有机会，请你为我捎带些旅途中偶遇的花种吧。
E: I believe there must be worlds blooming with lush flowers beyond the sky as well, right? If you have the chance, please bring me some flower seeds you encounter along your journey.

C: 在我看来，纷争正是为终结纷争而存在。纵使此世必要之痛，亦有迎来愈合的一天。
E: In my view, strife exists to end strife itself. Though it may be a pain this world needs, there will come a day of healing.

C: 「永夜之帷」的记忆中勾勒过——你的双足丈量过不少天外的世界，为我亲口讲讲那些「大地」的模样吧。
E: As depicted in the memories of the Veil of Evernight, you have traversed many worlds beyond the sky. Tell me, what is the "Earth" there like?

C: 你为荒笛讲述了冰天雪地的雅利洛-Ⅵ号，以及贝洛伯格的人们与寒潮和风雪持续千年的抗争……
E: You told Terravox about the frozen lands of Jarilo-VI, and how the people of Belobog have been fighting against the Eternal Freeze and blizzards for a thousand years...

C: 嗯…有位织者在漫长的岁月里独自观赏了许久风景。金丝带来消息，它仍在<color=#dbc291ff>遥远的高处边缘</color>，编织那场粉色的幻梦呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who has been watching the scenery alone for ages. The golden thread brings tidings: They're still at the <color=#dbc291ff>edge of a distant height</color>, weaving that pink dream.

C: 那么，就让我完成应尽的义务吧。希望这能让那位英雄的心归于平静……
E: Well then, let me fulfill my duty. May this bring peace to the hero's heart...

C: 「龙骸古城」。
E: The Dragonbone City.

C: 嗯，我会一直在此等待。
E: It's alright. I'll wait here for you.

C: 即使去过了那么多星球，我对银河还是所知甚少，因为它太广袤啦。关于银河的实质众说纷纭，倒是有几个假说可以和你分享。
E: I've been to many different worlds, yet I still know very little about the galaxy, simply because it's too vast. As for its nature, there are a few theories that I can share with you.

C: 关于星神…
E: About the Aeons...

C: 我有别的问题…
E: I have another question...

C: 关于同伴…
E: About companions...

C: 我的过去？要让你失望了，我只是个普通上班族。
E: My past? Sorry to disappoint you, but I'm just an ordinary white-collar employee.

C: 你也可以去找瓦尔特聊聊，如果他有空的话……
E: You can go and chat with Welt if he has the time...

C: 《冒险鼹鼠队》哪里有趣了？
E: What is so interesting about The Adventurous Moles?

C: （「让一切都回到它本来的位置」…这是指矿灯不在它原本的位置吗？）
E: ("Let everything return to its original position"... Does this mean that the miner's lamp is not in its original position?)

C: 看好了啊，{M#小子}{F#小姑娘}。那个亮着<color=#dbc291ff>黄灯</color>的阻车器，就是<color=#dbc291ff>满载矿车</color>的泊位。
E: Watch carefully, {M#boy}{F#girl}. The blocker with the <color=#dbc291ff>yellow light</color> on is the stop for <color=#dbc291ff>the loaded mine carts</color>.

C: 之后记得再来。我一定得出一道能难得住你的题……
E: Remember to come back later. I'll definitely come up with a puzzle that even you can't solve...

C: 看到你的水平这么高，我那笨徒弟也坐不住了。他最近听话了不少，也肯在正道上下功夫了…这都多亏了你啊。
E: After seeing your amazing skills, my useless apprentice has been feeling the heat. He's been better-behaved recently and is willing to put more effort into the hands-on stuff... This is all thanks to you.

C: 臭小子，没大没小！等你正式上岗了，可千万别捅什么篓子——出了事也别和人说你是我带出来的！
E: You brat, watch your mouth! Don't be a troublemaker when you get a job. And if you ever mess up on the job, don't tell anyone that I trained you.

C: 嗯？好久不见啊！你最近怎么样？我现在一人在这大矿区负责调度矿车呢。
E: Oh? Long time no see! How have you been? I'm now responsible for dispatching mine carts in the Great Mine by myself.

C: 嗯？好久不见啊！你最近怎么样？我现在一人在这大矿区负责调度矿车呢。
E: Oh? Long time no see! How have you been? I'm now responsible for dispatching mine carts in the Great Mine by myself.

C: 满载到黄灯，满载到黄灯…这回可错不了了。
E: Loaded cart to yellow, loaded cart to yellow... I can't get it wrong this time.

C: 哈哈，这回总算没问题了。
E: Haha, got it this time.

C: 滴、答，宾客，您看起来很疲惫啊，像是遇到了忆域迷因的微波炉，您难道没有在晨练时间吃晚饭吗？
E: Tick, tock, you look tired, dear guest. You look like a microwave that ran into a Memory Zone Meme. Did you not have your dinner during your morning workout?

C: 滴答，多亏您把我修好了，谢谢您，祝您能早日成为梦想中的<unbreak>54</unbreak>号星际燃油。
E: Tick-tock, thank you for fixing me up. May you soon become the Interstellar Fuel #54 of your dreams.

C: 当完成修复的瞬间，我就会爆炸，把整个美梦炸得粉碎——害怕了吗？
E: I'll explode the moment repair is complete, and blow this whole dream to smithereens! Afraid now?

C: …咳，抱歉，我不该跟您说这些。总之，世玲姐之前丢给我一套奇怪的模拟软件，让我做测试。
E: ...Ahem, sorry about that. I shouldn't have told you all that. In a nutshell, Miss Shiling threw me a set of weird simulation software and asked me to test them.

C: 没错。如你所见…我中了对方的陷阱！
E: Yes, as you can see... I fell right into their trap!

C: 以前？我一直是工程师，之前为「星际和平公司」工作，定级是…P<unbreak>24</unbreak>？P<unbreak>25</unbreak>？记不清了，我离开那里有好一阵子了。
E: Before this? I've always been an engineer. I used to work for the Interastral Peace Corporation, and I made rank... P<unbreak>24</unbreak>? P<unbreak>25</unbreak>, I think? I can't remember, for it's been a while since I worked there.

C: 「好吧，依照约定，咱们可以谈一谈了，你有什么想聊的？」
E: "According to the agreement, we're allowed to talk. Anything you want to chat about?"

C: 就像缓缓飘移的幽灵——你来到冬日的严寒中——！
E: Just like a drifting snow phantom — you've come in the dead of winter!

C: 至于这幅画嘛——价格是<unbreak>12000</unbreak>信用点。你要是真有诚意，那就至少得再加个价……
E: As for the price of this one — <unbreak>12,000</unbreak> credits will do. You should pump it up a little if you're really sincere about things...

C: 不过，你要是愿意和我的大宝贝对练一番——我也不是不可以考虑。
E: But then again, if you're willing to spar with my big baby, then I might just be willin' to reconsider.

C: 嗐，别再用这个老古董了，再出问题我可真折腾不动了。
E: Hey, don't try using this old relic. If anything happens to it, I'd lose my mind.

C: 我拍到了冰雕…
E: I took a picture of the ice sculpture...

C: 市民们或许不知道，在这里遍布错综复杂的道路与机关障碍：难道银鬃铁卫们都不会迷路吗？
E: The citizenry may not have known, but intricate road networks and mechanical obstacles are placed all over the premises: Do Silvermane Guards not get lost?

C: 对于这个寒冷的世界而言，能够带来温暖的纺织品本身就有种「存护」的意味。
E: For a freezing world, textiles that bring warmth have an inherent meaning of "Preservation."

C: 「彼时，人们只记得她与阿丽萨的联结，将其与前任大守护者多作比较，但她最终以非凡的手腕使众人折服，将离散的人心重新聚于一处；」
E: "During that time, people only recognized her by her connection with Alisa. They compared her to the previous Supreme Guardian, but eventually, she won over the people's hearts in her own unique way, reuniting the hearts of those that have drifted apart."

C: 「她是贝洛伯格大学的创建者与永久名誉校长，全贝洛伯格最慷慨的学术赞助人：她置纷乱的语言与度量衡于同一准绳之下，打破了隔绝众人心智的藩篱；」
E: "The founder of the University of Belobog and its permanent honorary dean, the most generous academic sponsor in all of Belobog: She compiled confusing languages and metrics, measured them against the same standards, and broke the barriers that separate people's minds."

C: …请问您是？
E: ...Could I ask who you are?

C: 我相信你们，这件事就拜托啦。
E: I trust you. I'm counting on you.

C: 这艘幽灵星槎的航行之旅，应该就到此结束了。
E: The voyage of the phantom starskiff should now come to an end.

C: 那个，虽然有些破坏气氛……
E: Well, I know this spoils the mood...

C: 说什么呢！技术再不好也不至于拍出这种黑影吧？
E: What do you mean! No matter how bad my photography is, it wouldn't produce these shadows, would it?

C: 拍的是佩佩
E: Just snapping a photo of Peppy

C: 可恶，你居然趁机拍下虎克大人出丑的样子，给虎克等着！
E: Unbelievable! You actually took the opportunity to capture Pitch Dark Hook the Great's embarrassing moment. Just you wait!

C: 有了，那这张照片就由你来拍吧，这样就是不一样的回忆了！
E: I know, why don't you take this photo then? Then it becomes a whole new memory!

C: 好好好~看在你帮我这么多忙的份上，我就承认这点吧。
E: Alright, alright~ As you've helped me so much, I'll give you that.

C: 没什么。
E: It's nothing.

C: 这叫「关怀备至」。
E: It's called an "all-inclusive package."

C: 你是温和派、还是激进派？
E: Are you feeling adventurous or cautious?

C: 没错，许久以前，这金人巷曾是罗浮第一夜市。
E: That it was. Many years ago, Aurum Alley was the most popular night market on the Luofu.

C: 你喝吧，我不饿。
E: No, thanks, I'm not really thirsty.

C: 还不快夸夸我？
E: I'm so awesome. I've done such an amazing job!

C: 不小心又给自己揽了一身事。
E: Seems like I could make a career out of this.

C: 头好痒，好像要长出脑子了。
E: I think my brain is about to explode from all this.

C: 金人巷原本是长乐天洞天最繁华的夜市，在过去，这条以美食和商业著称的巷子里挤满了为主人领取货物的金人…不过繁华早已过去了。
E: ...Well, Aurum Alley was originally the busiest night market in Exalting Sanctum. In days past, this alley, famed for its food and commerce, was brimming with aurumatons collecting goods for their masters... but that prosperity has long since passed.

C: 要是身有贵恙，我可以给帮忙看看，再开点儿药嘛。
E: If that's the case, I can give them a check-up and prescribe some medicine.

C: 如果是你的快递有问题呢？
E: What if we discover a serious issue with your package?

C: 别人叫我搬，我就搬了，我也没想到里面装着故障机巧，这件事和我没有关系。
E: I was told to move something, and I did. I had no knowledge of the presence of an ingenium. This matter has nothing to do with me.

C: 我准备好了。
E: I'm ready.

C: 你们肯定就是这样想的。
E: That was definitely your plan all along.

C: 码头危机暂时结束，但是「金人巷复兴」才刚刚开始呢！
E: The dock crisis is over for now, but the rejuvenation of Aurum Alley has just begun!

C: 家父不是已经拒绝了吗？
E: Hadn't my father already refused?

C: 会长反对公司就是为了这个？
E: Is that why the president is against the IPC?

C: 这下码头不仅能够支持与更多的商家合作，还打开了另外一条去往港口的通路，这样「物流规划」也会轻松不少，让我们一起为金人巷复兴努力吧！
E: We now have the additional capacity to work with more businesses and have also opened a new route leading to the port. With streamlined logistics planning, I think we'll see a revitalized Alley in no time!

C: 不止这个，小秘书说这也是宣传金人巷的机会。
E: Not only that, putting Spices Supreme on the map would increase interest in the Alley as a whole.

C: 请记住，机巧鸟不能托运龙女。
E: High, Crycranes' flight. Short, Bailu's height.

C: 即便是到现在我也很难想象，你们将如何竞标金人巷…但这也并非不可能！
E: Even now it's hard for me to imagine how you are going to win the bidding. As slim a chance as we have, there is still hope.

C: 你为什么强调这事和自己没有关系？
E: Why do you emphasize that this matter has nothing to do with you?

C: （霍三哥要求我不能打开货物，也不能问客人是谁？）
E: (Mr. Huo has forbidden me from opening up the "goods," and from asking who the client is?)

C: 《银河通用疾病速查》？
E: Pan-Cosmic Quick Diagnosis Booklet?

C: 公司几乎向金人巷所有的商户都发送了邀请函，希望商户们能与公司建立合作，我还有些犹豫……
E: The IPC had sent invites to almost all the stores in Aurum Alley, wishing to strike deals with us all. I'm still a bit hesitant...

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 我能理解孩子们对金人巷的热情，这一点我也一样，我们都想让这里更加繁荣。
E: I can tell that the opposing side is eager to see Aurum Alley thrive. Your passion resonates with me.

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 很多人受到你的帮助后，会反过来帮助商会，真好啊。
E: It's fantastic — many folks began lending the Merchant Guild a hand after you helped them out.

C: 没有商铺支持的商会是不成立的，去和他们加深合作吧。
E: The Merchant Guild cannot exist without the merchants' support. Try to establish a more meaningful partnership with them.

C: 走吧走吧！
E: Come on. Let's go!

C: 这里真的是「尚滋味」吗？好像是，又好像不对。
E: Is this really Spices Supreme? Could be, could be not.

C: 您来啦！都怪我，刚刚飞太快了没注意，看来得装个后视镜了……
E: There you are! It's my fault. I was drifting and not paying attention. I really should install a rear-view mirror...

C: 啊？
E: Huh?

C: 你们十王司这么神出鬼没的吗？
E: Is the Ten-Lords Commission always so mysterious?

C: 作为资金申请的基础课题报告已经提交上去了，最后这个…就是纯凑数了！毕竟咱们科研的关键就是个严谨，七份报告，一份都不能少。
E: The project report for the funding application has already been submitted. This last one... well, it's just to fill the quota! After all, the key to scientific research is rigor, so there must be no less than seven reports.

C: 总之这次，你就随意发挥吧。之前做过研究的三个课题样本，你随便选一个就行。
E: Anyway, this time, you can do as you please. Choose any one of the three research topics that have been studied before.

C: 结不结实不重要！我小心点用就没问题！重要的是：你看到这个反应了没！
E: Its sturdiness doesn't matter as long as I'm careful while operating it! The more important thing is: Do you see the object giving out the reading?

C: （所以扑满原来还有这种奇怪的能力设定吗？！）
E: (Trotters have strange abilities like this!?)

C: 这样的「特殊情况」，只能采取一些「特殊措施」了……
E: These "special situations" call for "special measures"...

C: 刚撕下广告画的一个角，眼前的画布似乎开始…扭动了。
E: The second you tear a corner of the advertisement, the canvas begins to... twitch.

C: 肯定是恶作剧！
E: This must be a prank!

C: 毋庸置疑！这就是「它」寻觅的价值。作为钥匙，它已然圆满……
E: This is without a doubt the value that it seeks! As a key, its purpose is served...

C: 别提！说来我就一肚子气，那帮老家伙，居然说我之前已经提交过一份类似的论文，还全都是错别字，让我别再添乱了！
E: Don't bring it up! I'm so mad at those old geezers. They said I had already submitted a similar paper and that it was even full of typos. Ugh, I don't wanna have to go through that again!

C: 但「异常」往往就是会藏身于随处可见的小东西里！只要这么做，一定可以使它显出原形……
E: But anomalies always hide in tiny, commonplace things! Just have to do something to make it show its true form...

C: （这个声音…「异常」应该就在附近。）
E: (This sound... the "anomaly" should be close by.)

C: 哎！灵感突然进入了我的大脑…这个坐标，感觉像是某种和<color=#dbc291ff>「影像」</color>有关的「设备」…我说不准具体是啥，你就当听个想法吧！
E: Oh! I feel an intuition coming into my brain... This coordinate feels like it's an "equipment" that's got to do with "<color=#dbc291ff>images</color>"... I can't tell what it is. Count it as a tip from me!

C: 希望我们以后还能常见，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
E: I hope we can see you often, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}.

C: 关于美食庆典…
E: About the food fest...

C: 您说话还挺…跳跃的。「真相」可是个很严肃的词，希望您能慎用。
E: Your tone is quite... animated. The "truth" is a very serious word. I hope you will wield it with more prudence.

C: 作为自诩「崇拜事实」的调查记者…我想现在只有一个办法了。
E: As the self-styled investigative reporter, the "Disciple of Truth"... I can only think of one way.

C: 我们出去拼凑现有的线索吧，{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
E: Let's piece together the clues we've got, {F#miss}{M#mister}.

C: …开个玩笑，我就喜欢像你这样务实的个性。
E: ...I'm kidding. I like how pragmatic you are.

C: 你怎么知道我有超能力的？
E: How did you find out about my power?

C: 我就在这等着，看你能拿我怎么办！
E: I'll wait right here. Let's see if you can handle me!

C: 您好呀。有点难以启齿，但…人家有点事想找您帮忙。
E: Well, hey there. It's a bit awkward, but... I need to ask you a favor.

C: 即使是在梦里，生活也不会那么单纯，努力并非一定能得到结果，这世界总是这样。
E: Life isn't simple even in a dream, and hard work doesn't always pay off. That's just how the world works.

C: 你也不想被舒翁讨厌吧？
E: You don't want Siobhan to be mad at you, right?

C: 要是早答应我，你也不至于落到现在这样…哎，还好最近家主的心情不错，我带你去见她，这次可得注意点说话啊。
E: If you had just listened to me earlier, you wouldn't be in this mess... Lucky for you, The Family Head is in a good mood, so I'll take you to see her. Just be careful with what you say.

C: 哼，你清楚就好，别整天惦记着你的那些怪物了，我来处理它们。走吧。
E: Hmph, good to know. And don't spend all day obsessing over those monsters of yours. I'll handle them. Now let's get going.

C: 你说的没错。「遥祝启程」的呈现形式与我的诠释方式是有关系的。
E: You're right. The way how the Graced Voyager is presented does relate to my interpretive method.

C: 等等…在我请求之前，你难道不想问问，到底是谁把包裹寄到列车的吗？
E: Wait... Before I do that, don't you want to ask who sent the package to the Express?

C: 会说话就多说点！
E: You're so good at buttering up. Keep going!

C: 听说只要按动某些机关，就能触发他们留下的惊喜。
E: I heard that if you press the right mechanisms, you'll be able to trigger the surprises that they've left behind.

C: 她依旧保持着那副笑容，一言不发。
E: The smile remains on her face, but she doesn't utter a word.

C: 这么长时间过去了，你还是放不下心中的包袱吗？
E: Seems like you still can't let go of the past even after all this time.

C: 去了「钟表匠」的居所。
E: I went to the Watchmaker's house.

C: 我来解释吧，事情是这样的……
E: Let me explain. This is what happened...

C: 但一切「表演」都带有目的，这部影片的故事应该没这么简单吧，小灰毛？
E: Then again, every "performance" has its own intention. I'm sure the story of this movie isn't that simple. Am I right, Gray Hair?

C: 我已经跟梅芙恩家主申请过了——今后我会作为顾问帮助克劳克影业妥善发展，让钟表小子的指针一直转动下去。
E: I've requested it from Lady Maeven. From today onward, I will assist Clock Studios in their steady development as a consultant and keep the hands of Clockie turning.

C: 关于你对「钟表匠」的印象。
E: About your impression of the Watchmaker.

C: 这个时候是不是该念几句广告词？
E: Isn't this a good time to read some lines?

C: 汽水先生，请等等我——「为了苏乐达，为了拯救美梦小镇，钟表小子一定会再回来的！」
E: Mr. Soda, please wait for me — for SoulGlad and for the Dreamville, Clockie will be back!

C: 等我再琢磨一下…
E: Allow me to ponder it a bit more...

C: 哈哈！你真幽默！那就祝你成功吧。
E: Haha! You're funny! Well, I wish you the best of luck then.

C: 慢着…你是来接手拍摄的摄影师？忍那些菜鸟很久了，就等你到场，快，赶紧开工！
E: Hold on... You're the camera person here to take over? I've had it with these amateurs. We've all been waiting for you. Hurry, it's time to start rolling!

C: 下一个镜头的演员已经就位……
E: The next scene's actors are already at their marks...

C: …没错，是我。
E: ...That's right, here I am.

C: 滴答，但其实——大家的梦想已经在旅途中都实现了呀！
E: Tick-tock, but in truth, everyone's dreams have already come true in this journey!

C: 滴答——滴答！哈努兄弟！你受伤了！
E: Tick-tock... Tick-tock! Brother Hanu! You're hurt!

C: 钟表小子，让我给你点颜色看看！
E: I'll teach you a lesson, Clockie!

C: 为角色拍摄外传是克劳克影业传承至今的光荣传统，那些未能在正片中得到充分塑造的角色将在外传中散发他们独特的光彩，吸引更多的人气。
E: Filming extra stories for characters is a glorious tradition that Clock Studios has continued to the very present. The characters who didn't get to be fully shaped in the main flick can showcase their uniqueness in extra stories and gain more popularity.

C: 咳，我的意思是——能力越大，责任越大，而且大导演的点子怎么会出问题呢？
E: Well, what I mean is... with power comes great responsibility. How could a great director's idea ever go wrong?

C: 「一天，一颗流星坠落在了小镇中。这场灾难让鳄鱼们手足无措，也给镇民们创造了反抗的机会。
E: "One day, a meteor crashed into the town. The crocodiles were at a loss for what to do, creating a chance for the townsfolk to launch a counterattack."

C: 「面对向自己宣战的镇民，石头老板选择了……」
E: "Faced with townsfolk openly hostile against him, Boss Stone decided to..."

C: 美梦小镇遇到的所有危机几乎都跟石头老板有关，他就是动画里的万恶之源，人人都对他恨之入骨。
E: Almost every single disaster in Dreamville was connected to Boss Stone. He's the source of all evil in the series, and everyone loathes him.

C: 当初的镇民们天天给他挖石头，真是太可怕了！虽然做动画很苦，但肯定比挖石头要舒服多了…吧？
E: Back then, the townsfolk would dig up stones for him all day. It was so terrible! Animating is seriously hard work, but it's far more comfortable than digging up stones... right?
...Hmph.

C: 啾，折纸小鸟正在休息…不要打扰我啾……
E: Tweet, Origami Bird is resting now... Stop bothering me...

C: 真期待啊…
E: Can't wait to find out...

C: 嘘，「专项委托」的事你可别对外声张——咱们得闷声发财，注意安全。
E: Shhh, don't leak anything about our "special assignment" — we gotta keep quiet, get rich, and stay safe.

C: 触碰录像带。
E: Touch the tape.

C: {NICKNAME}，你刚刚跑哪去了？时间紧急，就不要乱跑啦！
E: {NICKNAME}, where were you just now? Time is of the essence. Please don't just run about.

C: 很好！接下来——虽然你很失望，但你的搭档反而很激动。现在！这位姑娘，你会说——
E: Very good! Now, though you're disappointed, your screen partner is conversely very enthusiastic. Now, young lady! You will say...

C: 希望这样的考验不会持续太久……
E: I hope these tests won't take too long...

C: 最高分通过！
E: You pass with full marks!

C: 听好了，哈努兄弟。我知道你需要一把合适的武器，我也知道它就在楼上……
E: Listen closely, Hanu. I'm aware you're in need of a suitable weapon, and I also know there's one just upstairs...

C: 匹诺康尼有危险，能让一让吗？
E: Penacony's in danger. Can you get out of the way?

C: 滴答，这时候就要轮到我出场了！
E: Tick-tock, it's time for me to make an appearance!

C: 我们回来了！只要有这些，你一定能够打开心结，滴答！
E: We're back! As long as you have these, you'll be able to find closure, tick-tock!

C: 你是流光忆庭的信使？
E: Are you a Messenger from the Garden of Recollection?

C: 给我来一句。
E: I'd like some motivation.

C: 敢当着我的面扮猪吃老虎是吧。你，去把附近最好的机甲给我调过来！
E: She thinks she can fool me by flying under the radar? You there! Get me the most powerful mech we've got!

C: 我也有这样的信心。
E: Yeah, I'm pretty confident too.

C: 堂堂正正，用剑术一决胜负。
E: Defeat him fair and square with your sword.

C: 就拜托你了，尾巴大爷！
E: I'll leave it to you then, Mr. Tail!

C: 你其实可以将这句话换成「三月七的定力远超常人」的。
E: You can rephrase that to "March 7th's willpower far surpasses ordinary people."

C: 通常来说，我讲出「富含哲理的话」，就应该代表着我的剑术造诣又提升了吧？
E: For me to be waxing philosophical pearls of wisdom, that should mean I've attained new heights with my swordplay, am I right?

C: 之后，斯科特信守承诺，教三月七学习驾驶机甲。
E: And true to his word, Skott teaches March 7th how to pilot a mech.

C: 爸，大周末的喊什么喊？我正睡懒觉呢！
E: What's with all the yelling on a weekend, Dad? I was sleeping!

C: 常在河边走，哪有不湿鞋，哈哈哈。我只有一个问题，长官，谁出卖了我？
E: Hahaha, I knew this day would eventually come. I only have one question, Captain: Who sold me out?

C: 笑死，我怎么一点都不意外呢。
E: Haha, come on! Why am I not surprised at all?

C: 那我能不能先喝一半，剩下一半？万一被斯科特打败了，拿来补身体……
E: Can I drink half now and save the other half for later? Just in case Skott beats me, I can use it to recover...

C: 只是怕疼，妾身倒是有办法……
E: If it's just pain you're afraid of, I might have a solution...

C: 唉，诸位的医道理论仍然不尽完善啊。战斗能力提升是个相对概念，其实只要敌弱我强就行，请诸位将思路打开。
E: Well, it seems you're struggling to think outside the box. Sometimes, weakening your opponent is just as effective as improving your own combat skills. It's all about innovation.

C: 我…我肚子也疼，难道那碗药膳真的有问题？
E: M—Mine hurts too! Could it be that... something was wrong with that soup?

C: 萨姆从匹诺康尼回来以后天天哼这破歌，都给我洗脑了。
E: Sam has been humming that blasted song every day since coming back from Penacony, it's all I can hear.

C: 在你们正式开始比斗之前，我必须要跟你聊几句。
E: Before you start the fight, I have a few words for you.

C: 别大惊小怪的，好像我是到处入侵的病毒。现在是我的私人时间，没有「剧本」也没有任务。我建议你就当没见过我。
E: Don't be so paranoid. I'm not an infectious virus. It's our downtime now, I'm not on any "script" or mission. I suggest you pretend to not have seen me.

C: 能控制主舰的星灵生物到底是什么大小规模，你知道吗？肯定不是。
E: Do you know how huge the Astral Spirit must be to control a mother ship? A heliobus is out of the question.

C: 好了，感谢你听我唠叨了那么多。{NICKNAME}，如果你有空了，记得来找我啊。
E: Alright, thank you for listening to my rambling. {NICKNAME}, if you have spare time, remember to come and see me.

C: 这个友谊魔法…该怎么用？
E: So, how are we supposed to use this... Magic of Friendship?

C: 我叫小桶宝力，不是桶宝，你少说两个字，四月八姑娘！
E: My name is Litter Pony, not Pody! You missed out half of my name, Miss April 8th!

C: 嗯，回休息室准备比赛吧！
E: All right. Back to the lounge to prep for the match!

C: 喔！虎克知道！一定是公司的坏蛋故意穿得像大守护者，让你不敢对她动手！
E: Ooh! I know! It's gotta be some IPC baddie dressed up as the Supreme Guardian so you would hesitate to attack Topaz!

C: 我去叫她回来吧。
E: I'll go call her back over.

C: 没错。虽然您没有邀请函，但同样可以参加演武仪典，也有机会赢得胜利和荣誉。
E: That's right. Although you didn't receive an invitation, you can still participate in the Wardance. You'll definitely have a chance to win and gain honor.

C: 对啊…不对！公司也没对贝洛伯格做什么坏事啊！
E: Yeah... Wait, no! The IPC didn't do anything bad to Belobog!

C: （我挥拳的样子，美吗？唔…自己哪能看得到自己挥拳的样子啊。）
E: (Do I look impressive when I punch? Hmm... it's not like I can see myself in action.)

C: 我以为自己会很紧张，但我现在一点都不紧张！也不是不紧张…该怎么形容呢？冷静到异乎寻常！
E: I thought I'd be really nervous, but I don't have the jitters at all! To say I'm not nervous at all isn't accurate... How should I put it? I'm unusually calm!

C: （这肯定是一场精彩的较量。对手的铁臂会用什么招式呢？）
E: (This will surely be a great match. What moves does he have up his sleeve?)

C: 不，你没有失败。
E: No, you aren't defeated.

C: 四百年前。
E: <unbreak>400</unbreak> years ago...

C: 事涉天舶司事务，我也被唤来聆讯。不过，以这桩案子的严重程度，别说是我，将军若能抽身，怕是连他也要来亲自过问。
E: This involves the Sky-Faring Commission, hence I have been summoned for the hearing as well. However, considering the severity of this case, even the General may have to come to oversee this personally.

C: 我们并非抛弃了赐福，而是战胜了它，我们从狭隘的争斗中挣脱了出来。
E: We did not abandon the blessing, but triumphed over it. We have risen above the narrow crevices of conflict.

C: 比赛到此为止吧！
E: Halt the duel!

C: 真好呀，卢卡重新振作起来了！
E: Amazing, Luka's pulled himself together!

C: 你说的是虎克吧，那不就是个乳臭未干的小屁孩吗？
E: You mean Hook? You mean that brat who still reeks of mother's milk?

C: 稍作准备。
E: Make some preparations.

C: 这是我在跳蚤市场买回来的，感觉非常适合打造我的个人品牌。
E: I bought this from a flea market, and felt like it was suitable for creating my personal brand.

C: 亲爱的观众朋友们，欢迎回到星天演武仪典叩关赛的擂台！
E: Dear spectators, welcome back to the Luminary Wardance Knockout Match Arena!

C: （表达感动的情绪）
E: (Express gratitude)

C: 所谓「七步以外枪快，七步以内拳快」，若是一开局卢卡选手能快速缩近双方距离，然后贴脸出拳，请问波提欧选手又该如何应对？
E: As the saying goes: The gun is faster outside of seven strides, and the fist is quicker within seven. If Luka could rapidly close the distance once the match started, then strike a punch at point-blank range, how would Boothill respond to that?

C: 我打波提欧？真的假的！
E: Me? Fight Boothill? You've gotta be kidding!

C: 前排左手边第二位。
E: Front row, second from the left.

C: 每个人都会想要放弃的时候，有这样的想法是人之常情。但真正的英雄从来都是那些能正视自身弱小的人——毫无疑问，卢卡就是这样的人。
E: Everyone experiences moments when they feel like giving up. Such thoughts are only human. But real heroes are those who confront their own weaknesses — without a doubt, Luka is one of them.

C: 你别张口就来，我和银枝完全不熟。
E: You should think before you open your mouth. I'm completely unfamiliar with Argenti.

C: 下一个问题。听说您是第一次担当教练，没想到已经取得了如此辉煌的战绩。请问您今后有打算担任全职教练吗？
E: Next question. I hear that this is your first time being a coach. It's extraordinary that you've achieved such stellar results. Do you intend to convert into a full-time coach in future?

C: 不行，整个贝城的人都看着我呢，我不能输！
E: No, all of Belobog is watching me! I can't lose!

C: 抱歉，讲到关键词，触发小连招了。
E: Sorry, saying keywords triggers my tagline.

C: 鹤运物流也给形象授权了？
E: The Heron Express also provided their image rights?

C: 很简单吧？你听懂了吗？
E: Easy enough, eh? You got all that?

C: 小绿指着两人刚刚跑过的那条窄巷，用颤抖的声音说……
E: Vernon pointed to that narrow alley they just ran past, and in a quivering tone, he said...

C: 我早晚会战胜银狼！
E: I'll defeat Silver Wolf sooner or later!

C: 难度不够高，开发组什么时候出三阶魔方？
E: It isn't difficult enough. When will the devs release the Phase Three cube?

C: 想学？我教你啊，得先通过我们的观忍试炼才行！
E: Care to learn? I'll teach you, but you'll have to pass our Watcher Ninja trial first!

C: 那么，这就是我等流派的大名了吗？
E: Then, this will be our school's official name?

C: 话虽这么说…乐队要做的事其实很简单啦，在演出开场前完成想演奏的曲子就行。
E: I say that... but what the band has to do is actually pretty simple — to complete their song performance before the show starts proper.

C: 帕姆！我的留声机呢？
E: Pom-Pom! Where's my phonograph?

C: 芮克先生？
E: Mr. Reca?

C: 期待：预祝你们在音乐派对的演出能顺利进行。
E: Anticipation: I wish your music party performance smooth-sailing.

C: 音乐是世界的宝物啾！
E: Music is the world's treasure, tweet!

C: 快点吧，我很忙的。
E: Hurry up. I'm very busy.

C: ——盛会巨星！就是…我听群友说，那些奇特的音乐现象最近又有了新的变化，可以去看看！说不定对你们会有帮助呢。
E: The Festive Superstar! There's... I heard some of my friends say that those special musical phenomena have undergone some recent changes. You can go and check them out! Maybe that might be helpful for you.

C: 对音乐如此认真…或许，我确实能从乱破同学身上学到什么，这么想着，就过来了。
E: She was so serious about music... Perhaps, there really was something I could learn from her. That's the thought that brought me back.

C: 乐队经理并非我本意，在场各位心知又肚明。起初让我当，现在开始慌。自己不愿管，如今想赖账。哪能什么便宜都给你们占！
