E: Being the band manager was never my intention, and everyone here knows it. You insisted I take the role at first, and now you're starting to panic. You didn't want to manage things yourself, and now you want to back out. You can't have it all your way!

C: 诸位音忍！是否愿随在下——誓与校园的邪魔抗争，为此地受压迫的忍徒们取回公正！
E: Sound ninja, hear me! Will you be willing to join hands with me on a crusade to combat the evil that has befallen this school, to seize justice back from the oppressed ninja multitudes?

C: 在下要让那群自称大师的乌合之众明白，我等的信念坚定，绝非旁人能轻易动摇——此乃音律•忍法的终极•狩猎！
E: I will have that rabble who proclaim themselves masters understand the tenacity of our will, that it will not easily waver before pretenders. This is the Ultimate Hunt for Sound Ninjutsu!

C: 我们是校园名人了？
E: Ooh, have we attained celebrity status?

C: 没问题，我会负责。
E: Not a problem. I'll be responsible.

C: 苜蓿草家系已经撤销他的学院代表职位，相信音乐派对的后续活动不会再受到干扰。
E: The Alfalfa Family has already rescinded his rep position in the academy. I trust any subsequent events in the music party will not be disrupted.

C: 在下的忍•幻影将始终立于演台之上，以至为响亮的音律向所有来者宣告——
E: My Ninja Mirage will evermore remain on the stage, to proclaim unto all comers with a resounding melodious sound...

C: 让我看看！
E: Let me see!

C: 呜呜呜。这里…已经不需要我了喵。
E: Boohoo. This place... doesn't need me anymore, meow.

C: …生气的「阮•梅」造物。
E: ...Ruan Mei's angry creation.

C: 但你们的乐队很成功。
E: But your band is really successful.

C: …没看错吧，这、这是垃圾桶组合？好有意思诶。
E: ...Are my eyes deceiving me? Th—This is a trashcan group? How curious.

C: 发出一声不屑的*哼*。
E: Let out a disdainful *hmph.*

C: <s>「AK-A-3」</s>乱破
E: <s>"AK-A-3"</s> Rappa

C: 长话短说，我老桑博耐不住寂寞，这不前阵子去了趟匹诺康尼，想起来件事……
E: Long story short, I was feeling really lonely, so I made a trip to Penacony not long ago. And then I remembered something...

C: 来吧。
E: Bring it on.

C: 来得正好——希望你还没听腻。咱们今天要鼓捣点玩具，材料是…<color=#dbc291ff>冰之芯</color>和<color=#dbc291ff>固态净水</color>。开始吗？
E: You came at the right time. I was hoping you'd be back for more stories. We're cooking up some toys today, and the materials are... <color=#dbc291ff>Cores of Ice</color> and <color=#dbc291ff>Solid Water</color>. Shall we begin?

C: 嘿，又等来您嘞。老桑博今天打算整点高级货，只需一点<color=#dbc291ff>陨铁</color>和<color=#dbc291ff>金属</color>，开始吗？
E: Heh, I've been waiting for you. I'm getting ready to hustle some premium goods this time. I just need some <color=#dbc291ff>Meteoric Alloy</color> and <color=#dbc291ff>Metal</color>. Shall we begin?

C: 我软磨硬泡了好久，姬子姐姐才答应抽空当我的模特。可刚换新镜头，我还没适应用法，拍出的照片都有些奇怪……
E: I had to grovel and beg for so long before Himeko finally agreed to take some time off to be my model. But I just changed my lens, and I haven't gotten used to it yet — the photos came out all weird...

C: 唔，三月七乘客， 帕姆觉得你需要慎重考虑该给姬子哪一份照片……
E: Err, March 7th, Pom-Pom thinks you should consider very carefully which photo you wish to give to Himeko...

C: 抱歉，列车长，昨晚做了个噩梦，不太睡得着。
E: My apologies, conductor. I had a nightmare, and was hard-pressed to return to slumber.

C: 今天，将由我亲自下厨，为各位乘客烹饪一席充满创意的午餐。你们准备好了吗？
E: I'll be the chef for today to prepare a sumptuous lunch for all passengers. Are you all ready?

C: 呃，没办法了…姬子小姐，需要我来打下手吗？
E: Err, guess there's no dodging this one... Do you need me to help you prep, Himeko?

C: 糟了，好像买错了。
E: Uh-oh, I think we bought the wrong one.

C: 收养为宠物。
E: Keep them as pets.

C: 「呆呆狐」！
E: The Ditzy Fox!

C: 人家根本不肯卖给我们。以前不是有公司专员来推销过吗？
E: They won't even sell to us. Didn't some IPC specialist come by to promote it before?

C: 叫你家导演来。
E: Get your director over here.

C: 呃…睡蕉小猴可不会说好，只会说「蕉」。
E: Err... The Slumbernana Monkey can't talk, and it can only say "nana."

C: 发出一声赞叹的*哼*。
E: Hmphs in approval.

C: 你们从集装箱上救下藿藿，回到了地面。
E: You all rescue Huohuo from the top of the container and return to the surface.

C: 呼哧——呼哧——演武仪典之后，好久没这么劳累过了。
E: Huff... Huff... I haven't been so tired out since the Wardance.

C: 请允许我宣布获奖者的名字：来自星穹列车的无名客，三月七 / 赵相机小姐！
E: Allow me to declare the name of our winner: The Nameless from the Astral Express, Miss March 7th / Say~Cheese~!

C: 真正优秀的拍摄者致力于投身于作品中，而所有照片，都不过是拍下了自己。
E: A truly exceptional photographer immerses themselves fully in a shot — all photos are but a reflection of yourself.

C: 当然，以我的了解，大部分人只会把头埋进沙里，直到情况恶化到无法解决。
E: Of course, my understanding tells me that many will only bury their heads in sand, till the matter spirals into an insurmountable state.

C: 为什么会追到这里？他们是疯了吗？
E: Why have they pursued us here? Have they gone mad?

C: 嗷呜！我听说过你，好早以前就想和你认识了！蹭蹭~蹭蹭~
E: Awoo! I've heard of you, and I've always wanted to get to know you! *nuzzle*

C: 要是你们在对抗那个黑潮的时候，能这么厉害的话，城邦肯定就有救了吧？
E: If you're just as strong when the black tide comes, the city will surely be saved, no?

C: 喂，你们当着我的面挖我的墙脚，想拆队是吧，这就是黄金裔的手段吗？
E: Hey, poaching my property in my presence, you trying to cause trouble for me? Is this how a Chrysos Heir does things?

C: 你们这剥削有点厉害…
E: You lot sure know how to exploit free labor...

C: 往后，将由它来接替领队的职责，相信不会让您失望。那么，祝您的事业顺利。
E: In the future, it will bear the responsibility of leading the squad. I trust you won't be disappointed. Then, I wish you a successful career.

C: 是呀，这里距离天空很近。看看云，吹吹风，让思绪在阳光中飘散，心情会舒畅很多。
E: Yes, this place is very close to the sky. Gazing at clouds, basking in the wind, letting your thoughts drift through the sunlight — your mood will turn out much better.

C: 啊，怪不得我先前觉得什么地方不对。这位先生没有接受过{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的祝福，却表现得像是能和小奇美拉交流似的。原来他和你是同伴呀。
E: Ah, that's why I felt something was off before. This gentleman seemed to be able to communicate with the little chimeras without having {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}'s blessings. Turns out that he's your companion.

C: 我…输了。
E: I've... lost.

C: 自由——！独立——！
E: Freedooom! Independeeeeence!

C: 你，你这，嘶——嘶，念在你尚有可教化的余地，姑且原谅你的愚钝。
E: Y—You! Hiss... I shall graciously overlook your foolishness, considering there is yet room for your education.

C: …你！你刚才的气势呢？{NICKNAME}，这种只会说叠词的小海豹最有心机了……
E: ...You! Where did that confidence go? {NICKNAME}, baby seals who talk all cutesy are always full of tricks...

C: 哎呀…走吧走吧，吃饭吃饭。
E: Oh, did I now? Come on, let's go, it's chow time.

C: 抱歉…这个游戏，我有必胜法。
E: Sorry, it's just that I've got this game all figured out.

C: 到了决赛阶段，我有一问，{NICKNAME}选手，你是为了什么而战？
E: Now that we're in the finals, {NICKNAME}, tell us, what are you fighting for?

C: {NICKNAME}，请让泡泡和你一起迎战赛飞儿吧！
E: {NICKNAME}, have Bubbles join you and take on Ciphy!

C: 三弟，我、我不敢看比赛的结果，告诉我，谁赢了？
E: Brother, I... I can't bear to watch the result. Tell me, who won?

C: 翁法罗斯的危机从来不止于一种。
E: The crisis of Amphoreus is never just one thing.

C: 好搭档，喂——别走神了。
E: Hey partner. Are you still here?

C: 调查的事就拜托你们了。
E: I'll leave the investigation to you.

C: 诶？！什、什么情况？我刚才…是在这里吗？
E: Wh—What!? What's going on? Was I here just now?

C: 只是，在和缇宁大人交手后，我有了新的感触……
E: It's only that... after having faced off against Lady Trinnon, I had some new insights...

C: 当然！连入银轨的世界谁会没听过星穹列车？谁又会不知道无名客呢？
E: Absolutely! Every world connected to the silver rail knows about the Astral Express! And everyone knows about the Nameless!

C: 当然！毕竟很多时候，游戏的DEMO版本也是种情怀的代表。
E: Of course! After all, the demo version of a game often holds a special place in the heart.

C: 这个嘛，毕竟游戏的体量摆在那里…我个人对这个项目的定位是「贵精不贵多」——
E: Well, given the scope of the game... Personally, I've always considered this project to be "quality over quantity."

C: 走走走！
E: Go, go, go!

C: 折纸鸟…小啾啾……
E: Origami bird... Hey, little birdie...

C: 幽灵小鸟阁下，这就是你的不对了。波提欧兄弟已经通过公平的对决赢下了胜利…愿赌服输，能够坦率接受自己的失败，也是一种「纯美」。
E: Now that's not fair, Ghost Bird. Boothill beat you fair and square... being a good sport about losing is part of "the Beauty," you know.

C: 谢谢你，潮流•忍徒。
E: Thanks for the insight, Trendy Ninja.

C: …这只「幽灵小鸟」的诅咒有些特殊，已经对现实中游侠的躯体产生了影响。
E: This Ghost Bird's curse is different. It's already affecting the Ranger's real body outside the Dreamscape.

C: 求饶也没用，你问问他们答不答应！
E: Begging won't help. Ask them if they're okay with it!

C: 先让我打两把游戏吧{F#姐妹}{M#兄弟}，有什么话待会再说！
E: Let me squeeze in a couple of rounds first, {F#sister}{M#brother}. We'll talk later!

C: 放心吧，本大爷出马，手到擒来。
E: Relax! With me around, it's a cakewalk.

C: 打不过怎么不找自己的问题…
E: Don't you think you're the problem if you can't win?

C: 我打算去「蓝调的时刻」逛逛，你这小孩子就别跟过来啦。
E: I'm planning to check out the Blue Hour. You shouldn't follow me, kid.

C: 舒翁小姐，那饮料的味道太烈了。今天的话，换杯「长眠不醒」吧。
E: Ms. Siobhan, that drink's a bit too strong. Let's go with The Big Sleep today.

C: 怎么办？你压根没想到他会同意你的请求。朋友，你真要摸老奥帝的绒球吗？
E: Wait, he agreed? Uh-oh. You didn't think he'd say yes. Now what? Are you really gonna touch Oti's fluff ball, friend?

C: 哈哈哈哈。我猜，你说的这个势力里，大概率凑不出十个人来。
E: Hahaha. Let me guess. This "cosmic power" you're talking about probably doesn't even have ten members to begin with.

C: （附赠一个冷笑话。）
E: (An eye-rolling joke as a bonus.)

C: 一切准备就绪，可以开张了！
E: All set up and ready to open!

C: 这些是…我这是在做梦吧？
E: What's happening... am I dreaming?

C: 开！
E: Open it!

C: 「你幸福吗」。
E: "Are You Happy?"

C: 按照配方来看，这杯调饮能让饮用者在教育中<color=#dbc291ff>将自己的所知倾囊相授</color>。
E: According to the recipe, this drink enables the drinker to <color=#dbc291ff>share all their knowledge when teaching</color>.

C: 「形而上的入浴剂」。
E: "Metaphysical Bath Soak."

C: 怕了？要不要再试一杯？
E: Getting cold feet? Care for another glass?
Mmm...

C: 那么，比赛进行第三回合…真是胶着啊。真正的{NICKNAME}身手不凡，各自露一手给我们瞧瞧吧。
E: Now for round three... it's a tight match. Time to show off your skills — let's see what {NICKNAME} can really do!

C: 派对总有结束的时候。
E: Every party comes to an end.

C: 呵呵…银狼也问了这个问题。
E: Heh... Silver Wolf asked the same thing.

C: 呼…呼…呼……
E: Zzz... Zzz...

C: 不腻吗？你可以录下来回去听个够。
E: Doesn't that get old? Just record it if you want to hear it so badly.

C: 呵…公司确实拥有遍布寰宇的庞大势力，但我们面对的是一片浩瀚无垠的宇宙市场，总会存在一些隐秘的角落，连资本的无形大手也无法掌控。
E: Hmm... while the IPC does have vast influence across the universe, we're dealing with a boundless cosmic market. There will always be hidden corners that even the invisible hand of capital cannot control.

C: 说实话，我还是不太信任你。
E: To be honest, I still don't really trust you.

C: 但最耀眼的从来不是单颗宝石，能把众多宝石镶嵌成一件独一无二的珠宝，才有资格站在展台的最中央，俯视那些黯淡的失败者。
E: But the most dazzling has never been a single gem. Only those who can set many gems into a unique piece of jewelry deserve to stand at the center of the showcase, gazing down at those who have faded into obscurity.

C: 丑话说在前头，假如你带来的不是<color=#dbc291ff>「古代遗迹」</color>的东西，依旧恕不接待。
E: I won't mince words with you: If you bring me something that isn't from the <color=#dbc291ff>ancient ruins</color>, I won't be interested.

C: 别别别，你没听说底下有怪物吗？
E: No no no, haven't you heard about the monsters down there?

C: 这个古代遗物是干什么的？
E: What is this relic used for?

C: 接生怎么还是兆算玉璃！
E: Remind me again, why does the delivery also involve Abacus Circuitry!?

C: 器皿中的种子突然暴长开来，迅速形成一艘船的骨架。
E: The seed grew explosively, sprouting rapidly into the hull of a ship.

C: 你一定要说这么多谜语吗？
E: Are you done speaking in riddles?

C: 不烈？往里怼酒精啊！
E: Too bland? Just add some alcohol!

C: 放心好了，试错期又没多长，横竖不过十几年，一眨眼的功夫罢了。要真失败了，那就继续卖文玩呗。
E: No worries. It'll only take me a dozen years to try it out and see if this plan works. And if it doesn't, I can always go back to selling fandangles.

C: 嚯，鉴定为——假！请记住，我们「清玩斋」对假货一直保持零容忍的态度！
E: Whew, this one is... fake! Just a friendly reminder that here at Elegance Pagoda, we have a zero-tolerance policy for fakes!

C: 可恶，居然又输了…看来只跟玩家对战是没法变强的，得去刷点游离数据了。
E: Drats, I lost again... I'll never get stronger just battling other people, I need to go farm some roaming data.

C: 「收集，对决，养成，升级」——这就是我们以太战线的宣传口号！
E: "Collect, Battle, Train, and Upgrade" — that's Aetherium Wars motto!

C: 当然合规！这项工程可是得到贝洛伯格建筑行会会长和文化大臣亲自批准的——
E: Of course! This project has been approved personally by the president of the Belobog Architecture Guild and the Minister of Culture.

C: 人没事就好。
E: Glad to hear it.

C: 就决定是你了！
E: Nah, sounds fine to me!

C: 没事，我们一起慢慢想。
E: No problem, take your time.

C: 哈哈，两位的动作很快嘛！欢迎来到<color=#dbc291ff>「残响回廊的决胜乐园」</color>！
E: Haha, you two move fast. Welcome to the <color=#dbc291ff>Corridor of Fading Echoes Victory Zone</color>!

C: 没有的事——让各位新手玩家快速掌握游玩方法也是庆典的一环嘛。
E: It'd be my pleasure! Assisting new players in swiftly understanding the gameplay is just another part of the festival!

C: 我就将这名为<color=#dbc291ff>外宇宙之炎</color>的以太数据赠给两位好了——有了它，你们收集游离数据想必会轻松不少。
E: I will gift you this Aether data — "<color=#dbc291ff>Blaze Out of Space</color>." With this, collecting roaming data should be much easier for the both of you.

C: 希望你干别的也有这个劲头……
E: I wish you'd put the same effort into other things...

C: （看来在点亮附近的所有灯炉之前是没办法前进了……）
E: (It seems we won't be able to proceed until all the nearby lamps are illuminated...)

C: 哈哈哈，我承认了，你拥有真正的摇滚之魂！
E: Haha, I have to admit, you definitely have that rock 'n' roll flair.

C: 总之，如果你们的目标也是<color=#dbc291ff>「冠军首席」</color>的话，恐怕免不了与那位玩家一战。
E: In any case, if your goal is also to become the <color=#dbc291ff>champions</color>, then it's likely you'll run into them sooner or later.

C: 上次就是你们坏了好事！快把那只扑满还给我们！
E: It's the two who ruined our plans! Hand over the Trotter, now!

C: 就是就是，三月七说得对！
E: Yeah, what she said!

C: 这下都知道我欺负老年人了…
E: Now everyone's gonna think I pick on the elderly...

C: 嘿嘿…其实我们也不知道次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神是从哪来的。而且，它可不是普通的以太灵——毕竟次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神有自己的性格呢。
E: Hehe... To be honest, we don't actually know where Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord came from either. They're not your average Aether Spirit. Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord has their own personality!

C: 嗐，没事，师傅不必道歉。我们一定会想办法弄清次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神的真相的！
E: No need to apologize, Master Gongshu! I'm sure we'll figure out the truth behind Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord sooner or later!

C: 他想让我们做好对决准备。
E: He just wants us to be well-prepared for upcoming battles.

C: 一定能找到你们！星穹列车的小鬼头！
E: It's those little twerps from the Express!

C: 哼哼！哼哼？
E: Oink! Oink?

C: 可那位星核猎手姑娘说过，他其实是假面愚者吧？感觉这倒确实是他会做的事……
E: Really? The Stellaron Hunter girl did say he was a Masked Fool... and it seems like a stunt they'd pull...

C: 欸，那不是乔瓦尼先生吗？怎么又是他？
E: Mr. Giovanni... Again? What's he up to this time?

C: …等等等等，你就不惊讶一下嘛？！
E: Wait, wait, wait — you're not even a little bit surprised by this?

C: 哼！哼哼——哼！
E: Oink! Oink! Oink!

C: 要点燃的目标灯炉又在哪里呢？
E: There must be another lamp hiding around here somewhere...

C: 挑战我？可以，不过我玩得并不算好，要记得手下留情啊。
E: Challenge me? Alright, but I'm not very good, go easy on me, okay?

C: 哼——哼？哼哼？
E: Oink? Oink, oink?

C: 我说你，很识时务嘛，我欣赏你。
E: Sounds like you got me all figured out again.

C: 但，就让我们暂时忘记那些形而上的冗长讨论吧！眼下的要务，应当是尽情地享受这场庆典……
E: Let's set aside those ponderings for the moment. Our priority ought to be enjoying this delightful festival...

C: <size=36>开拓者！开拓者！开拓者！</size>
E: <size=36>Trailblazers! Trailblazers! Trailblazers!</size>

C: 虽然你们又一次打败了虎克，但我还是这次庆典中第一个获得冠军的人哦——你们可不要太得意忘形啦！
E: Hmph, you beat Hook again, but I won the tournament last time! So, don't get too ahead of yourselves!

C: 哼哼，哼～
E: Oink, oink~

C: 小桂子，你要是再讽刺我…我、我就再也不配合你表演胸口碎大石了！
E: Cut it out — if you keep teasing me, I—I... I'm not gonna perform my boulder-smashing trick for you anymore!

C: 网站上一直有人在分享自己的灵异经历，我之前也常去那上面看「见鬼实录」来锻炼胆量……
E: I used to go there to read first-hand accounts of ghost sightings whenever I needed to build up my courage.

C: 懂的懂的，咱们这不也是被差来干苦差事吗？
E: I can relate. We're no stranger to grunt work ourselves.

C: 我明白了，不宜对外宣布「龙女被岁阳附体」，所以得隐去我的名字，另编一个夸张的标题？
E: Oh, I get it... We can't just tell the public that the Dragon Lady was possessed by a heliobus, right? So... we won't mention my name right? And we'll make up a headline?

C: 等大伙休息得差不多了，就去看看这些线索吧。搞不好背后就有岁阳在作乱。
E: When everyone's rested and ready, let's go through the leads. Time to find another heliobus.

C: 姐姐在之前的战斗中，损伤甚重。
E: She sustained heavy injuries in the previous incident.

C: 我已按约为你们提供了线索，怎么还是空手而归？
E: I provided you with information as promised — why am I still empty-handed?

C: 我们与岁阳的处境并无不同，从拥有灵智的那一刻起，受欲念和本性驱使，注定要被束缚在自己的命途上，步向自己的结局。
E: Our situation is no different from that of the heliobi. From the moment we gain sentience, we are driven by desire and instinct, bound to our destiny, moving unceasingly towards our own demise.

C: 对吧对吧，真的吓人。
E: You can say that again...

C: 哇，这家伙果然自投罗网了。
E: Phew, sure enough, they walked right into our trap.

C: 我们解出来了！
E: We did it!

C: 成了。
E: All right, we're ready.

C: 这让我想起以前看恐怖幻戏练胆时，尾巴总喜欢在最紧要的地方突然冒出来吓唬我。
E: It reminds me of when I used to watch horror immersia to train my courage... whenever there was a suspenseful moment, Tail would jump up and scare me.

C: 我明白了，也请判官大人手下留情。
E: Understood... Please, take mercy on him.

C: 判官大人，他…没事吧？
E: Judge Huohuo, is he... alright?

C: 我来照顾他，你们快追！
E: I'll take care of the Cloud Knight. You go after Yanqing!

C: 无论是饮月龙尊，还是那名星核猎手，抑或是那名传你剑招的女子，你的成就将远超彼等，无可限量。
E: Whether it be Imbibitor Lunae, the Stellaron Hunters, or that woman, your accomplishments will exceed them. You will be matchless, without limits.

C: 他不会动手的。
E: He won't do it.

C: 眼下，是你突破自我，击碎所有枷锁的时刻。向老师——向试图困住你的将军…拔剑！
E: Now is the time to break all your chains. Draw your sword on your master — to the general who is trying to imprison you... draw your sword!

C: 既然你向我发起挑战，我自当应战。我要用你的形象和招式，来为你上这最后一课！
E: ...and now you wish to throw down the gauntlet. Very well. In your own image and with your own techniques, I will teach you one final lesson!

C: 什…什么？
E: Wh—What?

C: 看来，景元将军一直想拖延的「终盘」要提前了。素裳，去神策府把将军请来。
E: It looks like the "endgame" that General Jing Yuan has been trying to avoid is fast approaching. Sushang, please head to the Seat of Divine Foresight and fetch the general.

C: 其实还挺难的。有的信息一眼假，但有的信息嘛…仅凭网上的只言片语恐怕很难分辨。
E: We have our work cut out for us, that's for sure. Sometimes a lead is obviously fake, but other times... it's hard to tell from just a few words on the Internet.

C: 你到底是不是判官啊！这是岁阳在扰乱你的感受！给我支棱起来！别顺着岁阳的想法……
E: Are you a judge or not!? This heliobus is distorting your perceptions! Get a grip! Resist them!

C: 岁阳这种东西嘛，往往都是很执拗的，没办法用人类的思维方式去衡量。
E: Heliobi are stubborn creatures, we can't use human logic to judge their intentions.

C: 野蛮！这是头脑的对决，用剑像话吗！
E: You barbarian! This is a battle of minds, you think using a sword is fair?

C: 益智游戏彦卿不擅长，但要打架我可就不困了…来吧，棋鬼老师，请容彦卿向您讨教一二。
E: I am no good in these games of wit, but if you want to fight, that suits me perfectly... Come, Chess Ghost, allow me to teach you a thing or two!

C: 你向寒鸦解释了文远的事情。
E: You explain to Hanya about Wenyuan and his situation.

C: 听说你要辞职了？
E: I heard you were quitting?

C: 没问题，咱们走！
E: Okay, let's go!

C: 青雀，听说你打算辞职了？
E: Qingque, I hear you're thinking of quitting?

C: 你难道不知道青总她老人家一手创立了罗浮帝玉集团，让帝垣琼玉成为风靡银河的游戏。人家才是这儿至高无上的话事人，日理万机，哪能让你说见就见？
E: Surely you are aware that President Qing single-handedly founded the Luofu Dynasty Corp and spread the name of "Celestial Jade" all across the galaxy? She is the highest authority around here and has a million things to deal with. You think you can just ask to see her like that?

C: 如何？
E: Well?

C: 藿藿就去做你想做的事吧。我和{NICKNAME}、小桂子去一探凶宅！
E: You go and do what you need, Huohuo. Little Gui, {NICKNAME}, and I will go to the haunted house!

C: 你真是想得太顺利了，我有些担心了…对了，你们不觉得那块广告板非常突兀吗？
E: You make it all sound so easy! I'm a little concerned... Come to think of it, don't you think that advertisement board over there is a little out of place?

C: 咕咕叫的快递箱。箱子放在够不着的地方，也许能用<color=#dbc291ff>发出清脆声响的东西</color>将它吸引过来？
E: A courier package that is making a growling sound. The package is out of reach. Maybe you can use <color=#dbc291ff>something that makes a ringing sound</color> to lure it closer?

C: 注意措辞，别穿帮了！
E: Watch your phrasing! And don't blow your cover!

C: 这是没有事的意思吗？
E: Does this mean I'm fine?

C: 也许吧，我也不知道。总之，现在先发个帖子，让那里的人安心吧。
E: Perhaps. I don't know, too. Anyway, let's publish a post to put the people there at ease.

C: 虽然没找到跟尾巴有关的线索，不过还是谢谢你了，{NICKNAME}。
E: Even though we did not find any clues about Tail, I'm still grateful to you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 当然，这只是我无端的猜测，你们还是按计划继续调查为好。
E: Of course, that's just my unfounded speculation. You should continue your investigation.

C: 我从来没想过要吸干人类什么的，我只是…被她身上的那股气息吸引，忍不住就去接近了。
E: I've never thought of draining a human. I was just... attracted by her vibe. I couldn't help but get closer to her.

C: 人并不是只有那些负面情绪的。人，很复杂。我有时候也会丧气，也会厌烦，也会想要狠狠敲打某些坏东西。
E: Humans do not only have these negative emotions. Humans are, in fact, very complicated. Sometimes, I feel depressed or frustrated, too. And I'll want to smash and destroy the things around me.

C: 你那边的问完了是吧，来来来，我这里还有一些提问。是我特意为你收集的——
E: Have you finished with the questions over there? C'mon c'mon c'mon! I've got some questions with me here that I've collected up just for you...

C: 她觉得这样的我不仅不算人设崩塌，甚至还更酷了，说什么显得很「专业」。
E: She thought that when I was like this, it didn't ruin my reputation but actually made me seem even cooler — that I looked more "professional."

C: …其实我不是小桂子。
E: ...Actually, I'm not Little Gui.

C: 请开启休眠舱，正面朝上平躺，保持心境平和。
E: Please open up the cryosleep pod and lie down face up. Maintain a calm mood.

C: 在正式开启培育工作前，请容许我先为你讲解相关内容。
E: Before we begin with the nurturing, please allow me to explain the process.

C: 我知道你在空间站手眼通天，想必能联系上阮•梅女士。
E: You know all the tricks aboard the space station, so I know you must have a way of reaching Miss Ruan Mei.

C: 请讲吧。
E: Go on.

C: 请讲吧。
E: Go on.

C: 哼，料你也说不出个所以然来，随便讲讲吧，权当是给我助兴了。
E: I have no expectations of you providing anything insightful, but anyway, feel free to express whatever thoughts you may have.

C: 我是「惊梦酒吧」的主人，那些饮品都是我准备的。所以…你说呢？
E: I'm the owner of Dreamjolt Hostelry, and I prepared all those drinks. I'm sure you understand now, right?

C: 将饮品递给铁皮人
E: Serve the drink to the Tin Man

C: 「亲身去体验吧。我做了点调整。在这个空间中，你会以我的模样出现。」
E: "Go experience it for yourself. I've made a few adjustments, and you'll appear in my form in this space."

C: （为什么指着这边…它看得到我？）
E: (Why is she pointing at me...? Wait, can she see me?)

C: 解决起来很快的！很快的……
E: It'll be quick! I promise...

C: 你口袋里插着的那个就是邀请函？给我看看…嗯，落款是「鸢尾花家系家主，梅芙恩」。
E: Oh, is that the invitation in your pocket? Let me check it... I see. It's signed by Maeven, head of the Iris Family.

C: 你抵达了最终的答案。
E: You've found the ultimate answer.

C: 确实啊，虽然打算开家酒吧，但现在看来，缺的东西还有点多。正经的高档酒吧，空空荡荡的怎么能行！我去想想办法。
E: That's right. Although I want to open a lounge, I'm still lacking a fair few things now that I look at it. How can a proper upscale lounge be empty? I'll have to see what I can do.

C: 汪！这些题目，我完全算不出来哇！
E: Woof! These questions are just too hard!

C: 唉，这个名字不适合我。你们看，我既不忧郁，也不怎么会写诗。
E: *sigh* That name doesn't really fit me. I mean, I'm not melancholic, and I'm not poetic at all.

C: …明星？呵，都好久没听到这个词了。你喜欢舞台吗？
E: ...Superstar? Heh, it's been a while since I heard that word. Did you enjoy being on stage?

C: 破地方配上糟透了的调饮师，还有群傻乎乎的怪物。哈，躲在这玩过家家呢。
E: A rundown place with an awful drinksmith and dumb monsters. Ha, are you all hiding here playing house?

C: 你是要和舒翁约会吗？
E: Are you dating Siobhan?

C: 你自己看看，这种东西能给客人喝吗？！需求讲得明明白白，照着做都不会？
E: Look! How can you serve this to your customers!? I've told you what I need, and you can't even do what you're told!?

C: 记录「铁皮人」的情况。
E: Record information about the Tin Man.

C: 细说。
E: Do go on.

C: 唉，你问得好，繁华皆是表象，其后的狼藉与痛楚从不为世人所知晓。
E: *sigh* A piercing question, indeed. Happiness is but a facade, with the world oblivious to the pain and suffering concealed beneath.

C: 怎么好像有人对我哈气…
E: Did someone just breathe on me...?

C: 给我来杯<color=#dbc291ff>纸月亮</color>。既然打算在这做调饮师，就先让我看看你的水平。
E: Give me a glass of <color=#dbc291ff>Paper Moon</color>. Since you want to be a drinksmith here, let's see what you're made of.

C: 是。
E: Yes.

C: （它倒是挺愿意和我分享内心想法的。）
E: (It was quite willing to share its inner thoughts with me.)

C: 记录「淑女」的情况。
E: Record information about Lady.

C: …冰块？
E: ...Ice cubes?

C: 你明知是骗局还是过来了。
E: You came here even though you knew it was a lie.

C: 我信了。
E: I believe you.

C: 汪汪汪  汪  汪
E: WoofWoofWoof  Woof  Woof

C: 汪
E: Woof

C: 汪  汪
E: Woof  Woof

C: 记性<rhythm>可不<rhythm>比<rhythm>谁差
E: My <rhythm>memory <rhythm>isn't <rhythm>lacking

C: 对，它喜欢说些容易引发误会的话，其实自己害羞得不行，每次都要靠冰块来给内部的电路降温。
E: Yeah, it loves saying things that could cause misunderstandings, but deep down, it's so shy that it has to use ice cubes to cool down its circuits.

C: 不愧是公馆的东西，这报表的内容居然是实时更新的。
E: This stuff updates in real time? As I'd expect from the Pavilion.

C: 这叫修辞！修辞不懂吗！你该不会连折纸大学都没上过吧啾？
E: It's a figure of speech, don't you know!? You didn't even go to Paperfold University, did you?

C: 启动模拟程序
E: Launch simulation program.

C: 此后贝洛伯格作为巨星的家乡，一定能获得更多的发展机遇！
E: Then Belobog, as the hometown of a superstar, would certainly attract more development opportunities!

C: 可惜没有人会相信你。他们只会相信我传达给他们的真相。
E: Sadly, no one will believe you. They will only believe the truth I convey to them.

C: 就是就是！先把道理讲清楚再走！
E: Exactly! Let's sort this out before he leaves!

C: 这…是他要讲道理，又不是我们要讲道理，你跟我们喊什么？
E: It's him who wants to argue, not us. Why are you yelling at us?

C: 嗯？铄金恨公司吗？未必吧～
E: Does Shuojin really hate the IPC? I think perhaps not...

C: …这台公司的装甲，就是你们准备找我代言的东西？
E: ...This the IPC armor... is that what you want me to endorse?

C: 斯蒂芬•劳艾德。
E: Stephen Lloyd.

C: 我会信？那可是天才的造物！——螺丝咕姆，我们对「权杖」系统的模拟精度能提升到多少？
E: You think I'd believe that? That is a creation of a genius! Screwllum, how much more can we improve the simulated accuracy of the Scepter?

C: 与以往不同，黑塔并未反驳。
E: Herta does not retort — a departure from her usual self.

C: 我记得，那好像是登上列车后不久的事……
E: I remember that. It was shortly after I boarded the Express...

C: 真不错，是个「开拓」的好苗子。
E: I'm glad we found ourselves a natural at trailblazing.

C: …咳咳…{NICKNAME}乘客，你是否愿意加入星穹列车，成为一名「无名客」？
E: ...Ahem... Then here goes: {NICKNAME}, will you join the Astral Express Crew as a Nameless?

C: 成为谜语人，巴比巴伯巴拉！
E: A Riddler like Babbibalo Bala!

C: 不会要歃血为盟吧？
E: This doesn't involve a blood oath, does it?

C: 用行动来表示感谢吧！今天我们陪你一起，无论如何都要先把卧室装修出来！
E: Hehe, appreciation is better shown with actions. We're getting that bedroom done one way or another!

C: 你想得美！这都下午了帕！
E: Nice try! It's already the afternoon!

C: 你看黑咖啡没有糖分，还能改善消化系统环境，对身体很好的。喝一杯吧～
E: Black coffee has no sugar and can benefit your digestive system. It's good for your health. How about having a cup?

C: 这真是一杯美味的咖啡。
E: This is truly a delicious cup of coffee.

C: 该开始工作啦！
E: It's time to start work!

C: 你居然会喜欢钱？
E: You're actually interested in making money?

C: 好啊。事不宜迟，咱们这就出发吧。
E: Sure, let's set off now.

C: 继续前进吧，希望里面还剩下值得带走的东西。
E: Let's continue onward. Hopefully there will still be items in this place valuable enough for us to bring back.

C: 随着封印解除，通往地宫更深处的路径再次畅通。
E: With the seal dispelled, the path to the deeper part of the hypogeum is open once more.

C: 我再想想。
E: I'm having second thoughts.

C: 我不是在夸奖它啦…但不要心急，或许是它太早从蛋里孵出来的缘故。
E: I wasn't actually complimenting it... but let's not rush things. It probably just hatched too early.

C: 呵，你成功引起了我的兴趣！
E: Heh, now you've piqued my interest!

C: 我、我可没有那么说！
E: I-I never said that!

C: 呜…（我…最担心的事情还是发生了——搞砸了。）
E: *sniff*... (What... I feared most still happened — I messed up.)

C: 再大声点！
E: Even louder!

C: 呜嗡！（嗯！去！听起来更好混。）
E: Grumph! (Mm hmm! Let's go! Sounds way easier to get by.)

C: …多好的孩子啊，你不禁潸然泪下。
E: ...What a wonderful child. Your eyes start to well up.

C: 这个池子的人流量…是不是有点超标了？
E: Isn't this pool getting a bit... overcrowded?

C: 人类荣光永存！
E: Glory to humanity forever!

C: 哎呀，滑了一跤。
E: Oops, I slipped!

C: 呜呜嗡！（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}！）
E: Grumph! ({F#Mama}{M#Papa}!)

C: 紧张吗？
E: Nervous?

C: 您来了，太好了，我们的项目有救了！
E: You're here, what a relief! Our project might just be saved!

C: 列车真是越来越热闹了…
E: The Express is getting livelier than ever...

C: 可靠的伙伴。
E: A reliable partner.

C: 战争就此打响。最终，拉蒂卡兰人消灭了那只巨龙。可当硝烟散尽时，绿草如茵的大地已经化作焦土，再也长不出庄稼。
E: And so the war began. In the end, the Ladiklan people slayed the Giant Dragon. But when the smoke cleared, the once lush green land had turned into scorched earth where no crops would ever grow again.

C: 我们是二元概念的具象，从不轻易示现。但你不同，那条未被你踏足的小径，太过刺眼……
E: We are the embodiment of duality, rarely revealing ourselves. But you're different. That path you haven't taken yet is far too glaring...

C: 是「英雄」！小涟为我们找来的「英雄」，终于到啦！
E: It's really the "hero"! The hero that Reney found for us has finally arrived!

C: 我既然接受邀请，来到妖精的居所，便当亲力亲为，否则不显得我空摆凯撒的架子，推辞重责么？
E: I already accepted the invitation and arrived in the fairies' home, so it's only right that I personally see to things. Otherwise, by avoiding my duties, wouldn't I be merely posing as Imperator?

C: 不过，想要为妖精们提供更丰富的菜品，目前的食材种类恐怕远远不够。
E: However, if we want to offer the fairies a wider variety of dishes, our current range of ingredients is still quite lacking.

C: 好有热情呀，我也来！目标——四星！
E: Such energy. Count me in! Goal — Four stars!

C: 命名这种事，就交给我们的店长决定了。得足够威风，足够有吸引力。
E: Well, let's leave the naming to our manager. It's gotta sound impressive, and appealing too.

C: 第一次参加评审会，有些紧张呢。不知道会收获什么样的评价？
E: It's our first time at a review like this. I'm somewhat nervous... Wonder what kind of score we'll get?

C: 缇宝介意打两份工吗？
E: Tribbie, you mind picking up a second job?

C: 我知道，是主题活动。
E: Ah! You're talking about themed events.

C: 那就决定啦！餐馆的第一个主题活动是「甜蜜蜜节」，负责人则是缇宝、缇安与缇宁。
E: Then it's settled! The restaurant's first themed event will be "Sweetie Festival," and the event leads will be Tribbie, Trianne, and Trinnon.

C: 但*我们*不知道，究竟要做什么呢？
E: But we still aren't sure what needs to be done...

C: 谢谢小灰！摆在那张空桌上对吧，*我们*这就端来！
E: Thanks, Little Gray! Just place them on that empty table, right? We'll go get everything ready right away!

C: 原来如此。为方便评审，能请三位老师分别讲讲自己的想法吗？
E: I see. To help the judges out, could each of you talk about your dish a little?

C: *我们*有新发现！甜蜜蜜节过后，缇安找小妖精们收集了用餐反馈。有条建议值得关注。
E: We found something! After the Sweetie Festival, Trianne gathered feedback from the little fairies, and there was this one comment worth noticing.

C: 你的厨房，先借我几天吧。
E: I'll be borrowing your kitchen for a few days.

C: 今日就决出胜负。即将召开的美食评选，就由那几位评审员来做出判断。
E: Let's settle it today. We'll let those judges decide in the upcoming gourmet contest.

C: 既然将评判权交给旁人，我和他都已做好了告负的准备。
E: Since we entrusted the judgment to others, we're both ready to accept the outcome, whatever it may be.

C: 当然可以。要是你输得太快，反而没意思。
E: Not at all. It'd be rather boring if you were to lose the game too soon.

C: 哎。热衷竞赛没什么问题，但别胡乱使用餐馆的食材呀！
E: *sigh* I'm all for a little friendly competition, but don't go wasting the restaurant's ingredients like that!

C: 而后，出现在你眼前的……
E: And then, what appears before you is...

C: 嘻，但既然都被揭发了，那人家就不客气咯？
E: Hehe, but since I've already been caught red-handed... I guess I'll just help myself!

C: 呵。听起来似乎清闲，每日要面对的却是极为冗杂的数据报表，与无尽的客诉，实在是恼人啊。
E: Sounds idle, doesn't it? In reality, it's all endless stacks of data reports, and a never-ending flood of customer complaints. Utterly annoying.

C: 缇宝，在思考加快上菜速度的方法~
E: Tribbie's thinking of ways to speed up food delivery~

C: 无妨。我会一直在这里等店长迷！
E: No worries. I'll wait right here for you, mem!

E: My attacks are quite effective against enemies whose Weakness is Wind.

C: 那是经受千难百死，\n却不曾留下一道伤痕的脊背。
E: A silhouette of a body that has withstood endless trials and faced death innumerable times,\nbut bore not a single mark.

C: 「你是缇宁？」\n一位少女问。
E: "Are you Trinnon?"\na young girl asks.

C:
选美的比赛如期开展，
佳人们伸展曼妙的腰肢，
试图摘取头顶的果实。

每每将要触及之时，
一阵风却叫奖品倏然消失。
E:
The beauty pageant begins on time,
As the fair ones stretch their supple arms,
Trying to pluck the fruits above their heads.

Yet every time the apples come within reach,
A breeze blows the fruit away without a trace.

C: 兜帽少女在浴场中跷起双足， 指间翻飞着两枚硬币。 「简单说来，我去了四个地方。」 「尽情诓骗…收获满当。」
E: The girl with the hood dangles her feet in the bath, As two coins dance and fly between her fingers. "Basically, I visited four places." "Tricked them to my heart's content... And came back fully rewarded."

C: 她撇了撇嘴，\n「那听上去……」\n「还真是个理想的世界。」
E: She pursed her lips,\n"That does sound like..."\n"Quite the ideal society."

C: 「长夜」的交易很简单——\n<color=#9e5738>「岁月」</color>将抹去<color=#9e5738>「大地」</color>的苦痛，\n使它酣眠于同伴的簇拥；
E: The pact with Evernight is simple —\n<color=#9e5738>Time</color> would erase the pain of <color=#9e5738>Earth,</color>\nAnd cradle it in peaceful slumber among its own.

C: 「别怕，别怕…」\n熟悉的声音响起——
E: "Don't be scared, please don't be afraid..."\nA familiar voice rings out —

C: 但镜中忽现幻景，\n闪烁群星的光辉与家的灯火，\n还有陌生而熟悉的声音——
E: But a fleeting mirage flickers in the mirror,\nThe shining stars and the lights of the home,\nAnd a strange yet familiar voice —

C:
我需要确认，
我们的交易仍在继续，对么？
我为您许诺的未来，
可比神谕中的未来使人满意？
E: I must confirm: Is our deal still going strong?\nIs the future I promised you\nMore satisfying than the future in the prophecy?

C: 「我的麾下英杰似海，」\n「但缺一柄扬威的剑旗。」\n统帅伸手邀奏者同往。
E: "The legions of heroes under my command are as vast as the sea,"\n"Yet lack a formidable sword banner."\nThe commander extended a hand, inviting the musician to join.

C: 许多年后，\n剑士曾演奏的曲调，\n在圣城被后人奏响。
E: Many years later,\nThe song once played by that swordmaster,\nWas played by future generations in the holy city.

C: 直到一日，她那仄暗的水域，\n漂来一尾金鳟的泡泡。
E: Till one day, a golden trout's bubbles\nFloated into her gloomy waters.

C:
直到此世陷入永恒的静默，
所有火光都已熄灭。
深海中相对无言的敌人，
是这场神礼的观众。
E:
All the flames had died out,
Extinguished until this world fell into eternal silence.
And the wordless enemies in the deep sea
Were the audience of this rite, the Theoros.

C:
断锋爵的刃尖切下大地兽肉，
冬霖爵抛来的冰杯泛着霜气。
曳石爵为她斟满蜜酿，
吟风爵展开一卷新的诗篇……
E:
Dux Fragoris sliced the dromas flank with a time-worn edge.
Dux Brumalis cast an icy chalice, steaming with the breath of frost.
Dux Helkolithist brimmed her vessel with honey brew,
While Dux Carminum unfurled a scroll of new verse.

C: 少女将庭院扫净。\n圣城外的永夜地，\n从此也有一处光亮愈人心。
E: The girl makes the courtyard tidy,\nAnd in the evernight lands outside the holy city,\nThere is now a light curing souls' maladies.

C: 「你可知晓，他干的是渎神勾当？」
E: "Do you know what sacrileges he has committed!?"

C: 从此——\n最初的「人」行走大地，
E: Thus—\nthe very first mortals roamed the earth,

C:
有人问起：
师从何人才能如此精进？
他答了无数名字，
包括询问者自己。
E:
Some asked him:
Which teacher caused such improvement?
He answers with countless names,
Including the inquirer's own.

C: 可他的笑容单纯，\n启程至今，\n仍被以<color=#9e5738>「少年」</color>相称。
E: But his smile is pure,\nEver since the start of the journey,\nHe is still called a <color=#9e5738>"youth"</color> in this story.

C: 同僚怀疑他在探索新的渎神之径，\n学徒认为他是在创造新的奇迹。
E: Colleagues suspect him of creating new blasphemies.\nWhile students believe him to be making new miracles of mastery.

C: 「难道汝将吾当作答问机器？」 ——算是咎由自取。 「你应该感谢我， 好问题比好答案更为紧要。」
E: "Do you treat me just as a way to answer questions, a mere machine?" — The Titan got what they asked for. "You should thank me, For good questions are rarer than good answers."

C:
直到舞台在风雨中飘摇，
黑潮染污了舞者的裙摆，

她抹去了她们的面容，
将丝绸改作甲胄。
E:
Till the stage shook in the storm,
And the black tide tainted the dancers' skirts.

She wiped clean their visages,
And instilled armaments instead of silk.

C:
温热的液体，
自她睹见万物的双目中流下。

在那一瞬之间，
她确信自己看到了，
<color=#9e5738>「美」</color>的具象。
E:
Warm liquid flows,
From her eyes that now see all.

In that instance,
she is sure that she saw,
The manifestation of <color=#9e5738>"beauty"</color>.

C: 梦见曾是天真不知世事的贵裔…\n梦见庭中裁衣的无数个夜晚…\n梦见长满葡萄藤的神庙前，席卷而来的风…
E: She dreamed of how she was a naive noble girl, ignorant of the world...\nShe dreamed of the countless nights when she worked, in the courtyards she weaved...\nShe dreamed of being before the vine-covered temple where the wind blew by in a violent stream...

C:
昔日在黄金的浴池中刺穿双目，
因她提前窥见了众人，
过度灼眼的未来。
那未来绝非虚假的许诺可比拟。
E:
In the golden bath in times gone by, she pierced her eyes.
For she saw the
All-too-dazzling future of everyone.
That future was nothing compared to false promises.

It's a bit of an acquired taste, but making it is simple — just press the right kind of red soil into a solid block.\nIt melts in your mouth, and the flavor lingers beautifully.

E: Drag onto the character to select and upgrade 1 piece of advanced equipment that the character is already wearing to privileged equipment.

E: Teleportation Pot: After a creation enters a Teleportation Pot, it will be randomly teleported to another Teleportation Pot

E: Bubble: Creations that touch a Bubble will be trapped inside until they are struck by another creation, or until the Bubble bursts after a period of time

C: 在战斗内，部分角色在<color=#f29e38ff>满足条件</color>时，会<color=#f29e38ff>自动触发</color>的1次额外的攻击，称为<color=#f29e38ff>追加攻击</color>。反击也属于追加攻击的范畴。
E: During combat, some characters will <color=#f29e38ff>automatically trigger</color> an additional attack, known as <color=#f29e38ff>Follow-Up ATK</color>, when certain <color=#f29e38ff>conditions are met</color>. Counters are also considered a type of Follow-Up ATK.

C: 攻击敌人一定次数可破坏敌人的【战甲】。
E: Attacking enemies a certain number of times can destroy their "War Armor."

C: 通过探索、完成任务和世界事件可以收集到各类贴纸
E: You can get stickers by exploring the world, completing missions, and participating in happenings in the world.

C: 有效副属性，指的是对应角色的<color=#f29e38ff>推荐副属性</color>命中情况。包含推荐副属性的强化次数及词条本身。
E: Effective Subsidiary Stats refer to the occurrences of the <color=#f29e38ff>recommended Subsidiary Stats</color> for a character. This includes the number of enhancements and the stats themselves.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>万能合成机</color>能够合成开拓路上必不可少的<color=#f29e38ff>消耗品</color>，并带来各种意想不到的增益效果。
E: The <color=#f29e38ff>Omni-Synthesizer</color> can produce <color=#f29e38ff>Consumables</color> that are essential in your Trailblazing journey and bring all kinds of unexpected buffs.

C: 发现有<color=#f29e38ff>黄色标记</color>的目标——需要<color=#f29e38ff>手动</color>进行拍摄。
E: A target with a <color=#f29e38ff>yellow mark</color> is detected, which needs to be <color=#f29e38ff>manually</color> photographed.

C: 可以推动玩法区域内放置在军械箱上的照雪灯炉，将其他<color=#f29e38ff>接触不到</color>的照雪灯炉点燃，完成挑战目标
E: You can push the Snowshine Lamps and place them atop the armory boxes within the gameplay area to ignite the other lamps that remain <color=#f29e38ff>out of reach</color> and complete the challenge goal

C: 作为美梦小镇的大哥，能屈能伸是一项基本素质。如果有必要，可以躲进箱子里避开石头老板的爪牙。
E: As the boss of Dreamville, it is a basic requirement to adjust yourself to the situation. If needed, you can hide in the box to avoid Boss Stone's lackeys.

C: 有些时候，残留记忆的物件会被黑潮侵蚀，即使被完整回溯，也会在短时间后再次破碎，回到发动能力前的状态。
E: Sometimes, memory-laden objects may be corroded by the black tide. Even if they were rewound, they might become shattered again after a short time, returning to the state before activating the power.

C: 具有<color=#f29e38ff>成长能力</color>的敌人会根据你的行动进行倒计时。在计时结束时将获得强化，提高自己的攻击力。
E: Enemies with <color=#f29e38ff>Growth Abilities</color> will start a countdown based on your actions. When the timer reaches zero, they will be strengthened, increasing their ATK.

C: 「异变机制」：【微笑三消】\n<color=#f29e38ff>三个及以上</color>处于【惊喜频道】的该敌人<color=#f29e38ff>相邻</color>时，触发【微笑三消】机制，立刻被消灭。
E: Mutation Mechanic: Grin Sweep\nWhen <color=#f29e38ff>3 or more</color> of these enemies in the Surprise Channel are <color=#f29e38ff>adjacent</color> to each other, triggers the Grin Sweep effect, immediately defeating them.

C: 在战斗中积累<color=#f29e38ff>「战意值」</color>，可提升<color=#f29e38ff>「战意阶段」</color>。\n进入<color=#f29e38ff>「战意阶段4：力量觉醒」阶段时</color>，可获取强大的关卡增益，显著提升作战效率。
E: Accumulating <color=#f29e38ff>Grit Value</color> during battle can elevate your <color=#f29e38ff>Grit Phase</color>.\nWhen entering <color=#f29e38ff>"Grit Phase 4: Power Awoken"</color>, you can obtain powerful stage buffs and significantly improve your combat effectiveness.

C: 每消除一定数量的<color=#f29e38ff>猕猴桃</color>，则在场上随机触发<color=#f29e38ff>2×2方格范围爆炸</color>。
E: Every time a certain amount of <color=#f29e38ff>Kiwifruits</color> are cleared, randomly triggers <color=#f29e38ff>2×2 square detonation</color> on the board.

C: 魔法师仅能对小桶施放<color=#f29e38ff>战技</color>，使小桶获得3点<color=#f29e38ff>动能点</color>。\n我方角色<color=#f29e38ff>反击</color>时，小桶消耗1个动能点，发动<color=#f29e38ff>追加攻击</color>，并为魔法师恢复能量。
E: The Magician can only use their <color=#f29e38ff>Skill</color> on minicans, which grants 3 <color=#f29e38ff>Kinetic Points</color> to them.\nWhen allies launch <color=#f29e38ff>Counters</color>, minicans consume 1 Kinetic Point to launch <color=#f29e38ff>Follow-Up ATKs</color> and regenerate Energy for the Magician.

C: 我方角色施放<color=#f29e38ff>终结技</color>时，会使小桶获得1个动能点。\n动能点满时召唤额外4个小桶，立即发动<color=#f29e38ff>自爆冲击</color>。
E: When allies use their <color=#f29e38ff>Ultimates</color>, grants 1 Kinetic Point to minicans.\nWhen Kinetic Points are at max, summons 4 additional minicans and immediately launches <color=#f29e38ff>Self-Destructive Impacts</color>.

C: 异相仲裁拥有<color=#f29e38ff>骑士</color>和<color=#f29e38ff>王棋</color>两种关卡。未通过骑士关卡时，王棋会受到护卫，难度<color=#eb4d3dff>大幅提高</color>。
E: Anomaly Arbitration features <color=#f29e38ff>Knight</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>King</color> stages. When the Knight Stages are not cleared, the King will be protected by guards, making it <color=#eb4d3dff>significantly more difficult</color>.

C: 每轮工作结束后会回到编队界面，此时，上轮工作中存活奇美拉的<color=#f29e38ff>属性会得到继承</color>，累倒的奇美拉将无法进入下一轮。
E: After each round of work, you will return to the lineup interface. At this time, the previous round's surviving chimeras' <color=#f29e38ff>stats will be carried forward</color>, and chimeras that collapsed will not be able to enter the next round.

C: 当生命值为0时，选手将视为失败并退场，<color=#f29e38ff>请务必努力存活</color>
E: When a contestant's HP reaches 0, they will be considered as defeated and leave the war. <color=#f29e38ff>Please do your best to survive</color>

C: 若开拓者在结束时的机能评级<color=#f29e38ff>高于NO.5</color>则<color=#f29e38ff>视作通过</color>，否则视作失败
E: If the Trailblazer's performance rating at the end is <color=#f29e38ff>higher than No. 5</color>, it will be <color=#f29e38ff>considered a pass</color>. Otherwise, it will be considered a failure.

C: 当角色等级低于当前均衡等级要求时，会被<color=#f29e38ff>提升至适配当前均衡等级的角色等级</color>。
E: When a character's level is below what is required by the current Equilibrium Level, it will be <color=#f29e38ff>raised to a level that is compatible with the current Equilibrium Level</color>.

C: 在差分宇宙的上一课题中达到特定等级后，本期差分宇宙中提升星阶时，可以获得额外的智瞳。这个效果不会在星阶较高时生效。
E: After reaching a specific level in the previous topic of Divergent Universe, you can obtain extra Cognoculi when you raise your Astronomical Division in this period's Divergent Universe. This effect is disabled when high Astronomical Division is achieved.

C: 我方角色<color=#f29e38ff>受到治疗</color>时，会将回复生命值转化为<color=#f29e38ff>降低生命值</color>。

C: 我方2、3、4号位角色攻击敌人，会使选定目标陷入<color=#f29e38ff>【瞄准】</color>状态，并使1号位角色<color=#f29e38ff>行动提前</color>。
E: When characters at positions 2, 3, or 4 in the team attack an enemy, the enemy enters the <color=#f29e38ff>"Aimed"</color> state, and <color=#f29e38ff>advances the action</color> of the character in position 1.

C: 桂乃芬…哦，你是说小桂子啊！每次打牌输麻了，我就跑去看她演演杂技整整活，心情也能变好一些。只不过那种时候…我兜里也掏不出半镝子赏钱了……
E: Guinaifen... Oh, you mean Little Gui! Every time I lose at celestial jade, I go watch her acrobatics performance to cheer me up. It's just... I never have enough strale to give her a tip...

E: That's a set!

C: 如今茶楼里里外外全靠梦茗一人张罗，世人常道「狐人天生会行商」，哪有那么容易哟。
E: Nowadays Mengming manages everything in and out of the tea house. People say "foxians are born to do business," but things are always easier said than done.

C: 有话好好说呀…
E: Can we talk...?

C: 在下是路经此处的行商，叫我「罗刹」便可。

C: 年纪这么小，却已经是云骑骁卫了？！他该不会有个比我更厉害的娘在背后催着练武吧！
E: He's so young, but a Cloud Knight Lieutenant already!? Could he have a Ma more strict than mine urging him on with swordplay?

C: 这额间之眼是遨游天外所得，博识尊赐下的重宝。它助本座洞察外物变迁，遍历众多可能。不过，依博识尊的金科玉律「知识要以痛苦换得」，法眼确实可称得上一件永恒的刑具……
E: The eye on my forehead is a treasure from beyond the heavens bestowed on me by Nous. With it, I am able to see changes in the external world and explore many possibilities. However, as Nous made clear: "Knowledge comes at the price of suffering." The omniscia is, in some ways, an eternal punishment.

C: 呦，青雀你今儿看着可真喜庆，赢牌了这是？
E: Hey Qingque, you're looking chipper, did the cards fall in your favor?

C: 持明龙尊受秘法铸身，千代如一。在我看来这不是天赐，而是枷锁。他最终还是挣脱了，却不该以那样的方式……
E: To take the throne, the high elder of the Vidyadhara needs to pass a series of trials during which their physical features slowly transform to resemble that of their predecessors. I see that loss of identity as a curse, rather than a gift. He managed to break free eventually, but should have done it in a different way...

C: 三十年前的战争改变了许多人，她身上总是萦绕着一股悲伤的气息。我虽与她多年未见，但气味不会骗人——驭空仍然是那个驭空，尽管她自己都没有注意到。
E: The war thirty years ago changed many people. The scent of sorrow always surrounds her now. Although I have not seen her in many years, smells do not lie — Yukong is still the same Yukong, even if she herself does not realize it.

E: Are you familiar with perfumery? Making perfumes is just like dealing with people — only when the top, middle, and base notes are in perfect harmony can one create a good fragrance.

C: 行于命途的浪潮，如小女子这般的人只是一粒微渺的尘埃，随着那些巨手的拨弄上下沉浮，身不由己。
E: Drifting on the waves of destiny, people like me are just tiny specks of dust, tossed about involuntarily by the hands of fate.

C: 九毫米，永远的经典；加点老式磷火曳光剂的话，口感更像跳跳糖，但动静更大…有句话怎么说的来着？「曳光弹干两边的活儿」——要么把胆小的家伙吓跑，要么把胆大的给钓出来。
E: Nine millimeter — the eternal classic. With a little good old-fashioned phosphorus tracer, you've got yourself some popping candy — with extra pop. What's the sayin' again? "Tracer bullets work both sides of the fence..." meanin' they're enough to scare away the small fry... but still bring in the big fish.

C: 乌玛：匹诺康尼电视台特别栏目「好片指南针」为您报道。知更鸟小姐鼎力推荐，改编自格拉默铁骑助力匹诺康尼对抗虫群历史的大制作《黑焰骑士崛起》，终于正式上映了。 乌玛：现在记者我来到了克劳克影城门口，大家可以看到，观众正三三两两走出，接下来，就让我们来听听他们的点评吧！ 「兴趣使然的观众」 哦，什么覆灭？我不知道啊，不是我干的。我只是个游客，今天碰巧来看电影。 哦噢，你说格拉默铁骑啊。影片开头铁骑打虫潮那一段挺悲壮的。主角，就是那个铁皮人，流落到匹诺康尼之后，在这里发现繁育痕迹，竟然愿意帮助本地人继续对抗虫灾，很感人。哦，不是，我不是本地人。就像我刚才说的，我只是个游客。 「知更鸟的粉丝」 我是冲着知更鸟小姐唱的主题曲来的！上次去参加了知更鸟小姐的路演，她大力推荐这部影片。她说，也许将这段历史拍摄成电影会使它掺杂些许虚构…但我们需要先记住，才能理解，并愿意在未来的某一天，自己抽丝剥茧，寻觅那个真相。 的确，如果没有这部影片，我根本不知道匹诺康尼还有这段历史！ 「专业的点评人」 影片聚焦蝗灾时期误入匹诺康尼的格拉默铁骑AR-214，她直面失熵症带来的痛苦，在帮助阿斯德纳的过程中重新找到存在的意义，也真正拥有了自己的名字。最后一幕她卸去机甲，如真正的少女般走进匹诺康尼的人流时的回首一笑，非常打动人心。 虽然我十分怀疑这是否是史实，但或许这正是制片者的小小私心：也许历史沉重得难以一窥，至少在故事里，给予那位少女一个最温柔的结局…… 「很感性的观众」 呜呜…呜呜呜，她摘下面罩的时候我才发现…她只是一个心地柔软的女孩…面对匹诺康尼对她的误解，她明明能一走了之，可是，却还是选择默默担负引来虫灾的骂名，肩负起拯救匹诺康尼的重任…还好最后真相大白了…呜呜…导演你赔我眼泪…… 「非常严谨的考据党」 这是一部诚意之作。剧组在细节的还原上非常到位，例如，很多人认为是格拉默铁骑AR-214引来虫灾，很多影片乃至史书记载中都有谬误，这部电影却参考详尽的史实考证了虫潮的真正来源。以及，道具的细致程度，简直让人怀疑道具组是否见过真的格拉默机甲…… 一部影片是否饱含敬意、辛劳和心血，观众是能够觉察到的。 乌玛：好的，那么，观众采访就先进行到这里！ 乌玛：作为《黑焰骑士崛起》的监制，芮克先生也委托「副导演」参与了首映仪式。最初知更鸟小姐代表橡木家系提出合作时，你们是否感到意外呢？对于她坚持选取格拉默铁骑这一题材，你们有何看法？在拍摄过程中，又有什么印象深刻的事呢？ 「副导演」 呱呱呱呱，呱呱，呱呱呱呱呱呱，呱。呱呱。 乌玛：感谢「副导演」的精彩发言！
E: Uma: This is Penacony TV Station's special program "Exemplary Films Guide" reporting. Highly recommended by Miss Robin, the blockbuster The Darkflame Knight Rises, adapted from the historical battle where the Glamoth's Iron Cavalry aided Penacony against the Swarm, has finally hit the silver screen. Uma: I'm now standing at the entrance of Clock Studios Theme Park. As you can see, viewers are trickling out in groups. Let's hear what they have to say about the movie! Casual Viewer Oh, what destruction? I don't know. It wasn't me anyway. I'm just a tourist who happened to catch a movie today. Oh, you mean Glamoth's Iron Cavalry? That opening scene with the Iron Cavalry fighting the Swarm was pretty tragic. The protagonist, you know, that robot, discovers traces of the Propagation after ending up in Penacony. Yet, it still decides to help the locals fight against the Swarm Disaster. Really touching. Oh, no, I'm not a local. Like I said, I'm just a tourist. Robin's Fan I came for Miss Robin's theme song! I attended her roadshow last time, and Miss Robin strongly recommended this film. She said, sure, turning this part of history into a film might mix some fiction into it... But we need to remember first, before we understand. And someday in the future, we'll be willing to unravel the truth ourselves. Indeed, if it weren't for this film, I wouldn't have known about this part of Penacony's history at all! Professional Critic The film focuses on AR-214, a Glamoth Iron Cavalry who accidentally entered Penacony during the Swarm Disaster. She confronts the agony brought by Entropy Loss Syndrome, and through helping Asdana, she rediscovers the purpose of her existence and truly gains her own name. That final scene, where she removes her mech and steps into Penacony's crowd as a true girl at last, then turning back with a smile... it was deeply moving. I admit, I strongly doubt whether this is historically accurate. Yet perhaps this is the filmmaker's little indulgence. History itself could be too heavy for us to grasp in full, but at least in this story, they chose to grant that girl the gentlest ending possible... An Emotional Viewer *Sniff*... When she took off her mask, I finally realized... she was just a tender-hearted girl... Facing Penacony's misunderstandings about her, she could have just left. Instead, she silently bore the blame for bringing the Swarm Disaster, while shouldering the responsibility of saving Penacony... Thank goodness the truth finally came to light... *sniff*... Director, you owe me for these tears... Hardcore History Buff This is a work of true dedication. The attention to detail is remarkable. For instance, many believe it was the Glamoth's Iron Cavalry AR-214 who brought the Swarm Disaster. Countless films and even written records repeat this mistake. But this movie carefully drew on historical research to reveal the Swarm's true origin. And the props are so meticulously crafted, you'd almost suspect the prop team had seen actual Glamoth mechs... I must say, viewers can always tell when a film is made with respect, hard work, and sincerity. Uma: Alright then, that's all for our viewers interview! Uma: Now, as the executive producer of The Darkflame Knight Rises, Mr. Reca also invited the "assistant director" to attend the premiere ceremony. So, were you surprised when Miss Robin first proposed a collaboration on behalf of the Oak Family? What are your thoughts on her insistence on choosing the Glamoth's Iron Cavalry as the subject? And were there any unforgettable moments you could share with us during filming? "Assistant Director" Ribbit ribbit... ribbit, ribbit-ribbit-ribbit, ribbit. Ribbit-ribbit. Uma: What a moving speech from our "Assistant Director"! Thank you!

E: Maybe... I've eaten her cooking before~

C: 星核的猎手，命运的奴隶…呵呵，这些都不足以描绘你们之间的牵绊
E: Stellaron Hunters, Destiny's Slave... heh, even these titles fail to capture the bond between you

C: 对我方全体目标造成大量火属性伤害。
E: Deals massive Fire DMG to all targets.

C: 每个阶段，当自身被击倒时，行动延后并进入【休眠】状态。下次行动时施放【不屈酣战】，回复一定生命值并起身。
E: In each phase, when this unit is knocked down, its action is delayed, and it enters the "Repose" state. During its next action, uses "Indomitable Battle," recovers a certain amount of HP, and gets up.

C: 从黎明杀往天帷
E: From Dawn to Skyveil

C: 黑潮降临
E: Black Tide Inrush

C: 你看到虚弱的流萤，这是你不曾记得的景象。
E: You saw the weakened Firefly, a sight you didn't remember ever seeing before.

C: 统治者的回响诉说着：须用「强权」，用石头砸向那有罪的。若恶人不能受辱，如何彰显公义。
E: The ruler's resonance spoke: You must use "force." Cast stones at the guilty. If the wicked cannot suffer disgrace, how shall righteousness be shown?

C: 完成巨剑守护「简单」难度挑战
E: Complete the Greatsword Guardian challenge in Easy mode

C: 完成第3轮定级赛，并至少获得#4点荣誉值
E: Complete the 3rd round of placement match and obtain at least #4 Honor

C: 获得#2个1-2星方程。
E: Obtain #2 Equation(s) of 1- to 2-star rarity.

C: 以珍宝本身为代价。
E: At the cost of the Treasures.

C: 做一艘船去往彼岸。
E: Build a ship to sail to the other shore.

C: 早期对星穹列车展开仿制时，技术研发部一直难以解决引擎的动力问题。博识学会提出用反物质代替「开拓」之力，并以该控制器作为配套部件。设计初衷是，只要用扳手灵活调节正反物质的注入速率，就能把控列车的行进速度——和淋浴间调整冷热水比例的喷头一个道理。但样机测试总是以湮灭性的爆炸告终。毕竟，调节水温从来不是一件容易的事情。
E: During the early attempts to replicate the Astral Express, the Technology Department struggled to solve the engine's power issue. The Intelligentsia Guild proposed using antimatter to replace the power of Trailblaze, with this controller serving as a matching component. The original design concept was simple: just like adjusting the hot and cold water ratio in a shower head, one could control the Express's speed by cleverly adjusting the injection rate of matter and antimatter with a wrench. However, prototype testing always ended in annihilating explosions. After all, getting the water temperature right was never an easy task.

C: 暗海碎饵
E: Darksea Bait Chunks

C: 获得该奇物时，立即获得<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>宇宙碎片。战斗胜利后每有1名满血角色，获得<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>宇宙碎片【该奇物可以通过事件升级】
E: When obtaining this Curio, immediately gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Cosmic Fragments. After winning a battle, gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Cosmic Fragments for each character at full health. This curio can be leveled up through Occurrences.

C: 进入战斗时，若队伍中存在<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>名<color=#f29e38ff>「量子」</color>属性角色，敌方目标陷入的量子纠缠状态伤害提高，且叠加上限提高。
E: When entering combat, if there are <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> <color=#f29e38ff>Quantum</color> character(s) in the team, the Quantum Entanglement state DMG inflicted on enemy targets increases, and the stack limit increases.
● Initial Obtained Equations: #1, #2, #3, and #4

C: 黑潮决斗
E: Black Tide Duel

C: 黑天鹅竟然要离开了，回想起来，她…████奇怪，你什么都回想不起来。
E: Black Swan is actually leaving... Thinking back, she... ████████████████ Strange, you can't remember anything at all.

C: 奇怪，这位少女身上的确存在一丝杂音，可那位自称治安官的男人却毫无察觉。\n直接跟上去的话，自己很容易被其他人认出来，打草惊蛇，先使用「调律」进行监视吧。
E: That's strange... there is a definite trace of static noise around this girl, yet that man who calls himself a security officer is completely oblivious.\nIf I follow her directly, I'll be recognized and blow my cover. I'll use "tuning" to keep an eye on her for now.

C: 黄泉竟是「虚无」的令使…零点任务重于一切，绝不能让她在{NICKNAME}的身边拔刀。
E: So Acheron is an Emanator of the Nihility... The Zero-Point Mission is everything. I can't let her draw her blade anywhere near {NICKNAME}.

C: 在她们看来，梦主并未倒向「秩序」，可其他的命途又完全无法联想到一起。她们将要展示的证据，恐怕远远超出我的认知。
E: In their eyes, Dreammaster hasn't sided with the Order, yet the other Paths can't be connected in any way. The evidence they're about to present will likely far exceed my understanding.

C: 人们都已奔赴最后的战场，与黄泉进行道别，然后，将尽头变作起点。
E: Everyone has rushed to the final battlefield. Bid farewell to Acheron, and then, turn the end into a new beginning.

C: 跟随流萤的指引前进
E: Follow Firefly's guidance and move forward

C: 梳理现状
E: Assess the situation

C: 找到流萤
E: Find Firefly

C: 前往虚无的尽头
E: Head to the edge of Nihility

C: 容我说声抱歉。我原以为，变成你认知中熟悉的人，可以让许多事更顺利。
E: Let me apologize. I thought that becoming someone you are familiar with would make things easier... Or simpler.

C: 我知道，死亡吓不倒无名客。对你而言，甚至可以说是日常。
E: I know death doesn't faze the Nameless. It's practically just another day at the office for you.

C: 果然。但为什么……
E: Just as I thought. But why...

C: 为什么要打断我？
E: Why did you stop me?

C: 在你入梦后，也是她使用「同谐」的力量，帮助你适应美梦。只是，自那场告别后——
E: After you entered the dream, she was using the Harmony's powers to help you adjust to the sweet dream. It's just that... after your farewell...

C: 别担心。她只是利用「同谐」的共鸣对你进行了调律，以便你能更自如地在梦境中掌控自己的身体。
E: Relax. Just did some tuning on you with the resonance of the Harmony to allow you to control your limbs freely in the Dreamscape.

C: 是…她？
E: Is that... her?

C: 这…他们走过了商业中心……
E: Hmm... they passed through the commercial district...

C: 看附近的痕迹，是「死亡」下的手。可它们…竟然真的死去了？
E: From the traces nearby, it was "Death's" doing. But they... did they really die?

C: 我如果也只是一次就好了。
E: If only it was just once for me too.

C: 迅速死去…噢，「失熵症」？
E: Quickly drain her life away... oh, Entropy Loss Syndrome?

C: 「虚无」。在它淹没一切后，我必须成为幸存的最后一人，倾尽所有，力挽狂澜。
E: The Nihility. After it engulfs everything, I must be the last survivor, giving my all to turn the tide.

C: 你…在干什么…我不是你的敌人……
E: What... are you doing... I'm not your enemy...

C: 换句话说，匹诺康尼与「记忆」有关的一切，都是我应当毁灭的目标。但这本就是忆质的世界，没有帮手，我怎么可能做得到？
E: In other words, everything on Penacony related to the Remembrance was my target for destruction. But this was already a world of memoria. How could I possibly accomplish this without any help?

C: 没人知道。在他自称抱恙在身，不再现身后，尽管禁制仍未消去，但连我这位合作者，他也没有再联络过。
E: Nobody knows. After claiming to be ill and withdrawing from public view, even though the constraint remained in place, he never contacted anyone again. Not even me, his collaborator.

C: 直到…按照「剧本」的要求，流萤将你们送往了最后的舞台，自行离去。在此前的美好经历中，她享受了生的喜悦，却又必须…奔赴死亡的恐惧。
E: Until... following the "script," Firefly sent you all to the final stage before departing on her own. In those beautiful moments before that, she experienced the joy of living, yet she still had to... face the terror of death.

C: 但{RUBY_B#约定之地}盛会之星{RUBY_E#}给予我的死亡，已经足够仁慈。
E: But the death granted to me by the {RUBY_B#promised place}Planet of Festivities{RUBY_E#} was merciful enough.

C: 就算我拒绝，你也不会就此停下。请带路吧，但我会一直留心你的。
E: It's not like you'll stop here if I refuse. Lead the way, but I'll be keeping my eye on you.

C: 我知我罪，我罪常在我前——但我绝不悔改。
E: I know my sins. They are ever before me. But I shall never repent.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「任何人都有能力认清世界，然后承担它的重量，这才是{RUBY_B#反抗}牺牲{RUBY_E#}的意义。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Everyone has the power to see the world as it is, and to bear that weight. This is the true meaning of {RUBY_B#resistance}sacrifice{RUBY_E#}."</color>

C: 我不会让你得逞。
E: I won't let you get away with this.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>梦境的真相不止于此，我们必须告知所有愿意醒来的人，才能携手终结长夜。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The truth of the Dreamscape runs deeper. We must notify anyone willing to wake up, so we can end the long night together.</color>

C: 我不会让她死去。
E: I won't let her die.

C: 长久以来，我都是这样认为：灾难发生时，一首歌改变不了任何事，它简直是世界上最没用的东西。
E: I've believed for a long time that songs can't change anything when disasters strike... That music is the most useless thing in this world.

C: {RUBY_B#沉睡的人们}坠落的鸟儿{RUBY_E#}抬头仰望，会发现再度飞翔的可能，仍然存在于这世界上。
E: And when {RUBY_B#the sleeping ones}a fallen bird{RUBY_E#} looks up to the sky, it discovers that the possibility of soaring once again still exists in this world.

C: 流萤，萨姆，一位平凡的少女
E: Firefly, SAM, a regular girl

C: 我不会止步。
E: I won't stop here.

C: 我会证明，它们存在过。
E: I will prove that they existed.

C: 这是艾利欧的决定。
E: That's Elio's decision.

C: 谢谢你，我们一定能够再见的。
E: Thank you. I'm sure we'll meet again.

C: 嘀、答…宾客，你可一定要帮帮我，我的表盘里被塞进了一块可憎的积木！
E: Tick... tock... Oh dear guest, please, you must help me. Some wretched block is stuck inside my dial!

C: 某个夜晚，你坐在雪山脚下的湖岸边，把玩着那份神赐珍宝。月亮被浓云遮蔽，只漏出几丝不太明亮的光。
E: One night, you sit by the lake at the foot of the snowy mountain, toying with the divine treasure. The moon is hidden behind thick clouds, with only a few dim rays of light seeping through.

C: 你振臂一呼，军中好手们云集响应、自愿帮你喂招。一天结束，被你击倒的对手已排成长龙，你的脸上挂满了汗水和笑容。
E: With a rallying cry, skilled warriors from the army gathered to volunteer as your sparring partners. By the end of the day, your defeated opponents formed a long line, and your face was covered in sweat and smiles.

C: 连这个道理都不懂，就呆在桶里好好参悟吧，咕咕！
E: If you can't grasp even this simple truth, you can ponder it well while inside my can of a belly, grooowl!

C: 我方角色陷入【幻身】状态时将被<color=#f29e38ff>【离场】</color>，【幻身】状态下所召唤的单位将代替其进行战斗，并继承这名角色的部分属性。
E: When an ally character enters the "Phantom Illusion" state, they will be <color=#f29e38ff>"Departed"</color>. Units summoned during the "Phantom Illusion" state will fight in their place and inherit some of that character's stats.

C: 哇！小灰触发了<color=#f29e38ff>升级奖励</color>！
E: Wow! Little Gray triggered a <color=#f29e38ff>Level Up Reward</color>!

C: 点这里可以切换自动或手动对战！
E: Click here to toggle between auto and manual battling!

C: 登录时编译着色器
E: Compile shaders on login

C: 烦恼
E: Annoyances

C: 下一次，来点新鲜感如何？
E: How about something new and refreshing next time?

C: 你好奇那锋利的右手么？当凉意划过脖颈，它为生命的主人带来安息——而在葬礼上，我喜欢戴上面纱，用那从不沾染鲜血的另一只手…献上一朵枯萎的花。
E: Are you curious about my sharp right hand? It brings peaceful rest to life when its coldness slithers across a neck. While attending funerals, however, I'll don a veil and offer a withered flower with my other hand... the one that's never been stained with blood.
